Ngakhale akukaneni, Ndidzakutsatani ’Nu.

hymns.title: Kasupe Ali Wodzaza
hymns.lyrics:
Kasupe ali wodzaza,
Ndi mwazi wa Yesu;
Omwe asamba mwa uyu
Ataya zoipa.

Woba wakufa napenya,
Kasupe nakondwa;
Ndi ine enso mwa uyu,
Ndisamba ndiyera.

Mwazi wa Yesu wokondwa,
Ukhala wamphamvu;
Kwa ana onse a Mlungu
Uchita kuombola.

Mmene ndapenya mwazi
wa Mabala Anuwo,
Kukonda kwanu nditama
Kwa kutha kwa moyo.

Ndikhulupirira kuti
Mwakakonza malo
Ndipo ndidzalowa ine
Ku moyo wosatha.

Kumwamba ndikayimbanso
Zamphamvu za Mlungu,
Zopulumutsa onsewa
Omvana ndi Yesu.

hymns.title: Ndiyeretu Mbu
hymns.lyrics:
Ambuye ndifuna nditsukenitu,
Mukhalitse ndine mu mtima’ngamu;
Muthyole zonsezo zodetsa’netu,
Musambitse ine, ndiyeretu mbu!

Ambuye taonani pansi pano,
Kuti m’ndithandize kudzipereka;
Ndileke zangazo zoipsa’netu,
Musambitse ine, ndiyeretu mbu.

Chifukwa cha ichi ndipempheratu,
Ndidikira Inu Ambuyanga ’Nu;
Ndikhulupilira pa mwaziwo pyu,
Musambitse ine ndiyeretu mbu.

Ambuye muona ndidikira’Nu,
Idzani kukonzetsa mtima wanga;
omwe akufuna simuwakana,
Musambitse ine, ndiyeretu mbu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndiyere mbu, E, ndiyere mbu,
Musambitse ine, ndiyeretu mbu.

hymns.title: Imva Makobidi
hymns.chorus:
Ngwingwi! ngwingwi! Ngwingwi! ngwingwi!
Tili kuponya! Tili kupereka, Onse kwa Yesu.

hymns.title: Yesu Andikonda ’Ne
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu andikonda ’ne, Amatero m’bukhumo.
Akafoka mwana ’ke, Amlimbitsa Yesuyo.

Nandifera Yesuyo, Nagonjetsa tchimolo,
Natsegula khomolo, Kuti ndinke kwawoko.

Yesu andikonda ’ne, Nkana ndikudwalatu,
Mmene ndifookanso, Andisamalira ’ne.

Yesu andikonda ’ne, Ndikamkonda Iyeyo,
’Dzanditenga inetu, Ndikakhale nayedi.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu akonda, akonda ine,
Akonda ine, Atero m’bukhumo.

hymns.title: Timapazi Inu, Samalirani
hymns.lyrics:
Ndasamba m’manja mwanga, Mwayeretsedwatu,
Ndi kwapereka iwo, Ku ntchito ya Yesu.

Makutu amvetsere Pa tsiku lonseli,
Ntchito yonse yabwino, Manjawa achite.

Maso anga aone, Ntchito zawo zonse,
Kutitu asachimwe, Chifukwa cha Yesu.
hymns.chorus:
Timapazi inu Samalirani,
Musanditengere, Kuli zoipa.

hymns.title: Chikondi Chitikondwetsa
hymns.lyrics:
Chikondi chikondwetsa, Nichikonza njira;
Chimatithangata ife, Kukonda anzathu.

Dzikoli n’la chisoni, La imfa ndi nthenda,
Tidzachita mbali yathu, Kuthangata ena.

Moyo uno ukatha, Tikadzanka m’mwamba,
Tidzayimba kosaleka, Za kukonda kwake.

hymns.title: Usamalire Moyo Wanga ’We
hymns.lyrics:
Usamalire ’we, Adani akowo,
Ngambiritu mu dzikoli, Angakugwetse ’we.

Limbika nkhondoyo, Masiku onsewo,
Nupempha Mlungu wakoyo, Kukuthangata ’we.

Usaganize ’we, Kusiya nkhondoyi;
Sudzapumula mpakatu, Ambuye abwera.

hymns.title: Akristu Tiyeni
hymns.chorus:
Akristu tiyeni! Nkhondo tigwire,
Yesu Mbuye wathu, Atitsogoza.

hymns.title: Moyo Wanga Dzuka
Ndiri Kudza Kwa Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiri kudza kwa Yesu, Ndasauka ndachimwa;
Zonse zanga ndisiya, Kukapeza moyotu.

Inde Inu ndifuna, Ndinachimwa kwambiri;
Yesu ati, Ndichotsa Zakuipa zakozo.

Yesu zonse ndipatsa, Zili zanu tsopano,
Mtima wanga wonsewu, Muli mwini waketu.

Ndikukhulupirani, Mwazi wanu ndidziwa,
Wayeretsa inenso, Ndapachikwa ndi Khristu.

Yesu adzandidzaza Mtima wanga wonsewu,
Ine ndiri woyera, Yesu wanga nditama.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu ndikhulupira, Munafera inedi,
Mwa umphawi ndipempha, Mundipulumutsetu.

hymns.title: Inenso
hymns.chorus: Inenso, inenso, Mudalitse inenso.

hymns.title: Mundifungatire Ine
hymns.lyrics:
Mundifungatire ine, Mzimu wakuyera ’Nu,
Munditsuke mtima wanga, Inde, Mudze leroli.

Mzimu, mundidzaze ine, Ndisowatu nzeruzo.
Ndisowanso inu, Mbuye, Mundidzaze mtimanga.

Ine ndine wolefuka, Ndikugwadiranitu.
Mzimu Inu mundidzaze Ndi chikondi Chanucho.

Dalitseni ine, Mzimu, Sambitseni mtimanga.
Inu, Msangalatsi wanga, Mudze, inde leroli.
hymns.chorus:
Mudzetu, mudzetu, Mzimu wakuyera mbu.
Munditsuke mtima wanga, Inde, mudze leroli.

hymns.title: Ndifuna Yesuyo
hymns.lyrics:
Ndifuna Yesuyo, Ambuyanga,
M’mtendere ndinkemo, Mwa Iyeyu.

Ndifuna Yesuyo, Movutamu,
Ndipulumukemo Mwa Iyeyu.

Ndifuna Yesuyo, Mokondwa ndi
Mowawa, adzemo Ndi moyodi.

Ndifuna yesuyo, Ndichite ’ne
Zofuna zakezo, Ndidzazebe.

Ndifuna Yesuyo Woyeratu,
Ndikhale wakeyo, Wa Iyeyu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndifuna Inu, Yesu, Nthawiyi ndifuna,
Kwa Yesuyo, Mbuyanga, Ndifunako.

hymns.title: Ndipereka Zonse
hymns.lyrics:
Ndipereka zonse kwa Yesu, Zonse mwa ufulu;
Ndidzamkonda Iye koposa, Tsiku lili lonse.

Ndipereka zonse kwa Yesu, Pa mapazi ake;
Zadziko ndazikana zonse, Nditengeni Yesu.

Ndipereka zonse kwa Yesu, Ndikhale wanutu,
Ndimve Mzimu wanu ndidziwe, Kuti ndinu wanga.

Ndipereka zonse kwa Yesu, Wandipatsa mphamvu.
Ndikondwera chipulumutso! Nditama dzinalo!
hymns.chorus:
Ndiperekatu, zonse kwa Yesu;
Zonse kwanu ndipereka dalitsenitu.

hymns.title: Ndisauka Ndinachimwa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndisauka ndinachimwa, Koma Inu mwandifera,
Ndipo ndamva mundi’tana, Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

Ndisauka ndimasowa, Mphamvu ya kuyera mtima,
Mwazi wanu unditsuka; Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

Ndisauka, sindikhoza Kwiletsa nkhondo mu mtima,
Ndi chisoni, mantha, nkhawa, Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

Ndisauka sindiona, Ndimadwala ndilefuka,
Zonse ndizitaya kwa ’Nu, Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

Inde, Yesu mulandira, Muchiritsa mpulumutsa,
Mau anu ndivomera, Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

Inde, Yesu, mundikonda, Zonse zina ndazitaya,
Tsono kukakhala wanu, Mwana Mlungu ndingobwera.

hymns.title: M’titsitsimutse
hymns.lyrics:
Tiyamika’Nu Mulungu wokonda,
Chifukwa cha Yesu Mwana wanuyo.

Tiyamikira, Mulungu wamphamvu;
Chifukwa cha Mzimu wanu Woyera.

Tiyamikira, Mwana wa Nkhosayo,
Yemwe anafera zoipa zathu.

Tiyamika’Nu, Mlungu wa chisomo,
Munatigula ndi mwazi wanuwo.

M’titsitsimutse, Ndi chikondi chanu,
M’tiyatse ndi moto wa Mzimu wanu.
hymns.chorus:
Haleluya, tidzamtama, Haleluya, Amen;
Haleluya timpembedza, Mulungu wathu.

hymns.title: Khalatu Woyera
Mukhale Ndine
hymns.lyrics:
Mukhale ndine dzuwa lalowa, Wagwa usiku bwenzi lisowa,
Ndilibe wina wondithandiza, Wa mphamvu ndinu, mkhale ndinetu.

Kamoyo kanga katha leroli, Zidzachokanso zinthu za dziko,
Zimasinthika zoonekazo, Simusinthika mkhale ndinetu.

Koma kale mnakhalitsa pano, Mukhale ndine musachokenso,
Simpempha kuti Mbuye mutsotse, Komatu mukhalitse ndinetu.

Ndifuna inu tsiku lonselo, Ndi mphamvu yanu ndidzasungika,
Mukatsogola sindiopai, Msana, usiku, mkhale ndinetu.

Adani sindiopa mulipo, Muletse tsoka ndi chisonichi,
Ikadza imfa ndzalimba mtima, M’imfa ndi moyo mkhale ndinetu.

hymns.title: Dzuwa Lili Kulowa
hymns.lyrics:
Dzuwa lili kulowa, Mlungu atipumitse;
Linda ndi kupemphera mmene nyali zili kuwala m’mwamba.

Ambuye wamoyo’Nu, Ife tasonkhanatu,
Kufuna nkhope Yanu; mutifungatire’fe m’khola Lanu

Pamene mthunzi ugwa, Mumatifungatira;
Mwa chisomo chanutu, Mitima yathu ikwera kwa Inu.

Tikamwalira ife osaona za dziko,
Ambuye wachifundo, mutidzutsenso tsiku lotsiriza.
hymns.chorus:
Woyera Ambuye wa makamu!
Za m’mwamba ndi za dziko zitamanda Inu,
Mlungu Wamkulu.

hymns.title: Mombolo Wanga, Dzuwatu.
hymns.lyrics:
Mombolo wanga, dzuwatu,
La mtima wanga ndinudi,
Palibe mdima ngatitu
Mukawalira inedi.

Muchotse zonse zoti bii,
Zobisa nkhope yanuyo;
Mudzadzetu mtimangawo,
Ndi kuunika kwanuko.

Madzulo ano mkhaletu,
Pafupi ndine Yesudi
Ndisanagone tuloto,
Ndilingalira Inudi.

Kapena wina leroli,
Wasocherera m’njirayi,
Ya Inu, Mbuye, mbwezetu,
Mumpulumutse iyedi.

hymns.title: Ndiye Pothawira Pathu
hymns.chorus:
Ndiyetu thanthwe lilomba, Ndi mthuzi nthawi yotentha;
Mtsogozi wa aulendo, Ndiye pothawira pathu.

hymns.title: Mulungu Atsogoza ’Ne
hymns.lyrics:
Mulungu atsogoza ’ne, Ndapuma m’mtima mwangamo.
Ayang’anira m’njiramo, Poyenda ine konseko.

Masiku ena mdima bi, Ndimavutika m’mtimamo.
Pa nthawi zina nkondwadi, Popeza zokondwetsazo.

Ndzagwira dzanja lanulo, Osang’ung’udza konseyi,
Ndidzanka mokondweratu, Pomtsata Mbuye wangayo.

Podzatha ntchito yangayi, Podzagonjetsa tchimolo,
Kumene ndidzakhalatu, Sindidzaopa imfayo.
hymns.chorus:
Mulungu atsogoza ’ne, Ndi dzanja-dzanja lakelo.
Ndidzamtsatira Mbuyanga, Poyenda ine konseko.

hymns.title: Pokhala Mtendere
hymns.lyrics:
Pokhala mtendere mu mtimangamu, Pamene ndisaukanso,
Pamene mabvuto ndi akurudi, Moyo wangawu ngwabwinotu.

Ngakhale Satana atizunza ’fe, Chiripo chitonthozocho;
Chifundo cha Kristu anafera ’fe, Kundipatsa ’ne moyo wake.

Uchimo unapachikidwa pomwe, Pa mtanda wa Yesu Mbuye,
Machimo angawo anatherapo, Mbuye wanga ndiyamika ’Nu.

Ambuyathu tikhumba tsiku lija, Limene tidzaona ’Nu,
Lipenga limveke, tidzakondwatu, Pakukomana ndi Yesuyo.
hymns.chorus:
Moyowu (Moyowu) uli phee (uli phee).
Moyo wangawu ngwabwinotu.

hymns.title: Chidzakhala Chimwemwe
hymns.lyrics:
Chidzakhala chimwemwe choposa,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake;
Kuli dalo kwa Mlungu wangayo,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake.

Nkwambinotu kuyenda m’njirayi,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake;
Njowaladi koposa njirayi,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake.

Ndiopanji ndi kuda nkhawanso,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake?
Mbuyanga ali nane pafupi,
Potsamira m’mikono mwake.

hymns.title: Ndikhulupira ’Nu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikhulupira ’Nu, Mwana wa Mlunguyo,
Mbuyanga ’Nu;
Mumve popempha ’ne, Tchimo muchotsebe,
Lero ndikhale ’ne, Wa Inuyo.

Mzimu mndipatseko, Wondilimbitsayo
Mu mtimamo;
Munandiferadi, Ndiyambe leroli,
Inu kukonda ndi Mtimangawo.

Poyenda m’mdima bii, M’mtimamo nsonizi,
Mndigwiretu;
Mdima uchoke zi, Msozi ulekedi,
Ndisasochereyi, Kwa Inuko.

hymns.title: Ndidze Pafupipa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndidze pafupipa Mlungu wanga,
’Ngakhale ndi tsoka Mundibweza,
Koma ndiyimbabe, Mbuye m’ndikhalitse
Mbuye m’ndikhalitse, M’fupi Ndinu.

Ngakhale ku thengo, Ndasochera,
M’mdima ndigonapo, E pa mwala.
Koma m’kulotako, Ndiyandikizanso.
Ndiyandikizanso, M’fupi Ndinu.

Pajapo ndipenya Pokwerapo,
Angelo atsika Kumwambako,
Ndiwo akodola Kuti ndibwerere,
Kuti ndibwerere, M’fupi Ndinu.

Tsono poukanso Wokondwatu,
Ndipeza pomwepo Pali Mlungu;
Ndipo masautso Andisendezanso,
Andisendezanso, M’fupi Ndinu.

Podzabwera Iye N’dzanka naye,
Dzuwa ndi nyenyezi Zitsalira;
Pomwe ndiyimbanso, Ndidza pafupipo,
Ndidza pafupipo, Mlungu wanga.

hymns.title: Limbikani Mwa Mulungu
hymns.lyrics:
Limbikani mwa Mlungu wanuyo,
Nkana m’dziko muli mavutowo;
Khristu ndiye thanthwe lolimbalo,
Ndi la mphamvu zonsezo.

Limbikani ndi mtima woti nji,
Inde mwa chikhulupirirocho;
Kristu ndiye thanthwe la mphamvulo,
Agonjetsa tchimolo.

Limbikani mwa choonadicho,
Chikuthangatani koposatu;
Kristu ndiye thanthwe lopumamo,
Mmene vuto latha phe.
hymns.chorus:
Tilimbike kuima pa thanthwe lija,
Thanthwe ndilo Khristuyo;
Ngati tipiriratu tidzankako,
Kuli mpando wa Mlunguyo.

hymns.title: Thanthwe Lolimba
hymns.lyrics:
Chiyembekezo changatu, Chili mwa Yesu Woyera
Sindikhulupira wina Koma dzina la Yesuyo.

Pamene Iye adzadza, Ndidzapezeke mwa Iye,
Ndiri m’chilungamo chake, Wopanda naye chifukwa.
hymns.chorus:
Ndaima pa Khristu Thanthwe, Nthaka yonse ndiyo mchenga,
Nthaka yonse ndiyo mchenga.

hymns.title: Poyenda Ndi Mbuye
hymns.chorus:
Khulupira, palibenso njira, Yakukondwa mwa Yesu,
Komatu kumvera.

hymns.title: Mulungu Akhala Ndi Inu
hymns.lyrics:
Mulungu akhale ndi inu, Mpaka tidzaonananso;
Atsogoze, asunge ’nu; Mulungu akhale ndi inu.

Mulungu akhale ndi inu, Ndi mapiko akubisa,
Masiku onse kudyetsa; Mulungu akhale ndi inu.

Mulungu akhale ndi inu, Ndi pamene muvutika,
Adzakuthangatani ’nu, Mulungu akhale ndi inu.

Mulungu akhale ndi inu, Ndi chikondi chake chonse,
Asunge mzoopsya zonse, Mulungu akhale ndi inu.
hymns.chorus:
Asunga nonsenu, Tikomana ndi Yesu,
Asunga nonsenu, Mulungu akhale ndi inu.

hymns.title: Sitidzalekananso
hymns.lyrics:
Tikakhala ndi abwenzitu, M’dziko lathu lino,
Posachedwa timalekana Nao mwa chisoni.

Timakhala ndi ch’yembekezo, Pakufa anzathu,
Kuti pakutha dziko lino, Tidzakhala nao.

Sitidzalekananso ai, M’dziko lokomalo,
Nyimbo za chimwemwe, mtendere, ’Dzayimba kosatha.
hymns.chorus:
Sitidzalekana m’mwamba, Sitidzalekana,
M’dziko lokometsetsalo, Sitidzalekana.

hymns.title: Wogona Mwa Ambuye
hymns.lyrics:
Wogona mwa Ambuyeyo,
Podzuka sadzaliranso.
Mpumulo wa mtenderetu,
Wosaletseka ndi mdani.

Wogona mwa Ambuyeyo,
Wopanda mantha ndi ’mfayo
Chodala ch’yembekezocho,
Cha moyo wa kumwambako

Wogona mwa Ambuyeyo,
Akhala mu mtenderewo;
Chisoni chonse chatha phe!
Pobwera ’Ye adzauka.

Wogona mwa Ambuyeyo,
Adzamvatu lipengalo;
Adzadzutsidwa mmandamo!
Kupita kwa Ambuyeyo.

hymns.title: Ndidzamdziwa Mombolo Wanga
hymns.chorus:
Ndidzamdziwa, Ndidzamdziwa, Podzaima pa mbali pakepo,
Ndidzamdziwa, ndidzamdziwa, Ndi misomali m’manja mwake.

hymns.title: Patseni Bible
hymns.lyrics:
Patseni Bible ndilo ndikufuna, Ndi chotitsogolera njirayo;
Monga mapiri oonetsa kwathu, Obweza anthu osocherawo.

Patseni Bible ndilo ndikufuna, Mmene usweka mtima wangawo;
Patseni mau a Ambuye Yesu, Mau okondweretsa mmtimanga.

Patseni Bible ndilo ndikufuna, Nyali ya kusonyeza njirayo,
Mmene ndingagwe lindipulumutsa, Lindisonyeza tchimo langalo.

Patseni Bible ndilo ndikufuna, Liunikira a mu mdimawo,
Ndilo chiyembekezo kwa olira, Ndi nyali m’njira yonka m’mwambamo.
hymns.chorus:
Patseni Bible ndilo mau ake, Mau oyera a Mulunguyo,
Ndilo pangano la chikondi chake, ndi nyali mnjira yonka m’mwambamo.

hymns.title: Yimbiranso Kwa Ine
hymns.chorus:
Mau ake, ozizwitsa, Mau a moyowo,
Mau ake, abwinowo, Mau a moyowo.

hymns.title: Ndaimirira pa Gombe
hymns.lyrics:
Ndaimirira pa gombe, Ndiyang’anitsitsa,
Ku Kanani wabwinoyo, Komwe ndidzalowa.

Pa madambo akuluwo, ’Dzawala tsikulo,
Khristu adzalamulira, Nadzachotsa mdima.

Ndidzafika uko liti, Ndikudalitsidwa,
N’dzamona liti Atate, Kuti ndikapume?

Moyo wanga ukondwera, Kusiya dzikoli;
Nkana namondwe aombe, Sindiopa konse.
hymns.chorus:
Tidzapumula mdziko lokondwa (lokondwa),
Kuoloka pa gombe lija (lowala),
Tidzayimba nyimbo ya Mose,
Ndikukhala ndi Yesu nthawi zonse.

hymns.title: Chimwemwe Posachedwa
hymns.lyrics:
Chimwemwe podzatha ntchitoyi, Podzasonkhana okunkha,
Alikudza ndi zipatso, Ku Yerusalemuko.

(Bass and Tenor):
Chimwemwe posachedwa,
Chimwemwe cha muyaya,
Chifukwa nthawi yafika,
Yosonkhana okunkha.

Tidzayimba nyimbo zabwino, Tidzayamika mokondwa,
Tidzatama Khristu Mfumu, Mu mzinda watsopano.

Chimwemwe chitidikirako, Ku malo a chikhuduwo;
Yesu ali kuwakonza, Mu Mzinda watsopano.
hymns.chorus:
Kudzakhala chimwemwedi,
Chimwemwe cha nthawi zonse,
Chifukwa nthawi yafika,
Yosonkhana okunkha.

hymns.title: Ganizo Lokoma
hymns.chorus:
Pafupitu, Ndi kwathuko;
Ndili pafupi ndi kwathu, Koposa kalelo.

hymns.title: Bwinoli Tipita
hymns.lyrics:
Kuli dziko labwino m’mwamba
Lakuwala koposa dzuwa,
Ndi Atate akonza malo,
Pokhalira ife komweko.

Tidzayimba komweko nyimbo,
Za abwino omvera Yesu,
Sitidzamvatu zisoninso,
Tidzakondwa masiku onse.

Tidzatama Atate wathu,
Kuti iye ’napatsa Yesu,
Kuchotsera zochimwa zonse,
Ndi kutidalitsira ife.
hymns.chorus:
Bwinoli tipita,
Tikomana ku dziko lija (lijalo).

hymns.title: Mutibatizenso
hymns.lyrics:
Mutibatize ndi mphamvu yanu,
Mutitsitsimutse mwa nsoni zanu.

Osayenera ndi ochimwa’fe
Mutitsuke ife m’zoipa zathu.

Tifuna nkhunda ya m’mwamba idze
Idzatidalitse mwa nsoni zanu.

Imvani mau ochoka m’mwamba,
Ndiwe mwana wanga wokondedwayo.
hymns.chorus:
Tikupemphani Mbuye wathu Yesu,
Mutibatizetu ndi mzimu wanu.

hymns.title: Kasupe Wa Madalitso
hymns.lyrics:
Idzani ndi madalitso, Mtima wanga uyimbe;
Nsisi zanu zisaleke, Kuti tiyamike ’Nu,
Phunzitseni kumvera ’Nu, Kuti ndikudziweni,
Pamene chiyembekezo Chidzaza mtima wanga.

Ndinutu thandizo langa, Mwandifikitsa pano,
Ndipo mwa chifundo chanu Ndikafika kwathuko.
Anandifuna Yesuyo, Posochera mtalimo;
Anakhetsa mwazi wake Kundiombola ine.

M’ndipatse chisomo chanu, Pakuti ndichisowa!
Mundikokere kwa Inu Ndi chikondi chanucho.
Sindifuna kusochera, Kukusiyani Inu,
Tengani Mtima wangawu; Ukhale wanu konse

hymns.title: Mzimu Ndi Mtsogoziyo
hymns.lyrics:
Mzimu ndi mtsogoziyo M’njira ya Chikhristuyo,
Mtitsogoze ndinutu, Pa ulendo wathuwu.
Miyoyo ikondweratu, Pomva mau akewo;
Pakunena Mzimuyo, “Osochera, bwerani.”

Bwenzi lathu ndinutu, Mkhale mfupi nafetu,
Msatisiye tokhafe, Pakuyenda m’mdimamu.
Pakuomba mphepozo, Timaopa m’mtimamo
Tsono timva mauwo, “Osochera, bwerani.”

Mnene nchito yathatu, Mmene tidikira ’Nu,
Pakukhumba m’mwambamo, Tsono tipempherabe.
Nthawi ya mavutowo Tikhulupirira ’Nu,
Tsono timva mauwo, “Osochera, bwerani.”

hymns.title: Ndifuna Inu, Mbuyanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndifuna Inu, Mbuyanga, Chifukwa ndagwa mthopemo,
Ndi madzi pena motowo, M’nditsuke ’ne, mnditsuke ’ne.

Mukatsegula masowa, Ndidzakuyamikani ’Nu.
Komabe Mtima woyera, Udzapambana zonsezo.

Ukatsukidwa mtimawo Adzatseguka masowo.
Chifukwa kuti mwa Inu, Ndionamo za mmwambamo.

Ndayesa kudzikonzatu, Kuchotsa tchimo langalo
Ngakhale ndayesetsatu, Zoipazo zilipobe.
hymns.chorus:
Mnditsuke ’ne mu mtimamo, Ndi madzi pena motowo.
Mnditsuke ’ne machimowo, Achoketu mu mtimanga.

hymns.title: Kodi Mwalandira Yesu?
hymns.lyrics:
Kodi mwalandira Yesu Mbuyeyo?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?
Mwakhulupirira mwa chisomo ’ke?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?

Kodi mukuyenda ndi Ambuyeyo?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?
Mwapumula mwa Wopachikidwayo?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?

Kodi mwakonzeka pa kubwera ’Ye?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?
Kuti mukalowe m’malo abwino,
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?

Tayanitu zakunyansa zanuzo,
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?
Wakuchotsa tchimo lanu lonselo,
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?
hymns.chorus:
Kodi mwasambamo,
Mmwazi wabwino wa Yesuyo?
Kodi mwayeretsa mtima wanuwo?
Kodi mwasamba mmwazi wake?

hymns.title: Ambuye, Ndiri Kudza
hymns.lyrics:
Ndasocherera kutali, Mbuye ndibwera;
Ndayenda m’njira za mdima; Mbuye ndibwera.

Ndamwaza zaka zambiri, Mbuye ndibwera.
Ndilapa ndithu machimo, Mbuye ndibwera.

Ndatopa nazo zoipa, Mbuye ndibwera.
Ndimvera mau anuwo, Mbuye ndibwera.

Mtima wanga uwawadi, Mbuye ndibwera,
Mundichiritsa Mbuy’anga; Mbuye ndibwera.

Ndisowa mwazi  wanuwo, Mbuye ndibwera;
Munditsuke ndiyere mbu, Mbuye ndibwera
hymns.chorus:
Ndidzako! Ndidzako! Ndili kudzako!
Ndi chifundo cha Mbuye; Ndili kudzako.

hymns.title: Yemwe Afuna
hymns.chorus:
Omwe afuna, omwe afuna
Uza za chimwemwe m’dambo ndi m’phiri;
Atate wokonda aitana’ke
Omwe afuna adze.

hymns.title: Mumbveke Mbuyeyo
hymns.lyrics:
Tamani mphamvu ya Yesu angelo agwade;
Tulutsanitu korona mumveke Mbuyeyo
Tulutsanitu korona mumveko Mbuyeyo.

Inu osankhidwa ake, Owomboledwa’nu,
Tamani Mpulumutsiyo, mumveke Mbuyeyo;
Tamani Mpulumutsiyo mumveko Mbuyeyo.

Anthu onse ndi mitundu, Pa dziko linotu,
Am’lemekeze Mfumuyo, mumveke Mbuyeyo;
Am’lemekeze Mfumuyo, mumveke Mbuyeyo.

Tifuna kuti komweko, Tikamgwadire’Ye
Tidzayimba kosaleka mumveke Mbuyeyo
Tidzayimba kosaleka mumveke Mbuyeyo.

hymns.title: Yesu Bwenzi Mtimanga
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu, Bwenzi Mtimanga, Ndithawira kwanuko.
Pakuuka madziwo, Pakuomba mphepoyo.
Mundibise Mbuyanga, Likaleka vutolo,
Mnditsogoze bwinotu, Mndilandire kwanuko.

Pobisala penai, Ndingokangamira ’Nu.
Ndiri wosauka ’ne, Mbuye, msandisiyedi.
Wondithandiza wanga ’Nu, Ndikukhulupira ’Nu,
Mu mapiko anuwo Mundifunde inedi.

Khristu, Mukwaniradi, Mndikhutitse mmtimanga;
Msangalatse ifetu, Ovutika tonsefe.
Ine ndi woipadi! Inu wakuyera mbu;
Ine ndi wonyengadi, Woonadi Inutu.

Nsoni zanu ziinga Zakuipa zangazo.
Mundisunge woti mbe, Ee! ndi mwazi wanuwo.
Pa chitsime chanucho Mundimwetse Inudi;
Mtima wanga madziwo Adzayendayendabe.

hymns.title: Yesu Chimwemwe Chathu
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu chimwemwe chathucho, Chitsime ndinu cha moyo.
Ku’nika kwa ’nthu onsewo, Tibwera kwanu Mbuyathu.

Polawa mkate wa moyo Tilakalaka kudyanso.
Pakumwa madzi a moyo Tikwanitsidwa ndi Inu.

Mtima ufuna Inuyo Kumene mtitumizako
Tidzakondwera ngatitu Tigwira Inu kolimba.

Yesu, mukhale nafetu; Musangalatse ifenso.
Muchotse mdima wa tchimo, Muwale mdziko lonseli.

hymns.title: Inde Ndifuna Kumvatu
hymns.lyrics:
Inde ndifuna kumvatu, Za chikondano chakecho,
Cha Yesu Mbuye wangayo, Zomwe anamva kalelo.

Zina za Yesu ndimvetu Kuti ndichite zakezo.
Mzimu Woyera mudzetu, Ndiphunzitseni zonsezo.

Yesu ndi mmau mwakemo, Inde ndicheza nayeyo,
Liu ndimamva mbukhumo, Ndilo la Yesu Mbuyeyo.

Zina za Yesu mmwambamo, Ali pa mpando pakepo,
Udze Ufumu wakewo, Ndiyetu Mfumu ponsepo.
hymns.chorus:
E! Zina za Yesu, E! zina za Yesu,
Inde, ndilira mmtimamo, Chipulumutso chakecho.

hymns.title: Ambuyanga Yesu, Ndikonda Inu
Ndingayere Bwanji ’Ne?
hymns.lyrics:
Ndingayere bwanji ’ne? Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.
Nch’ani chindichizanso? Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.

Pakudetswa ndiona, Mwazi wa Ambuye yesu.
Pakuchimwa nditchula, Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu

Zina sizikwanatu, Mwazi wa Ambuye ndiwo.
Ntchito zanga zichepa, Mwazi wa Ambuye ndiwo.

Ndimakhulupiradi, Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.
Zolungama zangazi, Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.

Poyamika ndiyimba Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.
Ndithokoza Mbuyanga, Mwazi wa Ambuye Yesu.
hymns.chorus:
Mtsinje wa mwaziwo, Undiyeretsanso;
Sin’dziwa winanso, Mwazi wa Ambuye ndiwo.

hymns.title: Kodi Walemedwa M’mtima Mwako?
hymns.lyrics:
Kodi walemedwa m’mtima mwako?
Nena kwa Yesu, nena kwa Yesu
Kodi uli kumva za chisoni?
Nena kwa Yesu yekha.

Kodi ukulira mwa chisoni?
Nena kwa Yesu, nena kwa Yesu;
Kodi tchimo lina labisika?
Nena kwa Yesu yekha.

Kodi umaopa za chisoni?
Nena kwa Yesu, nena kwa Yesu;
Kodi ulikuda nkhawa m’mtima?
Nena kwa Yesu yekha.

Kodi ukulingalira imfa?
Nena kwa Yesu, nena kwa Yesu;
Kodi ukulira kuti adze?
Nena kwa Yesu yekha.
hymns.chorus:
Nena kwa Yesu, nena kwa Yesu,
Ndi bwenzi labwinotu.
Ndiye bwenzi lopambana onse,
Nena kwa Yesu yekha.

hymns.title: N’kwabwino Kukhulupirira
hymns.chorus:
Ndikhulupirira Yesu, Ndimtama nthawi zonse;
Yesu ali wa chifundo, Ndimtama nthawi zonse.

hymns.title: Poyambapo Ndakondwadi
hymns.lyrics:
Poyambapo ndakondwadi, Ntapeza Inu Mbuyetu,
Ndiyimba nyimbo yomweyi, Kukondwa sindikhala du.

Ndamuza ndimakhalatu Ku nyumba kwake komweko;
Mnyamata wake ndinetu, Ndampatsa Mtima wonsewo.

Omwewo mapanganowo, Sitilekana ifetu.
Ndamvera ine mauwo, Wandiloleza m’mtimamo.

Ndampatsa mtima wonsewo, Kupuma mwa Ambuyeyo:
Ndikhala, osamlekai, Kuthawa ndi kumsiya ’Ye.

hymns.title: Idzani Nonsenu Okonda Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Idzani nonsenu, Okonda Yesuyo,
Tiyimbe nyimbo yabwino, Tiyimbe nyimbo yabwino
Ku mpando wakewo, Ku mpando wakewo.

Ngakhale enawo Aleke kwimbako,
Akhristu ’fe tidzayimba, Akhristu ’fe tidzayimba
Kumlemekeza ’Ye, Kumlemekeza ’Ye.

Akhristu tonsefe, Tikondwe mdzikoli,
Koposa anthu enawo, Koposa anthu enawo,
Tisanafikeko, Tisanafikeko.

Tiyimbe mokondwa, Misozi iume;
Poyenda kunka kwathuko, Poyenda kunka kwathuko,
Kwa Mlungu wathuyo, Kwa Mlungu wathuyo.
hymns.chorus:
Tiyende (tu) pamodzi, Tilikupita kumwamba;
Akhristu tilikupita (pita), ku Ziyoni wabwinoyo.

hymns.title: Ndikonda Kunena Ndaomboledwa
hymns.chorus:
Ndi mwazitu (ndi mwazitu) wa Yesu, ndaomboledwa;
Ndine wake (ndine wake) kosatha, ndaomboledwa.

hymns.title: Tidzakhalitsa Pa Kasupe
hymns.lyrics:
Tidzakhalitsa pa kasupe, Wa madzi akewo.
Kumene Yesu adikira, Kupatsa moyowo.

Tikatopatu ndi ulendo, Tidzapumulatu,
Pa mtsinje wopambana yonse, Wokondwakondwatu.

Idzani nonsenu kwa Khristu, Mudzamwe madziwo,
Adzatimwetsa kwa ulere, Kasupe wakeyo.
hymns.chorus:
Tidzakhalitsa pa kasupe (wathu),
’Dzakhalitsa pa kasupe (wathu),
’Dzakhalitsa pa kasupe (wathu).
Pali madzi a moyo.

hymns.title: Tidzaima Bwanji Pa Chiweruzo?
hymns.lyrics:
Mmene Yesu adzasonkhatu, Mitundu yonse ya dziko,
Kodi tidzaima bwanji’fe Pa mpando wachiweruzo?

Kodi tidzamva mau ake, Wachita bwino iwetu,
Kapena tidzanjenjemera, Tidzachotsedwa ku mpando?

Iye adzakondwera ndithu, Kuona owomboledwa,
Adzawabvekatu zobvala, Pa kugwadira Mbuyeyo.

Tiyeni tidikire tsono, Ndi nyali zathu zowala,
Poitana Mkwati ku phwando Tidzakhale okonzeka.

Tikakhala okonzekatu, Tikakhala opirira;
Podzatha ulendo wathuwu, Tidzanka naye kumwamba.
hymns.chorus:
Adzasonkhanitsa tiriguyo, Koma mankhusu adzataya;
Nanga tidzaima bwanji ko’ Pa tsiku la chiweruzo?

hymns.title: Kodi Dzina Langa Lalembedwamo?
hymns.chorus:
Kodi dzina langa, Lalembedwa m’mwamba?
M’bukhu la ufumuwo, Kodi lalembedwa?

hymns.title: Tidzaima Bwanji Pa Chiweruzo?
hymns.lyrics:
Chiweruziro ndithu chayambidwa, Mabukhu atsegulidwa;
Ndipo ntchito iri yonseyo M’lungu adzaweruza.

Ayamba kuweruza akufa, Msanga aweruza a moyo,
Mwa zolembedwa m’mabukhu, Adzaweruza onsewo.

Kodi tidzatani pa nthawiyo, Povumbulutsidwa machimo!
Podzaweruzidwa mlandu, Kodi tidzaloledwatu?
hymns.chorus:
Kodi ife tidzatani Pa tsiku lalikululo?
Kodi tidzafika kwa Iye machimo atatsukidwa?

hymns.title: Pobwera Mfumu
hymns.lyrics:
Taitanidwatu ku phwando, Kukhala nao anthu ake;
Chidzaonekanji kwa ife, Pobwera Mfumu?

Adzavala korona Iye, Amene anafera anthu;
Tidzamuona bwino-bwino, Pobwera Mfumu.

Monga kung’anima kwa mphezi, Zobisika zidzaoneka
Tidzadziwana wina mnzake, Pobwera Mfumu.

Adzaona anthu akewo, Atavalatu zoyerazo;
Tikapirira tidzakondwa, Pobwera Mfumu.

Kulekana kwa nthawi zonse, Kulira kwa anthu ochimwa,
Kudzakhala koopsa ndithu, Pobwera Khristu.

Ambuye tilandirenitu, Tikhale pafupi nanutu,
Kuti tisadzaope konse, Pobwera Inu.
hymns.chorus:
Pobwera Mfumu, mbale, Pobwera Mfumu!
Chidzaonekanji kodi, Pobwera Mfumu?

hymns.title: M’mawa Tidzafesa
hymns.lyrics:
M’mawa tidzafesa mbeu zakukoma,
Msana ndi usiku tidzafesanso,
Nyengo ya masika tidzatema m’munda
Tidzabwera tonse ndi zipatsozo.

Tidzifesa m’dzuwa tidzifesa m’thunzi,
Sitiopa ife mtambo ndi mphepo.
Athatu masika nchitozi zidzatha,
Tidzabwera tonse ndi zipatsozo.

Tingolira kaya koma tidzafesa
Mbeu za Ambuye ntchito ya Yesu.
Adzachotsa msozi adzatilandira,
Tidzabwera tonse ndi zipatsozo.
hymns.chorus:
Ndi zipatsozo, ndi zipatsozo
Tidzabwera tonse ndi zipatsozo.

hymns.title: A! Mbusa Wanga Ndimvatu
hymns.lyrics:
A! Mbusa wanga ndimvatu, Uko ku chipululuko,
Zilira nkhosa zaketu, Zili kutali mkholamo.

Ndani afuna kunkako, Kukazipeza nkhosazo?
Ndani adzathandizayo, Kuti zifunde m’kholamo?

Etu! zilira konseko, Zili ku phiri ko’psako,
Imva, anena Mwiniyo, “Kweye, upeze Nkhosazo.”
hymns.chorus:
Bwezatu, bwezatu, Bweza zonse moopsamo;
Bwezatu, bwezatu, Bweza zakezo kwa Yesu.

hymns.title: Ndikonda Kuuzabe
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikonda kuuzabe, nthano ya Yesu, ndi
Zosaoneka zomwe, za m’mwamba zakezi;
Ndikonda kuuzabe, za cikondi chake,
Kubukitsa mbiriyo ya Mwana wa Mlungu.

Ndikonda kuuzabe, nthano yozizwitsa
Chifukwa ipambana, zonse zina ndamva;
Ndikonda kuuzabe, zomwe achitira
Kwa ine ndi kwa onse, a m’mvera ndi mtima.

Ndikonda kuuzabe, nthano yokomayo
Nthawi zonse ndiyimva, ndisekereranso.
Ndifuna kuuzabe kumvetsa amene
Sanamve za Mulungu, Wopulumutsayo.

Ndikonda kuuzabe, Mpulumutsi wanga
Natsika kumwambako natifera dala
Nakweranso kwawoko nadzadzanso Iye,
Kusonkhanitsa ake, Naye kukhalabe.
hymns.chorus:
Ndikonda kuuzabe, za Yesu mwini wanga,
Za chifundo chakecho, Ndiyimbe kumwamba.

hymns.title: Kufunafuna Otaikawo
hymns.lyrics:
Kufunatu E! ndi mtina wonse,
Kufuna akusocherawo;
Lalika kuti Yesu anati,
Idzani nonse kwa Inetu.

Kufunatu ndi kutsogolera,
Anthu ofoka’wo kwa Yesu;
Kutsogolera njira yabwino,
Yonka ku moyotu wosatha.

Tidzitero ponka kulalika,
Kutsata Yesu tsiku n’tsiku;
Ndi kuthangata ofoka onse,
Kuwatsogolera kwa Yesu.
hymns.chorus:
Pitanitu (inde) konse konseko,
Mukabwere ndi (anthu) osochera;
M’khola lake la (Yesu) Mpulumutsi.
Nafera’Ye anthu (E) ochimwa.

hymns.title: Kupulumutsa Omwe Ali Kufa
hymns.lyrics:
Pulumutsa omwe ali kufatu,
Uwachotse m’manda a uchimo;
Lilira ochimwa, nuwadzutsetu,
Nuwauze za Yesu Mbuyeyo.

Ngakhale amkana, Iye alinda,
Afuna kulandira olapa.
Awapembedzera moona Mtima,
Adzawakhululukira iwo.

Mu Mtima wa munthu muli zambiri,
Koma Yesu azichotsa zonse;
Atakhudzidwa ndi chikondi chake,
Nsinga za Satana zidzaduka.

Pulumutsa omwe ali kufatu
Limbitsa othodwa ndi olema;
Kwabwezera m’njira yopapatiza,
Ndi kuwauza za Mpulumutsi
hymns.chorus:
Pulumutsa omwe ali kufatu,
Yesu wachifundo alanditsa.

hymns.title: Kufuna Antchito
hymns.lyrics:
Mindatu yayera kale
Dzinthu dzonse dzachanso;
Pafupi ndi kutaliko
M’dziko lonse lapansi.

Atumizeni m’mawatu,
Ndi nthawi ya usana;
Ngakhale dzuwa lilowa,
Agwirebe ntchitoyo.

Ndipo inu otumidwa,
Gwirani ntchitoyo;
Ndipo potsiriza ntchito
Mudzadza ndi chimwemwe.
hymns.chorus:
Mbuye tikupempha Inu,
Kokosani antchito;
Atumizeni msangatu,
Nthawi isanethe’i.

hymns.title: Tinke Ife Ku Ntchito Ya Mulungu
hymns.lyrics:
Tinke ife ku ntchito ya Ambuye;
Tizitsata mapazi a Mbuye Yesu.
Mau ake adzapatsa mphamvu yake,
Ndipo ndi mtima wonse tigwire ntchito.

Tinke ife ku ntchito ya Mlungu wathu,
Yakudyetsa, Kumwetsa osowa onse.
Ndi mbendela ya mtanda tidzayendatu,
Pakulalika chipulumutso chake.

Tinke ife ku ntchito ya Mlungu wathu,
Ntchito ya kuchenjeza ilipo lero;
Ndi kwa anthu a mdima a mdziko lino,
Ndi kukweza Ambuye Ndi Mfumu yathu.

Tichitebe ntchito za Mlungu wathu,
Posachedwa Ambuye adzabweranso;
Ndipo ife tidzanka kumwamba naye,
Nyimbo zathu zokoma tidzayimbabe.
hymns.chorus:
Gwirani ntchitoyo, Gwirani ntchitoyo,
Mpakatu Yesuyo, Adzabweranso mdzikoli.

hymns.title: Gwira Zinchito Zake
hymns.lyrics:
Gwira zintchito zake, Mdima ukudzatu,
Yamba mmamawa ndithu, Kuli kuchatu.
Gwiranso msana monse, Mpaka madzulowo.
Gwira, usiku udza, Posachedwatu.

Gwira zintchito zake, Mdima ukudzatu,
Gwira masana onse, Kusanadei.
Udzapumula bwino, Potha zintchitozo,
Gwira, usiku udza, posachedwatu.

Mkhristu gwiratu ntchito, Mdima ukudzatu,
Dzuwa lapita kale, Msanga kuda bi!
Gwira madzulodzulo, Usanagonetu,
Msanga zintchito zonse Tere zithatu.

hymns.title: M’mawa
hymns.lyrics:
M’dzamva mau anga m’mawa
Mbuye popemphera;
Ndidzayang’ana kwa Inu
M’mene ndipemphera.

Mzimu anditsogolere
M’njira zolungama!
Andisonyeze njira za
Ntchito zanga zonse.

Anthu okonda dzinalo
Adzakwanitsidwa;
Mulungu adzawaphimba
Ndi chikopa chake.

hymns.title: Anthu Ambiri Ayimba
hymns.lyrics:
Anthu ambiri ayimba, Lodala dzina la Mbuye!
Ulemelero kwa Mlungu, Lodala dzina la Mbuye.

Dzinali lichotsa mantha, Lodala dzina la Mbuye!
Lili nyimbo ya ochimwa, Lodala dzina la Mbuye.

Athyola mphamvu ya tchimo, Lodala dzina la Mbuye!
Mwazi wake utitsuka, Lodala dzina la Mbuye.
hymns.chorus:
Dzina lodala, dzina lodala, dzina la Ambuye Yesu.
Dzina lodala, dzina lodala, dzina la Ambuye Yesu.

hymns.title: M’manja Mwake
hymns.lyrics:
M’manja mwakemo ndapulumutsidwa,
Ngakhale mavuto achuluka,
Ndikhulupirira ndikudalira,
Adzandisunga Wondiombola.

M’manja mwake chimwemwecho ndapeza,
Ndibisale ku mayeso onse,
Mofunda ndithu ndidzakhalitsamo,
M’manja a Yesu n’dzakhalitsane

M’manja mwake ndi populumukira,
M’mene uvutika mtima wanga,
M’mene abwenzi sangandithangate,
Ndidzapumulatu m’manja mwake.
hymns.chorus:
M’manja mwake, m’manja mwake,
Adzandichotsamo ndani,
M’manja mwake ndidzakhalitsa,
Inde ku nthawi zosatha.

hymns.title: Ndiyimba Mphamvu Ya Mulungu
Gwadwani Pa Maso Pa Mfumu
Tate Tikudza Kwa Inu.
hymns.lyrics:
Tate tikudzatu, Kwa inu, Mbuyathu,
Ngaka yolimbayo, Tipempha ’fe;
Dziko ndi la mdima Mmene mulibe ’Nu,
Mtisangalatse ’fe, Tate wathu.

Mtipulumutse ’fe Kwa mdani wathuyo,
Mutithangate ’fe Mu vutoli;
Ndife ofo’katu, Limbikitsani ’fe,
Ndi mphamvu yanuyo, Tate wathu.

Tipempha nsisizo Kuti tikhaletu
Mu njira yanuyo, Tate wathu.
Mtsitsogolere ’fe Mpaka mudzabwera,
Ndipo tidzapuma kwa inuko.
hymns.chorus:
Tate tibweratu kwa Inuko,
’Mvani popempha ’fe, Tate wathu.

hymns.title: Msandipitirire Yesu
hymns.chorus:
Yesu, Mbuye, Mundimveretu.
Mmene muitana ena, Msandilekatu.

hymns.title: Zokoma Ndithu Nthawizi
hymns.lyrics:
Zokoma ndithu nthawizi, Zakupemphera kwanuko,
Ku mpando wa chifumuwo, Ndiuza zanga zonsezo;
Pakundivuta m’mtimanga, Ndimamuuza Yesuyo,
Pakundiyesa mdaniyo, Ndinena kwa Ambuyeyo.

Zokoma ndithu nthawizi, Zopempha kwa Mulunguyo,
Kwa Yemwe ali wo’natu, Kwa Iye wodalitsa ’fe.
Ndilakalaka Iyeyu, Amene ’nandiferatu,
Posautsika m’dzikoli, Ndipempha m’dzina la Yesu.

Zokoma etu nthawizi, Za kupemphera Mbuyeyo;
Zimandisangalatsa ’ne, M’mavuto anga onsewo.
Ndilakalaka mphotho ya Kumwamwamba komweko.
Ndigwira mosalekatu Pakupemphera kwanuko.

hymns.title: Linda Ndi Kupemphera
hymns.chorus:
Linda pempha, linda pempha;
Usiku ndi usana dikirani ndi kupemphera.

hymns.title: Ntchito Ya Pa Mlungu Yatha
hymns.lyrics:
Ntchito ya pa mlungu yatha,
Sabata lina layamba;
Moyo wangawe pumula,
Mlungu wadalitsa lero.

Idza yamika Ambuye,
Yemwe apatsa mpumulo;
Timadalitsidwa lero,
Koposa masiku ena.

Mayamiko athu m’mwamba,
Akweratu monga nsembe;
Kuti Khristu atipatse
Dalitso m’mitima yathu.

Mpumulowu uli ngati
Fanizo la wakumwamba,
Komwe mpingo udzapuma,
Zitatha zowawa zonse.

hymns.title: Msaiwale Tsiku La Mbuye
hymns.lyrics:
Msaiwale tsiku la Mbuye wathuyo.
Ndi tsiku lopambana masiku enawo;
Ndi tsiku lakupuma ndi  la chimwemwecho,
Kuwala kwake kuli kochoka mmwambamo.

Sunga tsiku lake lopatulikalo,
Pembedza mwini njira yakunka mmwambamo;
Tikamtsatira Iye pa dziko linotu,
Adzatipatsa madzi a moyo wakewo.

Timyimbira Yesu pa tsiku lonseli,
Ambuye ali Bwenzi la ana onsewo.
Wokoma mtima ndinu, Mukhale nafetu,
Munalonjeza kuti mudzadza m’mtimamu.
hymns.chorus:
Tikondwera kudza kwa Sabata lakelo.
Tikondwera kudza kwa Sabata lakelo.

hymns.title: Sabata Nla Kupuma
hymns.lyrics:
Sabata nla kupuma, Ndi la chimwemwecho,
Ndi tsiku lotonthoza, Lokometsetsatu;
Akulu ndi ang’ono, Tigwade tonsefe,
Tiyimbe kwa Woyera Wa nthawi zonsezo.

Sabata lili ngati Chotchinjiriza ’fe,
Ndi monga ngati munda Wotupa mdambomo;
Litsitsimutsa m’yoyo Ya akutopawo,
Popuma pa Sabata Tiona mwambamo.

Ndi tsiku lakusinkha, Ndi la chikondicho,
Lakuyanjana nazo Za mwambamwambamo;
Tipeze zakukoma Zoposa zinazo,
Tifuna kupumula Kosatha mwambamo.

hymns.title: Skulu Ya Sabata
hymns.chorus:
Skulu ya (bwino), Sabata (bwino),
Skulu ya (bwino), Sabata (bwino),
Mtima wanga uikonda, Skulu ya Sabata.

hymns.title: Mulungu Watisunga ’Fe
hymns.lyrics:
Mlungu watisunga ’fe Mpaka mlungu winawu;
T’yeni timpembedze ’Ye, Tsiku lopumulali;
Tiganize zinthu za Mau a Mulunguyo.
Tiganize zinthu za Mau a Mulunguyo.

Pakufuna nsisizo, Zakudzera m’dzinalo,
Mudze, Mbuye wathu ’Nu, Mukhululukire ’fe;
Pakupuma mwanumo, Tikumbuka Inuyo.
Pakupuma mwanumo, Tikumbuka inuyo.

Pakulemekeza ’Nu, Tikuyandikira ’Nu;
Tikuona mphamvuyo, Ndi ulemelerowo.
Mtithangate Mbuyathu Kudya phwando m’mwambamo.
Mtithangate Mbuyathu Kudya phwando m’mwambamo.

Mbuye mugonjetsetu Tchimo la mu mtimanga,
Kuti ndikagwiretu Ntchito zokondwetsa ’Nu.
Masabata onsewo Alingane momwemo,
Masabata onsewo Alingane momwemo.

hymns.title: Idza Tsiku Lopuma
hymns.lyrics:
Idza tsiku lopuma, Lopatsidwa ku dziko.
Idza mmtima mwangamu, Monga nyali ya mmwamba.

Tsiku lokondweretsa, Likupita msangatu;
Litisangalatsanso Mpaka ntchito idzatha.

Tsiku loyeretsetsa, Tsiku lakupemphera;
Tsiku lakulandira madalitso anuwo.

Idza tsiku lopuma ndi zimphamvu za mmwamba,
Ndi kuyera kwanuko Kudze m’mtima mwangamu.

hymns.title: Tamva Mau Omwewo
Mombolo Akhale Nane
hymns.chorus:
Sindidzaopa nthenda (E! nthenda),
Akanditsogolera (tsogoza)
N’dzapita wosang’ung’udza,
Kutsata mapazi’ke.

hymns.title: Pokumbukira Mtandawo
hymns.lyrics:
Pokumbukira mtandawo Umene Mbuye nafapo,
Zokoma za pa dzikoli Sizinga kanthu konse bi.

Onani mutu, manjanso, Mapazi ndi mu nthitimo.
E! panalibe winayo Wondivalira mingayo.

Chinkana ndinachimwatu, Anakhulukira ’ne.
Ndisadzitame ndekhai, Nditame mtanda wakewo.

Chinkana ndipereketu, Ee! chuma chonse m’dzikomo,
Sizingakwane konsei, Ndingopereka mtimanga.

hymns.title: Bwenzi Lathu Ndiye Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Bwenzi lathu ndiye Yesu, Atikonda ifetu,
Zifunsiro zathu zonse, Tipemphere Mbuyathu;
Mtima phe tisowa tonse, Zitivuta chabeko,
Kaamba sitimanka konse Kumpemphera Mlunguyo.

Tili nazo zotiyesa, Zitidetsa nkhawamu,
Tisadandaule chabe, Timpemphere Mbuyathu;
Kodi tikaona wina, Timkhulupiriramo?
Yesu atidziwa bwino, Timpemphere yekhayo.

Kodi tikulema nazo, Zotiwawa m’mtimamo,
Atipulumutsa Yesu, Timpemphere Iyeyu.
Kodi akuthawa m’bale, Pempheratu bwenzilo,
Akusunga mkono mwake, Udzapumuliramo.

hymns.title: Yesu Alikuitana
hymns.chorus:
Aitana lero lomwe; Yesu alikuitana iwe tsopano.
(Tenor and Bass):
Aitana lero lomwe; Aitana lero lomwe;
Yesu alikuitana lero, ’itana iwe tsopano.

hymns.title: Mlendo Ali Pa Khomo
hymns.lyrics:
Mlendo ali pa khomo, Mlowetse ( Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu),
Wadza kale kalelo, Mlowetse ( Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
Mtsegulire msangatu, Wakuyerayerayo, 
Mwana wa Mulunguyo, Mlowetse ( Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).

Utsegule mtimawo, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
Ukachedwa ‘chokatu, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
Ndiye bwenzi lakolo, ‘Dzakupulumutsa we;
‘Dzakusamaliranso, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).

Imva mau Akewo, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu),
Sankha Iye leroli, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
Wangoima khomopo, ‘Dzakusangalatsa ‘we,
Udzamlemekezatu, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).

Mlendo wa kumwambayo, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
‘Dzakupatsa zonsezo, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu, Mlowetsenitu).
‘Dzakhululukira ‘we, Ndipo potsirizapo
‘Dzakutenga mmwambamo, Mlowetse (Mlowetsenitu,Mlowetsenitu).

hymns.title: Anadza Kwa Yesu Mkuru Wina
hymns.lyrics:
Anadza kwa Yesu mkuru wina, Kufunsa za njira ya chipulumutso;
Nayankha momveka Ambuyathuyo, Mukabadwensotu.

Nonsenu mverani mau ake Amene Ambuye nanena Kwa ‘ye,
Msanyozetu mau a uthengawu, Mukabadwensotu.

Mufuna kulowa mmwamba kodi? Kuyimba pamodzi ndi odalawo?
Mukafuna moyo wa nthawi zonse, Mukabadwensotu.
hymns.chorus:
Mukabadwensotu, mukabadwensotu;
Indetu ndinenadi kwa inuyo, Mukabadwensotu.

hymns.title: Mundimve, Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Mundimve, Yesu, ndikuliratu, ’Dzani kwa inetu.
Mu mtimanga ndilakalaka ’Nu, Yesu, idzanitu.

Ndilibe malo mokhaliramo, ’Dzani kwa inetu.
Khalani nane m’mtima mwangamo, Yesu, Idzanitu

Njobvuta njira ndimayendamo, ’Dzani kwa inetu.
Ndione nkhope yanu, Mbuyanga, Yesu idzanitu.

Wolapa mtima simunyozadi, ’Dzani kwa inetu.
Pemphero langa mumve lonseli, Yesu, idzanitu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndinasocheratu kutaliko, Kutali ndi Atateyo.
Tsopano, koma mndilandirenso, Yesu, idzanitu.

hymns.title: Yesu Ap’lumutsa
hymns.chorus:
Yesu awombola konsekonseko,
Mukakhulupira mau akewo.

hymns.title: Tidzamangatu Pa Thanthwe
Nthano Ya Yesu Uzeni
hymns.lyrics:
Nthano ya Yesu uzeni, Lemba mu mtimangamu;
Nthano yodala uzeni, Nthano yoposa zonse.
Nyimbo ya ’ngelo uzeni, Nthawi yobadwa Yesu,
Ulemelero kwa Mlungu, Ndipo mtendere pano.

Nena masiku ajawo, Mbuye nasala kudya,
Anayesedwa koopsa, Koma analakika.
Za ntchito yake uzeni, Ndi za zisoni zake,
Anazunzidwa kolimba, Mphawi wopanda kwao.

Za mtanda wake uzeni, Ndi za zowawa zake,
Za manda ake uzeni, Ndi za kuuka kwake.
M’nthano ndiona chikondi, Cha Yesu, Mbuye wanga,
Mmene ndiimva ndilira, Anawombola ine.
hymns.chorus:
Nthano ya Yesu uzeni, Lemba mu mtimangamu,
Nthano yodala uzeni, Nthano yoposa zonse.

hymns.title: Mbusa Wabwino, Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Mbusa wabwino, Yesu, Ati idzanitu,
M’khola mulowe nonse, Malo alipodi.
’Dzani  akulu inu, Ndi anyamatanso,
’Dzani, mulowe m’khola, M’njira ya choonadi.

Mbusa wabwino, Yesu, Anakufera ’we;
Aitanabe lero, Akusochera ’nu.
Kuli zoopsya kunja, Idza, atero ’Ye;
’Dzani, mulowe m’khola, Malo opuma du.

Inu msachedwe konse, Kuli mimbuluyo,
Ili kufuna nkhosa Kuti iziphetu.
Mbusa wabwino, Yesu, Akuitanabe,
’Dzani, mulowe m’khola, Malo alipomu.
hymns.chorus:
Akuitana mwa nsisi zake,
Wakusochera ’we, idza kwa ’Ne;
Mbusa wabwino aima mwa phee!
Kukulindiratu ’we.

hymns.title: Mmene Mbuye Adzayeza
hymns.lyrics:
Mmene Mbuye adzayeza, Zinthu za mu mtimamo;
Koditu tidzapambana, Pena ’dzalepheranso?

Kodi ’dzamva mau ake Wachitadi bwino ’we?
Pena kumva akunena, Choka iwe wochimwa?

Kodi ’dzamva Mzimu wake Nthawi isanathei?
Pena tizengerezabe, Ndi kuonongekadi?
hymns.chorus:
Mbuye wayeza iwetu, Nuperewera;
Ndi malamulo akewo, Nuperewera.

hymns.title: Odala Ali Akuchita
hymns.lyrics:
Imva mau a Mpulumutsi,
Mau owona a moyo;
Wosasamalawe kumbukiratu,
Odala ali akuchita.

Ngakhale timve malamulo,
Ndi malonjezano ake;
Kumvako sikungatipulumutse,
Odala ali akuchita.

Adzalowa mu mzinda uja,
Opanda tchimo ndi imfa;
Atayeretsedwa kwa nthawi zonse,
Adzadya za mtengo wa moyo.
hymns.chorus:
Odala ochita malamulo,
Odalatu odalatu;
Odala ochita malamulo,
Odala ndi akuchita.

hymns.title: - Bwenzi Palibe Lofana Naye
hymns.lyrics:
Bwenzi palibe loposa Yesu, palibe, palibe
Wina palibe wochiza nthenda, palibe, palibe.

Bwenzi palibe lofana naye, palibe, palibe
Iye ngofatsa koposa onse, palibe, palibe.

Nthawi palibe amatisiya, palibe, palibe
Akondweretsa mu mdima monse, palibe, palibe.

Iye samasiya munthu wake, palibe, palibe
Pena kukana wolapa konse, palibe, palibe.

Mphatso palibe yofana Yesu, palibe, palibe
Iye satimana malo m’mwamba? Palibe, palibe.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu adziwa zovuta zo, Atitsogoza konseko;
Bwenzi palibe lofana naye; Palibe, palibe.

hymns.title: Yang’ana Pa Mtanda Kwa Yesuyo
hymns.chorus:
Poyang’ana Yesuyo, Pakuona mtandawo,
Tingapeze moyowo, Poyang’ana Yesuyo (E, Yesuyo).

hymns.title: Yesu Mofatsa Aitana Tonse
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu, mofatsa, aitana tonse.  ’Mvanitu mau ake.
Akugogoda pa khomo pa mtima, Alikulindira ’fe.

Yesu apempha kwa ’Tate kumwamba, Ka’mba ka iwe ndine
Bwanji tikana zifundo zakezo, Kodi tichedweranji?

Nthawi ya nsisi ipitatu msanga, Kwa iwe ndi inenso;
Mdima wa imfa ukudza msanganso, Kwa iwe ndi inenso.

Yesu napatsa chikondi chakecho Kwa iwe ndi inenso.
Nkana tachimwa akhululukira, Tchimo la iwe ndine.
hymns.chorus:
Idzani kwanu! Inu, otopa, idzani.
Yesu mokonda aitana nonse.  Iwe, wochimwa, idza.

hymns.title: Chipata Chochinjikacho
hymns.chorus:
Mwachinjikira ine ko, Chipata cha kumwambako?
Ine, Ine, Mwachinjikira ’ne?

hymns.title: Sing’anga Mkulu Ndiye Yesu
hymns.chorus:
Dzina la Yesu ndi lokoma, Dzina la Yesu lipambana,
Dzina lake la kukonda, Yesu, inde, Yesu.

hymns.title: Mtima Walemedwa Ko?
hymns.lyrics:
Mtima walemedwa ko, Yesu alibe malo?
Muli tchimo lokha ko, Yesu alibe malo?
Iye wangoimatu, Agogoda mtimamo,
Adandaulira ’we, Kodi alibe malo?

Nthawiyo wataya ko, Sugwira nchito yake?
Mphamvuzo watayanso, Sugwira ntchito yake?
Sunaleke tchimolo, Sunakope munthuyo?
Sunabweze mlendoyo, Sugwira nchito yake?

Wangofuna dzikoli, Nthawi ya Yesu ’libe?
Ntchito yake waleka, Nthawi ya Yesu ’libe?
Ungotsata dzikoli, Chuma ndi zoipazi,
Kudzikondweretsa ’we, Nthawi za Yesu ’libe?

Ee, masamba okhawo, Wamana Yesu mphatso?
Mmanja mwako muli mbe, Wamana Yesu mphatso?
Sunasunge kanthui, Sunagwire ntchitoyo?
Sudzakondwa tsikulo, Pakuonatu Yesu.

hymns.title: Ndinamva Mauwo
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinamva mauwo, Andiitana ’ne;
Ndisambe m’mwazi wanuwo, Wodzera mtandamo.

Ndilibe mphamvuzo, Mundilimbitsa ’ne;
Mundiyeretsa konseko, Ndiyerayera mbu.

Atero ndaniyo? Ndi Yesu wabwino,
Apatsa mvanu mtendere; Ndi mphamvu mtimamo.

Nditama mwaziwo! Nditama nsisizo,
Nditama Yesu Mbuyeyo, Chiyero chathucho.
hymns.chorus:
Ndili kudzatu; Ndidza kwanuko!
Munditsuke mtimamo, Ndi mwazi wanuwo.

hymns.title: Ati Yesu Mbuyeyo
hymns.lyrics:
Ati Yesu Mbuyeyo, Ofo’ka ndinutu,
Mudikire, mpemphedi, Ndidzapatsa mphamvutu,

Mbuye ndimva leroli Za mphamvu zanuzi,
Zokha zisandutsadi Mtima wanga woti bii.

Ine kanthu ndilibe, Kogula moyowu,
Ndingotsuka mtimano M’mwazi wa Ambuye ’Nu.

Mmene ndidzaimatu Pa chiweruzopo,
Podzapulumukatu, Ndidzamtama Yesuyo.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu wathadi Za mangawatu,
Inde, ndinaipa bii, Watsuka ine mbu.

hymns.title: Ndiona Mwazi Wakewo
hymns.chorus:
Ndiona mwazi wakewo, Unditsuka ’ne mtimamo!
Nditama Mbuye Yesuyo, Ndiyere mtima mwangamo.

hymns.title: Atate, Ndziperekatu
hymns.lyrics:
Atate, ndziperekatu, Palibe winanso,
Popanda Inu, Mbuyanga, Ndidzanka kutiko?

Ndikhulupira Mwanayo, Ndifuna mphamvu ’ke;
Zoipa zanga zonsezo, Mzichotse Inutu.

Kwa Inu, Mbuye, mwini wa Chikhulupirocho,
Mndipatse mphatso yanuyo, Ndingafe m’mtimanga.
hymns.chorus:
Eh! Ndikhulupirira ’Ye, Wondifera ine.
Anapereka mwazi ’ke, Kupulumutsa ’ne.

hymns.title: Ndiyimbatu Za Yesu
hymns.chorus:
Ndi’mbatu za Yesuyo, Kuyamika kosatha;
Nadza kundifera ’ne, Ndi’mbabe chikondicho.

hymns.title: Ndidze Pafupi Ndi Inu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndidze pafupi ndi Inutu, Yesu, Mombolo wopambana ’Nu;
Inu mndisunge mmanja mwanu, Inu mndibise pa ngaka yanu,
Inu mndibise pa ngaka yanu.

Ndidza pafupi ndekha ndekha, Kanthu ndilibe kopatsa Yesu;
Mtima woipa ndipatsa ’Nu, Munditsuketu ndi mwazi wanu,
Munditsuketu ndi mwazi wanu.

Ndidza pafupi, ndine wanu, Ine ndisiya zoipa zonse;
Zonse zonyada za dzikoli, Koma mndipatse Ambuye Yesu,
Koma mndipatse Ambuye Yesu.

Ndidza pafupi ndinu, Mbuye, Mpaka kumwamba ndidzalowatu,
Nthawi zosatha n’dzakhalabe, Pafupifupi ndi Mp’lumutsiyo,
Pafupifupi ndi Mp’lumutsiyo.

hymns.title: Dzina Lopambana Mmwamba
hymns.lyrics:
Dzina lopambana m’mwamba, Ndi pa dziko lonselo,
Lomwe ’Tate anamutcha Mwana wake mmodziyo.

Dzinalo lipatsa dalo, Ndi chimwemwe mtimanga,
Ndidzauza anthu ena Za chokoma chakecho.

Moyo wanga udzayimba Za chikondi chakecho;
Ndidzatamandabe dzina, Lopambana onsewo.
hymns.chorus:
Dzina loyeratu (loyera), Dzina lofatsanso (lofatsa),
Lomwe nalinena angelowo.
Pa usiku uja (dzinalo), Dzina lokomatu (dzinalo),
Ndilo la Ambuye Yesu.

hymns.title: Ndikweze Yesu Yekha
Muli Dzuwa M’phiri Muja
hymns.chorus:
Muli dzuwa lakuwalitsa! Muli dzuwa m’mtimanga.
Yesu adzachotsa mdima, Muli dzuwa m’mtimanga.

hymns.title: Ilipo Nyimbo Ndikonda
hymns.lyrics:
Ilipo nyimbo ndikonda Kuyimba ineyo,
Ya Yesu Mbuye wangayo, Ch’omboledwere ’ne.

Wakukwanitsa mtimanga Ndi Yesu Khristuyo;
Ndichita chifuniro ’ke, Ch’omboledwere ’ne.

Ilipo mboni yangayo, Ch’omboledwere ’ne.
Yochotsa nkhawa, manthanso, Ch’omboledwere ’ne.

Alipo malo angawo, Wandikonzera ’Ye.
Kumene ndidzakhalako, Ntaomboledwa ’ne.
hymns.chorus:
Ntaomboledwa ’ne, Ndzalemekezatu dzina la Ambuyeyo.
Ntaomboledwa ’ne, Ndidzalemekeza dzinalo.

hymns.title: Mulungu Asamalabe
hymns.chorus:
Andikonda, andikonda, Akonda inenso;
Akonda zinthu zonsezo, Akonda inenso.

hymns.title: Nthawi Ya Pemphero
hymns.lyrics:
Nthawi ya pempheroyo, powerama ife,
Tisonkhana kwa Yesu, Ambuyathuyo;
Tikakhulupiratu adzatibisanso,
Tidzapeza mpumulo tikapempheratu.

Nthawi ya pempheroyo, Yesu ali mfupi
Ndi chifundo chakecho atimvera ’fe.
Atiuza nkhawazo, tizataye kwa ’Ye,
Tidzapeza mpumulo, tikapempheratu.

Nthawi ya pempheroyo, akuyesedwawo
Amatula kwa Yesu zisoni zawo;
Yesu wachifundoyo amazichotsatu,
Tidzapeza mpumulo tikapempheratu.

Nthawi ya pempheroyo tikhulupiranso
Kuti zomwe tisowa tilandiradi;
Tikakhulupiradi nkhawa zichokanso;
Tidzapeza mpumulo tikapempheratu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndi yokomadi, nthawi ya pempho,
Tidzapeza mpumulo tikapempheratu

hymns.title: Yesu Mnalonjeza
hymns.chorus:
Yesu, mtidalitse Popemphera ’fe;
Yesu, mtidalitse, Mkhale mfupimo.

hymns.title: Ndine Wanuyo
hymns.lyrics:
Ndine wanuyo, ndamva mauwo,
A chikondi chanucho;
Mundikoketu mfupi ndinuyo,
Mwa chikhulupirocho.

M’ntchito yanu mndipatulire ’ne,
Mwa chisomo chanucho;
Moyo wangawo uyang’ane ’Nu,
Ndichitetu zanuzo.

Ndikondwera ’ne pakupitatu,
Kugwadira Mbuyeyo;
Pakunenatu naye mserimo,
Monga bwenzi langalo.

Sindidziwatu za chikondicho,
Mpaka n’dzanke tsidyalo;
Sindifikira za chimwemwecho,
Mpaka n’dzanke kwanuko.
hymns.chorus:
Mndisendeze (mfupi), mfupi mbuyanga,
Ndi pa mtanda wanuwo;
Mndisendeze mfupi, Mbuye wanga ’Nu,
Ndi pa mwazi wanuwo.

hymns.title: Inetu Ndifunadi
Yesu, Mundisungetu
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu, mundisungetu, Mfupi mtanda wanu;
Ndipezemo kasupe Wondichiza mtima.

Nsisi zandipezanso, Pomwe pali mtanda.
Ee! Pa mtanda nthandayo Indiunikira.

Pa mtandapo ndiona Mwana wa Mulungu.
Mndithandize, Mbuyanga, Kuyendabe nanu.

Pa mtandapo ndzalinda, Ndikuyembekeza,
Mpaka ndidzafika ku Dziko la kumwamba.
hymns.chorus:
Mtandawo, mtandawo, Nditamanda mtanda,
Mpaka moyo wangawo Udzapume mmwamba.

hymns.title: Ndiyende Nanu Mulungu
Ndi Mtima Wanga Wonse
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi mtima wanga wonsewo,
Ndikweza mau kwanuko,
Ndiyimbe bwanji chikondi
Chozizwitsa cha Yesu Mbuye?

Chipatsa ’ne mtenderewo,
Chiunikira m’njirayo,
Chichotsa vuto chikondi
Chozizwitsa cha Yesu Mbuye.

Chiyembekezo changacho
Chonditulutsa m’machimo;
Pakufa ndi’imba chikondi
Chozizwitsa cha Yesu Mbuye.
hymns.chorus:
Chikonditu chozizwacho,
Chikondi cha Yesuyo;
Chikonditu chozizwacho,
Chikondi cha Yesuyo.

hymns.title: Ndikonda Inu, Mbuyanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikonda Inu, Mbuyanga,
Koposa zonsezo;
Chifukwa mwandipatsatu
Mtendere wanuwo.

Mukhala mfupi ndineyo,
Koposa onsewo;
Ndikonda kuganiza ’Nu
Koposa zinazo.

Mwandikondwetsa, Mbuyanga,
Ndisangalaladi;
Popanda nsisi zanuzo
Sindingakondwei.

Ambuye wanga, Yesuyo,
Mkayenda nanedi,
Masiku onse pansipo
Ndidzakondweradi.
hymns.chorus:
Sanazinene zonsezo (zonsezo),
Za nsisi zakezo;
Sanazinene zonsezo (zonsezo)
Watsuka inenso.

hymns.title: Akan’tsogoza Ndinkako
hymns.lyrics:
Akan’tsogoza ndinkako,
Ndikhulupira Mbuyeyo;
Ndikumbukira kutitu
Anandifera pa mtanda.

Ndikonda mau akewo,
Anditsogoze Mbuyeyo;
Kufuna kwake ndichite,
Anandifera pa mtanda.

Ndzapita osaopai,
Akhale nane Yesuyo.
Pa tsiku lina n’dzaona
Yesu tsamwali wa mtanda.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu anditsogozatu
Ulendo wanga wonsewo.
Bwenzi loona ndiyeyo,
Ndikumbukira Mtandawo.

hymns.title: Dziko Ai, Koma Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Dziko ai, koma Yesu,
Dziko ndi lachabetu;
Nsisi zake zikhalitsa
Nthawi zonse yemweyo.

Dziko ai, koma Yesu,
Wondisangalatsa ’ne;
Iye andiyang’anira,
Nkana m’vuto ndi’mbabe.

Dziko ai, koma Yesu,
Ndiyang’ane Iyeyo;
Pa ulendo wanga wonse,
Andiunikira ’ne.

Dziko ai, koma Yesu,
Mtandawo ndigwiradi;
Mpakatu maso ndi maso,
Ndidzamone Mbuyeyo.
hymns.chorus:
Nsisi zake n’zazikulu,
Ndi chikondi chakenso;
Chiombolo chozizwitsa,
Moyotu wosathawo!

hymns.title: Ndipereka Moyowu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndipereka moyowu
Kwa Ambuye wanga ’Nu;
Manjawa achitetu
Chifuniro chanucho.

Ndipereka miyendoyi,
Ikhaletu yanuyo;
Mau ayimbirenso
Inu Mfumu yangayo.

Ndipereka milomo,
Inenetu mauwo;
Ndipereka chumacho,
Sindimana kanthui.

Ndipereka nsikuzo,
Kuti ndiyamike ’Nu;
Ndipereka nzeruzo
Kuchitatu ntchitoyo.

Chifuniro changacho
Chikhaletu chanunso;
Ndipereka mtimanga,
Ukhaletu wanunso.

Ndipereka chikondi
Pa mapazi anuwo;
Munditenge ndensene,
Ndikhaletu wanuyo.
hymns.chorus:
Munditsuke ine mtima mbu (E, ine mbu),
M’mwazi wa Ambuye Yesuyo (E, Yesuyo),
Kwanu Mbuyanga ndidziperekadi,
Kwanu nthawi zonsezo.

hymns.title: Tsamwali Ndamkumanayo
Mau A Yesu
Ndikhaletu Wanu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikhaletu wanu, Mbuyanga; Konseko, konseko,
E, kufuna kwanu ndichite, Mndithandizetu.

Chuma ninji ko popandatu Inuyo, Mbuyanga,
Ndidzasiya zinthu zonsezo, Ndidzatsata ’Nu.

Pofulatira ’ne dzikoli, Mkhaletu nanenso;
Inu ndinu Chuma changacho; Mnditonthozetu.
hymns.chorus:
Wanutu (Mbuye), wanutu (Mbuye), Ndine wanu, Mbuyanga;
Wanutu (Mbuye), wanutu (Mbuye), Ndine wanu leroli.

hymns.title: Tsiku Lokoma Leroli
hymns.lyrics:
Tsiku lokoma leroli, Loposa enawo;
La kuganiza zinthu za Mulungu wathuyo.

Inde, kukoma kumvatu Za mau akewo,
Otembenuza mtimawo Kuloza mmwambamo.

Ngati sititha tchimolo, Kusiya tokha ’fe,
Ambuye wathu, Yesuyo, Adzalichotsatu.

hymns.title: Mbuye Mtipititse
Ndipitabe Mtsogolomo
hymns.lyrics:
Ndipitabe mtsogolomo,
Ndikwera nthawi zonsezo;
Ndipempha Inu, Mbuyanga,
Mndikweze ’ne Pamwambapo.

Sin’funatu kukhalabe
Kumene kuli nkhawazo;
Ngakhale ena ’khaleko,
Mndikweze ’ne pamwambapo.

Ndikhalebe pamwambapo,
Ngakhale ndiyesedwa ’ne;
Ndikhulupira kutitu,
Mndikweza ’ne pamwambapo.
hymns.chorus:
Mndikwezetu ndiime ’ne,
Pamwamba nsiku zonsezo;
Pamene sin’nafikepo,
Mndikweze ’ne pamwambapo.

hymns.title: M’sakane Ntchito Ya Mulungu
hymns.lyrics:
Msakane ntchito ya Mulungu wanuyo,
Mupite komweko Afuna iyeyo.
Anaitana ’nu, Amaitanabe,
Mudzakondweradi Pogwira ntchitoyo.

Msakane ntchitoyo, Imvani leroli;
Mwakana kalelo, Musakanenso bi!
Zotuta nzambiri, Achepa ’ntchitowo,
Mukondekondetu Kukopa anthuwo

Msakane ntchitoyo, Msachedwechedwenso;
Pakukanidwabe Chikondi chichoka
Pamene Mzimuyo Aloza njirayo,
Popempha Yesuyo, Idzani leroli.
hymns.chorus:
Bwerani, Msakane ntchitoyo,
Bwerani, Kwa Mlungu wanuyo.
Msakane ntchito ya Mulungu wanuyo,
Mupite komweko Afuna Iyeyo.

hymns.title: Mukhale M’mtima Mwanga
hymns.lyrics:
Mukhale m’mtima mwanga Ee, Yesu, Mfumuyo.
Mundiyankhire ine Mafunso angawo.
Mukhale m’mtima mwanga, Mnditsogoleretu,
Kuti ndionetsere Ukulu wanuwo.

Kachisi wa mtimanga Wayeretsedwatu,
Ulemelero wanu Uwale mkatimo;
Ndi thupi langa lonse Likhale lanulo,
Lichite nthawi zonse Kufuna kwanuko.

Ziwalo zanga zonse, Mzilamuliretu,
Muchite nazo zonse Kufuna kwanuko;
Ndidzipereke ndense, Osang’ung’udzanso,
Polamulidwa nanu Mu ntchito zangazo.

Ndidzapumula ndithu Mu mtima mwangamo,
Ndidzalindira Inu, Mukandifunatu;
Mukhale m’mtima mwanga, Ee, Yesu, Mfumuyo,
Mundiyankhire ine, Mafunso angawo.

hymns.title: Tate Mundisendeze Mfupi
hymns.lyrics:
Tate mundisendeze mfupi,
Ndifuna Inuyo;
Mundiyangate mmanja mwanu,
Ndipume mwanumo.

Yesu Mundisendeze mfupi,
Ndisasiye inu;
Dzanja lanu linditsogoze,
Ndisasochereyi.

Mzimu mundisendeze mfupi,
Ndifane ndinuyo;
Mtima mwangamo munditsuke,
Ndiyere ine mbu!
hymns.chorus:
Zingwe za chikondicho,
Mfupi, zikokere ’ne;
Mfupi, mfupi,
Ndinu m’mwambamo.

hymns.title: Ponse Ponse Naye Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ponse ponse naye Yesu ndzapita,
Ponse ponse anditsogolera ’ne.
Pakapanda Iye sindikondwai,
Ponse ponse naye sindiopatu.

Ponse ponse Yesu ali ndi ine,
Nkana ena andisiye m’dzikoli.
Nkana njira yanga ili yoopsa,
Ponse ponse ndimyamika Yesuyo.

Ponsepo ndi Yesu ndidzagonatu,
Mmene mdima undiphimba ineyo.
Ndziwa kuti ndidzauka tsikulo.
Ponsepo ndi Yesu ndiko kwathuko.
hymns.chorus:
Ponsepo, ponsepo, sindiopai,
Ponse ponse naye ndidzapitapo.

hymns.title: Yenda Mkuunika
hymns.lyrics:
Yenda mk’unika kwakeko, Atsogolere ’we;
Ndi Mzimu wa kumwambayo ’Dzainga mdimawo.

(Bass and Tenor):
Yendanibe mku’nikatu kwa Mlunguyo,
Yendanibe mku’nikatu kwa Mlunguyo,
Yendanibe mku’nikatu kwa Mlunguyo;
Mku’nikatu kwa Mlunguyo.

Yenda mku’nika Yesuyo, Wowala m’mauyo,
Atsogolera onsewo, Okhulupirawo

Nkana mithunzi igwetu, Kudetsa njirayo.
Mdimawo udzathawatu, Ku’nika kwakeko.

Yenda mku’nika kwakeko, Udziwe nsisizo,
Chikondi chidzaposadi, Pofika mmwambamo.
hymns.chorus:
Yendanibe, Mkuunikatu;
Yendanibe, Mkun’ikatu kwa Mlunguyo.

hymns.title: Okunkhawo Ali Kuti?
hymns.lyrics:
Okunkhawo alitu kutiko?
Amene akunkhatu zabwino?
Kuchoka mu dziko loipali,
Pochita ndi mau a Mlunguyo?

Pitani mu mphambano monsemo,
Funani mupezemo abwino;
Pitani kwa anthu ponse ponse,
Musonkhanitsire kumwambako.

Zobala zakhwima ponse ponse,
Za m’dzikomu zilindira ife.
Okunkha achepa ku ntchitoyi,
Zambiri zidzaonongekatu.

Anthuni idzani ndi zidazo,
Kudzasonkhanitsa za m’mundamo;
Gwiranibe mpaka Ambuyeyo,
Adzabwera ali kukondwatu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndanitu adze kudzakunkha,
Kusonkhanitsira anthu m’mwambamo?
Ndi yani atithandizeko,
Pofunafuna zobalazo?

hymns.title: Ndiganiza Za Dziko Lokometsa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiganiza za dziko lokometsalo,
Komwe ndzafikako tsikulo;
Podzaima pa mbali pa Mp’lumutsiyo,
Ndidzavala nyenyezizoko?

M’mphamvu yakeyo ndigwiretu ntchitoyo,
Kuti ndikopetu anthuwo;
Kuti ndzapate nyenyezi pa tsikulo,
Mmene Mbuye ’dzayamike ’fe.

Ndidzakondwera poona Mbuyangayo,
Ndikupereka mituloyo;
Ndidzakondwera m’mzinda wa golidiwo,
Ndikadzavala nyenyezizo.
hymns.chorus:
Ndidzavala nyenyezizo ko, Mbuyanga,
Mmene dzuwa lidzalowadi (lowadi)?
Mmene ndzauka mmalo a mpumulowo,
Ndidzavala nyenyezizo ko (tsikulo)?

hymns.title: Yesu Mundilankhule
hymns.chorus:
Mundinong’onezetu, Mwa nsisi zanuzo,
Udzagonjetsa ndithu, Udzamasukadi.
Mundilankhule, Mbuye, Tsiku ndi tsikunso,
Ndimvetu mau anu, Sulitu wekha ’we.

hymns.title: Sindipemphera Mbuyanga
Mlonda, Tandiuza Ine
hymns.lyrics:
Mlonda, tandiuza ine, Kunja kuli kuchako?
Zosonyeza kudza kwake, Kodi zionekadi?
Inde, mlendo, taonani, Kucha kwayandikiratu,
Vala za kukoma zako, Kuli kucha, dzuka ’we.

Mlonda, nyali iwunika Mommo m’njira mwakomo;
Zozizwitsa m’dziko monse, Zisonyeza tsikulo.
Podzaomba pa lipenga, Pakudzuka a ku manda,
Omwalira mwa Ambuye, Adzavala chosafa.

Mlonda, fu’la lili kudza Tsiku lalikululo.
Onse alalike kuti, Mfumu yayandikatu.
Inde, mlendo ’we, ndiona, Dziko lopambana lija.
Mzinda wopambana yonse, Uwoneka tsidyalo.

Mlonda, undiuze ine, Za mu mzinda momwemo,
Mmene Mfumu ikukhala, Pa chimpando chakecho.
Dziko lija likuwala Ndi ulemerero wake;
Kuli duwa ndi mitengo, Ndi mitsinje yoposa.

Dzuwa lituluka ndithu, La usana womwewo.
Onse alalike kuti, Tsiku layandikatu.
A ulendo aonenso, Kuli phiri la Mulungu;
Tidzafika konko msanga, Tidzakondwererako.

hymns.title: Kapenatu Si Ku Phiriko
hymns.lyrics:
Kapenatu si ku phiriko, Kapena ku nyanjako,
Kapena ku nkhondo komwetu, Mufuna ndipite ’ne;
Komatu akandituma ’ne Ku dziko la ’lendowo,
Ndilola mwa mphamvu ya Mbuyeyo, Ndzapita mufunako.

Alipo mau Ambuyeyo, Afuna ndinenedi;
Kapena kuli wochimwayo Wosowa thandizoli;
Ambuye, mkanditsogoza’ne, Ingavute njirayo,
Ndzauza uthenga wabwinowo, Ndzanena mufunazo.

Alipo malo a inenso Ku munda wa Mbuyeyo,
Ndzagwira ntchito yotutayo Ya Yesu wopachikwa.
Pokhulupilira mwanumo, Podziwa mndikonda ’ne,
Ndzachita kufunatu kwanuko, Ndzakhala mufunazo.
hymns.chorus:
Ndzapita kumene mufunako,
M’phiri, m’dambo, ndi m’nyanjamo;
Ndzanena zimene mufunazo,
Ndzatsata Mpulumutsiyo.

hymns.title: Mau Akukwiya Leka
hymns.lyrics:
Mau akukwiya leka,
Musanene konsetu;
Muwameze mau onse
Asanadetse m’lomowo.

Chikonditu ndi choyera,
Ndi chibwenzi chomwenso,
Musachiononge konse
Ndi mau akukwiyawo.

Maubwenzi amasweka,
Ndi mabanja omwenso;
Ka’mba mau a kukwiya
Olankhulidwa mwa nsontho.
hymns.chorus:
Kondananitu, Ati Ambuye,
Ana mverani malamulowo;
Kondananitu, Ati Ambuye,
Ana mverani lamulo.

hymns.title: Wakufetsa Ndi Kulira
hymns.lyrics:
Wakufesa ndi kulira,
Mbeu za chikondicho,
Wosatopa, wosagona,
Yesu amdalitsa ’ye.

Mvula idzatsirirapo,
Dzuwa ’dzawaliranso,
Ndi zipatso zidzabala,
M’mphamvu ya Mulunguyo.

Fesa mbeu, usatope,
Usaope konsetu,
Nkana utapeza vuto,
Udzatuta mokondwa.
hymns.chorus:
Ona! mmera wakukondwa,
Dzinthu dzonse dzachanso
Ona! m’minda mwayeratu,
Layandika khunkhalo.

hymns.title: Masika A Dziko Ayandika
hymns.lyrics:
Masika a dziko ayandikatu,
Aitana Mbuye okololawo;
Ndi minda yayera pa dziko lonse,
Ndi mwini zotuta wayandikanso.

(Alto, Tenor, and Bass):
Idzanitu angelo, msangatu;
Tengerani zotuta mmwambamo.
Mudzatengetu ife, kunkatu,
Kwathu mmwambamo.

E, tsiku lopanda misozi konse,
Layandika kudza mothamangatu;
Akubalalika ndi uchimowo,
Mwasonkhetu nthawi isanathei.

Ikomatu ntchito ya chikondicho,
Kasupe wosaphwa wa kumwambako;
Chikonditu ndicho chiitana ’fe,
Chigwiritsa ntchito, chibalitsatu.
hymns.chorus:
’Dzanitu msanga, Tengatu zotuta;
Mdzatitenge ’fe, Kwathuko.

hymns.title: Mbuyanga Ndisowa Inu
hymns.lyrics:
Mbuyanga, ndisowa Inu!
Ndine wosaukadi;
Mundigwire dzanja,
Mbuye, Mundilimbikitsetu.

Mundiveke zakuyera,
Zanga zili nsanzatu;
Mndiphunzitse kupemphera,
Mundipatse mphamvuzo.

Munditsogolere, Mbuye,
Ndekha ndilepheradi;
Myende nane pa miyalapo,
Ndinu nyali yangayo.

Ndingapezetu mavuto,
Oliritsa mtimanga;
Ndidzaumirira Inu
Mdzandisangalatsadi.
hymns.chorus:
Nthawitu zonsezo,
Ndimasowa Inu, Mbuye!
Nthawitu zonsezo,
Yesu mundisunge ’ne.

hymns.title: Yesu Andisungetu!
hymns.chorus:
Yesu andisungetu!
Mbuye ndipempha ’Nu;
Inetu ndine chabe, chabe,
Inu ndi zonsezo.

hymns.title: Tsamwali Ndiri Naye
Yesu Anditsogozatu
’Mvani Yesu Aitana
hymns.lyrics:
’Mvani Yesu aitana, Ndani angagwiretu?
Mindayo yayera kale, Ndani akakunkhemo?
Momvekadi aitana, Mphotho ’dzalandira ’we.
Ndani angayankhe msanga, Ndine Mbuye, tumeni.

Nkana sungapite mtali Ku maiko enawo,
Ungapeze anthu ena Apafupi ndi iwe.
Ngati sungalalikire Monga ngati Paulo,
Unganene za chikondi Cha Ambuye wakoyo.

Ngati sungakhale mlonda Wochenjeza anthuwo;
Kuwauza anthu njira Yonka nayo mmwambamo;
Pakupempherera ena, Ungagwire ntchitoyo.
Ungachite ngati Huri Pothangata Moseyo.

Mmene anthu alikufa, Mbuye aitanabe;
Wina asamamve nuti, Singachite kanthui.
Gwira ntchito wakupatsa, Nuigwire msangatu;
Ndi kuyankha poitana, Ndine Mbuye, tumeni.

hymns.title: Pa Mapazi Ake Yesu
Ndikonda, Ndikonda Ambuyanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikonda, ndikonda Ambuyanga ’Nu;
Ndikonda Yesuyo, Mpulumutsitu.
Ndikonda Inuyo muzidziwadi;
Zintchito zinena kukonda kwanga.

Ndikondwa, ndikondwa kopambanadi!
Ndaima pa phiri ndiyang’anitsa
Ku mzinda woyera ndikakhaleko,
Ndi Yesu, angelo, ndi anzangawo.

Yesu ’Nu, Mp’lumutsi, mndidalitsetu,
Ndinutu chimwemwe mpumulo wanga.
Ndiyimba chikondi cha Mbuyangayo;
Chisomo chanucho chindidzaza ’ne.

Ndaniyo aposa Mpulumutsiyo?
Akonda inenso nan’thangata ’ne.
Ndiyamika Mbuye, ndiyimbira ’Ye,
Ndikondwa koposa mu mtimangamo.

hymns.title: Thanthwe Long’ambika
hymns.lyrics:
Thanthwe long’ambikatu,
Ndibisale momwemu!
Madzi ndipo mwaziwo
Zotuluka m’nthitimo,
Zinditsuke m’mtima mbu!
Zindilimbikitsetu.

Ntchito zanga zonsezo,
Sizikondweretsa ’Nu;
Ndikazigwiritsadi,
Ndikalira nsonizi,
Zonse sizikwanazi,
Koma Yesu yekhayo.

M’manja mwanga chabe bi,
Mtanda ndingogwiradi;
Maliseche mveke ’ne,
Ndili ndekha, msunge ’ne,
Ndithawire mtsinjewo,
Munditsuke m’mtimamo.

M’moyo uno kunsiku,
Pena ndimwaliratu,
Mmene ndidzaukanso
Tionane masowo;
Thanthwe long’ambikatu,
Ndibisale momwemu.

hymns.title: Maziko Olimba
Yehova Ndi M’busa Wanga
hymns.lyrics:
Yehova ndi Mbusa, Sin’dzasowai,
Ndigona ku busa La msipu Wake
Anditsogolera Ku madzi ake,
Anditsitsimutsa Ndi mphamvu Yake.

Anditsogolera M’mabande mwake,
Chifukwa cha dzina Lokondedwalo.
Ngakhale ndiyenda Pafupi imfa,
Ha! sindidzaopa Zoipa zonse.

Chibonga ndi ndodo Za Mbusa wanga
Zindisangalatsa Masiku onse.
Mundiyalikira Pa maso panga,
Mkuona kwa mdani Chakudya changa.

Mudzoza mafuta Pa mutu panga,
Mwadzaza chifundo Mu chikho changa,
Udzanditsatira Ukoma wanu,
Ndidzakhala nanu Masiku onse.

hymns.title: Ugoneranjitu Mwana Wa Mfumu?
hymns.lyrics:
Ugoneranjitu mwana wa mfumu,
Kwinanso  wayandikira m’mwamba?
Dzuka, nyamuka, uvale za nkhondo;
Bweratu nthawi isanathei.

Anthu a m’dziko adzanjenjemera,
Adzaopsedwa ndi kudza Kwake;
Mvetsa migugu abwera Ambuye,
Mwana wa mfumu usachedwatu.

Usachedwenso ndi zinthu za m’dziko,
Ulemerero udzathadi phe!
Dula zinsinga zolimba za m’dani,
Mwana wa mfumu kondwera ndithu.

Usayang’anetu kwina iyai,
Yembekezera ufumu wake;
Ona kuwala m’mapiri monsemo,
Mwana wa mfumu zileke zonse.

hymns.title: Mulungu, Mfumu
hymns.lyrics:
Mulungu, Mfumu ’Nu, Ndilibe mphamvutu,
Munandilenga, mundisunga Nthawi zonsezi.
Munandilenga, Mundisunga Nthawi zonsezi.

Ndilibe winanso, Ndimatsamira ’Nu;
Zabwino zanu zipambana, Ndichitenji ko?
Zabwino zanu zipambana, Ndichitenji ko?

Ndipatse chiyani ko? Poona zonsezi
Zakhala zanu kale ndithu.  Ndidzatani ko?
Zakhala zanu kale ndithu.  Ndidzatani ko?

Mufuna mtimanga, Ndipatsa msangatu.
Ndikhale wanu nthawi zonse, Mndilandire ’ne.
Ndikhale wanu nthawi zonse, Mndilandire ’ne.

hymns.title: Kunja Kuli Kucha Kodi?
hymns.lyrics:
Kunja kuli kucha kodi? Mlonda, tandiuza ’ne.
Kodi nthanda yatuluka? Kodi kunja kwachatu?
Ukuona kodi kuti kwachadi?
Ukuona kodi kuti kwachadi?

Tifunsitse za ulendo, Kodi ulikuthadi?
Tayandikatu ku doko, Kodi tingaoneko?
Tingaone dziko la kumwambako?
Tingaone dziko la kumwambako?

Tifuuletu kolimba, Kunja kuli kuchatu;
Nthanda ili kutuluka, Iwoneka mwambamo.
Kondwerani, tayandika kwathuko;
Kondwerani, tayandika kwathuko.

Tili nao mau ake, Otitsogolera ’fe.
Tithamangetu dzolimba, Kuti tikafikeko.
Fuulani mokondwera m’mtimamo.
Fuulani mokondwera m’mtimamo.

hymns.title: Ambuye Wathu Yesu, Mubwera Liti?
hymns.lyrics:
Ambuye wathu Yesu, Mubwera liti ko?
Mitima yatopadi, Muchedweranji ko?
Lidzadza liti tsiku Lonyezimiralo,
Limene anthu anu Adzakondweranso?

Musiya mpaka liti, Ee, nyumba yanuyo?
Mwachedwachedwa, Mbuye, Ambiri agwatu;
Agwidwa ndi za dziko, Antchito anuwo;
Atsalatu pang’ono Oyang’anira ’Nu.

Dzutsani anthu anu, Tumani mauwo;
Anene anthu onse, Akudza Mbuyeyo!
Ziyake nyali zathu, Tivale bwinotu.
Tikonze mtima wathu, Kuona Mbuyeyo.

hymns.title: Ndikadakhala Nacho Chikhulupiro
hymns.lyrics:
Ndikadakhala nachotu Chikhulupirocho,
Sindinganjenjemeretu M’mavuto monsemo.

Choti ndikalangidwa ’ne, Ndisang’ung’udzatu,
Popwetekedwa ineyo Ndikhulupira ’Ye.

Chomwe chiwala m’mtimanga, Pokhala m’mdimamo,
Chimene sichiwopatu, Sichikaikanso.

Chosasunthika konsetu, Pokwiya dzikoli,
Machimo sangakope ’ne Akandidzera ’ne.

Mbuye, patseni mphamvuyo, Chikhulupirocho.
Chinkana pansi panotu Ndidzakondwerabe.

hymns.title: Akhristu Ali Nacho Chiyembekezo
hymns.lyrics:
Akhristu ali nachotu Chiyembekezocho.
Chimatikondweretsatu M’mavuto monsemo.
Chimatikondweretsatu M’mavuto monsemo.

Chinena za mpumulowo Pokhala ndi Khristu.
Pamodzi ndi anzangawo Tidzakhalitsako.
Pamodzi ndi anzangawo Tidzakhalitsako.

Mayeso ndi machimowo Kulibe mdzikolo.
Misozi ndipo imfanso Kulibe komweko.
Misozi ndipo imfanso Kulibe komweko.

Masiku athe msangatu, Ambuye adzetu.
Tilakalaka kuona Dzikolo ndi Inu.
Tilakalaka kuona Dzikolo ndi Inu.

hymns.title: Mpulumutsi, Mbusa Wathu
Chiyembekezo Chodala
hymns.lyrics:
Chiyembekezotu Chodalitsikacho,
Choposa zinthu zonsezo Za dziko lathuli.

Ilipo nyalitu Yowala m’mdimamo,
Yomwetu isonyeza ’fe, Za manda onsewo.

Alipo mauwo Osangalatsatu,
Achotsa makaikowo A nsisi zakezo.

Ee, mau akewo Atimasula ’fe;
Ndiwotu nyali yathuyo, Chiyembekezero.

hymns.title: Mdziko La Kuwalalo
hymns.chorus:
Misozi aichotsa, Imfa, nthenda ndi mantha.
Sawerenganso zaka, Kulibe usiku.

hymns.title: Mmamawa Kapena Potuluka Dzuwa
hymns.lyrics:
Mmamawa kapena potuluka dzuwa,
Ambuye Yesuyo ’dzafika ndi mphamvu,
Ndi ulemerero wo’kulu kutenga
Anthu ake mu dzikoli.

Kapena usana kapena madzulo,
Kapena usiku pamene Ambuye
’Dzafika mu ulemelero kutenga
Anthu ake mu dzikoli.

Tidzakondwa ngati tidzanka osafa,
Opanda kudwala, chisoni, maliro;
Kungokhwathulidwa podzadza kutenga
Anthu ake mu dzikoli.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu, Mbuye wathu,
’Dzayimba mokondwa liti?
Khristu adza, Khristu adza,
Aleluya amen. Aleluya amen.

hymns.title: Wakukonzeka Pakubwera Mkwati?
hymns.chorus:
Onani Mkwati, Yesu abweratu!
Onani Mkwati, Yesu abweratu!
Yang’ana adza, yang’ana adza!
Konzeka akubwera Mkwatiyo.

hymns.title: Sitidziwa Nthawi Ya Kudza
hymns.lyrics:
Sitidziwa nthawi yakudza kwa Mbuye,
Koma zooneka pa dziko zinena
Adzabwera msanga, tikondwa,
Komatu sitidziwa nthawi.

Ku’nika kulipo kwa anthu a nzeru,
Cho’nadi chilipo mu mau a Mlungu,
Alembi anena momveka,
Komatu sitidziwa nthawi.

Tilinde, tipemphe ndi nyali zowala,
Tigwirenso ntchito mpakatu abwera.
Poona zozizwa tiyimbe,
Komatu sitidziwa nthawi.
hymns.chorus:
Adzatu! Tikonzeke, tilinde!
Adzatu! Aleluya! Aleluya!
Adza ndi mphamvu za ’Tate wake,
Komatu sitidziwa nthawi.

hymns.title: Sitidziwa Kudza Kwa Mbuye
hymns.lyrics:
Sitidziwa kudza kwa Mbuye,
Madzulo kapena mmawa;
Kapena nthawi ya usiku,
Kapena m’mabinga kucha;
Atiuzatu tikonzeke,
Tisazime nyali zathu;
Pobwera adzatipezetu,
Tili kumdikira Iye.

(Alto, Tenor, and Bass):
Kudikiratu ndi kupemphera,
Kudikiratu ndi kupemphera;
Kuchezeratu ndi kupemphera,
Ndi kuyang’anira Inu.

Chikondi chake nchodabwitsa,
Kutiombola ifetu;
Anasiya malo oposa,
Nadza kudzatiferatu;
Nthawi zonse amakondwera,
Mmene owomboledwawo;
Akondwera m’chiyembekezo,
Podikira Mbuye wao.

Inu Yesu, Mombolo wanga,
Mudziwa ndikukondani,
Ndiyembekeza kundiona,
Ndidzamva mau anuwo;
Mmene mudzadza kuweruza,
Ena adzakuthawani,
Koma ine ndidzakondwera,
Ndili kudikira Inu.
hymns.chorus:
Kudikiratu, Ndi kupemphera;
Kuchezeratu, Ndi kuyang’anira Inu.

hymns.title: Masomphenya A Tsikulo
hymns.chorus:
Tione masomphenya a tsikulo
Limene lili kudza!
Ndi uleme’ro wa tsikulo manda
Adzatseguka.

hymns.title: Analonjeza Ambuye Wathu
hymns.lyrics:
Analonjeza Ambuye wathu,
Ndibweranso msanga kulandira ’nu.
Gwiritsanitu choonadicho,
Msagonenso tulo, dikiranitu.

Tidikiratu ndi nyali zathu,
Adzadzanso monga usiku mbala.
Timadziwanso wayandikadi,
Komatu za tsiku sitidziwai.

Chiyembekezo cha mau ake,
Kubwera kwa Yesu, Ambuye wathu.
Ndi lonjezano lopambanadi,
Abweradi msanga, gwiritsanibe.
hymns.chorus:
Gwiritsanitu choonadicho,
Apatsa inu ufumu wake,
Lowani nonse m’chimwemwe changa;
Korona alinda, gwiritsanibe.

hymns.title: A M’dziko Akondweretu
hymns.lyrics:
A m’dziko akondweretu,
Ambuye adzanso.
Mlandire Mfumu yathuyo
Poyimba mokondwa,
Poyimba mokondwa,
Poyimbayimba mokondwa.

A m’dziko akondweretu,
Adzalamula ’Ye.
Ndi anthuwo ayimbetu
Kutama Mbuyeyo,
Kutama Mbuyeyo,
Kutama Mbuye wathuyo.

Adzalamula mwa nsisi
Mitundu yonseyo;
Nawasonyeza onsewo
Chikondi Chakecho,
Chikondi Chakecho,
Chikondi Chake Mbuyeyo.

hymns.title: Tinena Za Dziko Lija
hymns.lyrics:
Tinena za dziko lija, Lokoma ndi lowalalo;
Tinena ubwino wake, Tidzazizwa pofikako,
Tinena miseu yake, Makomanso a ngalewo;
Zokoma zosaneneka, Tidzazizwa pofikapo.

Tinena zomasukatu M’uchimo ndi m’mayesowo;
Kusiya mavuto onse, Tidzazizwa pofikako.
Tinena chikondi chawo, Zovala za oyerawo,
Za mpingo wa onka mmwamba, Tidzazizwa pofikako.

Mukonze mu mtima mwanga, Ngakhale ndiyesedwatu,
Nanenso ndidziwe ndithu Khalidwe la kumwambako.
Pomwepo mu dziko lija, Lokoma ndi lowalalo,
’Dzayenda ndi angelowo, Ndi Yesu adzakhalako

hymns.title: Tabwera M’nyumbayi
Tili Kuyimba Nyimbo Yomweyi
hymns.lyrics:
Tili kuyimba nyimbo yomweyi,
Yakuyamika Mbuye wathuyo,
Mtendere wake tiufunadi,
Titapemphera tinka kwathuko.

Titanka kwathu, mkhale nafeko,
Tikufunani, Yesu, Mbuyathu,
Mutisungire nthawi zonsezo,
Mutiyeretse m’mtima mwathu mbu!

Usiku uno mutisungedi,
Khalani mfupi mnyumba mwathumo.
Mamawanso mudzatidzutse nji!
Kuti tigwire ntchito zathuzo.

Mtitsogolere nthawi zonsezo,
Kuyenda tokha sitikhozai.
Ngati mukhala, Mbuye, mfupimo,
Sitidzaopa kanthu kena bi.

hymns.title: Nkana Ndinachimwadi
Tilibe Mzinda M’dzikoli
hymns.lyrics:
Tilibe mzinda m’dzikoli
Wolimba, wokhalitsanso;
Komatu tikondwera ’fe,
Tifuna mzinda udzawo,
Tifuna mzinda udzawo.

Tilibe mzinda m’dzikoli,
Wolimba, wokhalitsanso;
Tifuna wina m’mwambamo,
Wowala ndi wosathanso,
Wowala ndi wosathanso.

Ee, malo a mtenderewo,
Otopawo apumako!
Ndikhala ndi mapikowo,
Ndikadaulukirako,
Ndikadaulukirako.

Tonthola moyo wanga ’we,
Adziwa nthawi Mlunguyo;
Ndichite ntchito yakeyo,
Apatsa ’ne mpumulowo,
Apatsa ’ne mpumulowo.

hymns.title: Konda Dzina La Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Konda dzinalo la Yesu,
Mwana wosauka ’we,
Ndilo lothandiza anthu,
Khala nalo ponse phee.

Konda dzinalo la Yesu,
M’moyo mwanu monsemo;
Mmene muli kuyesedwa,
Tchula dzina lakelo.

Dzina ili ndi lokoma,
La Mombolo wathuyo,
Polandira ife mmwamba
Tidzakondwererako.

Mbuye Yesu timtamanda,
Ndi zinyimbo zathuzo;
Mfumu ya mafumu onse,
Yesu timayesadi.
hymns.chorus:
Dzina la Yesuyo,
Lokondwetsa onsewo.
Mwambamo, ponsepo,
Litonthoza m’mtimamo.

hymns.title: Ndidziwitsitsa Yesu Ngwanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndidziwitsitsa Yesu ngwanga;
Tsiku ndi tsiku ndimakondwera.
Anandigula ndi mwazi ’ke,
Anandipatsa Mzimu wake.

Nkamvera Yesu ndikondwatu,
Ndiyang’anitsa Ambuyangayo
Ndipo angelo atengera
Ine chisomo ndi chumanso.

Ndine kapolo wa Mbuyanga,
Andigwiritsa ntchito Zake.
Ndimyembekeza ’dzabweranso,
Adzanditenga kwawo mmwamba.
hymns.chorus:
Mau omwewo, nyimbo yomwe,
Yesu ndimtama tsiku lonse.
Mau omwewo, nyimbo yomwe,
Yesu ndimtama tsiku lonse.

hymns.title: Pa Mtanda Pomwe Naferapo
hymns.lyrics:
Pa mtanda pomwe naferapo,
Pomwe ndalira ndi tchimolo,
Anandipaka ndi mwaziwo,
Tama dzinalo.

Nandiwombola m’zoipazo,
Yesu akhala mu mtimanga,
Nandilandira pa mtandapo,
Tama dzinalo.

Ndiye Kasupe Woyerayo!
Ndikondwa kuti ndasambamo,
Yesu watsukadi inenso,
Tama dzinalo.

Idza kwa Yesu kasupeyo,
Igwa pa mapazi akewo,
Sambamo lero uyeretu,
Tama dzinalo.
hymns.chorus:
Tama dzinalo, Tama dzinalo,
Anandipaka ndi mwaziwo,
Tama dzinalo.

hymns.title: Kodi Ungakhale Moyo Wonga Wacewo?
hymns.lyrics:
Kodi ungakhale moyo wonga Wakewo?
Kumayenda naye m’njira monsemo?
Ungamlole Iye kunyamula nkhawazo?
Mlole atsogole ’Ye.

Ungamlole kuti Iye amasule ’we?
Kuti umutsate poitana ’Ye?
Ungamlole kukutchinjiriza Mbuyeyo?
Mlole atsogole ’Ye.

Monga ukapeza malo mu ufumuwo?
Ungamyese akusamalire ’we?
Ungagwire ntchito Yake kopambanadi?
Mlole atsogole ’Ye.
hymns.chorus:
Mwa mphamvu Yake udzakhalatu,
Wakumasuka, inde, m’mwazi ’ke.
Chikondi ’ke chidzaze mtimako,
Poyenda nawe zidamkonda ’Ye.

hymns.title: Pakakhala Chikondi
hymns.chorus:
Chikondi m’banjamo;
Akhala mu mtendere, Akakondana.

hymns.title: Tifuna Mzimu wanuyo
hymns.lyrics:
Tifuna Mzimu wanuyo,
Yemwe nawala kalelo;
Nawatenthetsa m’mtimamo,
Nawalimbitsa mzo’psamo.

Mzimuyo ali kuti ko,
Nadzazayo Abramuyo?
Namsintha mtima Paulo,
Yemwe nampatsa changucho?

Yemwenso kalekalelo
Nanena za chikondicho,
Nawala pa Yesayayo,
Nampatsa Daniel nzeruzo.

Kodi mulibe mphamvuzo
Monga Eliya nazimva?
Mose nawala nkhopeyo,
Yobu anapiriranso?

M’chitetu monga kalelo,
Dzutsani ntchito yanuyo.
M’mene tipempha kwanuko,
Mtitsanulire Mzimuyo.

hymns.title: Ufuna Kuomboledwa Kodi?
hymns.lyrics:
Ufuna kuwomboledwa kodi?
Ilipo mphamvu m’mwazi Wake;
Ufuna kugonjetsa zoipa?
Muli mphamvu m’mwazi Wake.

Ufuna kuleka kunyadako?
Ilipo mphamvu m’mwazi Wake;
Idzatu pa mtanda nutsukidwe,
Muli mphamvu m’mwazi Wake.

Ufuna kuyera kopambana?
Ilipo mphamvu m’mwazi Wake;
Zoipa zonse adzayeretsa,
Muli mphamvu m’mwazi Wake.

Ufuna kugwira ntchito Yake?
Ilipo mphamvu m’mwazi Wake;
Ufuna kumuyimbira Iye?
Muli mphamvu m’mwazi Wake.
hymns.chorus:
Muli mphamvu (m’mwazi) yozizwitsatu,
M’mwazi wa Yesuyo;
Muli mphamvu (m’mwazi) yozizwitsatu,
M’mwazi wa Mwana wa Nkhosa.

hymns.title: Mdimawo Kulibe
hymns.lyrics:
Mdimawo kulibe akadza ’Ye,
Mdimawo kulibe akadza ’Ye,
Mdimawo kulibe akadza ’Ye,
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo.

Imfayo kulibe akadza ’Ye,
Imfayo kulibe akadza ’Ye;
Tidzakondweratu akadza ’Ye,
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo.

Msoziwo kulibe akadza ’Ye,
Msoziwo kulibe akadza ’Ye;
Adzasonkha onse akadza ’Ye,
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo.

Tidzayimba nyimbo akadza ’Ye,
Tidzayimba nyimbo akadza ’Ye;
Onse ’dzasonkhana akadza ’Ye,
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo.
hymns.chorus:
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo (Ake),
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo (Ake);
Mdimawo kulibe akadza  ’Ye,
Kutenga ’nthu Akewo.

hymns.title: Bwenzi Labwino Ndilo Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Bwenzi labwino ndilo Yesu,
Mmene muvutidwa m’dzikoli;
Alimbitsa mtimamo,
Atipatsa mphamvunso,
Bwenzi labwino ndilo yesu.

Ndinapezatu bwenzi Yesu,
Atonthoza moyo wangawu,
M’mene ndimtsamira ’Ye,
Sin’dzaopa m’daniyo,
Bwenzi labwino ndilo Yesu.

Pakuyenda usiku wo’psa
Wa chisoni ndi wa imfayo,
Sindiopa konse bi,
Yesu ap’lumutsadi,
Bwenzi labwino ndilo Yesu.

Podzafika kumwamba konko,
Tonse okhulupirika ’fe,
Inde, tidzayimbadi
Kumtamanda Iyeyo,
Bwenzi labwino ndilo Yesu.

hymns.title: Ulemu Kwa Mulungu
hymns.lyrics:
Ulemu kwa Mlungu, Ambuye wathu,
Akonda, napatsa ’fe Mwana Wake;
Napatsatu moyo kuombola ’fe,
Pa khomo la moyo natsegulatu.

Anapulumutsa ndi mwazi Wake
Amene akhulupirira mwa ’Ye.
Ngakhale wochimwa koposa ndithu,
Adzakhululukidwa mwa Yesuyo.

Anatiphunzitsa zopambanazo,
Tikondwa mwa Yesu, Ambuye wathu;
Komabe ’dzazizwa kopambanadi,
Pamene atenga ’fe, kumwambako.

hymns.title: Ndinu Wakuyera!
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinu wakuyera! Wa mphamvu zonse,
Nthawi ya m’mamawa tiyimba nyimboyi;
Mlengi wachifundo tikuyamikani,
Ee, Mlungu m’modzi mwa Atatuwo.

Ndinu wakuyera! Onse pa dziko
Akuyimbirani nakupempherani;
Akumwamba omwe nagwadira Inu,
Wa chikhalire ndi wosafai.

Ndinu wakuyera! Ife ochimwa,
Ulemero wanu sitimaona bi!
Mwayeradi nokha, wina saoneka;
Wangwiro m’mphamvu ndi m’kuyeramo.

hymns.title: Anandibvuula
hymns.lyrics:
Mtima wanga unaopa Yehova
Ntakanikizidwa pansi ndi cimo;
Ndamulirira Ambye m’thopemo,
Anandibvuulamo mwa cifundo.

Wandikhazika pa thanthwe lolimba,
Ndakhazikitsidwa sindicokapo;
Pano palibe coopsya ndakhala,
Cisomo cidzandibveka korona.

Wandipatsa nyimbo ya mayamiko,
Msana ndi usiku ndidzayimba;
Mtimawu useka ndi ufulu,
Ndikutamandani Mombolo wanga.

Ndidzayimba nsisi mwandicitira,
Ndzalimbika mpaka onse amdziwe;
Cipulumutso ndzayimba konseko.
Kuti ambiri amvere Mulungu
hymns.chorus:
Anandibuula m’matope,
Nandikhazikitsa pa thanthwe;
Moyo wanga lero uyimba,
Matamando Haleluya

hymns.title: Yesu Tsogolereni
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu tsogolereni, Pa ulendo woopsya;
Zobvuta zosatheka; ziri m’tsogolo mwanga,
Inu zonse mudziwa, Yesu tsogolereni.

Monga mai acita Naye mwana polira
Muletse zobvutazo; Nditonthozedwe ine,
Ndinu Mfumu ya luntha; Yesu tsogolereni.

Pakutha pa dzikoli, Zoopsa zidzakula;
Pokhapokha pa Inu, Ndidzapeza Mpumulo,
Ndidzamva mau aja ’Msaope nditsogoza.’

hymns.title: Nkhoswe Yadza
hymns.lyrics:
Lalikira mau konse kuli anthu
A mtima wosowa A m’dziko latsoka,
Mkhristu ali yense Anene mokondwa
Nkhoswe yafikadid!

Usiku wapiti, Kunja nako kwaca;
Kulira kwaleka, Ndi mkwiyo naonse,
Pamapiri napo Dzuwa lioneka;
Nkhoswe yafikadi!

Mfumu ya mafumu ibwera ndi mwayi,
Kwa ocimwa onse Kudzapulumutsa;
M’malomo mwa cete Mumveka nyimbo
Nkhoswe yafikadi!

Cikondi cakuya Ndicimene bwanji,
Kwa anthu ocimwa Apeze cisomo, Wocimwa ngati’ne Ndingawale bwanji;
Nkhoswe yafikadi!

Kuyimba kumveke Mlengalenga monse;
Oyera a m’mwamba Ndi a pansi pano
Abvomerezane Nyimbo yacikondi,
Nkhoswe yafikadi!
hymns.chorus:
Nkhoswe yafikadi, Nkhoswe yafikadi!
Mzimu wa Mulungu pangano la Mbuye;
Lalikira mau Konse kuli anthu,
Nkhoswe yafikadi!

hymns.title: Bwera Wosocera! Bwera!
hymns.lyrics:
M’dziko la alendo, Komwe ukhala,
Imva kuitana, "Mwana wanga!’

Ku dziko la njala, Wokomokawe
Idza ukondwe, "Mwana wanga!"

Siya zanduzo Coka m’matsoka,
Watopa mumtima, "Mwana wanga!"

Komo Ndotseguka! Ndiwe wangabe;
Ndikuyang’anabe, "Mwana wanga!"

Wasocereratu; Subwera kodi?
Wakhulukidwa, "Mwana wanga!"

Gome lilindira, Suiwalika!
Udzadye upume, "Mwana wanga!"

Wopanda kwanu’we, Wopereweza,
Ndikukonda iwe, "Mwana wanga!"
hymns.chorus:
"Bwera wosocera! Bwerera Kwanu!
Wasocera Kutali; Bwera kwanu!’

hymns.title: Yesu Ponong’oneza
Ndinakuferatu, Wacitanji ’
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinakufera ’we, ndakhetsa mwaziwo
Kupulumutsa ’we kucoka mwimfayo
Ndapatsa moyo wangawo, wapatsa inenji?
Wapatsa moyo wangawo, wapatsa inenji?

Ndasiya mwambamo, ulemererowo,
Ndinadza m’dzikomu mwa mdima wokhawo.
Ndasiya zonse zabwino, wasiya c’ani ’we?
Ndasiya zonse zabwino, was iya c’ani ’we?

Ndinazunzidwa ’ne, kosanenekatu,
Ndasautsine ’ne, populumutsa ’we.
Ndinapirira zonsezi, wapiliranji ’we?
Ndinapilira zonsezi, wapiliranji ’we?

hymns.title: Cikhululukiro Coona
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinaona pa Mtandapo
Wothatha ndi mwazi
Ali kundiyang’anitsa,
Pafupi ndi mtanda

Sindihta Kuiwala,
Zomwe ndinaona
Ngati ndine ndinamupha,
Zidziwika zokha

Anandiyang’anitsanso,
Ngati kundiuza
Imfa yino, mwazi uno,
zikupulumutsa

Chimo langa linamupha,
Loda ngati mdima,
Cinsisi ca cisomoco,
Cakhululukira

hymns.title: Usamanong’ona
hymns.lyrics:
Usamanong’ona M’kacisi muno!
Udzikhala cete, Kumvetseratu.

Udzikhala cete malo ano
Cifukwa Ambuye aona iwe.

Udzidzicepetsa popempherapo;
Cifukwa Ambuye amvera iwe.

Ganiza zabwino za Mlungu wathu,
Dikira, numvere uthenga wace.
hymns.chorus:
Nyang’ma (tu), Nyang’ama (tu),
Poyenda muno
Popeza (tu), m’nyumba (tu)
Ya Mlungu wathu.

hymns.title: Ntayenda Nanu
hymns.lyrics:
Ntayenda nanu Mulungu!
Ngati a Kumwamba,
Ntaunikidwa panjira,
Yofitsa kwa Yesu

Mzimu Woyera bwerani,
Mtehnga wa mpumulo;
Ndidana nazo zoipa,
Zotilekanitsa

Ndinakondwa nthawi ija!
Sindingaiwaile,
Ndatsala m’zobvuta zokha,
Dziko ndi lacabe.

Fano ndinalikondalo,
Kaya ndi lotani,
Thangateni kulicotsa,
nditsale ndi Inu

hymns.title: Mombolo Wozizwitsa
hymns.lyrics:
Khristu nsembe ya ocimwa, Mombolo wozizwitsa!
Taomboledwa ndi mwazi, Mombolo wozizwitsa!

Nditama mwazi wacewo, Mombolo wozizitswa!
Wandifitsa kwa Mulungu, Mombolo wozizwitsa!

Wanditsuka chimo lonse, Mombolo wozizwitsa!
Mfumu ndiye m’kati mwanga, Mombolo wozizwitsa!

Ndiri naye m’njira monse, Mombolo wozizwitsa!
An’sunga tsiku ndi tsiku, Mombolo wozizwitsa!

Andipatsa cigonjetso, Mombolo wozizwitsa!
Ndi m’mayeso cipambano, Mombolo wozizwitsa!

Ndampatsa Mtima wonsewu, Mombolo wozizweitsa!
Dziko silingathandize; Mombolo wozizwitsa!
hymns.chorus:
Mombolo wozizwitsa ndiye Yesu wanga!
Mombolo wozizwitsa Ndi Yesu Mbuye.

hymns.title: Madalitso Ngati Mvula
hymns.lyrics:
"Madalitso ngati mbvumbi;’ Pangano la cikondi;
Nyengo yakupata mphamvu, Yocokera Kumwamba.

"Madalitso ngati mbumbi; "Titsitsimutseniso"
M’mapiri ndi m’madambonso, Mvula ya citsitsimutso.

"Madalitso ngati Mbvumbi;" Tipotsenitu Mbuye;
Mtitsitsimutse tsopano, Tiope Mau anu.

"Madalitso ngati mbvumbi;" Mbumbiwo ugwe lero,
Tilandireninso Mbuye, Yesu musatitaye.
hymns.chorus:
Tipempha Inu Mvula ya madalitso;
Nsisi zitigwre ife, Tipempha madalitso.
(Alto, Tenor and Bass):
Mvula tipempha Inu, Mvula ya madalitso,
Nsisi zitigwre ife, Tipempha madalitso.
