hymns.chorus:
Stand like the brave, stand like the brave,
Stand like the brave, with thy face to the foe.

hymns.title: Awake, My Soul!
hymns.lyrics:
Awake, my soul! stretch every nerve,
And press with vigor on;
A heavenly race demands thy zeal,
And an immortal crown.

’Tis God’s all animating voice
That calls thee from on high;
’Tis he whose hand presents the prize
To thine aspiring eye.

A cloud of witnesses around
Hold thee in full survey;
Forget the steps already trod,
And onward urge thy way.

Blest Saviour, introduced by Thee,
Our race have we begun;
And, crowned with victory, at Thy feet
We’ll lay our trophies down.

hymns.title: Onward, Christian Soldiers!
hymns.lyrics:
Onward, Christian soldiers!
Marching as to war,
With the cross of Jesus
Going on before.
Christ the royal Master,
Leads against the foe;
Forward into battle,
See, His banners go!

Like a mighty army
Moves the church of God;
Christians, we are treading
Where the saints have trod;
We are not divided,
All one body we,
One in hope and doctrine,
One in charity.

Crowns and thrones have perished,
Kingdoms rise and wane,
But the church of Jesus
Constant will remain.
Gates of hell can never
’Gainst that church prevail;
We have Christ’s own promise,
That can never fail.

Onward, then, ye people!
Join our happy throng,
Blend with ours your voices
In the triumph song;
Glory, praise, and honour
Unto Christ the King,
This through countless ages
Men and angels sing.
hymns.chorus:
Onward, Christian soldiers!
Marching as to war,
With the cross of Jesus
Going on before.

hymns.title: Fight the Good Fight
Sound the Battle Cry
hymns.lyrics:
Sound the battle cry,
See! the foe is nigh;
Raise the standard high
For the Lord;
Gird your armor on,
Stand firm, every one,
Rest your cause upon
His holy word.

Strong to meet the foe,
Marching on we go,
While our cause we know
Must prevail;
Shield and banner bright,
Gleaming in the light,
Battling for the right,
We ne’er can fail.

O Thou God of all,
Hear us when we call,
Help us, one and all,
By Thy grace;
When the battle’s done,
And the victory won,
May we wear the crown
Before Thy face.
hymns.chorus:
Rouse, then, soldiers! rally round the banner!
Ready, steady, pass the word along;
Onward, forward, shout aloud hosanna!
Christ is Captain of the mighty throng.

hymns.title: Rise Up, O Church of God
hymns.lyrics:
Rise up, O men of God!
His kingdom tarries long.
Bring in the day of brotherhood,
And end the night of wrong.

Let women all rise up!
Have done with lesser things.
Give heart and soul and mind and strength
To serve the King of kings.

Rise up, courageous youth!
The church for you doth wait,
Her strength unequal to her task.
Rise up, and make her great!

Lift high the cross of Christ!
Tread where his feet have trod.
Disciples of the Son of man
Rise up, O church of God!

hymns.title: Soldiers of Christ, Arise
hymns.lyrics:
Soldiers of Christ, arise,
And put your armor on,
Strong in the strength which God supplies
Through His eternal Son;
Strong in the Lord of hosts,
And in His mighty power,
Who in the strength of Jesus trusts
Is more than conqueror.

Stand, then, in His great might,
With all His strength endued;
But take, to arm you for the fight,
The panoply of God;
That, having all things done,
And all your conflicts passed,
You may o’ercome thro’ Christ alone,
And stand entire at last.

From strength to strength go on;
Wrestle, and fight, and pray;
Tread all the powers of darkness down,
And win the well-fought day;
Still let the Spirit cry,
In all His soldiers, “Come!”
Till Christ the Lord who reigns on high
Shall take the conquerors home.

hymns.title: We Are Living, We Are Dwelling
hymns.lyrics:
We are living, we are dwelling,
In a grand and awful time,
In an age on ages telling-
To be living is sublime.
Hark! the waking up of nations,
Gog and Magog to the fray;
Hark! what soundeth? Is creation
Groaning for her latter day?

Christian, rouse and arm for conflict,
Nerve thee for the battlefield;
Bear the helmet of salvation,
And the mighty gospel shield;
Let the breast-plate, peace, be on thee,
Take the Spirit’s sword in hand;
Boldly, fearlessly, go forth then,
In Jehovah’s strength to stand.

And the prince of evil spirits,
Great deceiver of the world!
He who at the blessed Jesus
Once his deadly weapons hurled,
Cometh with unwonted power,
Knowing that his reign will cease
When the kingdom shall be given
To the mighty Prince of Peace.

Christian, rouse! fight in this warfare,
Cease not till the victory’s won;
Till your Captain loud proclaimeth,
“Servant of the Lord, well done!”
He, alone, who thus is faithful,
Who abideth to the end,
Hath the promise, in the kingdom
An eternity to spend.

hymns.title: Stand Up! Stand Up for Jesus!
hymns.lyrics:
Stand up! stand up for Jesus!
Ye soldiers of the cross;
Lift high His royal banner,
It must not suffer loss;
From victory unto victory,
His army shall He lead,
Till every foe is vanquished,
And Christ is Lord indeed.

Stand up! stand up for Jesus!
The trumpet call obey;
Forth to the mighty conflict,
In this His glorious day.
Ye that are His now serve Him
Against unnumbered foes;
Let courage rise with danger,
And strength to strength oppose.

Stand up! stand up for Jesus!
Stand in His strength alone;
The arm of flesh will fail you;
Ye dare not trust your own.
Put on the gospel armor,
And, watching unto prayer,
Where duty calls, or danger,
Be never wanting there.

Stand up! stand up for Jesus!
The strife will not be long;
This day the noise of battle,
The next the victor’s song.
To Him that overcometh,
A crown of life shall be;
He with the King of glory
Shall reign eternally.

hymns.title: Lead On, O King Eternal
On Jordan’s Stormy Banks
hymns.lyrics:
On Jordan’s stormy banks I stand,
And cast a wishful eye
To Canaan’s fair and happy land,
Where my possessions lie.

O’er all those wide extended plains
Shines one eternal day;
There, Christ, the Sun, forever reigns,
And scatters night away.

When shall I reach that happy place,
And be forever blest?
When shall I see my Father’s face,
And in His kingdom rest?

Filled with delight, my raptured soul
Would here no longer stay;
Though Jordan’s waves around me roll,
Fearless I’d launch away.
hymns.chorus:
I am bound for the promised land,
I am bound for the promised land;
O who will come and go with me?
I am bound for the promised land.

hymns.title: Gracious Father Guard Thy Children
hymns.lyrics:
Gracious Father, guard Thy children
From the foe’s destructive power;
Save, O save them, Lord, from falling
In this dark and trying hour.
Thou wilt surely prove Thy people,
All our graces must be tried;
But Thy word illumes our pathway,
And in God we still confide.

We are in the time of waiting;
Soon we shall behold our Lord,
Wafted far away from sorrow,
To receive our rich reward.
Keep us, Lord, till Thine appearing,
Pure, unspotted from the world;
Let Thy Holy Spirit cheer us
Till Thy banner is unfurled.

With what joyful exultation
Shall the saints Thy banner see,
When the Lord for whom we’ve waited
Shall proclaim the jubilee!
Freedom from this World’s pollutions;
Freedom from all sin and pain;
Freedom from the wiles of Satan
And from death’s destructive reign.

hymns.title: Come, Come, Ye Saints
hymns.lyrics:
Come, come, ye saints, no toil nor labor fear;
But with joy wend your way.
Though hard to you the journey may appear,
Grace shall be as your day.
We have a living Lord to guide,
And we can trust Him to provide;
Do this, and joy your hearts will swell:
All is well! All is well!

We’ll find the rest which God for us prepared,
When at last He will call;
Where none will come to hurt or make afraid,
He will reign over all.
We will make the air with music ring,
Shout praise to God our Lord and King:
O how we’ll make the chorus swell:
All is well! All is well!

hymns.title: I Will Follow Thee
hymns.lyrics:
I will follow Thee, my Saviour,
Wheresoe’er my lot may be.
Where Thou goest I will follow;
Yes, my Lord, I’ll follow Thee.

Though the road be rough and thorny,
Trackless as the foaming sea,
Thou hast trod this lay before me,
And I’ll gladly follow Thee.

Though I meet with tribulations,
Sorely tempted though I be;
I remember Thou wast tempted,
And rejoice to follow Thee.

Though Thou leadest me through affliction,
Poor, forsaken though I be;
Thou wast destitute, afflicted,
And I only follow Thee.

Though to Jordan’s rolling billows,
Cold and deep, Thou leadest me,
Thou hast crossed the waves before me,
And I still will follow Thee.
hymns.chorus:
I will follow Thee, my Saviour,
Thou didst shed Thy blood for me;
And though all men should forsake Thee,
By Thy grace I’ll follow Thee.

hymns.title: I Want Jesus to Walk With Me
hymns.lyrics:
I want Jesus to walk with me.
I want Jesus to walk with me.
All along my pilgrim journey,
I want Jesus to walk with me.

In my trials, Lord, walk with me.
In my trials, Lord, walk with me.
When the shades of Life are falling,
I want Jesus to walk with me.

In my sorrows, Lord, walk with me.
In my sorrows, Lord, walk with me.
When my heart within is aching,
I want Jesus to walk with me.

hymns.title: Higher Ground
hymns.lyrics:
I’m pressing on the upward way,
New heights I’m gaining every day;
Still praying as I onward bound,
“Lord, plant my feet on higher ground.”

My heart has no desire to stay
Where doubts arise and fears dismay;
Though some may dwell where these abound,
My prayer, my aim is higher ground.

I want to live above the world,
Though Satan’s darts at me are hurled;
For faith has caught the joyful sound,
The song of saints on higher ground.

I want to scale the utmost height,
And catch a gleam of glory bright;
But still I’ll pray till heaven I’ve found,
“Lord, Lead me on to higher ground.”

hymns.title: In a Little While We’re Going Home
hymns.lyrics:
Let us sing a song that will cheer us by the way,
In a little while we’re going home;
For the night will end in the everlasting day,
In a little while we’re going home.

We will do the work that our hands may find to do,
In a little while we’re going home;
And the grace of God will our daily strength renew,
In a little while we’re going home.

We will smooth the path for some weary, wayworn feet,
In a little while we’re going home;
And may loving hearts spread around an influence sweet!
In a little while we’re going home.

There’s a rest beyond, there’s relief from every care,
In a little while we’re going home;
And no tears shall fall in that city bright and fair,
In a little while we’re going home.
hymns.chorus:
In a little while,
In a little while,
We shall cross the billow’s foam;
We shall meet at last,
When the stormy winds are past,
In a little while we’re going home.

hymns.title: Jacob’s Ladder
hymns.lyrics:
We are climbing Jacob’s ladder.
We are climbing Jacob’s ladder.
We are climbing Jacob’s ladder,
Soldiers of the cross.

Every round goes higher, higher.
Every round goes higher, higher.
Every round goes higher, higher,
Soldiers of the cross.

Sinner, do you love my Jesus?
Sinner, do you love my Jesus?
Sinner, do you love my Jesus?
Soldiers of the cross.

If you love Him, why not serve Him?
If you love Him, why not serve Him?
If you love Him, why not serve Him?
Soldiers of the cross.

hymns.title: As Jacob With Travel was Weary
hymns.lyrics:
As Jacob with travel was weary one day,
At night on a stone for a pillow he lay;
He saw in a vision a ladder so high
That its foot was on earth and its top the sky.

Come let us ascend! all may climb it who will;
For the angels of Jacob are guarding it still:
And remember each step that by faith we pass o’er,
Some prophet or martyr has trod it before.

And when we arrive at the haven of rest
We shall hear the glad words, “Come up hither, ye blest,
Here are regions of light, here are mansions of bliss.”
O who would not climb such a ladder as this?
hymns.chorus:
Alleluia to Jesus who died on the tree,
And has raised up a ladder of mercy for me,
And has raised up a ladder of mercy for me.

hymns.title: O Happy Band of Pilgrims
hymns.lyrics:
O happy band of pilgrims,
If onward ye will tread
With Jesus as your fellow,
To Jesus as your Head!

O happy if ye labor
As Jesus did for men;
O happy if ye hunger
As Jesus hungered then!

The trials that beset you,
The sorrows ye endure,
The manifold temptations
That death alone can cure,

What are they but His jewels
Of right celestial worth?
What are they but the ladder
Set up to heaven on earth?

O happy band of pilgrims,
Look upward to the skies,
Where such a light affliction
Shall win you such a prize!

hymns.title: Rise My Soul, and Stretch Thy Wings
When on Life a Darkness Falls
hymns.lyrics:
When on life a darkness falls,
When the mist flows chilling,
Paths and signposts lost in doubt,
Loveless, unfulfilling,
Reach us, Jesus, from Your cross,
Though we feel forsaken;
Keep us through the aching night
Till new dawns awaken.

When the dreams and vows of youth
Painfully accuse us,
Stab our conscience, steal our worth,
Christ will not refuse us:
Peace the world cannot provide,
Daily resurrection.
Strong companion at our side
For each new direction.

Come and meet Him, Friend and Lord,
Thro’ the gospel story:
Open door to life and peace,
Window into glory.
All who seek Him, soon are found,
Made His close relation:
Christ our pathway, Christ our home,
Christ our sure foundation.

hymns.title: Until Then
hymns.lyrics:
My heart can sing when I pause to remember
A heartache here is but a stepping stone
Along a trail that’s winding always upward,
This troubled world is not my final home.

The things of earth will dim and lose their value
If we recall they’re borrowed for awhile;
And things of earth that cause the heart to tremble,
Remembered there will only bring a smile.
hymns.chorus:
But until then my heart will go on singing,
Until then with joy I’ll carry on
Until the day my eyes behold the city,
Until the day God calls me home.

hymns.title: When We All Get to Heaven
hymns.lyrics:
Sing the wondrous love of Jesus,
Sing His mercy and His grace;
In the mansions bright and blessed
He’ll prepare for us a place.

While we walk the pilgrim pathway
Clouds will overspread the sky;
But when travelling days are over
Not a shadow, not a sigh.

Let us then be true and faithful,
Trusting, serving every day;
Just one glimpse of Him in glory
Will the toils of life repay.

Onward to the prize before us!
Soon His beauty we’ll behold;
Soon the pearly gates will open -
We shall tread the streets of gold.
hymns.chorus:
When we all get to heaven,
What a day of rejoicing that will be!
When we all see Jesus,
We’ll sing and shout the victory!

hymns.title: Come, All Christians, Be Committed
hymns.lyrics:
Come, all Christians, be committed
To the service of the Lord;
Make your lives for Him more fitted,
Tune your hearts with one accord.
Come into His courts with gladness,
Each his sacred vows renew,
Turn away from sin and sadness,
Be transformed with life anew.

Of your time and talents give ye,
They are gifts from God above;
To be used by Christians freely
To proclaim His wondrous love.
Come again to serve the Saviour,
Tithes and off’rings with you bring.
In your work, with Him find favor,
And with joy His praises sing.

God’s command to love each other
Is required of every one;
Showing mercy to another
Mirrors His redemptive plan.
In compassion He has given
Of His love that is divine;
On the cross sins were forgiven;
Joy and peace are fully thine.

Come in praise and adoration,
All who on Christ’s name believe;
Worship Him with consecration,
Grace and love you will receive.
For His grace give Him the glory,
For the Spirit and the Word,
And repeat the gospel story
Till mankind His name has heard.

hymns.title: Lord of All Good
God, Whose Giving Knows No Ending
hymns.lyrics:
God, whose giving knows no ending,
From Your rich and endless store:
Nature’s wonder, Jesus’ wisdom,
Costly cross, grave’s shattered door.
Gifted by You, we turn to You,
Offering up Yourselves in praise:
Thankful song shall rise forever,
Gracious donor of our days.

Skills and time are ours for pressing
Toward the goals of Christ, Your Son:
All at peace in health and freedom,
Races joined, the church made one.
Now direct our daily labor,
Lest we strive for self alone:
Born with talents, make us servants
Fit to answer at Your throne.

Treasure, too, You have entrusted,
Gain through powers Your grace conferred:
Ours to use for home and kindred,
And to spread the Gospel Word.
Open wide our hands in sharing,
As we heed Christ’s ageless call.
Healing, teaching, and reclaiming,
Serving You by loving all.

hymns.title: Son of God, Eternal Saviour
hymns.lyrics:
Son of God, eternal Saviour,
Source of life and truth and grace,
Word made flesh, whose birth among us
Hallows all our human race,
You our head, who throned in glory,
For Your own will ever plead:
Fill us with Your love and pity,
Heal our wrongs, and help our need.

Bind us all as one together
In Your church’s sacred fold,
Weak and healthy, poor and wealthy,
Sad and joyful, young and old.
Is there want or pain or sorrow?
Make us all the burden share.
Are there spirits crushed and broken?
Teach us, Lord, to soothe their care.

As You, Lord, have lived for others,
So may we for others live.
Freely have Your gifts been granted;
Freely may Your servants give.
Yours the gold and Yours the silver,
Yours the wealth of land and sea;
We but stewards of Your bounty
Held in solemn trust will be.

Come, O Christ, and reign among us,
King of love and Prince of Peace;
Hush the storm of strife and passion,
Bid its cruel discords cease.
By Your patient years of toiling,
By Your silent hours of pain,
Quench our fevered thirst of pleasure,
Stem our selfish greed of gain.

Son of God, eternal Saviour,
Source of life and truth and grace,
Word made flesh, whose birth among us
Hallows all our human race:
By Your praying, by Your willing
That Your people should be one,
Grant, oh, grant our hope’s fruition:
Here on earth Your will be done.

hymns.title: The Wise May Bring Their Learning
hymns.lyrics:
The wise may bring their learning,
The rich may bring their wealth,
And some may bring their greatness,
And some their strength and health;
We too would bring our treasures
To offer to the King,
We have no wealth or learning-
What shall we children bring?

We’ll bring Him hearts that love Him,
We’ll bring Him thankful praise,
And young souls meekly striving
To follow in His Ways:
And these shall be the treasures
We offer to the King,
And these are gifts that ever
The poorest child may bring.

We’ll bring the little duties
We have to do each day;
We’ll try our best to please Him
At home, at school, at play:
And better are these treasures
To offer to the King
Than richest gifts without them;
Yet these a child may bring.

hymns.title: A Diligent and Grateful Heart
hymns.lyrics:
A diligent and grateful heart
Prompts me to sing Thy praise.
Thy love and mercies from the start
Have blessed me all my days.

I thank Thee for the means to serve
With talents and with tithes,
For sharing brings the utmost joy
When lifting other lives.

My thanks I give for stewardship
To minister through deeds,
To serve and share with patient care
Thy people in their needs.

O Lord, I dedicate my all
In this response to Thee.
Help me to magnify this call
In deep humility.

hymns.title: For Beauty of Meadows
hymns.lyrics:
For beauty of meadows, for grandeur of trees,
For flowers of woodlands, for creatures of seas,
For all You created and gave us to share,
We praise You, Creator, extolling Your care.

As stewards of beauty received at Your hand,
As creatures who hear Your most urgent command,
We turn from our wasteful destruction of life,
Confessing our failures confessing our strife.

Teach us once again to be gardeners in peace;
All nature around us is ours but on lease;
Your name we would hallow in all that we do,
Fulfilling our calling, creating with You.

hymns.title: God in His Love for Us
hymns.lyrics:
God in His love for us lent us this planet,
Gave it a purpose in time and in space:
Small as a spark from the fire of creation,
Cradle of life and the home of our race.

Thanks be to God for its bounty and beauty,
Life that sustains us in body and mind:
Plenty for all, if we learn how to share it,
Riches undreamed of to fathom and find.

Long have our human wars ruined its harvest;
Long has earth bowed to the terror of force;
Long have we wasted what others have need of,
Poisoned the fountain of life at its source.

Earth is the Lord’s: it is ours to enjoy it,
Ours, as His stewards, to farm and defend.
From its pollution, misuse, and destruction,
Good Lord, deliver us, world without end!

hymns.title: We Praise Thee With Our Minds
hymns.lyrics:
We praise Thee with our minds, O Lord,
Kept sharp to think Thy thought;
Come, Holy Ghost with grace outpoured,
To teach what Christ hath taught.
In all our learning may we seek
That wisdom from above
Which comes to all: the brave, the meek,
Who ask in faith and love.

We praise Thee thro’ our bodies, Lord,
Kept strong to do Thy will;
Thy Spirit’s temples, which afford
A means to praise Thee still.
We give ourselves, a sacrifice,
To live as unto Thee;
For Thou alone hast paid the price
To bring salvation free.

We praise Thee in our hearts, O King,
Kept pure to know Thy ways;
And raise to Thee a hymn to sing
Eternally Thy praise.
Altho’ adoring hearts will bow
As age on ages roll;
We praise Thee in our beings now,
Mind, body, heart, and soul.

hymns.title: Father, Who on Us Do Shower
hymns.lyrics:
Father, who on us do shower
Gifts of plenty from Your dower,
To Your people give the power
All Your gifts to use aright.

Give pure happiness in leisure
Temperance in every pleasure,
Wholesome use of earthly treasure
Bodies clean and spirits bright.

Lift from this and every nation
All that brings us degradation;
Quell the forces of temptation;
Put Your enemies to flight.

Father, You who sought and found us,
Son of God, whose love has bound us,
Holy Spirit, in us, round us,
Hear us, Godhead infinite.

hymns.title: O God, Whose Will Is Life and Good
hymns.lyrics:
O God, whose will is life and good
For all of mortal breath:
Unite in bonds of servanthood
All those who strive with death.

Make strong their hands and hearts and wills
To drive disease afar,
To strive against the body’s ills
And wage Your healing war.

By healing of the sick and blind,
Christ’s mercy they proclaim,
Make known the great physician’s mind,
Affirm the Saviour’s name.

Before them set Your gracious will,
That they, with heart and soul,
To You may consecrate their skill
And make the sufferer whole.

hymns.title: God of Our Fathers
hymns.lyrics:
God of our fathers, whose almighty hand
Leads forth in beauty all the starry band
Of shining worlds in splendor through the skies,
Our grateful songs before Thy throne arise.

Thy love divine hath led us in the past,
In this free land by Thee our lot is cast;
Be Thou our ruler, guardian, guide, and stay,
Thy word our law, Thy paths our chosen way.

From war’s alarms, from deadly pestilence,
Be Thy strong arm our ever sure defense;
Thy true religion in our hearts increase,
Thy bounteous goodness nourish us in peace.

Refresh Thy people on their toilsome way,
Lead us from night to never-ending day;
Fill all our lives with love and grace divine,
And glory, laud, and praise be ever Thine.

hymns.title: To the Name That Brings Salvation
hymns.lyrics:
To the name that brings salvation
Let the nations bow the head;
Let them kneel in adoration
When this name of names is said;
Let them pray for restoration
Of all things in Christ the head.

He through every generation
Rules in endless majesty;
May the kings of every nation
Now foreswear their enmity,
And with humble veneration
In the love of God agree.

Lord, we pray for upright rulers:
Guard them surely in their need
From the vanity of power
And the emptiness of greed;
Let them see the truth of lowness,
And on justice let them feed.

hymns.title: Mine Eyes Have Seen the Glory
hymns.chorus:
Glory! glory! Hallelujah!
Glory! glory! Hallelujah!
Glory! glory! Hallelujah!
His truth is marching on.

hymns.title: I Vow to Thee, My Country
Lord, While for All Mankind
hymns.lyrics:
Lord, while for all mankind we pray,
Of every clime and coast,
O hear us for our native land,
The land we love the most.

O guard our shores from every foe;
With peace our borders bless;
With prosperous times our cities crown,
Our fields with plenteousness.

Unite us in the sacred love
Of knowledge, truth, and Thee,
And let our hills and valleys shout
The songs of liberty.

Lord of the nations, thus to Thee
Our country we commend;
Be thou her refuge and her trust,
Her everlasting friend.

hymns.title: Our Father, by Whose Name
hymns.lyrics:
Our Father, by whose name,
All fatherhood is known,
Who dost in love proclaim
Each family Thine own,
Bless Thou all parents, guarding well,
With constant love as sentinel,
The homes in which Thy people dwell.

O Christ, Thyself a child
Within an earthly home,
With heart still undefiled,
Thou didst to manhood come;
Our children bless, in every place,
That they may all behold Thy face,
And knowing Thee may grow in grace.

O Spirit, who dost bind
Our hearts in unity,
Who teachest us to find
The love from self set free,
In all our hearts such love increase,
That every home, by this release,
May be the dwelling place of peace.

hymns.title: Happy the Home that Welcomes You
hymns.lyrics:
Happy the home that welcomes You, Lord Jesus,
Truest of friends, most honoured guest of all,
Where hearts and eyes are bright with joy to greet You,
Your lightest wishes eager to fulfill.

Happy the home where man and wife together
Are of one mind believing in Your love:
Through love and pain, prosperity and hardship,
Through good and evil days Your care they prove.

Happy the home, O loving Friend of children,
Where they are giv’n to You with hands of prayer,
Where at Your feet they early learn to listen
To Your own words, and thank You for Your care.

hymns.title: Love at Home
hymns.lyrics:
There is beauty all around,
When there’s love at home;
There is joy in every sound,
When there’s love at home.
Peace and plenty here abide,
Smiling fair on every side;
Time doth softly, sweetly glide,
When there’s Love at home.

Kindly heaven smiles above,
When there’s love at home;
All the earth is fill’d with love,
When there’s love at home.
Sweeter sings the brooklet by,
Brighter beams the azure sky;
O, there’s One who smiles on high
When there’s love at home.

Jesus, make me wholly Thine,
Then there’s love at home;
May Thy sacrifice be mine,
Then there’s Love at home.
Safely from all harm I’ll rest,
With no sinful care distress’d
Thro’ Thy tender mercy blessed,
When there’s love at home.

hymns.title: Lead Them, My God to Thee
hymns.lyrics:
Lead them, my God, to Thee,
Lead them to Thee,
These children dear of mine,
Thou gavest me;
O, by Thy love divine,
Lead them, my God, to Thee;
Lead them, my God, to Thee,
Lead them to Thee.

When earth looks bright and fair,
Festive and gay,
Let no delusive snare
Lure them astray;
But from temptation’s power,
Lead them, my God, to Thee;
Lead them, my God, to Thee,
Lead them to Thee

E’en for such little ones,
Christ came a child,
And in this world of sin
Lived undefiled.
O, for His sake, I pray,
Lead them, my God, to Thee;
Lead them, my God, to Thee,
Lead them to Thee.

Yea, though my faith be dim,
I would believe
That Thou this precious gift
Wilt now receive;
O, take their young hearts now,
Lead them, my God, to Thee;
Lead them, my God, to Thee,
Lead them to Thee.

hymns.title: Lord, Bless Our Homes
hymns.lyrics:
Lord, bless our homes with peace and love and laughter,
With understanding and with loyalty.
May we together follow Christ the master
And know the blessing of His sov’reignty.

May every heart receive His loving spirit
And know the truth that makes life truly free;
Then, in that spirit may we live united,
And find in God our deep security.

Forgive the hurts our selfishness inflicted
On those we love and those who love us best.
Christ, heal the scars, and draw us all together
In Him whose will is peace and joy and rest.

Father, in gratitude for homes and loved ones,
We open now our hearts to all mankind.
Grant us Your spirit- love for one another-
So in Your peace may we our concord find.

hymns.title: Happy the Home
hymns.lyrics:
Happy the home when God is there,
And love fills every breast;
When one their wish, and one their prayer,
And one their heavenly rest.

Happy the home where Jesus’ name
Is sweet to every ear;
Where children early lisp His fame,
And parents hold him dear.

Happy the home where prayer is heard,
And praise is wont to rise;
Where parents love the Sacred Word
And all its wisdom prize.

Lord, let us in our homes agree
This blessed peace to gain;
Unite our hearts in love to Thee,
And love to all will reign.

hymns.title: O Perfect Love
hymns.lyrics:
O Perfect Love, all human thought transcending,
Lowly we kneel in prayer before Thy throne,
That theirs may be the love that has no ending,
Whom Thou forevermore dost join in one.

O perfect Life, be Thou their full assurance,
Of tender charity and steadfast faith,
Of patient hope, and quiet, brave endurance,
With childlike trust that fears nor pain nor death.

Grant them the joy which brightens earthly 	sorrow;
Grant them the peace which calms all earthly strife,
Add to life’s day the glorious unknown morrow
That dawns upon eternal love and life.

hymns.title: O God, From Whom Mankind
hymns.lyrics:
God from whom mankind derives its name;
Whose covenant of grace remains the same,
Be with these two who now before You wait;
Enlarge the love they come to consecrate.

May through their union other lives be blessed;
Their door be wide to stranger and to guest,
Give them the understanding that is kind,
Grant them the blessing of an open mind.

Preserve their days from inwardness of heart;
To each the gift of truthful speech impart.
Their bond be strong against all strain and strife
Amid the changes of this earthly life.

From stage to stage on life’s unfolding way
Bring to their mind the vows they make this day,
Your Spirit be their Guide in every move,
Their faith in Christ the basis of their Love.

hymns.title: Heavenly Father, Hear Our Prayer
hymns.lyrics:
Heav’nly Father, hear our prayer
As we bow before You:
Bless them in the life they share,
Humbly we implore You.
Be their guide in all endeavors,
Be their hope that nothing severs;
Constant source of love divine,
Let Your love within them shine!

As they pledge their love this day
Here before Your altar,
May their hearts, upon You stayed,
Never fail or falter.
Be their comfort in all sorrow;
Be their reason for tomorrow.
Grant them strength to live each hour
Trusting solely in Your pow’r.

Blest Creator, Lord of Life,
Hear our glad thanksgiving.
Husband You have joined to wife
For their earthly living.
Justified by Jesus’ merit,
Life eternal they inherit.
When their days on earth have passed,
Take them to Your home at last!

hymns.title: May the Grace of Christ Our Saviour
hymns.lyrics:
May the grace of Christ our Saviour
And the Father’s boundless love,
With the Holy Spirit’s favor,
Rest upon them from above.

Thus may they abide in union
With each other and the Lord,
And possess, in sweet communion,
Joys which earth cannot afford.

hymns.title: Glory Be to the Father
hymns.lyrics:
Glory be to the Father, and to the
Son, and to the Holy Ghost;
As it was in the beginning, is now, and
ever shall be, world without end.
Amen, Amen.

hymns.title: Holy, Holy, Holy
hymns.lyrics:
Holy, holy, holy,
Holy is the Lord!
Holy, holy, holy,
Holy is our God!
He who always liveth,
Evermore the same
Heav’n and earth He ruleth,
Come and praise His name!

Holy, holy, holy,
Holy is the Lord!
Holy, holy, holy,
Holy is our God!
Glorious and beloved
Is the One adored!
Holy, holy, holy,
Holy is the Lord.

hymns.title: Let All Mortal Flesh Keep Silence
hymns.lyrics:
Let all mortal flesh keep silence,
And with fear and trembling stand;
Ponder nothing earthly minded,
For with blessing in His hand,
Christ our God to earth descendeth,
Our full homage to demand.
Amen.

hymns.title: Amens
hymns.lyrics:
Amen, Amen.
Amen.
Amen.
Amen, Amen.
Amen.
Amen, Amen, Amen.

hymns.title: Sevenfold Amen
hymns.lyrics:
Amen, Amen, Amen, Amen,
Amen, Amen, Amen.

hymns.title: All Things Come of Thee
Cast Thy Burden Upon the Lord
Lord, Bless Thy Word to Every Heart
hymns.lyrics:
Lord, bless Thy word to every heart
In this Thy house today,
And help us each as now we part,
Its precepts to obey.
Amen. Amen.

hymns.title: O Thou who Hearest
hymns.lyrics:
O Thou who hearest every heartfelt prayer,
With thy rich grace, Lord, all our hearts prepare;
Thou art our life, Thou art our love and light,
O let this Sabbath hour with Thee be bright.
Amen.

hymns.title: The Lord Bless You and Keep You
hymns.lyrics:
The Lord bless you and keep you;
The Lord lift His countenance upon you,
And give you peace, and give you peace;
The Lord make His face to shine upon you,
And be gracious unto you, be gracious,
The Lord be gracious, gracious unto you,
Amen.

hymns.title: We Give Thee But Thine Own
hymns.lyrics:
We give Thee but Thine own,
Whate’er the gift may be;
All that we have is Thine alone,
A trust, O Lord, from Thee.

hymns.title: As We Come to You in Prayer
hymns.lyrics:
Now, Dear Lord, as we pray,
Take our hearts and minds far away
From the press of the world all around
To Your throne where grace does abound.
May our lives be transform’d by Your love,
May our souls be refreshed from above
At this moment, let people everywhere
Join us now as we come to You in prayer.

hymns.title: Spirit of the Living God
hymns.lyrics:
Spirit of the living God,
Fall afresh on me!
Spirit of the living God,
Fall afresh on me!
Break me, melt me, mould me, fill me!
Spirit of the living God,
Fall afresh on me!

hymns.title: May God Be With You
hymns.lyrics:
May God be with you
Till we meet again,
May God be with you,
Keep you safe till then;
And may His blessings
Be within your heart,
May God be with you
While we’re apart,
May God be with you.

May God with you,
Watch you from above,
May God protect you
In His tender love;
And with the dawning
Of each bright, new day,
May God be with you,
To guide your way,
May God be with you.

hymns.title: Shalom
hymns.lyrics:
Shalom, my friends, Shalom, my friends,
Shalom, shalom.
May peace be with you, God’s peace be with you.
Shalom, shalom.

May blessings attend you, angels defend,
Shalom, shalom.
God’s mercies befriend you unto the end.
Shalom, shalom.

Till we meet again, till we meet again,
Shalom, shalom.
May God be with you, His peace be with you.
Shalom, shalom.

hymns.title: May the Lord Bless and Keep You
hymns.lyrics:
May the Lord bless and keep you
both now and evermore.
Amen, Amen.

hymns.title: Thy Word Is a Lantern
hymns.lyrics:
Thy Word is a lantern unto my feet,
And a light unto my path.

hymns.title: Heavenly Father, to Thee We Pray
hymns.lyrics:
Heavenly Father, to Thee we pray,
On this holy Sabbath day;
Through Thy Word Thy will make known;
May each heart become Thy throne,
Let Thy living water flow
That we Thy boundless love may know.
Amen.

hymns.title: God Be in My Head
God Be in My Head
hymns.lyrics:
God be in my head,
And in my thinking.
God be in my eyes,
And in my looking.
God be in my mouth,
And in my speaking.
Oh, God be in my heart,
And in my understanding.

hymns.title: Holy Spirit, Hear Us
This Is the Day the Lord Hath Made
hymns.lyrics:
This is the day the Lord hath made;
He calls the hours his own.
Let heav’n rejoice, let earth be glad,
And praise surround the throne.

hymns.title: As You Have Promised, Lord
hymns.lyrics:
As you have promised, Lord, today,
You are letting Your servant go away in peace.
My eyes have seen You in broad daylight
Before all nations, planning salvation.
Light of revelation for the nations,
And glory of Your people Israel.

hymns.title: Jesus, Stand Among Us
hymns.lyrics:
Jesus, stand among us
In thy risen power;
Let this time of worship
Be a hallowed hour.

Breathe the Holy Spirit
Into every heart;
Bid the fears and sorrows
From each soul depart.

Thus with quickened footsteps
We pursue our way,
Watching for the dawning
Of eternal day.

hymns.title: Hear Our Prayer, O Lord
hymns.lyrics:
Hear our prayer, O Lord,
Hear our prayer, O Lord;
Incline Thine ear to us,
And grant us Thy peace.
Amen.

hymns.title: Cause Me to Hear
hymns.lyrics:
Cause me to hear Thy loving kindness
In the morning, for in Thee do I trust.
Cause me to know the way wherein I shall
walk for I lift up my soul to Thee.
Amen.

hymns.title: Bless Thou the Gifts
The Lord Is in His Holy Temple
hymns.lyrics:
The Lord is in His holy temple,
The Lord is in His holy temple,
Let all the earth be silent,
be silent before Him.

hymns.title: Surely, Surely
hymns.lyrics:
Surely, surely the Lord has been here,
Surely angels still linger near;
I hear music soft on my ear,
I feel His Spirit, I have no fear.

hymns.title: Day by Day, Dear Lord
hymns.lyrics:
Day by day, Dear Lord,
of Thee three things I pray:
To see Thee more clearly,
Love Thee more dearly,
Follow Thee more nearly,
Day by day.

hymns.title: Dismiss Us, Lord, With Blessing
Lead Me, Lord
hymns.lyrics:
Lead me, Lord, lead me in Thy righteousness;
Make Thy way plain before my face.
For it is Thou, Lord, Thou, Lord, only
That makest me dwell in safety.

hymns.title: The Lord Is in His Holy Temple
hymns.lyrics:
The Lord is in His holy temple,
The Lord is in His holy temple,
Let all the earth keep silence,
Let all the earth keep silence before Him,
Keep silence, keep silence before Him.
Amen.

hymns.title: Almighty Father
hymns.lyrics:
Almighty Father, hear our prayer,
and bless all souls that wait before thee.
Amen.

hymns.title: Praise God, From Whom All Blessings
Praise God, From Whom All Blessings
LETŠA PHALAFALA MOLETI
hymns.lyrics:
Letša phalafal'a efangedi
Bohle ba kgalemelwe
Bohle ba kwago molaetša
Ba ikokobetše ba phele

E kwagale dithabeng
le gona mafelong ohle
Lewatle le tumiše
Phološo e thabišago

E letšeng le mebileng
moo go lego batimedi
Dilo tšohle di lokišitšwe
Tate o ba letile

Leletša ba lego mathateng
Ba lakatšago go phološwa
Ekwang taletšo ya M'phološi
Yeo e rego etlang keno go nna
hymns.chorus:
Letša phalafala moleti
Ekwagale kgole
Modimo o a go roma
Lokolla ba tlemilwego

hymns.title: KGOŠI E ETLA
hymns.lyrics:
Kgoši e tlang e monyakong
Yeo e rwelego 'fapano
Bjale o tla go bakgethwa
Go ba iša gae

Di tšhupo tša go tla ga 'Gwe
Di diragala ka pele
Re tlo bona ka pejana
'Phelo bosafeleng

Hlokomelang ba lefaseng
Meleko ga e fele
Go tlo fihla Mophološi
Molahletši a hwe

Gona faseng le leswa
Re tlo phela re le baswa
Bao ba hwago ba se sa hwa
Ka mo go sa feleng
hymns.chorus:
Monyakong…………
Monyakong,……………
Kgoši šetše fihlile
E etla eng e etla
šetše e le monyakong

hymns.title: FAHLOGO DI TLO LEBANA
hymns.lyrics:
Fahlego di tlo lebana
Le Kreste Mophološi
Ke tlo thaba ge ke bona
Jeso ke Mophološi

Ka leswiswana ke'a mmona
Go na le se ntšhirago
Ka tšatši le lekganyago
Ke mmone kgalalelong

Ke tlo thabela go mmona
ka nako e sa tsejweng
Tšohle di kgantshwa ntshe
go fele matshwenyego

Fahlego di tlo lebana
Le Mophološi wa ka
Ke tlo lebana le Yena
Jeso M'phološi wa ka
hymns.chorus:
Fahlego di tlo lebana
Ka mošola go maru
Fahlego di tlo lebana
Le Jeso kua pheletšong

hymns.title: O ETLA KA PELE
hymns.lyrics:
Monate mafoko tsebeng tša molelere
Ge a sepela kgolekgole
Setšego le kgauswi a boe Mophološi
Ka pele mmušo o tle

Bohle ba kilego ba bolokiwa
Ba tsoge gape pheletsong
E le ba lewatleng leo le tebileng
Bophelo ba tlo bofiwa

Lefaseng le leswa re tlo kopana
Re opele koš' 'a bogoši
Go tšwa Lebowa, Borwa ba tlo kopana
Ba tumiše Kgoš 'a magoši

Haleluya Amen ! Haleluya gape:
Ka tshepagalo re tlo bantshe
Letang, ka tshepo, go fihlela nako
Mphapahlogo re tlo o rwala
hymns.chorus:
O etla, O etla ka pejana
O etla 'faseng lekhwi gape
Balelere bona ba
Ikhumanele 'gae la M'phološi

hymns.title: A GAE KE KGOLE NA?
hymns.lyrics:
Gae ke kgole kudu na?
Ke botšišitše moleti
A re 'šego bofetile
Bjale go tla masa
Ka gona O se sa lla
Eupša sepela ka tshepo
O tlo fihla matšatšing
Ao a sa feleng

Ke botšišitšese hlopeng
Košaya sona ke e reng
Ka sebete ke tlo lwa ntwa
Ka tshosa le bora
Ka gona O se sa lla
Ntweng o kgotlelele
Moputso ke wa mofenyi
ge jetšea fentse:

Ke botšišitše 'long tšohle
Di re ka lentšu le letee
'Nako yona e a fela
Gae le bonale
Ka gona o se sa lla
Di pontšho di a bonala
Dilo tšohle di tsetsela
Di nyoretšwe Khutšo

Gae ga go sa le kgole
A kakanyo e botse bjang
E ba thabong molelere
Phumola megokgo
Ka gona O se sa lla
Re tlo kopana kwa pele
Matshwenyego a fedile
Motseng wa khutšo

hymns.title: HLOKOMELANG BAKGETHWA
hymns.lyrics:
Hlokomelang bakgethwa
Thoromo ya legodimo
Mabone a tuke
Itukišetšeng Morena

Bonang tshepiso ya 'Gwe
Dibe di tshwaretšwe
Diaparo le mphapahlogo
le bolele thekololo

Mebušo e ya fediswa
Ekwang dikoloi di duma
Bolelang ka tshegofato
Phalafal'a bosupa e a lla

Ditshaba di a thulana
Go tla bogosi bja Kreste
Lefase le mo bodulong
Goelatsang Jeso o etla

Badiradibe tlang le'a bitšwa
Jeso a le kopela
Akgofang go seso gothwe
Mogau, nako di fedile
hymns.chorus:
O etla! Jeso o etla
bona! O tla kgalalelong
O tla go buša ka phenyo
O etla Jeso o etla

hymns.title: GE A FIHLA
hymns.lyrics:
Ge Bets 'a fihlile Yena
Go phutha ba Gagwe
Ba bohlokwa e le ruri
Go ba baratwa

O llo go re phutha bohle
Re le ba bohlokwa
Re tlo kganya ka bosweu
Re le baratwa

Bananyana ba bannyane
Ba rata M'phološi
Ba bohlokwa e le ruri
Go Jeso M'phološi
hymns.chorus:
Bjalo ka dinaledi
Phadimo mphapahlogong
Ka botse ba phadime
Ba botsefale

hymns.title: GE BA BITŠWA GODIMO
hymns.lyrics:
Ge phalafala e lela le nako e fedile
Go fihla nako yeo e sa feleng
Ba bakgethilwego lefaseng ba tlo phuthana
Ba bitšwa godimong ke tlo ba gona

Ka nako e botse mo bahu ba tlo tsošwang bohle
Ba tlo ba le bopo le leswa bohle
Ba bakgethilwego šetše ba phuthegela Gae
Ba bitšwa godimong ke tlo ba gona

A re šomeleng Morena go fihlela phirimong
Ka rato la Gagwe a re boleleng
Ge re hwa go tlo fela modiro wa rena mokhwi
Ba bitšwa 'Godimong ke tlo ba gona
hymns.chorus:
Šetše ba....bitšwa
'Godi.....mong
Šetše ba..... bitšwa
'Godi.... mong
Šetše ba.....bitšwa
'Godi.... mong
Ba bitšwa
'Godimong ke tlo ba gona

hymns.title: EMIŠANG PHALAFALA
hymns.lyrics:
Letšang phalafala ka legoa
Jeso o e tla gape
Bohle ka thabo ba ikopelele
Jeso o e tla gape

Goelelang dikoting
Le mebotong Jeso o e tla gape
Go tla ka kganya kwan 'e hlabilweng
Jeso o e tla gape

Dirang lešata lena mawatle
Jeso o e tla gape
Goelelang le šabašabeng
Jeso o e tla gape

Di a re botšadi tiragalo
Jeso o etla gape
Le moya wo o tutlang ka kudu
Jeso o e tla gape

Ditshaba tšohle digalefile
Jeso o e tla gape
Tsebo, Bohlale digotše kudu
Jeso o e tla gape
hymns.chorus:
O e tla gape
O e tla gape
Jeso o e tla gape

hymns.title: RE TLO PHUTHEGA NOKENG
hymns.lyrics:
Re tlo phuthega nokeng
Mmogo le mangeloi
Meetsing ao a elelago
Go tšwa T'roneng ya Jehofa

Gona lebopong la noka
Re tlo hiwa ka thapelo
Re tumiše ka lethabo
Mehleng yohle ya boiKhutšo

Seso re file nokeng
Re tlo lahla merwalo
Ka mogau re lokolotšwe
Refiwe mphapahlogo

Kgauswi nokeng e phadimang
Go tlo fela leeto
Dipelo di tletše thabo
Ka koa ya boiKhutšo
hymns.chorus:
Ee re tlo phuthega nokeng
Sedibeng se se botse botse
Le ba kgethwa re kopane
Sedibeng se se itshekileng

hymns.title: KE TLO LATELA M'PHOLOŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Ke tlo latela M'phološi
gohle mo a nkisago
Mo a yang ke tlo latela
ee Morena ke ye ntshe

Le ge tsela e le mmitlwa
Mme e sa bonagale
O e sepetse ka pele
Ka thabo ke latela

Le gare ga matshwenyego
ke wela le ditekong
Le wen 'o kile wa lekwa
ka gona ke latela

O ntshepetša tlaisegong
Mmogo le boditaneng
Wena o kile wa hloka
ka gona ke latela

Ge Jordane ka maphotho
e tonya le go tshosa
O e wetse pele ga ka
lenna ke tlo latela
hymns.chorus:
Ke tlo latela M'phološi
yo'a ntshololetseng madi
Le ge bangwe ba go lathla
nna ke tlo go latela

hymns.title: SEDIBA SE GONA.
hymns.lyrics:
Sediba se gona sa madi
A tšwago go M'phološi
Badiradibe ba tsena gona
Ba hlapišwa dibe
Ba hlapišwa dibe
Ba hlapišwa dibe
Badiradibe ba tsena gona
Ba hlapišwa dibe

Lehodu le hwago le'a thaba
Go bona sediba
Gobane lenna ke le ditšhila
Nka hlapa sedibeng
Nka hlapa sedibeng
Nka hlapa sedibeng
Gobane le nna ke le ditšhila
Nka hlapa sedibeng

Madi a Gago konyan' e hwago
Ga' fele maatla
Phuthego e phološitšweng
E nyoretšwe Wena
Ba phološwe sebeng
Ba phološwe sebeng
Phuthego e nyoretšwego Wena
E phološwe sebeng

Baka ke bone sediba
Sa madi tumelong
Lerato la 'Go le pelong
Go fihlela ke' hwa
Go fihlela ke' hwa
Go fihlela ke' hwa
Lerato la 'Go le pelong
Go fihiela ke' hwa

Morena o ntukišeditse
le ge ke sa swanela
Tefelo ya neo ya madi
Bophelo bjo sa felego
Bophelo bjo sa felego
Bophelo bjo sa felego
Tefelo ya neo ya madi
Bophelo bjo sa felego

Go na le kos 'e monate
Ke tumiša M'phološi
Leleme le ikokobetšang
Lentšhitšwe lebitleng
Lentšhitšwe lebitleng
Lentšhitšwe lebitleng
Leleme le ikokobeditšego
Lentšhitšwe lebitleng

hymns.title: MORENA KE NYAKA GO HLWEKA
hymns.lyrics:
Morena ke nyaka go hlweka
Ke nyaka o dule Go nna ka bosafelego
O psatlaganye medimo, Mme o ntshe dira
Bjale nhlatšwe ke tlo feta lehlwa

Morena Jeso, Lebelela go tšwa teroneng
O nthuše ke dire le ka boineelo
Ke ineela le tšohle tšeo ke di tsebago
Nhlatšwe ke sweufale bjalo a lehlwa

Jeso, ke kgopela ka boikokobetso
Ke le maotong ao a bapotšwego
Tumelo e mpontsha madi a nhlatšwago
Nhlatšwe ke sweufale bjalo ka lehlwa

Morena ke letile ka kgotlelelo
TIa o bope pelo e mpšha ka teng ga ka
Ga o seso wa gana bao ba go nyakago
Nhlatšwe ke sweufale bjalo ka lehlwa
hymns.chorus:
Ke sweufale bjalo ka lehlwa
Nhlatšwe ke sweufale bjalo ka lehlwa

hymns.title: AH EKWA DIPENI DI E WA
hymns.lyrics:
Kwa tshelet 'e tshelwa
E kwa ge e wa
Ke ya Jeso yohle
e fiwe yena

Khenkhe! Khenkhe!
Bjalo ke moneelo
O fiago Morwa
Ke bananyana

Re le bananyana
re tliša peni
Mohla re godile
re tliše kudu

Ge re sena selo
re mofe 'rato
O tlo thaba kudu
a amogele
hymns.chorus:
Khenkhe! Khenkhe!
Khenkhe! Khenkhe!
"E kwa e tshelwa
Ke ya Jeso yohle
E fiwe yena

hymns.title: E JESO O WA NTHATA
hymns.lyrics:
Ee Jeso a nthata
Go bolela mangwalo
Bananyana ke bagwe
ba bofefo o maatla

Ee Jeso oa nthata
Mme o ile a nkhwela
O hlatšwa dibe tšohle
Bana bagwe ba tsene

Ee Jeso oa nthata
Maswabing le bohlokong
O tšwa kua legodimong
Go mpona ke robetse

Ee Jeso wa nthata
O hiwa gohle le nna
Gomme ge ke mo rata
O tlo nkisa 'Godimong
hymns.chorus:
Jeso oa nthata
Ee oa nthata
Jeso oa nthata
ke kwa ka mangwalo

hymns.title: KE HLAPILE DIATLA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke hlapile diatla
ga botse mosong wo
Gomme ka di nea Jeso
Go mo Someleng

Ke boditse ditsebe
Tša ka go mo theetsa
Medirong ya pelohlomogi
Ya diatlanyana

Maahlo a tebelelong
Medirong le dipapading
A thibelwe dikotseng
Ka baka la Jeso
hymns.chorus:
A maotonyana a hlokomele
Se sengwe le se
sengwe ke direle Jeso

hymns.title: RE THABA LERATONG
hymns.lyrics:
Re thabišwa ke 'rato
Tsela e bonolo
Le re thusa le kgopolong
Mogau go bangwe

Fase le tletše dibe
Lehu le tshenyego
Ka lerato re tlo leka
go sokolla bangwe

Ge bophelo bo fela
Re bitšwa godimo
košaya rena e tlo ba
Ka gosafelego
hymns.chorus:
Ke Modimo ya tletšego rato
Re ba 'Gwe re swana le Yena
Re thabišwa ke 'rato
Tsela e bonolo
Le re thusa le kgopolong
Mogau go bangwe

hymns.title: TŠWELANG PELE BAKRESTE
hymns.lyrics:
Mašole a Kreste, le yeng ntweng
Le Iweng le Satane, Sera sa lena
Kreste molaodi ke ketapele
Twelang pele ntweng, 'Swao le 'miswe

Ka tshupo ya phenyo manab 'a tshaba
tšwelelang mašole, go hwetšaphenyo
Koa tsa tumišo a di opelwe
Gowa he ngwanešo mantšu a phenyo

Mašole a maatla re le phuthego
Re le mo mohlaleng wa bakgethwa
Moya mmele ke tšaGago, tšohle ka bosafelego
Ga re kgaogane, bohle re go tee
Kholofelong, Thutong le mo Leratong

Kgoši tša lefase tšohle di a hwa
Phuthego ya Jeso e eme bjalo
'Ao! ga e palelwe e ka se fele
Ka tshepo go Kreste ke molaodi

tšwelang pele batho, A re kopaneng
Phuthego ya Jeso re mo tumišeng
Kgalalelo, Hlompho go Kreste Kgoši
E, ka bosafeleng e tlo opelwa
hymns.chorus:
tšwelelang Mašole, A re yeng ntweng!
Fapano sa Jeso se le ka pele

hymns.title: IHLOKOMELE MOYA WA KA
hymns.lyrics:
Itiise moya wa ka!
Manaba ke a mantisi
Mašabašaba a dibe a gona
Gore a tle a go theose

Elwa o rapele!
O se ineele ntweng
Elwa ka mehla yohle
Gomme o kgopele thuso

Ga o seso wa fenya
Gomme o se tepelele
Mošomo wa 'Go o tlo fela
O humane mphapahlogo

hymns.title: TSOGA KGOTHALA
hymns.lyrics:
Tsoga kgothala moy
'a ka O ko tšwele pele
Ba sebotša legodimong
Mphapahlogo ruri

Ke 'ntšu la ya Legodimong
Leo le go bitšago
Le ne moputso wa Gagwe
Go eo a kgothetseng

Leru la ba go hlatsetsang
Le go bokanetse
Lebala ka te fetileng
Kodumela pele

Mophološi ke mothomi
wa lebelo lekhwi
Re tlo bea naong tša 'Gwe
Meputso ya rena

hymns.title: KE ETLA SEFAPANONG.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke etla sefapanong
Bofokoding le bodiding
Tšohle ke'a di lahla
Ke tlo humana phološo

Ke go hlologeletšwe
Sebe se santse se ntaola
Jeso o bolela le nna o re
Ke tlo go hlapisa

Ke go fa tšohle tša ka
Bagwera le lehumo
Ke be wag ago
Go ya ka bosafelego

Ke tshepa ditshepiso
Bjale ke kwa madi
Ke pitikologa fase
Ke bapotšwe le Jeso

Jeso o tlatša moyeng
Gomme ke phethegile
Gohle ke phethegile
Go tumiswe konyana
hymns.chorus:
Ke tshepile Morena
Konyana ya Khalefari
Ke khunama fapanong
Mpholose Jeso bjale

hymns.title: MORENA KEA KWA
hymns.lyrics:
Morena ke kwa maoto
ao a thololwago
A kgodisa ba nyorilweng
A a rothele le nna

Tate wa pelo hlomogi
Se mphete nna mosenyi
Mme le ge o ka mpheta
Se fete le masoto

Kgale ke letse dibeng
Kgale ke go hlomere
Lefase le ntsere pelo
Ntshwarele o mphološe

Se mphete Moy 'o mokgethwa
O ka bontsha difofu
Supakgoni bja ga Jeso
Bolela khutšo go nna
hymns.chorus:
Le nna le nna o
rothisetse le nna

hymns.title: NTLATŠE GONA BJALE.
hymns.lyrics:
Moya o mokgethwa
Hlatšwa pelo e tshogilego
Ntlatše ka bogona bja Gago
Etla o ntlatše gona bjale

Moya o bonolo o ka ntlata
Ga ke tsebe bjang
Gomme ke hloka wena ka kudu
Tla o ntlatše bjale

Ke tletše bofokodi
Maotong a makgethwa
Moya o Segofaditšwe
Ntlatše lerato gona bjale

Nhlatšwe, nkhomotše
mphološe, O hlatšwe pelo ya ka
O a homotša, O a phološa
O a ntlatša le bjale
hymns.chorus:
O ntlatše bjale hle
Jeso tla o ntlatše bjale
Ntlatše ka bogona bja Gago
Etla o ntlatše gona bjale

hymns.title: KE GO HLOKA NAKO TŠOHLE
hymns.lyrics:
Kea go hloka hle
Mokgethwa-kgethwa
Ga go lentšu le
kang go nkhomotša

Kea go hioka hle
Dula hleng ga ka
Teko ga dimphenye
ge o le gona

Kea go hloka hle
thabong, bohlokong
E tla ka pejana
Dula le nna

Kea go hloka hle
O tle gonthuta
Masot 'a tshepiso
o ntshollele

Kea go hloka hle
Wen 'o Mokgethwa
Ntire wa Gago
Morw 'a Modimo
hymns.chorus:
Kea go hloka Jeso
ka dinako tšohle
Ntshegofatse Mpholosi
ke tla go wena

hymns.title: KE NEELA TŠOHLE
hymns.lyrics:
Tšohle go Jeso ke neela
Tšohle tokologong
Ke mo rate ke motshepe
Ke be ke mophelele

Tšohle go Jeso ke neela
Ke khuname mo fase
Ke lahla tšohle tša 'fase
Ntšee Jeso Ntšee

Tšohle go Jeso ke neela
Nišee M'phološi; Ntšee
A ke ka Moya Mokgethwa
Ke tsebe gore O waka

Tšohle go Jeso ke neela
Ekwa Moya Mokgethwa
A thabo ya go pholoswa
Tumišo' ineng la Gwe
hymns.chorus:
Ke a neela……
Ke a neela………
Tšohle go wena
Mpholosi ke a neela

hymns.title: BJALO KA GE KE LE
hymns.lyrics:
Bjalo ka ge ke le Morena
Madi a 'Go a nhlatswitse
Mme o mpiletša go wena
Kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

Bjalo ka ge ke le Morena
Go ntšha sebe moyeng wa ka
Wena o hlatšwa ka madi
Kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

Bjalo ka ge ke lahlega
Dintweng le ngongoregong
Ka teng le poifo ka ntle
kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

Bjalo ka ge ke le hlokong
Ponong, khumong le phodisong
Ee tšohle ke ya di hloka
Kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

Bjalo ka ge ke le nisee
O nhlatšwe, O nswarele
Gobane O tshepisitse
Kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

Bjalo ka ge ke le 'rato
le thubile dilo tšohle
Ke tlo ba wa Gago fela
Kwan 'a Modimo ke etla

hymns.title: RE TSOŠOLOŠE
hymns.lyrics:
Lebogang Modimo
ka Morwa wa Gagwe
Yena Jeso a re
hwetsego dibeng

Lebogang Modimo
ka Moya Mokgethwa
'Sedi le re bontshitsego
M' phološi

Tumišo le theto go
Kwan 'e hlabilweng
Ya rwala dibe tšohle
ya re hlatšwišiša

Tumišo yohle e
be go Morena
Ya re rekilego
ka mogau wa 'Gwe

Re tsošološe re
llatse lerato
Re tsošwe moyeng
ka mollo wa Go
hymns.chorus:
Aleluya! Motumišeng!
Aleluya! Amen!
Aleluya! Aleluya!
re tsošološe

hymns.title: TŠEA NAKO GO KGETHWAFALA
hymns.lyrics:
Ba pelo telele, Ge o bolela
Le Morena o me Lentšung la Gagwe
Tswalana le ba Gwe, Thusa bahloki
O se lebale di Tshepiso tša Gwe 

Ba pelo telele, Tlhakatlhakanong
Dula sephiring Le Jeso fela
Ka go bona Jeso, Swana le Yena
Bagwera ba gago Ba tlo motseba

Ba pelo telele O kgethwafale
Latela 'Mphološi Se mo taboge
Lethabong, manyaming Latela Jeso
O lebe go Jeso, Tshepa ntšu laGwe

Ba pelo telele O kgethwafale
O fole moyeng, Maikemišetšong
Jeso a laole, ka Moya wa 'Gwe
O tlo lokela Modir 'wa Godimo

hymns.title: MPABALELE LE NNA
hymns.lyrics:
Mpabalele tšatši le phirima
Go tla bošego he mpabalele
Ge thuso ya bangwe e palelwa
Wena yo thusago mpabalele

Bophelo bo feta ka lebelo
Monate lefaleng o fela
Phetogo le go bola di mokhwi
Wen 'o sa fetogeng mpabalele

Ke hloka wena metsotso yohle
Mogau wa Gago o mpha Matla
Ke mang ya tla nketapele gohle
Wena Morena he Mpabalele

O dutše o le ka bosafeleng
Se šuthe go nna hle mpabalele
Nkgotlelele ka dibe tše tšaka
E kwa Morena he mpabalele

Ge'o le gona ke tlelwa ke maatla
Le maswabi ga a ntšwabise
Lehu bo kae bohloko bja gago
Ke fenya tšohle o mpabaletše

hymns.title: TŠATŠI LE A PHIRIMA
hymns.lyrics:
Tšatši le a phirima
Boikhuto bja godimo
Rapela ge bošego bjo
Bonesa mabone legodimong

Morena wa bophelo
Le wa lefase lohle
Rena ba go nyakago
Re phuthe 'ratong
E ba kgauswi

Tšatši le'a phirima
Re tee 'ratong la Gago
Kgalalelong le mogaung
Tša lešira la 'Go re rotoge

Ge dinaledi, 'tšatši
bošego, di nyamile
Moren'a mangeloi re utullele
Moso re bone Jeso
hymns.chorus:
O a halalela Morena Modimo!
Legodimo le lefase
Di tumiša wena
Ramaatla ohle

hymns.title: TŠATŠI LA MOYA WA KA.
hymns.lyrics:
Tšatši la moya wa ka Mphološi
Ga go bošego ge o le gona
Go se be le maru lefaseng
Go tla mahlong a ka

Ge ke tlelwa ke boroko
Maahlo a ka a otsela
Mogopolo wa ka 'fobeng
sa M'phološi o ikhutse

Dula le nna mantšiboa
Ke le nosi nka se phele
Dula le nna Ke bošego
Gobane ga ke nyake go hwa

Ntshegofatse ge ke tsoga
Ke sepela mo lefaseng
Leratong la gago ke be ke
Tsene legodimong

hymns.title: MORENA SWIKA LA RENA
hymns.lyrics:
Morena 'swika la rena
Ke sebo sa botshabelo
Seširo le morithi
Ke sebo sa botshabelo

Seširo le sephemelo
Ke sebo sa botshabelo
Ga re tshoge gare tshabe
Ke sebo sa botshabelo

Dikgogola le ge ditla
Ke sebo sa botshabelo
Re humana hlokomelo
Go sebo sa botshabelo

Leswika la botshabelo
Ke sebo sa botshabelo
Dula kgauswi hle mothusi
O sebo sa botshabelo
hymns.chorus:
Leswika………..Le nang le maatla
Morithi …..ge go fiša
Ketapele………..Ya rena
Ke sebo sa botshabelo

hymns.title: O NKETAPELE
hymns.lyrics:
O nketepele Morena
A mantšu a tšwang Godimo
Gohle ke yang tše ke dirang
Jeso ke moetapele

Le ge go etla leswiwi
Le ka bo botse Edene:
Metseng lewatleng leo le wang
Jeso ke moetapele

Morena ntshware seatla
ke se ngongorege tseleng
Ke kgotsofatšwe ke wena
Goba Jes 'o nketapele

Ge modir 'wak 'o fedile
Ka mogau ke fentše
Nka se tšhabe le lehu
le Jordan 'o nketapele
hymns.chorus:
O nketapele Morena
Ka seatla o a nhlatla
Ke latele tshepagalong
Jeso ke moetapele

hymns.title: GE KHUTŠO E BJA KA MOTSWEDI
hymns.lyrics:
Ge khutšo e le ntshe tseleng ya ka
Manyami le on a' le ntshe
Le ge go le bjang, O nthutile gore
Ke re golokile le moyeng

Ge Satane a ntshwenya, Go la teko
Ke dule tshepong ya gore
Jeso o mpone a nkwela bohloko
A ntšhololela madi a 'Gwe

Ka dibe ke tletše thabo e kgolo
Dibe tšaka ka mphela
Di kokotetšwe tšohle sefapanong
Tumiša Morete moy 'a ka

Moren 'akgofiša pono ya tumelo
Le ya go tlošwa ga maru
Phalafal 'e letšwe Moren 'a theoge
Bjalo ge go khutšo le moyeng
hymns.chorus:
Goloki…………. Le moyeng
Golokile, "lokile moyeng

hymns.title: A KWANO
hymns.lyrics:
A kwano 'e kgolo e tletšeng thabo
Mo a tleng tša bosafeleng
A tšhegofatšo le go ba khutšong
Mo atleng tša Bosafeleng

A monate go sepela tsela
Mo atleng tša bosafeleng
Go sedi tseleng matšatši ole
Mo atleng tša bosafeleng

Ke tlo tšhošwa keng
Ke tlo tšhaba eng
Mo atleng tša bosafeleng
Ke na le khutšo le Moren 'a ka
Mo atleng tša bosafeleng
hymns.chorus:
Ithekge, ithekge
o bolokege go tšohle
Ithekge, Ithekge
mo atleng tša bosafeleng

hymns.title: TUMELO YA KA E LEBELETŠE WENA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke lebeletše Wena
Konyana' Khalefari, M'phološi
O nkwe mo thapelong, O ntloše melato
Go toga lehono, Ke be wa Gago

Kgaugelo ya Go e mphe maatla
E ba tshepo, Gomme bjalo ka
ge o nkhwetše, A lerato la ka
Le se ke la fetoga, Le phele

Tseleng e leswiswi, Le mathateng
O ntshepediše, O tloše leswiswi
Phumula megokgo, O se ntlogelele
Ka phonyoga

hymns.title: KGAUSWI LE MODIMO
hymns.lyrics:
Kgauswi le Modimo kgauswi nyana
Le ge sefapano se nthotoša
Yona koša ya ka e tlo ba 'erego
Kgauswi le Modimo kgauswinyana

Bja ka moleleri šego bo nkwela
Mo leswikeng ke samele
Torong tša ka ke be kgauswi le
Modimo, Kgauswinyana

Tsela e bonale ya godimo
Gohle mo nthomago ke fiwe mogau
Mangeloi ona a nkgopela are
Ke ye godimo kgauswinyana

Ge kakany e phafoga tumišong
Ke tšwe manyaming ke le Bethele
Maswabing a ka ke tlo dula ke le
Kgauswi le Modimo kgauswinyana

Le ge ke rotoga ka lethabo
tšatši, ngwedi, tšohle ke fetile
Ke tlo hlwa kopelong kgauswi le Modimo
Kgauswi le Modimo kgauswinyana

hymns.title: TSEMELELANG LE EME
hymns.lyrics:
Tsemelang le eme Moreneng
Le ka gare ga hlakahlakano:
Ke swika fela le nang le maatla
Mo golweng le sera

Tsemelelang le eme golokeng
Pelo di seke tša huduega
Ke Kreste fela a tlo re thušang
Re le badiradibe

Tsemelelang le eme nneteng
Le ge 'imela e feta tšohle
Ke swika fela le re fang matla
Ge go phetilwe tšohle
hymns.chorus:
A re emeng leswikeng
Re tsepame swikeng
Swika leo e leng Kreste
Ge re kgotlelela re tlo
Tšwelela sehlopheng
se yang Godimong

hymns.title: TSHEPO YA KA E TIILEGO.
hymns.lyrics:
Tshepo ya ka e tiile
Tokong le mading a Jeso
Nka se ke ka itshepa mme
Ke ithekga go Jeso

Ge leswiswi le mo šira
Ke dula mogaung wa gwe
Le difefo tseleng ya ka
Tumelo yak 'e go Yena

Go ikana le kgwerano
Mading a gwe dia nthekga
Ge go tšohle go se selo
Go Jeso ke sa tshepile

Ge go letšwa phalafala
Go yena ke rotošetšwe
Ke apešitšwe ka toko
Ke eme kgauswi teroneng
hymns.chorus:
Go Jeso swika ke eme
Lešabašaba le fele
Lešabašaba le fele

hymns.title: TSHEPA O THEETSE
hymns.lyrics:
Ge re sepela le Morena leseding
Kgalalelo tumišo tseleng
Re dire that' wa 'Gwe o tlo ba le rena
Ge re tshepa gape re mokwa

Ga go na moriti, ga go na le leru
Go myemyela ga 'Gwe di toge
Ga go okaokwe ga go na poifo
Tšohle re tshepa re Mokwa

Ga go na morwalo ga go na manyami
Eupša tšohle o di lefile
Ga go na sello le go selekega
Go kaone ge re tshepa re kwa

Ga re na sešupo sa rato la gagwe
Ge re sešo re lahle tšohle
Toko a re bontshe, Lethabo a re fe
Tšohle go ba tshepang ba kwa

Le go mo direleng, Re dule dinaong
Go ba re sepele le yena
A laele re dire, A rome re yentshe
Re se tšhoge, Re kwe re tshepe
hymns.chorus:
Tshep 'o theetse ga
go tselapedi ya go thaba
Moreneng, Ka ntle le go mokwa

hymns.title: MODIMO A BE LE LENA
hymns.lyrics:
Modimo a be le wena
a go hlatle a go thekge
A go šireletše gohle
Go fila re kopana gape

Modimo a be le wena
Phukeng tša gwe a go file
Ka mmana a go fepe
Modimo a be le wena

Modimo a be le wena
Tlalelong le matshwenyegong
'Atleng tša 'Gwe a go ake
Modimo a be le wena

Modimo a be le wena
Ka lerato a go tswese
A Sireletše lehung
Modimo a be le wena
hymns.chorus:
Re kopa.........ne, Re Kopane
Re kopane naong tša Jeso
Re kopa.......ne, Re kopane
Modimo a be le wena

hymns.title: LE BAGWERA RE KA SE SA LAELANA.
hymns.lyrics:
Ge re kopana le bagwera
go tlala lethabo
Eupša go tla manyami
ge šetše re tlo kgaogana

Re thaba kudu ge re bona
Bana bešo mokhwi
Eupša re sa goletše
lona fase la lethabo

Mantšu a go re šala botse!
A se sa bolelwa
Eupša dikoša tše dikgethwa
di tlo go opelwa
hymns.chorus:
Godimong ga go kgaoganwe
Ga go laelanwe
Go lona fase le botse
Gaeng la bakgethwa

hymns.title: ROBALA TSHEPONG GO JESO.
hymns.lyrics:
Robala tshepong go Jeso
Mo go sa tsogweng ka sello
O khuditše ka boroko
A ka se tsošwe le go tshwenywa

Ithobalele go Jeso
Boroko bjo bo monate
Go ikhutša o le tshepong
Kholofelong ya bosafeleng

Robala go Jeso khutšong
Tsogo ya gwe ke e kgethwa
Ga go poifo, tahlego
Tše širang matl 'a Mophološi

Robala mme o tlo tsošwa
Phalafala ge e letšwa
Go phatloge le lebitla
O tsošwe ka bosafeleng

hymns.title: GE MOŠOMO WA KA O FEDILE
hymns.lyrics:
Ge mošomo wa ka o fedile mokhwi
Mmele wona o tlo apara go sa hwe
Ke tlo tseba M'phološi wa ka ka mošola
O tlo nkamogela a myemyela

Lethabo le tlo ata kudu
Ge ke mmona 'fahlegong
Ge leihlo la kgaugelo
Le ntebelela
Pelo ya ka e tlo tumiša
Ka mogau le lerato
Godimo ke lokišeditšwe bodulo

Ke gopola baratiwa
Ba šetšego ba hwilego kgale
Ke gopola taelano kua nokeng
Re ka se sa kgaogana kua edene
Takatšo ke go bona M'phološi
hymns.chorus:
Ke tlo.... motseba
Ke tlo motseba
Ke phološitšwe
Ke tlo ema le Yena
A na le mabadi
Diatleng tša 'Gwe

hymns.title: MPHE BEBELE
hymns.lyrics:
Mphe Bebele sedi la bophelo
Go kgothatša motimedi tseleng
Ga go sefefo se se ka lefihlang
Go bane Jes 'o tlilo boloka

Mphe Bebele pelo e nyamile
Sebe mahloko di ntlatša poifo
Mphe mafoko ao a tšwang go Jeso
Emiša 'bone M'phološi a tle

Mphe Bebele e nkgantšhetše tsela
Nthute kotsi tša lefase leno
Bone la poloko le tuke kudu
Le boneše tsela ya khutšo

Mphe Bebele 'bone le sa feleng
Le emiše 'bitleng leo le butšweng
Mpontšhe lesedi la go tšwa Godimo
Mpontšhe kgalalelo ya Jordane
hymns.chorus:
Mphe Bebele ntšu le lekgethwa
Sedi la gago le tlo ntlhatla
Ke ditshepišo molao le lerato
Go be go tle tšatši le sa feleng

hymns.title: BUŠA O NKOPELELE
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso o ba file bohle, Mantšu a bophelo
Modiradibe theetša, Mantšu a bophelo
Re a filwe fela, A re iša go Jeso

Tsebišang le batho bohle, Mantšu a bophelo
A re tlišetša khutšo, Ka Jeso M'phološi
O a hlatswišiša, Dipelo tša rena
hymns.chorus:
Ke mantšu a mabotse bjang, Mantšu a makatšang
Ke mantšu a mabotse bjang, Mantšu a bophelo

hymns.title: LEBOPONG LA NOKA YA JORDANE
hymns.lyrics:
Bopong la Jordane k'eme
Ke laletše mahlo
Nageng ya Kanana thabong
moo humo la ka le lentshe

Mapatlelo a mabotse
A tletše ka kganya
Jeso Letšatši oa buša
O tloša bošego

Ke tlo fihla neng bo botseng
Mme ke šegofatšwe
Ke tlo bona neng Tate
Ke khutše mmušong wa 'Gwe

Ke thakgetše pelong ya ka
Nka se sa dula fa
Le ge maphotho a ntika
ka sebete ke tlo ya
hymns.chorus:
Re tlo ikhutša nageng
E botse ya thabo
Ka mošola ka bosafeleng
Re opele koša ya Moshe le Kwana
Re hwe le Jeso go ileng

hymns.title: GO TLA LETHABO BOFELONG
hymns.lyrics:
Go tla lethabo bofelong
Ge re phuthegela gae
Re tliša 'ngata tša rena
Kwa Jerusalem 'e mpšha

Koša tša ntshe dimonate
Re tumiša re sa khutše
Re reta Kgoš'a magoši
Kwa Jerusalem 'e mpšha

Re letilwe ke lethabo
Nywako ke e mentšhi gona
E lokišitšwe ke Jeso
kwa Jerusalem 'e mpšha
hymns.chorus:
Le... tha ... bo, kwa pele
Le....tha .... bo, Lesafeleng
Go se fele ga thabo
ge Mophološi a tla

hymns.title: KAKANYO E TEE E BOTSE
hymns.lyrics:
Go tla kakanyo
Go nna e botse
Ke kgauswi le gae lehono
Go feta pele

Kgauswi ntlong ya Tate
Dintlong tše dintši
Kgauswi moo Jeso a bušago
Lewatleng le botse

Ke kgauswi go ya gae
Ke rola merwalo
Sefapano sa maima
Ke rwala mphapahlogo
hymns.chorus:
Kgauswi gae
Legae la ka
Kgauswi gae lehono
Go feta pele

hymns.title: GO NA LE LEFASE LE LEBOTSE
hymns.lyrics:
Go na le 'fase le lebotse
Tumelong re le bona pele
Tate wešo o re letile
Go re lokišetša bodulo

Re tlo opela faseng lela
Dikoša tše botse tumišong
Re ka se ke ra ba manyaming
E seng ka baka la boikhutšo

Go Tate wešo kwa Godimo
Re tlo goa koš 'a tumišo
Ka mpho e kgolo lerato
Le mahlatse a tšhegofatšo
hymns.chorus:
Monate kua pele
re kopane faseng le botse
Monate kua pele
re kopane faseng le botse

hymns.title: RE KOLOBETŠE
hymns.lyrics:
Re kolobetše ka matla a Gago
Ka 'rato le moya re batamele

Ga se re loke, re tšhilafetše
Re tlatšwe mo tšhileng ya sebe

Moya wa legodimo theoga
Re kgopela kgaugelo re batamele

Theetša ntšu le tšwago Godimo
Le re: O moratuwa, O wa nkgahliša
hymns.chorus:
Re ya go rapela Morena Jeso
Ka ‘rato le moya re kolobetše

hymns.title: E TLA SEDIBA SA MAHLATSE
hymns.lyrics:
Tla sediba sa mahlatse
O nthute go opela
Melatšwana ya mogau
e lokela tumišo
Onthute go go kgabiša
Ke bontšhe toko ya go
Ge tshepo ya kgaugelo
yona o mpha fela

Ke bea kgopolo yaka
Ka thušo ya 'Go ke mo
Ke na le tshepo go
fila gae ka lethabo
Jes 'o nyakile timelong
Ke tšwile ka lešakeng:
Go mpoloka le dikotsing
A tšolla madi a 'Gwe

Ka mogau ke wa molato
ka mehla yohle
Mme o ntleme ka dithapo
Ke be kgauswi le wena
Morena ge ke timela
Ke tloga go Modimo
Tšea pelo yekhwi ya ka
O e tliše go wena

hymns.title: MOYA O MOKGETHWA
hymns.lyrics:
Moya o mokgethwa
hlatla mokreste kgauswi
Re goge ka seatla
Re baeng lefaseng
Ea lapilego a kwe
Ntšu la mohomotši
Seba 'tlang molelere
ntatele go ya gae'

O mogwer 'a potego
O kgauswi go thuša
O se ke wa re šia
Poifong le leswiswing
Ge go le matshwenyego
Dipelo di fifala
Seba 'ta molelere
Ntatele go ya gae'

Ge mošom 'o fedile
Re tlo leta tokologo
Re maketše thapelong
Re sa tsebe re ngwadilwe
Re taboga meetsefula
'Kgopelang madi 'a Jeso
Seba 'tla molelere
ntatele go ya gae'

hymns.title: SE SE TEE NNA WA MORENA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke na le kopelo Morena
Tsela tša ka di maraga
Ka meets goba mollo
Ntihwekise, ntlhwekise

Ge o mpha pono e hlakilego
Ke a thaba moeng wa ka
Mme kudu-kudu pelo e mpša
Ke tšohle-tšohle go nna

E, ge pelo e hiwekile
Ke tlo atelwa ke pono
Bophelong bja gago go
Bonwa tse hlwekilego
Go hiweka

Gana tsel a morago
Le kgopolo ya ditšhila
Le g eke leka ka elwa
Ga se ke hlweke ga ke a hlweka
hymns.chorus:
Ntlhatšwe ka ntle le ka teng
ka mollo
Le ge go le bjang ga ke gane
Sebe sona se hwe
Sebe sona rehwe ruri

hymns.title: NA O HLAPILE MADING?
hymns.lyrics:
Na o tšwa go Jeso go yo hlapišwa
O hlapile mading a kwana?
A o tshepile yana lehono na?
O hlapile mading a kwana?

A o sepela le yena M'phološi?
O hiapile mading a kwana?
A o ikhutša go eo a bapotšweng?
O hlapile mading a kwana

Ge go monyadi o tlo ba botse
O hiapile mading a kwana
O itukišetša go aga 'seding?
Le go hlapa mading a kwana

Lahla aparo tše tlatšego sebe
'Mme o hlape mading a kwana
Go sediba seo se hiatšwang le moya
Tla o hlape mading a kwana
hymns.chorus:
O hlapile mading 
Mading a hlapišang le moya?
Aparo tša gago dibja ka lehlwa
O hlapile mading a kwana

hymns.title: KE LELERILE MORENA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke lelerile Morena, Bjale ke etla
Ke sepetše tsel'a sebe, Jeso ke etla

Ke sentše nywaga e botse, Bjale ke etla
Ke tla ke Ila ka manyami, Jeso ke etla

Ke lapišitšwe ke sebe, Bjale ke etla
Ke tshepile 'rato la 'Go, Jeso ke etla

Kgopelo le tshepo yaka, Ke go tla gae
Go ba Morena a nkhwetše, Jeso ke etla

Ke hloka madi a Gagwe, Bjale ke etla
Ntlapiše ke be mosweu, Jeso ke etla
hymns.chorus:
Ke etla, ke eta; Ke tšwa tahlegong
Moulele atla tša go, Jeso nkamogele

hymns.title: EO A KWAG
hymns.lyrics:
Mang le mang, Yo a kwago a goelele
Mantšu a tšegofatšo, 'Faseng lohle
A boleleng gohle mo go leng batho
Le ge e le mang a tle

Le ge e le mang ya tlang se diege
Monyako o sa butšwe o ka tsena
Jeso ke nnete, Tsela e phedišang
'Le ge e le mang a tle'

'Lege e le mang, Tshepišo e ntshe
'Le ge e le mang' A duleleruri
'Le ge e le mang, 'Phelo bosafeleng
'Le ge e le mang a tle'
hymns.chorus:
Le ge e le mang, Le ge e le mang
A botšeng bohle baleng mo lefaseng
Tate wa ba bitša 'O re batle gae'
'Le ge e le mang a tle'

hymns.title: BOHLE TUMIŠANG MATLA
hymns.lyrics:
Tumišang maatla
'Jeso Mangeloi a iname
Tlišang mphapahlog
'a bogoši le rwešeng Morena
Tlišang mphapahlog
'a bogoši le rwešeng Morena

Lena ba le kgethilwego
le le mašalela
Mo hlompheng ya le phološang
le rwešeng Morena
Mo hlompheng ya le pholosang
le rwešeng Morena

Di tšo tšohle le ditšhaba
mo lefaseng lekhwi
Bohle a ba mo hlomphe
ba rwešeng Morena
Bohle a ba mo hlomphe
ba rwešeng Morena

E ke rena le bakgethwa
re ka inama
Re opele go safeleng
re rweše Morena
Re opele go safeleng
re rweseng Morena

hymns.title: JESO MORATWA KE NNA
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso moratwa ke nna, Kefofela go wena
Ge difefo di ntlela, Le meetseful 'a ntlela
Mphihle au mophološi, Fefo se be se fete
Ke tsene polokegong, O be o nkamogele

Ga go sebo se sengwe. Ke lebeletše wena
Hle o se ke wa ntahla, Wena o nkemiše:
O tshepo yohle yaka, Thušo e tšwa go wena
O nkhurumetše hlogo, ka diphuka tša gago

Kenyaka wena Kreste, Go feta dilo tšohle
O tšoše ba ba weleng. O fodiše balwetši
Go halalela wena, Nna ke diradibe
Ke letše tšhil 'a sebe, O lletše kgalalelo

O tletše kgalaleio, E bipang dibe tša ka
Go the nok'e fodišang, Mpoloke ke hiwekile:
O noka ya bophelo, A ke we tokologong
O mele pelong ya ka, ke toge bosafeleng:

hymns.title: JESO THABO YA PELO
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso thabo ya pelo
Wena noka ya bophelo
Lethabong la lefase
Re boela go wena gape

Wena bogobe bjo 'phelago
Re lakatša go ja wena
Re nwa go wena sediba
O tlatše meoya ya rena

Re go lakatša Meoyeng
Gohle moo re lahlelwago ntshe
Go lethabo ge bosele
Mahlatse ge re go dumela

Jeso o dule go rena
O re direle khutšo
Leleka swiswi la sebe
O kgantšhetše lefase

hymns.title: SE SENGWE KA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Bogolo ka Jeso ke tsebe
Bogolo ka mogau ke bontšhe
Ke kgone poloko ya 'Gwe
Lerato la yo'a nkhwetšeng:

Bogolo ka Jeso k'ithute
Ke tsebe go rata ga 'Gwe
Ke rutwe ke moya wa 'Gwe
O montshe dilo tša Jeso

Bogolo mantšu a Jeso
Ke bolele le Morena
Ke theetse ntšu la 'Gwe
E be polelo tša nnete

Bogolo ka tulo sa 'Gwe
Khumo tumišong ya 'Gwe
Bogolo ka 'goši bja 'Gwe
Le ka go tla ga Morena
hymns.chorus:
Bogolo ka Jeso
Bogolo ka Jeso
Ke bone poloko ya 'Gwe
Lerato la yo a nkhwetšego

hymns.title: JESO KEA GO RATA
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso kea go rata, kea tseba o wa ka
Ke lahla tšohle le mekgwa ya sebe
Morekolodi wa ka o m'phološi
Ge ke go ratile Jeso ke bjale

Ke go rata ka ge wen'o nthatile
Wa nthekela tshwarelo sefapanong
Ke go rata ka ge o wele mmetiwa
Ge ke go ratile Jeso ke bjale

Ke tlo go rata bophelong le lehung
Ke tlo tumiša g oka sa phedile
Le go gotonya ga lehu go nkwetše
Ge ke go ratile Jeso, ke bale

Di tulo tša kgalalelo le thabo
Ke tlo go hiompha gona legodimong
Ke opele ke rvele mphapahlogo
Ge ke go ratile Jeso ke bale

hymns.title: KE ENG SE KA NHLATSWAGO SEBE?
hymns.lyrics:
Ke fela madi a Jeso

Ke kae moo nka hiatswiwago?
Ke fela mading a Jeso
Ke kae moo nka swarelwago?
Ke fela mading a Jeso

Ga go na polano
Ke fela mading a Jeso
E sego go lokeng ga ka
Ke fela mading a Jeso

Tshepo ya ka le khutšo
Ke fela mading a Jeso
Go loka gohle ga ka
Ke fela mading a Jeso

Kgalalelo ke opela
'Fela mading a Jeso
Ditebogo tšeo ke tlišago
Ke fela mading a Jeso
hymns.chorus:
Al ke a bohlokwa a
nhlatšwago bošweu
Ga ke tsebe se sengwe
Ko feia madi a Jeso

hymns.title: BOTŠA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
A 'o tennwe, pelo e bohloko?
Tsebiša Jeso, tsebiša Jeso
A 'o swabile o hloka lethabo?
Tsebiša yena Jeso

O palelwa go thiba megokgo?
Tsebiša Jeso, Tsebiša Jeso
A 'o na le dibe tše fihlilwego?
Tsebiša yena Jeso

A 'o tšhaba maswabi a tlago?
Tšebisa Jeso, tšebisa Jeso
A 'o fešegela tša ka moso?
Tšebisa yena Jeso

O tshwenywa ke kgopolo ya lehu?
Tšebisa Jeso, tšebisa Jeso
A 'o kganyoga mmušo wa Jeso?
Tšebisa yena Jeso
hymns.chorus:
Jeso, Tsebiša Jeso
ke mogwera 'potego
Ga go mogwera goba ngwaneno
tsebiša Jeso fela

hymns.title: GO BOTSE GO TSHEPA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Go botse go tshepa Jeso
Go theetša ntšu la gage
Le go boloka tshepišo
go rialo Morena

Go botse go tshepa Jeso
Go tshepa madi a 'Gwe
Ka tumelo go hlwekišwa
Mading a Gagwe fela

E go botse go mo tshepa
Go tlogela le dibe
Go Jeso go itšeela
Bophelo, thabo, khutšo

Ke thabetše go mo tshepa
Jeso M'phološi wa ka
Mme ke tseba o na le nna
O tlo ba le nna gohle
hymns.chorus:
Jeso, Jeso kea mo tshepa
Ke mo lekile gohle
Jeso, Jeso ya rategang
ruri ke tshepa wena

hymns.title: LE MONATE LETŠATŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Le monate letšatši la
go ikgethela Mophološi
A pelo e e thabileng
E bolele thabo ya ka

Go fedile go phethilwe
Ke wa Morena ke wa ka
O mpiditše ka latela
Ka thabela pitšo yeo

Ikhutše hie pelo ya ka
Nagana ka dilo tše khwi
O se tloge, go Morena
yo' a ruileng tše bohlokwa
hymns.chorus:
Monate tšatši le Jeso
A nhlatswitšeng sebeng
O nthutile go rapela le
Go phela ka lethabo
Le botse tšatši le Jeso
A nhlatswitšeng sebeng

hymns.title: TLANG BAO RE RATAGO MORENA
hymns.lyrics:
Tlang bao re ratago
Morena re thabeng
Re opele mmogo bohle
Re opele mmogo bohle
Re hlomphe bogoši
Re hlomphe bogoši

Ba ganang G'opela
Ba sa tsebeng Modimo
Mme bana ba legodimo
Mme bana ba legodimo
Ba opele thabong
Ba opele thabong

Thaba ya Sione
E tšweletša botse
Sešo re file Godimong
Sešo re fihle Godimong
Mebileng ya gauta
Mebileng ya gauta

A keng re opele
Megokgo e ome
Re sepele Imanuele
Re sepele Imanuele
Go ya Legodimong
Go ya Legodimong:
hymns.chorus:
Re ya kua Sione
O mobotse Sione
Re ya legodimong
Motse mobotse wa Modimo

hymns.title: KE REKOLOTŠWE
hymns.lyrics:
Ke rekolotšwe, Kea goelela
Ke rekolotšwe ka madi
Ke rekolotšwe ka mogau
Ke ngwana 'Gagwe ka mehla

Ke rekolotšwe ka lethabo
ga go poloelo e ka hlalošang
Ke tseba gore sedi la Gagwe
Le dutše gonna ka mehla

Ke nagana ka M'phološi
Ke nagana tšatši lohle
Ke opela ke sa homole
K'opela rato la Gagwe

Ke tlo bona botse bja Gage
Kgoši ya molao o botse
Ka rato la Gagwe o a nthlathla
O mpha kopelo bošego

Mphapahlogo o letile
Mošola meagong e botse
Kapele setše go phethilwe
Ke tlo dula le Morena
hymns.chorus:
Reko..……..lotšwe
Ke re kolotšwe ka madi
Rekolotšwe, Rekolotšwe
Ke ngwana gagwe ka mehla

hymns.title: RE TLO IKHUTŠA SEDIBENG
hymns.lyrics:
Re tlo ikhutša sedibeng
Metsing a itshekileng
Gona Jeso o re letile
Go re amogela

Ge re lapile mo leetong
re tlo dula khutšong
Pele ga 'diba sa bophelo
motsweding wa 'phelo

Tla go Jeso Kreste o tilšwe
O kgone go ema
Ke yena meetsi a bophelo
Enwa o se nyorwe
hymns.chorus:
Re tlo ikhutša sedibeng
Re ikhutše sedibeng
Re ikhutše sedibeng
Meetsing a itshekileng

hymns.title: GE JESO A PUTHA DITŠHABA
hymns.lyrics:
Ge Jeso a phutha ditšhaba
Pel'a 'Gwe go bonale
Re tlo ema bjang kahlolong
Tšatšing le legolo la tsogo

Na re tlo kwa M'phološi ge a re
Mohlanka wa potego
Goba re thothomela ka poifo
Re fetšišwe pele ga Gagwe

O tlo bososela bana ba 'Gwe
Ge a bona swao la 'Gwe
A ba apese ka kgalalelo
Ba khuname naong tša 'Gwe

A re lebeleleng re letile
Mabone a tuke ka kudu
Ge monyadi a tsena modirong
Re be re itukišeditše

Dipelo di labile Godimo
Ka kgotlelelo re letile
Eto la rena ge le fedile
Re tlo dula nae khutšong
hymns.chorus:
O tlo phutha mabele sebokeng
Mme mmoko o tlo gašagana
Re tho go ema bjang kahlolong
Tšatšing le legolo la tsogo

hymns.title: NA KE NGWADILWE?
hymns.lyrics:
Ga ke' iše felo khumo
Le ge e le gauta
Ke hloka legodimo
Ke tsene lešakeng
Bukung kgolo ya pušo
Gona legodimong
O ko mpotše Mmoloki
A ke ngwadilwe nna

Dibe tšaka di tletše
Bja ka 'šabašaba
Eupša madi a' Mmoloki
Wona a ntekane
Go na le ditshepišo
Tihakeng tše phatsimang
'Lege di le khubedu
Di tlo šhweufala'

Motse mobotsebotse
Felo ga lesedi
Moo ba halaleditšweng
Ba aparo tše tšhweu
Mo bobe bo sa tseneng
Go senya tše botse
Go nale mangeloi
A hlokometšego
hymns.chorus:
A ke ngwadilwe nna
Bukung tšweu ya 'Go
Bukung kgolo ya mmušo
A ke ngwadilwe nna

hymns.title: KAHLOLO E BEILWE
hymns.lyrics:
Kahlolo e beilwe, 'Puku di butšwe
Re tlo ema bang tšatšing leo
Go ahlolwa bobe le botse
Moahlodi ge a ahlola

Kahlolo e tlo thoma ka bahu
Ba phelago ba tlo latela
Kahlolo ya 'Gwe e tlo ema
Dipukung tša Modimo

Re tlo ema bjang go nyakišišwa
Dibe tša rena ge di utullwa
Melato e ahlotšwe gohle-gohle
Go se gona boikarabelo
hymns.chorus:
Re tlo ema bjang tšatšing leo?
Re tlo ema bjang tšatšing leo?
Na re tlo humana, Re ahlola?
Goba dibe di hlatswitšwe

hymns.title: RE MEMILWE MONYANYENG KGOŠING
hymns.lyrics:
Re memilwe monyanyeng kgošing
Go dula le batho ba 'Gwe
Go tlo ba bang go wena le nna
Ge kgoš'i tsena?

Mphapahlogo ba keng sa mmetiwa
Kgalalelo ya hwetšeng batho
Moo re tlo bona go hlakile
Ge Kgoši' tsena

Nakong yeo go tlo bonatšwa
Dilo tše difihletšweng bohle
Re tlo tsebana dibopego
Ge Kgoši' tena

O tlo thaba ge a re bona
Hiopha se apere tše tšweu
Botse ge re ka ema tekong
Ge Kgoši' tsena

Kgaogano eo e safeleng
Bohloko go ba batimetšeng
Tlhorišego naking ya 'hloko
Ge Kgoši' tsena

Morena re fe tšhegofatšo
Gore re kgone go go leta
Gore re tle re se go tšhabe
Mohlang o tsena
hymns.chorus:
Mohlang Kgoši e tsena
Nwanešo o reng
Go tloba bjang go wean le nna
Ge Kgoš'i tsena

hymns.title: RE RWELE DINGATA
hymns.lyrics:
Re bjala ka mehla, Peu ya go loka
Mosong, mosegare, le mantšiboa
Šetše re emetše, Nako ya go buna
Re tlo thaba ge re wele dingata

Re bjala letšatšing, Re bjala moriting
Ga re tšhabe le phoka, ya marega
Šetše re tlo fetša, Modiro wa rena
Re tlo thaba ge re wele dingata

Re bjalela Morena, Le ka megokgo
Le ge ka dinako, Re mahlomoleng
Ge dillo difedile, Re tlo mmona
Re tlo thaba ge re rwele dingata
hymns.chorus:
Re rwele ngata, Re rwele ngata
Re tlo thaba ge re rwele dingata
Re rwele ngata, re rwele ngata
Re tlo thaba ge re rwele dingata

hymns.title: E-KWA LENTŠU LA MODIŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Ekwa lentšu la modiši
Kwa sethokgweng ka leswiswing
A bitša tše di timetšeng
Kgole le lešaka la 'Gwe

Ke mang yo'a ka mo thušago
Go nyaka ba ba timetšeng
Ke mang yo'a ka dibušang
Moo di ka bang polokegong

Ekwa di lla sethokgweng
Kwa dithabeng godimo
Ekwa Morena ge a re
'Eya o bone 'nku tša ka'
hymns.chorus:
Di tsenyeng, di tsenyeng
di tšwa kgole dithabeng
Di tsenyeng, di tsenyeng
Di tlišeng go Jeso

hymns.title: PHOLOŠA BA BA HWAGO
hymns.lyrics:
Phološa ba ba hwago, Ba hlokomele
Ba phamoleng sebeng le lebitleng
Llelang basenyi, Tsošang ba welego
Ba botšeng ka Jeso M'phološi

Le ge ba monyatša, O ba letile
O letile ba ba sokologago
Ba lekeng ka maatla, Le ka bonolo
O tlo swarela ba ba dumelago

Ka pelong ya motho eo a lego tekong
Go fihlilwe se se ka bolokago
Angwe ka lerato, le pelotshekegi
Ba tlo boela ba tsoga gape

Phološang ba ba hwago, Go la swanetše
Morena o tlo le nea maatla
Tseleng e sesane ka boikokobetšo
Ba botšeng gore M'phološi o hwile
hymns.chorus:
Phološang bao ba hwago
Ba hlokomeleng
Jeso o kgaugelo
O a boloka

hymns.title: KE RATA GO BOLELA DITSHWANTŠHETŠO
hymns.lyrics:
Ke rata go bolela
tshwantšhetšo ya legodimo
Ka Jeso kgalalelong
Le ka 'rato la 'Gwe
Ke rata go e bušeletša
Go bane e le nnete
E nkgodiša kganyogo
Go fetiša tšohle

Ke rata go e bušeletša
Tshwantšhetšo e makatšago
Go feta le gauta
tša tora tša rena
Ke rata go e bušeletša
Go batho ba bangwe
Ge ba seso ba kwe
Thomo ya Modimo

Ke rata go e bušeletša
tshwantšhetšo e monate
Gommo ke tlo e bušeletša
E ba botse ka kudu
Ke rata go e bušeletša
Go batho ba bangwe
Ge ba sešo ba kwe
Thomo ya Modimo

Ke rata go e bušeletša
Go ba tsebago
Ba rata go e kwa
Le bjaloka ba bangwe
Ge ke le kgalalelong
koša ya ka e mpša
E tlo ba yona ye
Yeo ke e ratilego
hymns.chorus:
Ke rata go e bušeletša
Tshwantšhetšo e kgethwa
Tshantšhetšo 'a kgale-kgale
Ya rato la Jeso

hymns.title: NYAKANG BA LAHLEGI
hymns.lyrics:
Nyakang ba lahlegi ka bonolo
Ba hlahlathang kgole dithabeng
Ba feng mantšu a phedišago
A re 'tlang gae lehono le'

Nyakang ba lahlegi ka bonolo
Ba pelo tše tletšeng bohloko
Ba gogeleng tseleng ya poloko
Ba šupeng tsela ya bophelo

Ke ya gona ka Jeso ya mpitšang
Ke mo latela mehla yohle
Ke hlokomele ba ba gobetšeng
Ke ba tliše go Jeso tsela
hymns.chorus:
E yang kgole, kua Dithabeng tšohle
(E yang kgole.. kwa.. dithabeng.. tšohle)
Le ba bušeng
(Le ba buseng.. Ba.. balahlegilego..)
Mohlapeng wa Morekolodi wa ka
(Mohlapeng wa Morekolodi wa ka..)
Jeso kwana.. ya badiradibe
(Jeso kwana.. ya.. badiradibe..)

hymns.title: PITŠO YA BABUNI
hymns.lyrics:
Kgole, kgauswi mašemong
Go tletše ka puno
Go phatsima gauta ya yona
Thabeng ke mabele
