Dumelela Jeso ka pelong
Ge go le gona go se hlatšwešišwe
Dumelela Jeso go tsena

Ge bagwera ba se sa tshepagala
Dumelela Jeso go sena
Ge o tlo tsena
'Felong la boikhutšo
Dumelela Jeso go tsena

Ge o opela le bakgethwa
Dumelela Jeso ka pelong
Ge o tlo tsena
'Felong la boikhutšo
Dumelela Jeso go tsena
hymns.chorus:
Bjale se ngongorege
Bjale o se mo lahle
Bjale o bule pelo
Dumelela Jeso ka pelong

hymns.title: NKA SE GO TLOGELE
hymns.lyrics:
Nka se go tlogele
Nkase go lahle
Ke tlo go goga, ke boloke
Ka lebaka la leina la ka
O se boife
O tšee keletšo ya ka

Ge o tlelwa ke difefo
O mpitše o le thapelong
Ke tlo go akarela matsogong
Tiišong ya hlokomelo
Mo ditekong, mo ditekong
Ke go lokišetše tsela

Ge godimo le hlwekile
Mme wena o le phadimong
Lethabo le le ka ka noka
Tšohle e le boipsino
Ke tlo ga le wena
Ke tlo ba nago
Ke goge kgato tša 'go

Ge moya wa gao o tepelela
O tletše mahloko
Mouwane o go tlaletše
Ke tlo kgantšha
Le leswao, le leswao
La lerato la ka le bonwe

hymns.title: MPOTŠE TABA YA KGALE-KGALE
hymns.lyrics:
A ke le mpotšeng ditaba
Tšeo di sa tsejwego
Ka Jeso kgalalelong
Ka Jeso leratong
Le mpotšeng ga botse
Bjalo ka ngwana
Ke'a fokola ke lapile
Ke mo manyaming

Le mpotše ka bonolo
Le ka kwešišo
Thekolllo e makatšago
Phodišong ya sebe
E bušeletše gantši
Ke se e lebale
Bjalo ka phoka e
Fela mosegare

Le mpotše yona ge
Le tšhaba gore
Nka forwa ke lefase
Menateng ya lona
Ge botse bja lefase
Bo feta mahlong a ka
Mpotše taba ya kgale
Ka lerato la Jeso
hymns.chorus:
Le ke le mpotše taba
Le ke le mpotše taba
Le ke le mpotše taba
Ka Jeso leratong

hymns.title: JESO 'SEDI LA LEFASE
hymns.lyrics:
Mangeloi ge 'a opela
Jeso 'sedi lefaseng
Kgalalelo Moreneng
Jeso 'sedi lefaseng

Tsogang bohle ka 'thabo
Jeso 'sedi la 'fase
Tlang phenong ya godimo
Jeso 'edi la 'fase

Kreste o kgabišitšwe
Jeso 'sedi lefaseng
Moren'a bosafelego
Jeso 'sedi lefaseng

Retang Kgoši ya khutšo
Jeso 'sedi la 'fase
Retang tšatši la toka
Jeso 'sedi la 'fase
hymns.chorus:
Re tsama 'a 'seding Le le botse
Tlang mo phadimong ya tšhegofatšo
Le re phadimele nako tšohle
Jeso sedi la 'fase

hymns.title: GAPE GO BOWA LETŠATŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Gape go tlo bowa tšatši la boikhutšo
Le šegofaditšwe ke Jehofa
Ge a re laetše mošomo
Mme bohle ba tle ba be le khutšo

A re emišetšeng letšatši le go
Ithute thato ya 'Gwe, re mo kwe
Mme o tlo kwa ge re hlagiša dithapelo
Le kgopelo tša rena

Morena a mafase a theetše
Ekwa ntšu la bana ba 'Go mogaung
Ditshepišo tša gago di tiile
Ttliša tshepo go bakgethwa

Tate tshepo ya rena godimo
maatla, taelo tša 'Go di a re goga
Bophelong ke modiši le thušo
Kgalalelo, bogolo ke tša 'Go

hymns.title: 'RATO LA GWE PELOHLOMOGI
hymns.lyrics:
Tsogela lethabong moya wa ka, Mme reta Mophološi
O nyaka koša go nna, Lerato la 'Gwe la toka
Rato la 'Gwe, 'rato la 'Gwe, Toko e phethagetše

A mpona ke le tshenyegong, Mme a nthata ke le gona
A mpoloka tahlegong, Toko ya Gwe lerato
'Rato la 'Gwe, 'Rato la 'Gwe, Toko e kgolo

Le ge dira e le tše ntši, Lehu le thiba tsela
O nkgoga ka pabalelo, Toko ya Gwe lerato
'Rato la 'Gwe, 'Rato la 'Gwe, Toko e tiilego

Ge bothata bja ka leru, Le leso bo etla bo duma
O eme kgauswi le nna, Pelohlomogi ke lerato
Rato la 'Gwe, 'Rato la 'Gwe pelohlomogi e kgolo

hymns.title: EMANG, EMELANG JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Emang, emelang Jeso
Mašole 'a 'fapano
Emišang molao wa 'Gwe
Go sešo senyege
Le fenye le go fenya
Le hlatlwa ke Yena
Dira tšohle di fele
Kreste ke Morena

Emang, emelang Jeso
Le kweng le moKgoši
Le yeng tweng e thata
tšatšing la lehono
Banna mošomeleng
Dira e le tše ntši
Le tiišetšeng Moreneng
Le Iweng ka maatla

Emang, emelang Jeso
Ntwa e ya fela
Lehono ke mokgoši
Ka moso ke phenyo
Yo'a fenyago o rwešwa
Mphapahlog 'a 'phelo
Le Moren'o tlo buša
Ka mo gosafeleng

hymns.title: NA KE BOMANG?
hymns.lyrics:
Na ke bomang mošol'a maphotho
Ba feta mellwane'a mabitla
Ba re, Jeso boloka?
Ba hlapile mo mading

Na ke bona bao bosweng bja bona
Ba hlalefile ba kgetha Jeso
Ba šupa kgaugelo
Ba hlapile mo mading

Ba ke bao e riling mahlomoleng
Ba hwetša khutšo go Jeso Kreste
Ba tletše kgalalelo
Ba hlapile mo mading

Na ke bona bao ka gare ga ntwa
Ba ema gona moo go fišago
Khutšo yeo e hlwekileng
Ba hlapile mo mading

Ba bolokilwe ka bosafeleng
Sebeng, lehung le mahlomoleng
Jeso o re tlang keno
Le hlapišwe ka madi
hymns.chorus:
Ba sena menyakong ya Jerusalema
Ba hlapile mo mading a kwana
Ba tsena menyakong ya Jerusalema
Ba hlapile mo mading

hymns.title: A O TENNWE NA?
hymns.lyrics:
A o tennwe tshotlegong, A o tlalelong?
Ta go nna O tle go khutša

A o na le tšhupo Go nkgogela go Yena?
Diatleng, naong tša 'Gwe, Go na le dintho

A o na le mphapahlogo O rwalwago ke Kgoši?
E, o gona, eupša ke wa mmetlwa

Ge ke mmona, ke molatela, ke na le eng mokhwi?
Mahlomola le mahloko, Le dillo

Ge le mo ngaparetše, Go tlo felela kae?
O tlo fenya mahlomola, O phele

Ge ke re a nkamogele, Na o tlo gana?
Le ga tee, Tšohle le ge di ka feta

Eupša ge ke dira tšohle, Na o tlo mputsa?
Bakgethwa le ba lego dillong, Ba re Eng

hymns.title: BONANG MOPHOLOŠI MOJAKO
hymns.lyrics:
Bonang M'phološi mojako
O opaopa ka bonolo
Ga a bolo go leta moo
O se ke wa mo swabisa

O re o reke go Yena
Gauta le diaparo
O tlotse maahlo o bone
O apole dibe tša gago

A ke o kwe lentšu la Gagwe
O go fa boikgethelo
Wena o modiradibe
Nagana o sokologe

Mošomo wa Gagwe o a fela
O tloga a se sa rapela
Wa ditšhila a tšhilafale
Wa goloka a loke bjalo

Jeso o eme ka ntle
O kgopela pelo ya 'go ka bonolo
Ragoga o bule mojako
A tle a lalele nago

Mo tsenye o mo amogele
Mme o tlo ikhutša go yena
O thabe le yena
Le je mmogo dilalelo

hymns.title: KE TSENE FASENG LE BOTSE
hymns.lyrics:
Ke tsene faseng le botse
Ke humane khumo gona
Moo phadimong le lethabong
Moo bošego bo fetileng

Ke sepela le M'phološi
Mme re hlamula monate
Mme o nkgoga ka seatla
Ga sešo ke be godimong

Go tla monko o monate
O tšwa hlareng tše sa omeng
Le matšobeng a sa poneng
Mo dinokeng tša bophelo

Phefo e ntlišetša tumo
Ya koša tša legodimong
Di opelwa ke mageloi
Dikoša tša polokego
hymns.chorus:
Oh! Kanana nag'e botse
Ke tlo ema mo go wena
Ke lebelele mosola
Moo ke agetšwego gona
Mme ke bone kgalalelo
Gae la kaka bosafeleng

hymns.title: GO ŠEGOFALE KOPANO
hymns.lyrics:
Go šegofale
Kopano leratong
Bogwera mokhwi
Bo swane le bja legodimong:

Ka pele ga terone
Re lla ka thapelo
Maikemišetšo a rena
Ke a tee go fihla khutšong

Mathwenyego ohle
Le yona merwalo
Le go llelana ga rena
Le kwelano bohloko

Ge re kgaogana
re kwa bohloko
Eupša re tshepa gore
Re tlo kopana gape

hymns.title: TSOGA MOYA WA KA
hymns.lyrics:
Tsoga moya wa ka
Tloga mo poifong ya 'Go
Tefelo ya madi e
Šetše ntefeletše
Monkemedi o teroneng
Monkemed o teroneng
Ina la ka atleng tša 'Gwe

O phele 'godimong
Go tlo nkgopelala
Ka rato la Gagwe
ka madi a Gagwe
Ao a tšhologetšego bohle
Ao a tšhologetšego bohle
A gaša terone ya mogau

Mabadi a mahlano
A kwa khalfari
A nkišetša thapelo
A mpolelela ka kudu
Mme a re mo tshwarele hle
Mme a re Mo swarele hle
Se mo tlogelele go hwa

Tate o kwa
Mo tšwa wa Gagwe
A ka se fularele
Morwa wa Gagwe
O arabela mo mading
O arabela mo mading
A re ke tšwetšwe ke Modimo

hymns.title: TLA GO JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Tla go Jeso, Tla go Jeso
Tla go Jeso bjale
Bjale tla go Jeso
Tla go Jeso Bjale

Oa boloka, Oa boloka
Oa boloka bjale
Bjale wa boloka
Oa boloka bjale

A ka kgona, A ka kgona
A ka kgona bjale
Bjale a ka kgona
A ka kgona bjale

Bitša yena, Bitša yena
Bitša yena bjale
Bjale bitša yena
Bitša yena bjale

O letile, O letile
O letile bjale
Bjale o letile
O letile bjale

O mo tshepe, O mo tshepe
O mo tshepe bjale
Bjale o mo tshepe
O motshepe bjale

Šegofatšwa, Šegofatšwa
Šegofatšwa bjale
Bjale Šegofatšwa
Šegofatšwa bjale

hymns.title: GA GO LEINA LE LENGWE
hymns.lyrics:
Ga go leina le lengwe
Le swanago le la Jeso
Ke thabo ya mangeloi
Le mokreste lefaseng

Ga go le le swanang nalo
Ge pelo e nyamile
Ga go le le swanang nalo
Ge pelo e thabile

Ke ne tshepo ya go mmona
Mohlang a tlo bonala
Ka tshepo a nkamogele
A nkhomotše le moyeng

Ge a rata na ke some
Ka mehla tshemong ya 'Gwe
Go lokile ge 'ele Jeso
A šegofatše tšohle

Ge a rata gore lehu
Le kgome mmele ke hwe
Go lokile ge'ele Jeso
Tshepo ya lehu la ka
hymns.chorus:
Leina botse, Leina botse
Ga go le swanang nalo
Leina botse, Leina botse
Ke leina la ga Jeso

hymns.title: BJALE BOLELA LENTŠU KA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Bolela lentšu ka Jeso
Mogwer a lerato
Kgothatša dipelo ka
Seo o se diretšwego

Bolela lentšu ka Jeso
Tshwarelo ya dibe
Mme ka mogau o leka
Go ya gae legodimong

Bolela lentšu ka Jeso
Bjale wena o re
Ke rata M'phološi
Yo a nkhwetšego

Bjale bolela lentšu ka Jeso
Se sene nako
Pelo e tletšego botswa
Moputso ke maswabi

Bjale bolela lentšu ka Jeso
Tumelo ge e fela
Ragoga phokolong yohle
Mme o mo nee tšohle
hymns.chorus:
Boleala lentšu ka Jeso
Le tlo thusa tseleng
Lentšwana ka Jeso
Košeng le thapelong

hymns.title: LETŠANG TSHIPI TŠA LEGODIMO
hymns.lyrics:
Thabang lena ba legodimo
Ka moya o o thakgetšego
Bona Tate o mo gahlanetša tseleng
O amogela ya lapilego

Thabang lena ba legodimo
Ka motimedi yo a phološitšwego
Maya o bolokilwe mo sebeng
Ngwana yo a tšwetšwego leswa

Thabang mme le dire thato
Mangeloi a opela ka phenyo
Bolelang poleo ya lethabo
Ka moya o tee o tšwetšwego
hymns.chorus:
Kgethwa! Kgethwa! Go 'Opela mageloi
Kgethwa! Kgethwa! Ka harepa
Ke bontši bjo bo rekolotšwego
Ba opela koš'a tokologo

hymns.title: KE JESO WA NAZARETA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke eng bontši bo hlokofetše
Bo feta bo potlakile
Ba phuthegang mehla yohle?
Ke thapelo ya eng bjale?
Bontši bja araba
Jeso monasareta o a feta
Jeso monasareta o a feta

Ke mang Jeso ya sikinyango motse
Ka maatla a kalo?
Mofeti yoo o na le go šikinya
Batho ka thato?
Gape ba fetola ba re:
Jeso monasare o a feta
Gape ba fetola ba re:
Jeso monasare o a feta

Jeso ke yena yeo a kilego
A sepela mahlokong
Mme ba imelwago bohle
Balwetši ba tla go yena
'Fofu sa ineela go kwa:
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta
'Fofu sa ineela go kwa:
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta

Lehono bale ka kgale
Re ka bona kgato tša 'Gwe
O eme mo go rena
O tsena gore a dule
Na ga re na go goelela
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta
Na ga re na go goelela
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta

Tlang bohle ba imelwago
Tlang tshwarelong, khutšong
Lena bao le timetšego
Bang le amogele kgaugelo
Ba le kwago phemelo e kgauswi
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta
Ba le kwago phemelo e kgauswi
Jeso wa nasareta o a feta

Ge o gana pitšo ye
O senya 'rato la Gwe
O tlo goa ka maswabi
Ge o gana pitšo ya 'Gwe
Go tlo thwe: O diegile
Jeso wa nazareta o fetile
Go tlo thwe: O diegile
Jeso wa nazareta o fetile

hymns.title: TŠE MASOME SENYANE LE SENYANE
hymns.lyrics:
Go be go šetše tše masomesenyane
Le senyane šakeng
Engwa e lelera dithabeng
kgole le 'fero sa gauta
Kgole kua dithabeng, nageng
Kgole le modiši yo bonolo
Kgole le modiši wa potego

Tše masomesenyane le senyane
Di gona: ga se tša felala
Eupša modiši a fetola:
Etee yona e timetše
Bjale le ge mogwera e le e mobe
Ke a e hloka nku ya ka nageng
Ke nyaka nku ya ka nageng

Ga go yo mongwe yo' a tsebilego
Bogare bja meete a setšwego
'Swiswi leo Morena a le fetilego
Pele a humana nku ya 'Gwe
Kua nageng a e kwa e lla
E tsetla e šetše eke e a hwa
E lla e tsetla e šetše e ke e a hwa

Morena madi a tseleng ke a eng?
A mohlala mo thabeng?
A tshologile e timetše
E sešo bonwe ke modiši
Morena atla tša Gago di gagoletšwe eng
Di phutšwe ke mmitlwa bošego
Di phutšwe ke mmitlwa bošego

Gohle dithabeng medumong
Go rotoga matlapeng
Go kwagala legoa la go ya legodimong
Thabang, ke humane nku ya ka
Mangeloi a opela teroneng
Thabang, morena o humane nku ya 'Gwe

hymns.title: SE INEELE MOLEKONG.
hymns.lyrics:
Se innele tekong, Seo ke sebe
Go fenya go thuša, Go goga e mong
O Iwe senna, Fenya ditlwaelo
O lebelele Jeso, O tlo fenya

O nyatše bobe le dithogako
O hlomphe Modimo
Se nyatš 'ina Yena
O dule botshepeging
Pelotshekeging o lebele Jeso
O tlo fenya

Modimo o fa mofenyi mphapahlogo
Re fenya tumelong,Le ge re ka wa
M'phološi wa rena,O tlo re tsoša
Le belela Jeso, o tlo fenya
hymns.chorus:
Kgopela thušo go M'phološi
Khomotso le maatla
O rata go go thuša
O tlo fenya

hymns.title: GO LLA GO KA SE MPHOLOSE
hymns.lyrics:
Dillo ga di mphološe
Ešita le dikeledi
Ga di alafe matswalo
Ga di nhlatšwe le dibe
Dillo ga di mphološe

Mešomo ga e phološe
Ditiro tše hiwekilego
Kgopolo e halalelago
E ka se ntokafatše
Mešomo ga e mphološe

Tebelelo ga e mphološe
Ke timela melatong
Ke kwa ntšu la mogau
Ge ke leta ke tlo hwa
Tebelelo ga e mphološe

Tumelo e a phološa
Ke tshepa Morw’a Gago
Ke tshepa tiro ya 'Gwe
Ke tšhabela go Yena
Tumelo e a mphološa
hymns.chorus:
Jeso o ile 'a ntellela
A nkhwela sefapanong
Jeso o tlo ntokolla
Mme o tlo mpoloka

hymns.title: TSHEPA YENA FELA
hymns.lyrics:
Etlang bohle ba imelwago sebeng
Morena o na le mogau
O tlo le fa Khutšo
Ge le mo tshepile

Jeso o tšholotše madi
Go re nea mašoto
Ikineleng bjale ka mading
Ao a hlatswišišago

E, Jeso ke nnete, tsela
Yeo e išago khutšong
Dumelang bjale go Yena
Le šegofatšwe

Etlang bjale tsenang bakgethweng
Le ye kgalalelong
Agang faseng la godimo
Kua lethabong
hymns.chorus:
Mo tshepeng, mo tshepeng
Mo tshepeng bjale
O'a boloka o'a boloka
o'a boloka bjale

hymns.title: BONA MODIŠI WA ISRAELE YO BOLO
hymns.lyrics:
Modiši wa Israele
O eme o a bitša
Ekwa o bitša dikonyana
Mme o a di akarela

O re le ba lese ba tle
Le se ba thibele
Gobane Morena o
Tletše go ba phološa

Morena re ba tlišitše
Ka lethabo
Ke ka thabo re lego ba Gago
Le bana ba rena

hymns.title: TUMIŠANG LEINA LA JEHOFA
hymns.lyrics:
Tumišang Jehofa
Mo reteng makgotleng
Mo hlompheng godimong godimo
Tumišang lerato
Kgaugelo ya 'Gwe
E ka ka maatla

Bjale phalafala e tumiše phenyo
Tumišong ya 'we go Ile harepa
Tšeo di dumago gabotse
Tumišang kopelong 'ina la 'Gwe

Ge le mo reta tumišong
Tumišang ka hlale
Tše botse! O nea bophelo
Meoya yohle e tumiše Yena
Tumišang Jehofa

hymns.title: KE YA GO HLOKA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Ke ya go hloka Jeso
Ke le modidi
Moeti le mofeti
Ga ke na tša lefase
Ke hloka rato la 'Go
Go nkhomotša tseleng
Tiiša kgato tša ka
Go ba maatla a ka

Ke hloka pelo 'a Jeso
Go kwa ke tlalelwa
Bolela teko 'a ka
Go nthuša bohlokong
Ke hloka kgaugelo 'a 'Go
Go ba thušo ya ka
Go mpontšha tša Jeso
Go ntšhupa konyana

Ke ya go hloka Jeso
Mme ke tlo go bona
O le kgalalelong
O dutše teroneng
Ke na le baphološwa
Ke tle ke thabele
Go opela tumišo tša 'Go
Go bona Morena, Amen

hymns.title: MODIMO THUŠO YA RENA
hymns.lyrics:
Modimo thušo ya rena
Tshepo ka mehla
Tshireletšo le sefefong
Gae la bosafelego

Moriting wa terone
Go na le bakgethwa
Tsogo la 'Go le lekane
phemelo ya sebetša

Dithaba di sešo tša ba gona
'Fase le sešo la bopšwa
Go floga bosafelego
O dutše o le Modimo

Sekete sa mengwaga
Eke ke phirimo
Se ka ba bjalo ka meso
Pele go letšatši

hymns.title: O TLO EMA A TSEPAME BOKA MMOTO.
hymns.lyrics:
O tlo ema o tsepame
Bjalo ka dithaba
A ikhutše ba ka leswika
Eo a thepago Jehofa

Go be go se tše ka phemelago
Salem e mo botse
Ka matsogo a sa felego
Go bakgethwa

Bontšha kgaugelo Morena
Go bao ba go tshepilego
Ba ituletšego dinneteng
Molaong wa nnete

hymns.title: TUMELO E PHELAGO
hymns.lyrics:
Molao o nyaka tumelo
E tee e phedilego
Eo e rego Modimo ore:
Ditiro tše phedilego

Morena, O re swarele
Molao wa 'Go o robilwe
Wona o a halalela mme
Ga re o kwešiše

Swarela tlolo ya rena
Tloša bobe bja rena
Thuša ka baka la Morwa
Re boloke molao gape

hymns.title: RE TLO KOPANA MOSOLA
hymns.lyrics:
Re tlo kopana ka mošola
Moo go sego difefo na?
Kgalalelong e sa felego
Moo go sego mahloko?

Re tlo kopana lebopong
Re fetile difefong
Re tiiše Boitshwarelong
Lebopong la legodimo

Re tlo kopana motseng
Meagong e phadimago
Merakong ya Jaspera
A! e agetšwego rena?

Re kopane le M'phološi
Ge a tlo tšea ba 'Gwe
A re tlo tseba kgaugelo
Re dule teroneng ya 'Gwe?
hymns.chorus:
Na re tlo kopana gona
Re tlo kopana mošola?
Na re tlo kopana gona
Moo go senago difefo?

hymns.title: MOLAPO WA BEULA
hymns.lyrics:
Ke feta molapong woo ba rego o bodutu
Mme ke humana tšela yeo e tletšego matšoba
Go nna ke molapo wa Beula, o mo botse
Gobane ke sepa le Mphološi molekane

Ga go na moriti o ka fifatšago tsela
Gobane phadimo ya kgalalelo e ka mehla
Mme melodi e opelwago ke ba legodimong
E kwagala melapong yeo, E mphodiša matswalo

Eke ke lethabong go ya motseng wa lesedi
Lethabo la ka le'a gola, Le phadimo
Mme ke atamela difero tša borena godimo
Gona tseleng e rotogago 'pušong ya lerato
hymns.chorus:
Molapo wa Beula
O a hlokega go nna
Gobane ke bona fase
Le lebotse la tshepišo

hymns.title: MOLAPONG O MOBOTSE WA EDENE
hymns.lyrics:
Molapo o botse wa Edene
Monate khutšong
Dipelong tše nyamilego
Ekwa monko o bose

Pelong ya yo a llago
Go phadima letšatši
La koša ya magneloi
Ao a opelago kgole

Legae le gona la M'phološi
La sehlopha se sekgethwa
Lefaseng la kgalalelo
Go koša tše mpšha
hymns.chorus:
Molapo o botse wa Edene
Legae la bakgethwa
Gantši ge ke tlalelwa
Ke lora khutšo ya Gago

hymns.title: KRESTE GOBA BARABAS.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke tlo dirang ka Jeso?
O eme pele ga ka
Ka aparo se sekhubedu
Le mmitšwa hlogong

Ke lokolle lehodu
Leo le ikgogomošago?
Sebe goba M'phološi?
A o tlo lahlwa mang?

Potšišo e bohlokwa ye
Kgwerana e sa eme
Kwalobohloko
E sa ntše e le gona

Sedulong sa kahlolo
A o ka lahla lefase?
O sa ntše o goelela
Mmapoleng! Mmapoleng!

Ga se modiradibe, fela
Potšišo e tla ka maatla
E theetšeng bakreste
Mo nakong ya diteko
hymns.chorus:
Ye ke potšišo bjale
Karab 'e tlo ba efe?
A ke bapole Kgoši Jeso?
Ke lese Barabas?

hymns.title: TLIŠANG TŠA LESOME
hymns.lyrics:
Ekwang lentšu la Beibele ka mehla
Tlišang tša lesome polokelong
Dirang boineelo bosafelego
Le tshepe ditshepišo tša Gagwe

Le nyaka tsebo ya Moy 'o Mokgethwa?
Tlišang tša lesome polokelong
Di tlišeng bjalo ka ge di tshepišitšwe
O tlo le nea meputso

Emišetšang Morena dipelo
Tlišang tša lesome polokelong
Di tlišeng bjalo ka ge di tshepišitšwe
O tlo le nea meputso

Emišetšang Morena dipelo
Tlišang tša lesome polokelong
Tumišang ka botshepegi le dimpho
Pelong tšeo le di bolokilego

Emišetšang tumišo magodimong
Tlišang tša lesome polokelong
Re opele haleluya lethabong
Monateng ka ge na le tshepo
hymns.chorus:
Tlišang tša bošome polokelong
Le nnteke, Go ialo Jehofa
"Mme ke tlo le tšhelela mašoto
Go hlokege felo la go amogela"

hymns.title: TŠATŠI LE LEKGETHWA LA JEHOFA
hymns.lyrics:
Letšatši le le kgethwa
La Jehofa Morena
Ke lona la bošupa
Le kgethilwe ke Yena

Mošomo o feditšwe
Sabata sešo e thome
Mme a le šegofatša
Ke ka moo re ikhutšago

Batho ba le fetotše
Ba kgetha la pele
Hlokomela ka mo Beibeleng
Ga e bolele bjalo

Ba bantši bona ba re
Sontaga e lokile
Eupša puku 'a Morena
Yona e a ba phegiša

Ka bala mme ka bona
Molao wa Sabata
Ka pele ka ikokobetša
Tseleng ye ya nnete
hymns.chorus:
Le 'amogele, Le amogele
Re a go thabela
Go ikhutša go Jehofa

hymns.title: KHUTŠO E PHETHAGETŠEGO
hymns.lyrics:
Khutšo, Khutšo
'Faseng le la sebe
Madi a Jeso a re fa khutšo

Khutéo, Khutšo
Go lapa mo tseleng
Go šomela Jeso ke go ikhutša

Khutšo, Khutšo
Ge o selekegile
Sefegeng sa Jeso go Khutšo

Khutšo, Khutšo
Ba ratua ba ile
Go Jeso re bolokilwe bohle

Khutšo, Khutšo
Te di sa tsejwego
Jes'o re tseba mo teroneng

Khutšo, Khutšo
Lehu le širago
Eupša Jes'o fedišitše lehu

Khutšo, Khutšo
Ntwa e tlo fela
Jeso o re biletša godimo

hymns.title: JESO KE TLO GO LATELA
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso ke tlo go latela
Gobane ke ekwa o mpitša
Ratong tumišong ke etla
Gore o nkiše gae

Maahlo a ka tšwa tseleng
Dinao tša fapoga
Le ge ke fokola
Ke wena maatla a ka

Ge ke le mahlokong
Dibe di le tseleng
Ke tho ba le Khutšo
Ge ke go latela
hymns.chorus:
Ke tlo latela
Ke tlo latela
Ke tlo latela
Kae le kae moo o nkišago

hymns.title: RE BJALA PEU TŠA PELOHLOMOGI
hymns.lyrics:
Nke re phutheng matšoba
A tletšego mo ditseleng
Nke re bolokeng mabele
Mmoko re o lahle
Nke re humaneng khutšo
Mahlatseng a gona bjale
Nke re tlošeng ka botshepegi
Mmitlwa yohle tseleng

Ke eng re sa rate dikoša
Tše tšwago dinonyaneng?
Ke eng re sa hlokomele
Matšoba ao a ratwago?
Nke re tateng lehlabula
Ge re sale go lona
Bjalo ka ge re le maregeng
Nakong ya go tonya

Ge re sa kwele ngwananyana
Yoo a re senyeditšego
O tlo tsoga a lahlilwe
Re sehlwe re na naye
Re ganelang go bonwa
Re mmona maswabing
Le ge a sentše
O lokelwa ke tshwarelo

Ge re mmona a rapaletše
A tonya lehung
O kile a re botša
Tša nako e fetilego
O kile a re bolediša
A re hwela lehung
Bjala pelohlomogi hle
Re tlo buna kgapele
hymns.chorus:
Re bjaleng pelohlomogi
Re bjale pelohlomogi
Re bjale pelohlomogi
Re tlo buna pelohlomogi

hymns.title: MORENA BONA SEFEFO
hymns.lyrics:
Marena bona sefefo
Maphotho a a tlola
Go maru a maso godimo
Gago thušo kgauswi
A ga o bone re a hwa?
Na o robaletšeng?
Ke nako e tšhošago ka kudu
Lebitla tlase tlase

Morena ke mo tlalelong
Manyaming lehono
Ke mo khuduegong ya pelo
Oho! Tsoga o mphološe
Diba di nkiša mathateng
Ke hupetšwe moyeng
Mme ke' a hwa, ke'a hwa
Morena, Phakiša o laole

Morena poifo e ile
Tšohle di mo Khutšong
Letšatši le phadima lewatleng
Legodimo le kgauswi
O dule le nna M'phološi
Se ntlogele ke nnoši
Ka lethabo ke fihle lebopong
Ke khutše kua Moreneng
hymns.chorus:
Diphefo, maphotho
Di tlo go kwa
Homolang (le khutše)
Na ke lewatle leo le tlolang
Goba mademone goba le batho?
Se ka seke sa nwelela sekepe
Moo go robetšego Morena
Di tlo go le kwa lentšu la ka
Homolang, le Khutše
Di tlo go le kwa lentšu la ka
Le homole

hymns.title: MOPHOLOŠI YO A MAKATŠAGO
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso Mophološi wa makatša
Morena le Mophološi
O fihla moya wa ka leswikeng
Dinokeng tša lethabo

M'phološi yo'a makatšago ke Jeso
O tloša morwalo wa ka
O ntshwere nka se šikinyege
O mpha maatla ka mehla

O šegofatša ka dinako tšohle
Mme o ba gona seng sa 'Gwe
Kopelela Modimo kgalalelong
Ka Morekolodi wa ka

Mo hang ke tsoga phadimong ya Gagwe
Go mo gahlanetša marung
Poloko ya Gagwe, Lerato la 'Gwe
Ke opele le bontši
hymns.chorus:
O fihla moy'a ka farong tša swika
Leo le širago 'ganateng
O fihla 'phelo bjaka leratong
O mpipa ka 'atla sa 'Gwe
O mpipa ka 'atla sa 'Gwe

hymns.title: MOREKOLODI YO A ŠEGOFADITŠWEGO
hymns.lyrics:
Morekolodi a sešo
a re sala botse
A re tlogela go
Dula le mohomotši

A tla go re thabiša moyeng
Yo a thakgetšego
Ge a humana pelo
Yeo e mo ratago

Re kwa lentšu la Gagwe
Ke le le bonolo
Le tlosa phoso mme
Le lapološa pelo

Semelo se re nang naso
Le phenyo ya rena
Le kakanyo ye kgethwa
Ke tša Gagwe

Moy'o hlwekilego le kgaugelo
E ba pelohlomogi
Lokiša dipelo tša rena
Re swane Nago

hymns.title: LE GE ŠETŠE E LE TŠE DIKHUBEDU.
hymns.lyrics:
Le ge di kaba khubedu
Di tlo ba tšhweu - tšhweu
Le ge di kaba khubedu
Di tlo ba tšhweu, tšhweu
Le ge di kaba bja ka letsoku
Di tlo šweufala
Le ge di ka hibila
Le ge di ka hibila
Di tlo ba bjaka lehlwa
Di tlo ba bja ka lehlwa

Ekwa lentšu le go kgopelago
Boela go Modimo!
Ekwa lentšu le go kgopelago
Boela go Modimo!
O pelo hlomogi ka kudu
Gomme o lerato
Ekwa lentšu le go kgopelago
Boela go Modimo!
Ekwa lentšu le go kgopelago
Boela go Modimo!

O swarela phošo tša Gago
Gomme o tlo di lebala
O swarela phošo tša Gago
Gomme o tlo di lebala
Lebelelang go Nna batho bohle
Go bolela Modimo
O swarela diphošo tša Go
Gomme o llo di lebala
O swarela diphošo tša Go
Gomme o tlo di lebala

hymns.title: LAHLELA THAPO YA BOPHELO.
hymns.lyrics:
Lahlela thapo ya bophelo
Leswiswing go na le yo a ka phološwago
Ngwan 'ešo kua go tlo ya mang
Go lahlela thapo kotseng ya ‘Gwe

Dira ka lebelo le ka maatla (ohle)
O duletše eng, O diegela eng?
Bona o a nwelela! Phakiša hle
Etšwa ka leselawatle, etšwa

O lahlele bathing ba lego kotseng
Ba nwelelago bohlokong kua
O sešo wa fihla
Phefong tša diteko le madimabe
Di tloga di ba iša ka teng-teng!

Nako ya phološo e a feta hle!
Ba tloga ba timelela ruri bohle
Phakiša, ngwanešo ga go nako
Lahlela thapo ba phologe hle!
hymns.chorus:
Lahlela thapo, Lahlela thapo
E mongwe o ya kgole
Lahlela thapo, Lahlela thapo
E mongwe o a nwelela

hymns.title: ITHEKGE MATSOGONG A JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Ithekge matsogong a Jeso
O tlo go thuša
O tlo go thuša
Ge o tshepa lerato la 'Gwe
O go tlatša tumišo

A&B
Ithekge matsogong a Gagwe
Motshepe, Ithekge matsogong
Tšea kgaugelo ya 'Gwe
Ithekge o lebelele godimo
Matsogong a M'phološi

Ithekge matsogong a Jeso
O tlo phadimiša tsela ya 'Go
Mo šale morago ka lethabo
Ekwa lentšu la Gagwe

Ithekge matsogong a Jeso
Tliša mathata ohle a gago
Morwalo o bonalago boima
O tle go Morena

Ithekge matsogong a Jeso
Tla o tlogele tšohle go Yena
O tletše lerato ka pelong
Ga a fifale mahlo
hymns.chorus:
S&T
Ithekge matsogong a Gagwe
Motshepe hle
Tšea kgaugelo ya 'Gwe
Ithekge lebelela godimo
Matsogong a Mophološi

hymns.title: KE NA LE MOPHOLOŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Ke na le Mophološi
Morapeledi kgalalelong
M'phološi ya rategago, mogwera
Bjale o nhlokometše ka bonolo
M'phološi wa ka e be wa gago hle!

Ke na le Tate, O mphile tshepišo
Ya bosafelego ya nnete nnete
Gomme o tlo mpiletša go Yena
Ke duma a amogele le wena

Aparo se se botse se se šweu
Kgalalelong se letile pono 'a ka
Gomme ge ke e amogela e phadima
Mogwer 'a ka amogela engwe le wena!

Ke filwe khutšo e ka ka noka
E sa tsejwego ke mogwera lefaseng
Kreste ke mmopi, Kreste ke mofani
Nke o ka newa Khutšo yeo le wena!

Ge Jeso a go humane, Tsebiša ba bangwe
Gore M'phološi wa ka ke wa gago
Rapela M'phološi ba tle kgalalelong
Thapelo 'e tlo arabjwa bjaka go wena
hymns.chorus:
Ke M'phološi wa go le wena
M'phološi wa ka o re:
"Ke wa go le wena"

hymns.title: BOSAFELEGO! KAE?
hymns.lyrics:
Bosafelego! Kae?
Bo fofa sebakabakeng
Modimong, le Khutšong
Ga bo sa le go
Potšišo e bohlokwa
Bosafelego! kae?
Potšišo e bohlokwa
Bosafelego! kae?

“Bosafelego! kae?
Bosafelego! kae?
Polokegong kgalalelong
Goba matshwanyegong
Goba bobeding bjo
Bosafelego! kae?
Goba bobeding bjo
Bosafelego! kae?

Bosafelego! kae?
O ikgethela bjang?
Tša lefase leno o
sa di hlokomeletše eng?
O sešo o tiišetše
Bosafelego! kae?
O sešo o tiišetše
Bosafelego! kae?

Bosafelego! kae?
Mogwera hlokomela
Modimo o tloga
A dira kahlolo
Tšatši leo la gago
Bosafelego! kae?
Tšatši leo la gago
Bosafelego! kae?

Bosafelego! kae?
Ao bosafelego! kae?
Mogwera tsoga
se ye le lefase
Araba potšišo
Bosafelego! kae?
Araba potšišo
Bosafelego! kae?

hymns.title: JESO MOPHOLOŠI
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso M'phološi kua Betlehema
O tšwaletšwe lesakeng, a dihlong
Ah ke semaka! Go retwe Yena!
A nyaka nna Ee nna!
O tletše go nnyaka!
O tletše go nnyaka

Jeso Mophološi kua Khalefari!
O ntefeletše molato gona kua!
Oh, Ke semaka!
Go tlile bjang na?
A hwela nna Ee, nna
A hwa ka baka la ka

Jeso M'phološi
Go tloga kgale
Ke sa le kgole le lešaka
Ka bonolo o bolela moyeng
A bitša nna, Ee, nna
A bitša nna, Ee, nna

M'phološi o tlo tšwa 'godimong
Tshepišo e bots'e bušeletšwe
Ke tlo mmon'a theoga legodimong
A tlela nna, Ee, nna
A tlela nna, Ee, nna

hymns.title: SEDI LE BONOLO
hymns.lyrics:
Sedi le le bonono
Leswiswing, Ntshepediše!
Go leswiswi ke kgole
Le legae, Ntshepediše!
Nthekge maoto ga ke hloke pono
Ya kgole kgauswi go ntekane

Kgale ke sa rapele
ke re Ntshepediše!
Ke be ke ikgethetše
Tsela bjale, Ntshepediše!
Ke be ke ithata ke sa boife
Se gopole sebe sa ka hle

O ntšhegofatše le nna, O nketepele
Dithokgweng, maswikeng
'Nokeng tšebogale go ya mesong
Mme mesong mangeloi a thaba
Ba ke ba ratilego kgalekgale

hymns.title: E SEGO TSELA YA KA
hymns.lyrics:
Tsel 'a 'Go Morena, E sego ya ka
Le ge leswiswi le le bjang
Ntshepediše ka seatla
O nkgethele le tsela
Ga ke rate le go ikgethela
Nka se ke ka ikgethela
O nkgethele Modimo
Ke tle ke sepele tokong

Mmuš 'o ke o nyakago ke wa Gago
Tsela e šupiwe ke Wena
Eo e išago gona ga Gago
Nka tla ka timela
Tshwara le bophelo bjaka
Bo tletšego thabo le manyami
Mphe se ntoketšego
O nkgethele se ntoketšego

Nkgethele bagwera
Bophelo goba bolwetši
Nkgethele tša bophelo
Bodidi goba bohumi
Kgetho e se be ya ka
Go tše kgolo goba tše nyenyane
Wena o be montshepidiši
Bohlale bjaka le tšohle

hymns.title: PELO E MAHLOMOLENG.
hymns.lyrics:
Pelo e le maswabing
Maahlo a lakatšago
Thabo e gona tumelong
Lesedi go Jeso

Menate ya lefase ga
e kgotsofatše
'Rato le šupa 'thabo
Lerato ga le hwe

Khomotšo ya godimo e
Newa ke Kreste
Na wena o loketše tahlego?
Itshole (sokologa o phele)

Khutšo ya 'Gwe eke noka
'Rato la 'Gwe eke koša
Joko ya 'Gwe e bofefo
Letšatši lohle
hymns.chorus:
Tlang (e tlang) keno go nna (lena)
Bohle ba le lapilego, Le imelwago (moyeng)
Ke tlo le lapolosa: (etlang le)
Itšeeleng joko ya ka, Le ithute go nna
Gobane ke bonolo, Ke pelohlomogi
Le tlo humana Khutšo meoyeng

hymns.title: KOŠA TŠA LETHABO
hymns.lyrics:
Koša tša lethabo
Letšatšing le lebotse
Re tlo reta M'phološi
Bophelo le tsela

O ratile le bana
Ge a sa le lefaseng
Le kua legodimong o
Sa rata re 'a tseba

Re rata tumišo tša
'Gwe, Le go kwa ditaba
Tša ge'a le Galelia
Ya bogologolo

M'phološi wa mahlatse
Re khunama mokhwi
Re tlo go kgopela thušo
Go phelela Wena
hymns.chorus:
Re opela tumišo
Tša Kgoši (ya rena)
Re opela kgalalelo
'a Kgoši

hymns.title: NALEDI E BOTSE
hymns.lyrics:
Naledi e botse ya tšwa bošego
Legodimong e ya phadima ka 'sedi
Ya goga banna ba bohlale
Go humana malao a M'phološi

Ba tsebišitšwe ke lentšu la nnete
Ke nako gore naled 'e phadime
Ba latela sedi leo le lego gohle
E lego Kreste naledi ya meso

Re latela bjalo ka bona
Lesedi la lefase lohle
Re tlo latela seding la 'Gwe
Go ya gae legodimong
hymns.chorus:
E sa phadima, e sa phadima
Naledi e botse nageng le thabeng

hymns.title: HAREPA TŠE MASOME A DIKETE
hymns.lyrics:
Ekwang mantšu a bontšintši
A tumiša godimong
Go lethabo Jeso o buša gona
Modimo wa lerato
Bona o dutše teroneng
Jeso o buša lefase
Haleluya, Haleluya
Haleluya, Amen

Kgoši ya kgalalelo
O buše ka bosafelego
Ga go se ka kgaoganyago
Ba Gago 'ratong la 'Go
Ke bao e lego lethabo
Go bona sefahlogo sa Gago
Haleluya, Haleluya
Haleluya, Amen

Phakisa o tle M'phološi
Letšatši la kgalalelo
Ga go ešo goelelwa gore
Lefase le a feta
Re tlo opela re re
Kgalalelo go Kgoši'
Haleluya, Haleluya
Haleluya, Amen

hymns.title: E MONGWE O TLO TSENA
hymns.lyrics:
E mongwe o tlo tsena mojakong
Kua pele, kua pele
A latšwe bose bja kgalalelo
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? ke nna?
A sepele mebileng ya gauta
A bone botse ponong tše botse
A šome ka thabo 'a leeto
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? ke nna?

E mongwe o tho rola sefapano
Kua pele, kua pele
O tlo amogela serwalo
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? Ke nna?
Mongwe o tlo bona Morena kgalalelong
A phologe maswabi a lefase
A thabe le yena bosafelego
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? Ke nna?

Mongwe o tlo opaopa go tswaletšwe
Kua, pele, Kua pele
A kwe lentšu le re Ga o tsejwe
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? Ke nna?
Mongwe o tlo bitša a se kwagale
O tlo ganelela lefela
A hlaelwe sedulo sa bakgethwa
Ke wena? Kenna? Ke wena? Ke nna?

Mongwe o tlo 'opela le bafeny
Kua pele, kua pele
Go opela ba rekolotšwego ka madi
Ke wena? Ke nna? Ke wena? Ke nna?
Mongwe o tlo dumedisa tsogong
Baratiwa kua go sego kgaogano
A bolokilwe kgalalelong
Ke wena? Ke nna? Ke wena? Ke nna?

hymns.title: GE MATŠATŠI A FETA BJALO
hymns.lyrics:
Pelo di hloile ge
Matšatši a feta bjalo
Meoya e a timela ge
Matšatši a feta bjalo
Re tlo myemyela gona
Tseleng yohle ya rena
Tse botse re ka di dira
Ge matšatši a feta

Ga go nako 'a papadi
Ge matšatši a feta
Fahlogo di phadime
Ge matšatši a feta
Faseng la mathata
Dikeledi di maahlong
Thuša ngwaneno a tsoge
Ge matšatši a feta

Tlemo tšohle tša lerato
Ge matšatši a feta
Re di tlogela morago
Ge matšatši a feta
Re bjala peu tše botse
Di gola moriting, leseding
Di re thabiša dipelo
Ge matšatši a feta
hymns.chorus:
A feta, a feta
A feta, a feta
Bo botse re ka bo
Dira ge matšatši a feta

hymns.title: FELO LE GONA LA GOIKHUTŠA
hymns.lyrics:
Felo le ntshe la goikhutša
Go yena Modimo
Moo sebe se sa tshwenyego
Go yena Modimo

Felo le ntshe la khomotšo
Kgauswi le Modimo
Moo re kopanang le Jeso
Kgausi le Modimo

Felo le ntshe tokologong
Kgauswi le Modimo
Felo la thabo le khutšo
Go Yena Modimo
hymns.chorus:
Jeso Morekolodi
E 'a tswang go Tate
Re sware re letile
Kgauswi le Modimo

hymns.title: O NTHWALE
hymns.lyrics:
Ke goletše tšatši leo!
Ge ba rekolotšwego
Ba apere tše tšhweu Sione
Gae la lethabo

Ke tlo kwa di haleluya
Go tšwa mašabašabeng
Moya le wona o thakgetše
Le bona bakgethwa

Thabelang tšatši leo
Le ratwang ke bafeti
Le tlo fediša le mahloko
Ba khutše Mohloding
hymns.chorus:
O nthwale, nthwale nkiše Sione
Nthwale o nkiše motseng wa thabo
Motse wa bakgethwa

hymns.title: NAKONG YA TEKO
hymns.lyrics:
Mo nakong ya teko, Tate ntiiše
Boiteko bio bobe bo se nkgeloše
Ge o mpona ke thekesela
Ntshware ka seatla
Ratong la Gago, O se ntese ka wa

Ka menatenate nka gogwa ke lefase
Bobe bo tla go ntwantšha
Bo nkgopotša mahloko a Getsemane
Pono ya Golgota e sefapanong

Ge o ka ntlišetša maswabi, dillo
Bohloko bo ka ntlela tseleng ya ka
Nthuše ke se hlaelelwe
Ke 'atla sa 'Go
O nthuše ka merwalo ya ka ka mehla

hymns.title: BA TLISA DIMPHO GO JESO.
hymns.lyrics:
Ba tliša dimpho go Jeso
Tša bewa dinaong
Lerato go Mophološi
La natefiša tšohle
Mediro e mebotse
Le thušo bahloking
Tšohle o a dibona
Ke tše botse tšohle

Be go le ntshe mofeti
Ya hlokometšego
Dimpho ge di ntšhiwa
E le tše dibotse
A tlelwa ke phišego
Ya go tliša mpho
A ema kgauswinyana
A sa swara selo

A goa a re Morena
Ke'a tseba o mogau
Tšea tšohle go nna
Le pelo e mpe
Jeso a arabela
A re mpho ya 'go
E botse go di feta
Tšeo di tlišitšwego
hymns.chorus:
O tlišitše go Jeso
Mpho e rategang
A re, "ke neela pelo"!
A bea naong tša 'Gwe

hymns.title: NTŠEE KE LE BJALE
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso Morena ke'a lla
Morena nthuše ke ya hwa
Tliša bophelo bja Gago
Nkuke ke le bjale

Ke tletšeka dibe Jeso
Ka madi a Gago nhlatšwe
O ka ntira seo se ratang
Ntšee ke le bjale

Ga ke na le mešomo
E mebotse Moreneng
Mphološe ka ina la 'Go
Ntšee ke le bjale

Ke khunama pele ga 'Go
Mpone M'phološi dinaong
Nthome mošomo wa Gago
Ntšee ke le bjale

Ge 'o rata ke go šomele
Mpšafatša hlaologanyo
Nna o ntšhomiše:
Ntšee ke le bjale

Pheletšong ya mošomo
Ge šetše ntwa e fentšwe
Sello sa ka e tlo ba se
Ntšee ke le bjale
hymns.chorus:
Ntšee Kgoši
Ntšee ke le bjale
Batametša phološo
"Ntšee ke le bjale"

hymns.title: GO SOMELA JESO
hymns.lyrics:
Thabang re šomela Morena
Re kgahlwa ke mošomo wa Gawe
Tšohle tšeo a re laelago tšona
Di tlo phethišwa ka botlalo

Ka thabo re tlo ruta
Lerato la 'Gwe ditšhabeng
Jeso kgalalelo ya Tate
O tlo re nešetša ditšhegofatšo

Ka boikokobetšo re latela Morena
Teleng ka botlalo
Batimedi re ba iša nneteng
Go yona kwana ya Morena
hymns.chorus:
Wena Jeso re tlo ya
Pele ka lethabo
Re tšweleletše
Mošomong wa Gago

hymns.title: E SWANETSE KONYANA
hymns.lyrics:
E swanetše Konyana
E swanetše Konyana
E swanetše Konyana
E hlabilweng

Mphološi mmušo o tle!
Fetšiša mmus 'a sebe
Tliša boikhutšo bja
'Go, Konyana

Eke re ka motheetša!
Re rate re tumiše
Go filela Sione
Go konyana
hymns.chorus:
Tumo haleluya!
Theto haleluya!
Tumo haleluya!
Go konyana

hymns.title: DIATLANYANA TŠE PEDI
hymns.lyrics:
Atlana tše pedi go šomela Jeso
Lelengwana go mo tumiša
Ditsebjana tša go theetša
Lentšwana la go opela!

Maottwan 'a mabedi go sepela tsela
Go ya magodimong godimo
Mahloan'a mabedi go bala Beibele
Go ruta 'rato la Jeso!

Pelwana go e nea Jeso
Noyana o tee go o phološa
Bophelwana bo tee go mo šomela
Nna fela go ba wa Gagwe
hymns.chorus:
Morena, re atle
mešomong bonyenyaneng
Morena, re atle
Go ithuta Wena

hymns.title: KOKO! КОКО
hymns.lyrics:
Koko! Koko! Ke mang?
Eme, eme botseng!
Ke moeng le Morena wa ka
Yo bjalo sešo a bonwe pele
Moya wa ka, go a makatša
O ka se bule mojako?
O ka se bule na?

Koko! Koko! O gona!
O eme, botseng!
Lebati le boima go bulega
Bobi le manti di tlemme lebati
Di tlemeletše mojakong
Di tlemeletše mojakong

Koko! Koko! Boning!
O eme, botseng!
Tsogo le mabadi lea opaopa
Kgare ya mmetlwa e hlogong
Go phadima mahlo ka bonolo
Na o tlo tlogela M'phološi
A eme, a eme?

hymns.title: APEŠA KA BOPHELO BJA 'GWE
hymns.lyrics:
Lebelela Jeso ga' na bosodi
Tate nkabele Yena
Phelo bjaka bja sebe bjale
Bo šweufala twa, bo ka lehlwa

Mabadi a sebe a tseneletše
Bokhubedu moya' ka wa tšhaba
Go apešwa Jeso ke Wena
Ke bolokegile e le ruri

Ka wena thabo ya mogau
Jeso o swere seaparo
Morena ke'a se amogela
Ke apara bophelo bja 'Go

Lehu la 'Go le a boelanya
'Phelo bja 'Go bo a lokafatša
Ke tumišwa ke ntšu la 'Go
Go tla ga Gago go retwe
hymns.chorus:
Ke apara bophelo bja 'Gwe
Bophelo bja 'Gwe ke tlo bo tseba

hymns.title: HLABANG MOKGOSI WA NTWA
hymns.lyrics:
Hlabang mogoši sera se kgauswi
Emiša lešela la Morena
Itlemeng matheka le lokele ntwa
Letshepeleng mo ntšung la 'Gwe

Ka maatla re thulana Le sera, Re tlo fenya
Šela la Morena le phadime seding
Re ka se šitwe ke ntwa

Modimo wa bohle re a rapela!
Re thuše bohle ka Kgaugelo
Ntwa e fedile, Phenyo e humanwe
Re rwale mphapahlogo pel'a 'Go
hymns.chorus:
Bjale emiša mašole
A re Iweng re emišitše lešela
Loka! Tsepama! Goelelang hosanna!
Kreste ke Yena molaodi

hymns.title: NKETE PELE MOPHOLOSI
hymns.lyrics:
M'phološi, ntshepediše ke se timele teleng
Jeso ke se timele, Kreste tseleng yohle
Ntshepediše botse Leratong la 'Go

Maphotho a bophelo Ge a fela a biloga
Wena sebo sa botšhabelo, Moy a ka o go tshepile
M'phološi, ntshepetše Ke sešo ke timele
Ntshepediše botse Tate ke go tshepile

Sefefo sa bophelo ge šetše se fetile!
Kreste ke humanwe gae, Nageng yeo ya goloka
M'phološi, ntshepetše ke sešo ke timele
Tate megokgo yohle, Wena e phumule hle
hymns.chorus:
Ntshepediše ke šireletšegile go Wena
Ke dule leratong, M'phološi ntshepediše

hymns.title: DI KOKOTETŠWE KOTENG
hymns.lyrics:
Go bile gona mongwe yeo a nkhwetšego
Gore nna sehlobogwa ke phele
A sepela tsel'a sefapano
Gore dibe tša ka di swarelwe

O mogau, lerato le pelohlomogi
Ge a hlwekiša pelo e mpe
Eupša ga go tshekišo ke a tseba
Gobane dibe tša ka di bapotšwe

Ke tlo kgomarela M'phološi wa ka
Ka mehla ke tlo sepela ka lethabo
Ka koša molomong, koša pelong
Gobane dibe tša ka di tlošitšwe
hymns.chorus:
O di kokotetše sefapanong
O ratile go di belega
Jeso a ya sefapanong ka maswabi
Mme a ya gona le dibe tša ka

hymns.title: GA GO SELO SA KA GOMME TŠOHLE TŠA 'GO
hymns.lyrics:
A! bohloko maswabi a ba bangwe
Gore nako e be gona ya tebogo
Ke re: Jeso tšohle go rena
Ga go selo, gape ka tebogo
Ke re: Jeso tšohle go nna
ga go selo ke tšago

A nkhumana ka mmona mohlareng
Pelo e hlabegilego ya re go nna
Ke šalelwe ke se sengwe
O tšee se sengwe
Ke šalelwe ke se sengwe
O tšee se sengwe

Ka mehla kgaugelo ya Gagwe e a thuša
E a fodiša, e kwelobohloko, e tletše
O a nkokobetša ge ke seba
Sa ka se senyenyane go sa Gago
Sa ka se senyenyane go sa Gago

Lerato la Gago Moren'a ka
Le bogodimo bja go feta legodimo
Le feleleditše le mpaletše hle!
Ga go selo sa ka tšohle ke tša Gago
Ga go selo sa ka tšohle ke tša Gago

hymns.title: LETHABO KA DINAKO TŠOHLE
hymns.lyrics:
Ngwathele senkgwa sa bophelo
Morena bjalo ka ge o ngwatha
Dinkgwa pele ga lewatle
Ka puku ya nnete
Ke 'a go hloka kgoši

Tliša nnete e utullotšwego
Bjalo ka ge o dirile Galelia
Ga go tahlego dithapo di wele
Ke go nea tšohle tša ka

Mantšu a Gago ke moya le bophelo
Ke ragogela go kwa
Ke a tekateka ke Wena thušo 'a ka
Go theetša ntšu la Gago go nea Phenyo

hymns.title: KHUTŠO YA BA LAPILEGO
hymns.lyrics:
Gona gang la bakgethwa
Ke 'fase la boikhutšo
M'phološi o ile gona
Go phetha kgopelwa ka
Go ikhutša ba lapileng
Go ikhutša ba lapileng
Go ikhutša ba lapileng
Ke tlo ikhutša le nna

O ntukišetša bodulo
Bjo le go ka bosafeleng
Gaeng le safetogego
Faseng le halalelang
Go ikhutša yo'a lapileng
Go ikhutša yo'a lapileng
Go ikhutša yo'a lapileng
Ke tlo ikhutša le nna

Bohloko ga bo tsene ntshe
Le maswabi ga a tsene
Eupša mphapahlogo gona
Ke tlo rwala ka thabo
Go ikhutše ditšhuana
Go ikhutše ditšhuana
Go ikhutše ditšhuana
Ke tlo ikhutša le nna

Lehu le tlo go fedišwa
Medu ya lona e ntšhwe
Opelang kudu bakgethwa
Thabelang tšatši leo
Go ikhutša ba fentšeng
Go ikhutša ba fentšeng
Go ikhutša ba fentšeng
Ke tlo ikhutša le nna
hymns.chorus:
Mošola ga Joredane
Kua tšhemong ya Edene
Mohlareng wa bophelo
Ke tlo ikhutša le nna

hymns.title: MORENA FELONG LE LEKGETHWA
hymns.lyrics:
'Fase le homole 'pele Gagwe
Homolang, Homolang, Pele Gagwe

hymns.title: EKWA THAPELO
hymns.lyrics:
O re fe khutšo
Amen

hymns.title: LA SABATHA
hymns.lyrics:
Le tše di šegofatšang

Le re batho, Tlang le role
Tše boima magetleng
Tlang le khutše le phumule
Kudumela mo phatleng
Amen

hymns.title: Ridza Tsuri
hymns.chorus:
Ridzanyi, murindi, ridza, Pasi pese ridzisa;
Mwari arikuti, Ridza Vasungwi vaponeswa.

hymns.title: Petyo Kana Nepam’suvo
hymns.chorus:
Pamsuwo, Pam’suwo, Pam’suwo, Hunde’po pam’suwo;
Anouya, Anouya, hunde ari pam’suwo.

hymns.title: Usu Neusu
hymns.chorus:
Ndichazomuona Tenzi, Iyo mhiri kwedenga;
Tichazoonana naYe, Gare gare kumusha.

hymns.title: Arikuuya
hymns.chorus: Arikuuya ngekukasika, Jesu zve arikudzoka,   Nevafambi vake vachazotorwa, Apo Jesu auya.

hymns.title: Kure Senyi Kumusha?
hymns.lyrics:
A kurekure kumusha?
Ndabvunza murindi, ati,
Usiku hurikupera,
Kwakuda kuyedza.
Usacheme, kurumidza,
Mutewere, kusimbira;
Muchasvika mukupenya
Hakuna kupera.

Ndabvunza kune mukani,
Anerwiyo rwekushinga,
Ngekushinga ndinokana,
Hondo ichapera.
Musacheme, mutiwire,
Dakara basa rapera,
Tinoziva tinechipo,
Kuti takurira

Ndabvunzazve pasi, zuva,
Zvese zvakandipindura;
Nguva irikundopera,
Jesu anouya.
Musacheme, zviwoniso zve
Zviri kutinyewera,
Zvisikwa zvese zvinoda
Tsuri imborira.

Tiripatyo nekumusha,
Kunofadza kutondera
Chifarai imwi vafambi,
Bvisanyi’wo kutya.
Musacheme, tisangane
Apo kusina kuneta,
Zviyedzo’zvo zvakapera,
Tasvika kumusha

hymns.title: Jesu Arikuuya
hymns.lyrics:
Rindanyi’mwi vanoyera,
Zvioneso zvaonekwa
Mwenje yenyu batidzanyi,
Munochingamidza Tenzi

Wonanyi chitsidzo chake,
Chekuti musunungurwe
Nguwo chena nezviremba,
Kasikanyi kutaura.

Atigadzirira nzvimbo,
Muumambo hwake iyo;
Tauranyizve zvemutsa,
Tsuri isati yaridzwa

Vanyangadzi uyai zvino,
Kristu anotinunura;
Kasika ichipo nguva,
Kristu anoda kuuya.
hymns.chorus:
Wonanyi, anouya;
Jesu Mambo anouya,
Anouya kuzotonga,
Wonanyi, anouya.

hymns.title: Apo Jesu Anouya
hymns.lyrics:
Apo Jesu anouya kugashira vake;
Vanhu vake vakanaka, Vanodikanwa.

Vachaunganidza vana veumambo hwake:
Vatereri vakanaka, Vanodikanwa

Vana vese vanodisa Muponesi wavo
Varivake vanokosha, Vanodikanwa
hymns.chorus:
Senyenyedzi kudenga, Vese vachapenya;
Vachagara naJesu, Wake, kumusha

hymns.title: Mazita Anodaidzwa
hymns.lyrics:
Kuti Tenzi anoridza tsuri yekuguma ’Iyo,
Apo nguva yepasi yapera’wo;
Kuti vakanaka vese vanounganidzwa’po
Mazita anodaidzwa, ndiripo.

Pamusi’wo vanomuka vakafa kuna Kristu,
Vanoona mbiri huru yake’yo
Apo vasarudzwi vanosangana kumusha’ko,
Mazita anodaidzwa ndiripo

Ngatibate basa rake kuti rinozopera;
Ngatishumaire rudo rwaMwari
Ndizvo Jesu anouya kutora vanhu vake,
Mazita anodaidzwa ndiripo
hymns.chorus:
Mazita anodaidzwa (3 times)
Anodaidzwa kudenga, ndiripo

hymns.title: Jesu Unouya-Zve!
hymns.chorus: Unouya, unouya, Jesu unouya zve!

hymns.title: Kusangana Kurwizi
hymns.lyrics:
Tichasangana kurwizi,
Apo kune kupenya;
Mvura yakanakisisa
Yabva kuna Jehova.

Iyo pagombe perwizi,
Rwakabvira kuchena
Tichafamba nekutenda,
Nguva dzese tofara

Kurwizi’rwo runopenya,
Mitoro ticharasa;
Tosunungurwa ngemutsa,
Togashira chiremba

Tosvika nekukasika,
Nerwendo ruchapera;
Mwoyo yedu ichafara,
Ngerwiyo rwekutenda
hymns.chorus:
Hunde tosangana iyo,
Parwizi rwakanaka kudenga
Tosangana nevanoyera
Pachigaro chaMwari

hymns.title: Ndokutewera M’ponesi,
hymns.lyrics:
Ndokutewera M’ponesi, Kwese’ko ndinogara
Apo imwi munoenda, Hunde ndokutewera

Kana nzira inoshata,  Kana kusina nzira
Mwaenda pamberi pangu, Ini ndokutewera

Kuti ndaona dambudzo,  Zvimwe ini ndaedzwa
Imwizve mwakamboedzwa, Ini ndokutewera

Kana ndawane urombo,  Kushaya, kusafara
Ndatondera mwakashaya, Tenzi, ndokutewera

Kuti ndinoona rufu, Musatizve mwauya
Mwakafa, makamboigwa, Ndichiri kutewera
hymns.chorus:
Ndokutewera M’ponesi, Imwi makandifira
Kana vese vakusiya, Ini ndokutewera

hymns.title: Iripo Tsime
hymns.lyrics:
Iripo tsime izere Neropa raJesu;
Vanyangadzi vasamba’mo, Vanochena naro

Mbavha yokufa yafara Kuona tsime’yo
Kana ini munyangadzi, Ndinochena nayo

Nyenye yaMwari, ropaIro, Harishaye simba
Dakara vanhu vaJesu, Vese vaponeswa

Tenzi ndinodawirazve, Kana ndakatadza
Vandigadzirira chipo, Chawanwa ngeropa

Nekudenga ndichaimba, Ngesimba nerudo
Kuti ngeropa raJesu, Ndaponeswa naro

hymns.title: Kuchena Kwazvo
hymns.lyrics:
O Jesu ndinoda kurapwa kwazvo
Ndinoda imwi mugare mumoyo
Bvisa zvakaipa, dzinga mhandu’yo
Mundisambe ndichachena kwazvo

O Jesu, kudenga nangisa pasi
Mundibatsire ndinopira zvese
Ndinozvipa ini zvese ndinazvo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo

Jesu, ndikukumbire nekupfava
Pamakumbo ako, Tenzi ndamira
Ndachena ngeropa nge kudawira
Mundisambidze ndichachena kwazvo

Jesu, ndarindira nekutiwira
Uyo mundipinze nemoyo mutsva
Haurambe vese vakutsvaka’vo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo
hymns.chorus:
Ndichachena, ndichene kwazvo
Mundisambidze, ndichachena kwazvo

hymns.title: Inzwai Mapeni’wo
hymns.chorus:
Gwendere, Gwendere, Gwendere, Gwendere Ari kuiswa;
Ese ndeaJesu, Unogashira

hymns.title: Jesu Anondidisa
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Randiudza Bhaibheri;
Vana vanomudisa,
Muponesi wavada

Jesu wakandifira,
Wakasiya’ro denga
Wakauya pasizve,
Kuponesa’vo vese

Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Ndine urombo ini;
Wakazarurira’wo,
Nzira yekudenga’ro

Jesu wandidisa’ni,
Uripetyo’zve neni;
Kuti ndikamuda’ye,
Unozonditorazve
hymns.chorus:
Jesu wandida, Jesu wandida
Jesu wandida, Bhuku randiudza

hymns.title: Chengetai Tukumbo
hymns.lyrics:
Nhasi maoko angu,
Ndasamba’wo kwazvo
Ndaapa kuna Jesu,
Kuita basa’ro

Nzeve dzangu ndaudza,
Kuterera kunzwa
Zvebasa’ro remutsa,
Zvondingabatsira

Maziso anangisa,
Zvemaoko angu
Arege kunyangadza,
Pam’sana paJesu
hymns.chorus:
Chengetai tukumbo, Apo twafamba;
Zviro’zvo zvaJesu, Basi ndinoda

hymns.title: Rudo Runotifadza
hymns.lyrics:
Rudo runotifadza, Runonatsa nzira
Runoita titeerere, Nekuva nemutsa

Pasi rine urombo, Kurwara nekufa;
Ngerudo tinobatsira, Vamwe kudawira

Apo basa rapera, Tatorwa kum’soro,
Ngoma yedu tichaimba, NdiJesu nge-rudo
hymns.chorus:
Mwari rudo, Tirivana vake, Mwari rudo
Tifanane na’Ye. Rudo runotifadza, Runonatsa
nzira, Runoita titeerere, Nekuva nemutsa

hymns.title: Fambanyi MaKristu
hymns.lyrics:
Ngatifambe tese mubasa iri,
Muchinjiko wake uri pamberi;
Kristu Tenzi wedu uri pamberi,
Pamberi mubasa ngatifambenyi.

Chita cha Satani chichakurirwa
Fambanyi pamberi, tine mabasa
Ngerwiyo’rwo rwedu Jesu akudzwa
Ngatiite basa, tinoripedza

Sangano raMwari sehondo huru
Rinoenda mberi pamwe naJesu
Hatipatsaniswe, tese ngerudo
Rusimbiro rumwe nerudzidziso

Umambo hwepasi huchazoputswa
Asi sangano’ro riri kukura
Zano raSatani richakurirwa
Chitsidzo chaKristu chinozogara

Ndizvo imwi vanhu, pamberi kwazvo
Ngatiimbe tese rwerukuriro
Mbiri nerukudzo rwaKristu Mambo
Vanhu nengirozi dzichaimba’yo
hymns.chorus:
Fambanyi maKristu mubasa iri
M’chinjiko waJesu uri pamberi

hymns.title: Iwa Kumurindi Wako
hymns.lyrics:
Mwoyo wangu rinda, Mhandu dziri zhinji
Dzinoda kubvisa imwi, Munzira yaMwari

Rinda, munamate, Musatize hondo,
Itanyi mazuva ese, Jesu ari petyo

Reganyi kufunga, Kuti makurira,
Dakara Jesu auye, Kuzotitambira

hymns.title: Muka Moyo Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Izwi resimba raMwari,
Rinokudaidzai,
Anovapa zvipo zvavo,
Kune vanodisa

Mbovo zhinji dziri petyo,
Dzirikunangisa,
Siya nzira’yo yekare,
Muende kudenga

Muponesi matiisa,
Munzira kumusha,
Kuti apo takwirira,
Tinozokutenda

hymns.title: Ndouya Kumuchinjiko
hymns.lyrics:
Ndouya kumchinjiko,
Upofu neurombo
Handidi chimwe chiro,
Asi ruponeso’rwo

Jesu ndokuchemera,
Moyo wangu waipa,
Jesu’ye wataura,
Ndinozo-kuchenura

Ndapa zvese kunemwi,
Zviro zvese zvepasi
Moyozve nemuviri,
Uve wenyu narini

Ndosimbira kunemwi,
Mune zvitsidzo zvenyu
Zvino ndarapwa ini,
Neropa’ro raKristu

Jesu arikuuya,
Moyo wangu wazara,
Zvino ndakachenurwa,
Mbiri kuna Jehova
hymns.chorus:
Ndosimbira kunemwi, Nyenye yepaCalvary,
Ndinopfugama pasi, Mundiponese ini

hymns.title: Kuneni
hymns.lyrics:
Ndanzwa ngezvikomborero,
Murikuvapa Tenzi,
Vamwe varikugashira,
Madonhwe mundipenyi

Musandipfuura Baba,
Kana ndashata ini,
Tenzi, musazondisiya,
Mutsa wenyu ndipenyi

Ndanga ndiri muchitema,
Ndine urombo ini
Moyo wabatwangepasi,
Mundisunungurenyi

Mudzimu musapfuure,
Mapofu murapenyi,
Ita umboyo waJesu,
Runyararo ndipenyi
hymns.chorus:
Kuneni, Kuneni,
Madonhwe mundipenyi

hymns.title: Ndizadze Zvino
hymns.lyrics:
Uyayi Mudzimu Mutsvene,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu,
Uyanyi’wo zvino pano,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu

Munokwanisa kuzadza,
Moyo wese’wo wangu
Asi ndinokuda Imwi,
Kuzadza moyo wangu

Ndaneta handine simba,
Ndinopfugama kwenyu
Mudzimu usingaperi,
Zadzanyi moyo wangu

Uyanyi mundichenure,
Nyaradza moyo wangu
Zvino murikuita’wo,
Kuzadza moyo wangu
hymns.chorus:
Uyanyi, zadzanyi, Jesu nemutsa wenyu,
Uyanyi’wo zvino pano, Zadzanyi moyo wangu

hymns.title: Ndinokushaya Nguva
hymns.lyrics:
Ndichiri kushaya, Tenzi wangu,
Hakuna izwizve kunga renyu

Ndichiri kushaya, Garai petyo,
Handiputswi apo muripano

Ndichiri kushaya, Mudambudzo,
Kana ndikushaya, Murufaro

Ndichiri kushaya, Ndikudisa,
Nezvitsidzo zvenyu munondipa

Ndichiri kushaya, Munoera,
Ndinova wenyu’di, Mwakanaka
hymns.chorus:
Ndoshaya nekushaya, Tenzi ndokushaya,
Zvino mundikomborere, Ndinouya

hymns.title: Ndazvipira Zvese
hymns.lyrics:
Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
KwaMuponesi wangu,
Ndosimbira nekumuda,
O, chengeta upenyu

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Tenzi pamberi penyu,
Ndarega pfuma dzepasi,
Mundigashire Jesu

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Ndinofanana nemwi,
Ndizadzenyi Mweya wenyu,
Muri wangu M’ponesi

Zvese, Jesu, ndazvipira,
Ndanzwa moto mutsvene,
O, rufaro rweupenyu.
Mbiri, Mbiri kunemwi
hymns.chorus:
Zvese ndikupa, Zvese ndikupa,
Zvese kuna Muponesi, Zvese ndikupa

hymns.title: Sezvo Ndiri
hymns.lyrics:
Sezvo ndiri, asi Jesu,
Pam'chinjiko wandifira,
Nekuti wandidaidza,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, handiyedzi,
Moyo wangu kuchenesa,
Asi munondiyeresa,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndatambudzwa,
Nekutya nekupokana,
Zvepasi zvinondiyedza,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndinoshaya,
Ndine hurombo, hwebofu,
Asi zvese munondipa,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, ndinouya,
Kuti mundisunungure
Ngekuti ndinodawira,
Nyenye yaMwari, ndauya

Sezvo ndiri, rudo rwako,
Rwandikurira mumoyo,
Ndiri wako wega zvino,
Nyenye yaMwari ndauya

hymns.title: Mutimutse Zve
hymns.lyrics:
Tinokukudza, Imwi Mwari wedu,
NdiJesu wakauya kufira isu

Tinokukudza, Imwi Mwari wedu,
Wakatipa rujeko, ndi’ye Mudzimu

Mbiri, kukudza, kweNyenye yaMwari,
Wakatiponesa mune zvitadzozve

Mbiri, rukudzo, kunemwi wemutsa,
Wakatitsvaka nokutitungamira

Mutimutsezve, ngerudo izare,
Moyo yese ipfutwe ngemoto m’tsvene
hymns.chorus:
Hareruya, Kudza Mwari, Hareruya, Amen,
Hareruya, Kudza Mwari, Mutimutsezve

hymns.title: Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa
hymns.lyrics:
Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Taura naTenzi, Munozogutswa,
Ngeizwi’ro rake Uzadze moyo,
Tsvaka kuna Iye Chikomborero

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Iwanyi nenguva naJesu ega,
Nekumunangisa, Mufane na’Ye,
Vese vachaona Jesu kunewe

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Musaenda mberi, asi teverai,
Jesu Muponesi, Anotungamira,
Ndizvo muBhaibheri, Munosimbira

Iwanyi nenguva Yekuponeswa,
Zvese’zvo zvifungo Zvamunoita,
Zvinotungamirwa NdiJesu Kristu,
Zve munogadzirwa Humambo hwedu

hymns.title: Garai Neni
hymns.lyrics:
Garai neni usiku hwasvika,
Tenzi garai neni kune dima,
Vanditiza vamwe vabatsiri,
Mubatsiri wedu, garai neni

Upenyu hwachimbidza kuguma,
Kufara kwepasi kunopera,
Zvasakara kwazvo zviro zvese,
Usingasakari, garai neni

Ndinomuda Imwi nguva dzese,
Mutsa unokurira  muyedzi
Mudonzvo wangu, Mutungamiri,
Mudima, pachena garai neni

Imwi muripo, handityi mhandu,
Handine kuremerwa mushungu
Kufa, guva, kukunda kuripi?
Ndinokurira ugere neni

Misa muchinjiko ndotandadza,
Penya, undinongedze kudenga,
Kwayedza kwazvo, yabva mimvuri,
Mupenyu, mukufa, garai neni

hymns.title: Zuva Ririkudoka
hymns.lyrics:
Zuva riri kudoka,
Pasi rinozorora,
Namata nekutenda,
Usiku hunouya

Tenzi weupenyu’wo,
We zvese pasi pano,
Mutiunganidze’su,
Mumaoko’wo enyu, Muri pedyo

Apo dima rasviba,
Werudo tichengete,
Moyo yedu ikwire,
Pamberi penyenyedzi, Apo muri

Kuti apo nguva’yo,
Inopera pasi’ko,
Tenzi matibvumira,
Tichapinda kumusha, Wekudenga
hymns.chorus:
Yera, Yera, Yera, Tenzi Mwari,
Denga rese nepasi,Zvese zvazara ndimwi,
Tenzi Mwari

hymns.title: Zuva Remoyo Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Zuva rangu, Muponesi,
Kunopenya apo muri
Murambidze zvakaipa,
Zvinozondidzikatira

Apo hope dzandibata,
Maziso angu apfigwa
Ndotondera kuchanaka,
Kuna Jesu kuzorora

Garai neni zuva rese,
Ndichengete nguva dzese,
Garai neni pausiku,
Kanazve murufu rwangu

Ndikomborere ndomuka,
Ndisati ndaenda m’basa,
Ndichanaka nepanzira,
Dakara ndisvike denga

hymns.title: Chidziwiro Munguva Yechampupuri
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi ari Dombo redu,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Tisatye muzviro zvese,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

Bvute redu masikati,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Nekupenya pausiku,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

Champupuri chatinera,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Kuna Mwari taponeswa,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

O Mwari, Bako redu’wo,
Nechidziwiriro chedu,
Mubatsiri muripetyo,
Nechidziwiriro chedu
hymns.chorus:
Nge-Dombo rinemasimba,
Ngebvute, apo taneta;
Ngewedu kutungamira,
Nechidziwiriro chedu

hymns.title: Iye Anonditungamira
hymns.lyrics:
Wanditungamira Jesu,
Ngemazwi ake emutsa
Zvese’zvo ndinozoita,
Iye anotungamira

Kana ndabatwa nenhamo,
Zvimwe ndichafara kwazvo,
Nerunyararo, dambudzo,
Anova nerubatsiro

Tenzi, ndibate ngesimba,
Ndizvo handigurugute,
Kwese ndiri ndichafara,
Mwari anotungamira

Kuti basa razopera,
Zvese newe ndakurira,
Kana rufu handizotyi,
Kuti Mwari achineni
hymns.chorus:
Iye anditungamira, Ngeruoko wandibata,
Ini ndinomutevera, Kuti anotungamira

hymns.title: Kwanaka Nemoyo Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Apo runyararo runondifadza,
Kana urombo ndinahwo,
Kana muzvese, makandidzidzisa,
Kunaka nemoyo wangu’wo

Kana Satani anonditambudza,
Ndichasimbira kunemwi,
Jesu anoziva kwangu kushaya,
Wakandifira’po pamuti

Ndinofara ngekutondera kuti,
Zvitema zvangu zvese’zvo,
Zvapera pamuchinjiko, zvapera,
Ndatenda nemoyo, Jesu’yo

Kurumidzanyi musi wenyu Tenzi,
Makore achazopetwa,
Tsuri inorira, Tenzi odzika,
Zvadaro, nemoyo, kwanaka
hymns.chorus:
Kwanaka . . . nemoyo, . . .
Kwanaka nemoyo wangu’wo

hymns.title: Kutsamira Mumaoko Asingagumi
hymns.lyrics:
Tine ukama, tine kufara,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Chikomborero, runyararo’wo,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake

Kunotapira kufamba m’nzira,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Nzira yapenya, zuva nezuva,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake

Chinyi ndinotya, nekutizira?
Kutsamira m’maoko ake,
Ngerunyararo, Tenzi wapedyo,
Kutsamira m’maoko ake
hymns.chorus:
Kutsamira, Mumaoko’iwo aJesu,
Kutsamira, Mumaoko ake aJesu

hymns.title: Ndinonangisa Kunemwi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinokunangisa, nekuzodaira, Muponesi,
Chinzwai, ndonamata, mubvise zvitema,
O, mundiregere ndive wenyu

Ngemutsa mundipe moyo ungasimbe, Ndishingise
Makandifira’wo, zve ndive nerudo,
Runoyera sezvo moto m'tsvene

Kana kune dima, kana ndatambudzwa, Mundibate,
Dima mungadzinge, pukuta masodzi,
Musandibvumire ndirasike

hymns.title: Pedyo Kunemwi, Mwari Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Pedyo nemwi, Mwari, pedyo nemwi,
Kana ne dambudzo, riri neni,
Ndichiri kuimba, pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Ndafanane M’fambi, wadokerwa,
Dima randibata ndi'munzira,
Mukurota ini,ndiri pedyo nemwi,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Nzira yaonekwa yekudenga,
Munditungamire, kuchengeta,
Dzasheedza ngirozi, pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Ndizvo pakumuka, ndikutenda,
Kubva mudambudzo ndakukudza,
Muurombo ini ndiri pedyo Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

Zvepamwe naJesu, Ndingakwira,
Pamberi pezuva, kune denga
Pakuimba ndiri pedyo nemwi Mwari,
Pedyo nemwi Mwari, pedyo nemwi

hymns.title: Mira Padombo
hymns.lyrics:
Miriranyi’wo kuna Jehova,
Mukutambudzwa zvemuurombo,
IDombo rega rinopa simba,
Muyedzi ari pedyo

Miriranyi mese kururama,
Moyo ushinge nerudawiro
IDombo rega rinokurira,
Zvitema zvepasi’po

Miranyi mese muidi’ro,
Kana ranonoka richakura,
IDombo rega rinotipa’wo
Kuzorora kudenga
hymns.chorus:
Miranyi paDombo, simbiranyi apo,
Dombo ndiKristu ega,
Kuti takurira tichazomira,
Nechita chichaponeswa

hymns.title: Dombo Rine Simba
hymns.lyrics:
Rukariro urwo rwangu,
Rusimbire kuna Kristu,
Handidawiri nemunhu,
Asi muzita raJesu

Kuti avigwa ngedima,
Tsitsi dzake ndogarira
Mumhepo huru yesimba,
Ruoko rwake ndobata

Chirangano chake icho,
Nechitsidzo cheropa’ro,
Zvinondipa rusimbiro,
Pakati pematambudzo

Apo anenge ouya,
Netsuri ichazoridzwa,
Ndinoda kuti ndimire,
NaJesu parudyi rwake
hymns.chorus:
Ndinomira kuna Jesu,
Ndiye Dombo, nheyo yangu,
Zvimwe ndichanyura zvangu

hymns.title: Kusimbira Nekuteerera
hymns.lyrics:
Apo tinofamba muinzwi raBaba
Imbiranyi toona m’nzira
Kuti tinomuda, nesu anogara
Nevese vanomuteerera

Hakuna urombo hunotitambudza,
Asi Jesu anohudzinga,
Kana kupokana, masodzi nekutya
Hazvigari nekusimbira

Hakuna mutoro, hakuna urombo,
Asi anotidzokesera,
Hakuna kushaya, kana kutambudzwa,
Tinowana nekusimbira

Asi hatione kufara kwerudo,
Dakara zvese tinomupa,
Ngekuti anopa kufara nerudo,
Kuna ivo vanosimbira

Ndizvo pamwe tese tinogara naYe,
Kana kufamba naYe m’nzira,
Isu tichaita mazwi ake ese,
Kuteerera nekusimbira
hymns.chorus:
Kuteerera, Ndiyo basi nzira,
Kufara kuna Jesu, Basi kuteerera

hymns.title: Mwari Ngaave Nemwi
hymns.lyrics:
Mwari ngaave nemwi mwese,
Dakara tikumbanezve,
Amutungamirirenyi,
Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese

Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese,
Ndiye anomuchengeta,
Munopiwa mese kudya,
Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese

Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese,
Apo mune matambudzo,
Munobatsirwa mwese’wo,
Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese

Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese,
Amuonese’wo rudo,
Kudzinga hosha nerufu,
Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese
hymns.chorus:
Kuti tikumbane, Kuti tikumbanezve,
Kuti tikumbane,
Mwari ngaawe nemwi mwese

hymns.title: Hatichati Kwasaranyi
hymns.lyrics:
Pasi pano nevashamwari,
Tinozoonana,
Asi zvimwe tine urombo,
Apo tapatsana

Tinofara nekusimbira,
Apo tapatsana,
Kuti apo Jesu auya,
Zvetichaonana

Kupatsana hakutaurwi,
Kumusha wedu’yo,
Asi tichaimba nziyozve,
Rufaro nerudo
hymns.chorus:
Hatichati, ”Kwasaranyi”, Kumusha waMwari
Kunyika’yo yerufaro, Hakuna kwasaranyi

hymns.title: Kurara Kuna Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Anorara kuna Jesu,
Hama inodiwa yedu,
Ruzororo rwakanaka,
Hakwanise kutambudzwa

Anorara kuna Jesu,
Wagadzirirwa upenyu
Warara nerusimbiro,
Hwekumutswa naJesu’wo

Anorara kuna Jesu,
Pamwe nevamwe’vo vedu,
Apo Jesu anomutsa,
Havazochemi nekutya

Anorara kuna Jesu,
Asi tsuri’yo yaKristu,
Icharira kuvamutsa,
Kuti vaende kudenga

hymns.title: Kutanga Muponesi
hymns.lyrics:
Apo basa rapera, ndinoenda kumusha,
Uko kufa kunopfeka kusafa,
Ndicham’ziva M’ponesi apo achazouya,
Iye anondigashira mumusha

Ndichazofara kwazvo kuona usu hwake,
Nekupenya kwemaziso ake’wo,
Moyo wangu kum’kudza nge rudo’rwo nemutsa
Anondigadzira musha kumusoro

Ndinotondera avo vadikanwi vakafa,
Kuti ngerufu tapatsana navo,
Apo Jesu auya navo tichasangana,
Asi ndichatanga kuona Jesu

Achanditungamira kupinda mazambara,
Apo tisingazovi neurombo,
Ndichaimba nevese rwiyo’rwo rwekufara
Asi ndichatanga kuona Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Ndicham’ziva ndicham’ziva,
Apo tichazomira naye,
Ndicham’ziva ndicham’ziva,
Ne marwadzo m’maoko ake

hymns.title: Ndipe Bhaibheri
hymns.lyrics:
Ndipe Bhaibheri, nyenyedzi yapihwa,
Vafambi vese kutungamira,
Zvampupuri’zvo zvisingazodzimi,
Kujeka’ko kunotipenyera

Ndipe Bhaibheri, apo ndatambudzwa,
Ngezvitema neurombo hwazvo,
Ndipe mazwi’yo Jesu ataura,
Kunditondedza aripo pedyo

Ndipe Bhaibheri, ndinofamba naro,
Rinditsiure nge zvakaipa,
Mwenje weruponeso mune dima,
Kundipangidza nzira yekudenga

Ndipe Bhaibheri, mwenje weupenyu,
Usingagumi, newakanaka,
Rindiratidze rujeko rwaJesu,
Rindionese mbiri kudenga
hymns.chorus:
Ndipe Bhaibheri, masoko matsvene,
Ndinoteera kujeka kwaro,
Zvikohomedzo, zvitsidzo mutemo,
Nerudo, zvese zvakumbana’mo

hymns.title: Mazwi Anoshamisa E Upenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Imba, imbazve kuneni, Mazwi e upenyu,
Ngandione kunaka’wo, Mazwi e upenyu
Mazwi akanaka,anondidzidzisa

Kristu anoapa vese, Mazwi e upenyu,
Inzwanyi imwi vatadzi, Mazwi e upenyu
Anotipa tese, tinozova vake

Raurazve vhangeri’ro, Mazwi e upenyu,
Vese vachasunungurwa, Jesu Muponesi,
Unotichenura, tipinde kumusha
hymns.chorus:
Mazwi aya akanaka, Mazwi e upenyu,
Mazwi aya akanaka, Mazwi e upenyu

hymns.title: Ndinomira PaJordani
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinomira paJordani,
Nekunangisisa,
Kunyika’yo yeKenani,
Uko kune musha

Kumakomo akanaka,
Kuriko kupenya,
Uko Kristu anotonga,
Hakuchina dima

Ndichasvika’ko rini’ko?
Nekukomborerwa,
Nekuona Baba vangu,
NaIye kugara?

Moyo wangu wafarira,
Unoda kuenda,
Handityi chiro chouya,
Ndashinga kufamba
hymns.chorus:
Tichazorora kunyika iyo,
Nguva shoma tichazorora
Toimba rwiyo rwaMosisi naJesu,
NaJesu tichazogara

hymns.title: Tichafara
hymns.lyrics:
Tichafara basa rapera,
Tounganidzwa kumusha,
Apo taunza misumbu,
KuJerusarema idzva

Toimba nziyo dzakanaka,
Nemoyo yedu yotenda,
Kristu Mambo, tomukudza
KuJerusarema idzva

Rufaro runotirindira,
Nedzimba zhinji dzavakwa,
Jesu Iye wagadzira,
KuJerusarema idzva
hymns.chorus:
Rufaro, Rufaro idi,
Rufaro rusingaperi,
Rufaro runouya musi,
Toungana kumusha

hymns.title: Kufunga Kamwezve
hymns.lyrics:
Kufunga kamwezve,
Kuchiri kuuya,
Ndiri pedyo kudenga’ro,
Kupinda kare’ko

Kumba kwaBaba,
Kune imba zhinji,
Nekune icho chigaro
ChaJesu M’ponesi

Pedyo kuenda’po, Pedyo kuzorora,
Pedyo kusiya dambudzo,
Pedyo pekufara
hymns.chorus:
Ndiri pedyo, Ndiri pedyo,
Ndiri pedyo kudenga’ro,
Kupinda kare’ko

hymns.title: Nyika Yakanaka Kudenga
hymns.lyrics:
Nyika yakanaka kudenga
Toiona ngekudawira
Baba vedu vatimirira
Vanotigadzirira musha

Tichaimba kunyika iyo,
Nziyo dzevakakomborerwa
Moyo haizochemi’yo zve
Kunyika’yo yekuzorora

Tichamupa kutenda kwazvo
Kuna Baba vedu kudenga
Ngechipo chikuru che rudo
Misi yese takomborerwa
hymns.chorus:
Ikwo’yo… Pamberi… Tichazosangana ikwo’yo
Ikwo’yo… Pamberi… Tichazosangana ikwo’yo

hymns.title: Mutibhabhatidzezve
hymns.lyrics:
Tibhabhatidze nesimba guru
Muponesi uyai nerudo rwenyu

Tirikuchema, hatifanire
Kubva muchitema mutisambidze

Njiva yaMwari, dzikai kunesu
Mutikomborere ngemutsa wenyu

Inzwanyi izwi rabva kudenga
Uri mudikanwi, unondifadza
hymns.chorus:
Tirikukuteta, Mambo Jesuzve
Kubva muchitema mutisambidze

hymns.title: Uyai Mweya wakachena
hymns.lyrics:
Uyai Mweya wakachena,
Mundikomborerenyi
Kuti mwoyo wangu ucha
Kukudza nguva dzose
Ndidzidzisenyi kukuda
Kuziva zvakanaka
Zvechikariro chembiri
Chinondipa kufara

Ndauya kunemwi
Tenzi Munozondibatsira
Ndinosimbira kunemwi
Mundiswitse kumusha
Jesu wakandi tsvakisa
Ndanga ndiri mufambi
Mudambudzo wandibvisa
Nge ropa rake iri

Ndagashira mutsa wenyu
Ndinomuitirenyi?
Ndipenyi kunaka kwenyu
Ndosungirwa kunemwi
Nguva dzese ndarasika
Kubva munzira yenyu
Ndiri pano hangu
Baba Batisa mwoyo wangu

hymns.title: Mudzimu unoyera
hymns.lyrics:
Mudzimu unoyera,
Unotitungamire
Uripetyo maKristu,
Vateweri vaJesu
Vaneti vanofara,
M’dzimu unodayidza
Wati, Vafambi uya,
Nditewere kumusha

Unesu dzese nguva,
Unoda kubatsira
Musatisiye tega,
Tirikufamba m’dima
Dambudzo rinouya,
Mwoyo inozoneta
Wati, Vafambi uya,
Nditewere kumusha

Apo edu mazuva,
E mabasa apera
Basi kunozosara,
Kuyenda’ko kudenga
Kufunga ngemazita,
Kuti isu tanyorwa?
Vati,Vafambi uya,
Nditewere kumusha

hymns.title: Mwoyo Wakachena
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinoda chimwe’cho chiro
Kuti Tenzi, anondipa
Kana ngemvura, ngemwoto
Ndinochema, ndinochema

Kuti mundipe kuona
Ngepachena, ndichafara
Asi kucheneswa m’woyo
Kwondifadza, kwondifadza

Asi kuti ndacheneswa
Ndizvo ndingazonzwisisa
Ndizvozvo zviro’zvo zvenyu
Tinoona, tinoona

Ndinosiya zvakaipa
Nezvifungo zvakashata
Asi kana ndichiyedza
Ndakaipa, ndakaipa
hymns.chorus:
Mundisambe … mwoyo wese…
Kana m’mwoto… mundipise…
Hazvinenyi zvozvitema…
Zvinopera…zvinopera

hymns.title: Wasambwa muropa
hymns.lyrics:
Wanga waenda kuna Jesu here?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye?
Unosimbira m’utsa wake here?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye

Unofamba neYe mazuva ese?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye?
Unozorora kuna Kristu here?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye

M’kwambo asvika, unochena here?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye?
Wagadzirirwa dzimba dzekudenga?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye

Rasa nguvo iyo inechitema
Usambwe muropa renyenye?
Kune tsime iyo inowerera
Sambanyi muropa reNyenye
hymns.chorus:
Wasambwa… muropa…
Muropa’ro here renyenye?
Mwoyo wako wakachena’wo here?
Wasambwa muropa renyenye

hymns.title: Tenzi Ndodzoka
hymns.lyrics:
Ndafamba kure kumusha
Tenzi ndodzoka
Ndakaita zvakaipa
Tenzi ndodzoka

Ndarasa makore mamwe
Tenzi ndodzoka
Ndopinduka nemasodzi
Tenzi ndodzoka

Tenzi ndaneta kutadza
Tenzi ndodzoka
Rudo rwenyu ndosimbira
Tenzi ndodzoka

Rusimbiro rwangu rwega
Tenzi ndodzoka
Kuti Jesu wandifira
Tenzi ndidzoka

Ndashaya ropa reNyenye
Tenzi ndodzoka
Mundisambidze ndichene
Tenzi ndodzoka
hymns.chorus:
Ndodzoka kumusha,
Zvekusafamba
Tambanudza mawoko,
Tenzi ndodzoka

hymns.title: Uyo unoda
hymns.lyrics:
Vese’wo vanonzwa, rauranyi
Soko rakanaka murese pasi
Kuti vanhu vese ngaarinzwe’ri
Uyo unoda, uya

Uyo unouya, nhasi uya
Pinda pamusiwo wazarurirwa
Jesu ndiyenzira yeidi ega
Uyo unoda, Uya

Uyo unoda, dawira idi
Uyo unoda tiwira ngeizwi
Uyo unoda, upenyu narini
Uyo unoda, Uya
hymns.chorus:
Uyo unoda, uyo unoda
Tuma soko pagomo nemikana
Baba wodikanwa akudaidza
Uyo unoda, Uya

hymns.title: Tenzi Wevamambo
hymns.lyrics:
Kudzanyi zita raJesu, Dzese ngerosi’dzo
Unzanyi chiremba chake, tenzi wevamambo
Unzanyi chiremba chake, Tenzi wevamambo

Rudzi ruduku rwaMwari, Mune rusimbiro
Mutendenyi Muponesi, Tenzi wevamambo
Mutendenyi Muponesi, Tenzi wevamambo

Ndudzi dzese’dzo nevanhu vari pasi pano
Kudzanyi’vo Tenzi Jesu, Tenzi wevamambo
Kudzanyi’vo Tenzi Jesu, Tenzi wevamambo

Ndinodisa kumukudza nengerosi idzo
Murwiyo’wo rwekukudza, Tenzi wevwmambo
Murwiyo’wo rwekukudza, Tenzi wevamambo

hymns.title: Jesu Mudikani Wemwoyo Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu wangu mudiwa,
Ndinouya kunemwi
Mananda andibata,
Chiripo champupuri
Ndiwige Mponesi,
Dakara kwanyarara
Munonditungamira,
Kumusha wekudenga

Ndimwi Chidziwiriro,
Hakuchinazve chimwe
Musandisiya ndega,
Tenzi mundibatsire
Ndosimbira kunemwi,
Rubatsirozve rwangu
Mundifukidze ini,
Ngemapapiro enyu

Ndimwi Kristu ndinoda,
Zvese’zvo munondipa
Simudza vaputsika,
Rapanyi vanorwara
Zita renyu royera,
Ini ndega ndashata
Ndazara ngezvitema,
Mwazara’di nemutsa

Kune mutsa kunemwi,
Wekuchenesa ini
Rega uzondirapa,
Mwoyo wangu mukati
Zvetsime reupenyu,
Pinda mumwoyo wangu
Rirambe \‘chiwerera,
Kuzondipa upenyu

hymns.title: Rufaro Rwemwoyo Yinoda
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu rufaro rwe-mwoyo,
Tsime reupenyu hwedu
Tinosiya zvepasi’po
Todzokera kuna Jesu

Chingwa cheupenyu hwedu
Tinoda kugutswa ndimwi
Tinomwa mutsime renyu
Nyota yemwoyo ipere

Tinoda mugare nesu,
Kwese uko tinoenda
Tofara nemutsa wenyu
Ngerudawiro tosimba

O, Jesu mutibatsire
Mutiitenyi tipenye
Dzinga dima rechitema
Penyeranyi pasi pese

hymns.title: Zvimwe ZvaJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Hunde ndinooda kunzwazve
NdiJesu nerudo rwake
Neruponeso rwemutsa
RwaIye wakandifira

Zvimwe ndinooda kufunda
Zverudo rwake rwomweya
Mudzimu unoera’o
Mundidzidzise zvese’zvo

Zvimwe zva Jesu mundipe
Inzwi rake muBhaibheri
Anotaura kuneni
Ndinomuteererazve

Zvimwe zva Jesu ndiMambo
Achatonga pachigaro
Zvimwezve umambo hwenyu
Hunde, uyai Tenzi Jesu
hymns.chorus:
E, Zvimwe zvaJesu, E, zvimwe zvaJesu
Zvimwe’zvo zvekuponeswa,
NaIye wakandifira

hymns.title: Jesu Wangu Ndinokuda
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu, ndinokuda muri wangu’wo
Ndinosiya zvese zvakaipa’zvo
Mununuri wangu Muponesi’wo
Kuti ndakakuda, asi nazvino

Ndinomuda ngekuti mwakandida
Pamuchinjiko mwakandiponesa
Pamsana pangu mwakatambudzwa’po
Kuti ndakakuda, asi nazvino

Kana muupenyu, kana mukufa
Ndichakuda Imwi, mwandiponesa
Ndichiti, apo ndabatwa nerufo
Kuti ndakakuda, asi nazvino

Kumusha kwembiri, kunofarisa
Ndichakudza Imwi ikwo kudenga
Kudenga ndichaimba urwo rwiyo
Kuti ndakakuda, asi nazvino

hymns.title: Maropa AJesu Ega
hymns.lyrics:
Ndoyera senyi mwoyo? Maropa aJesu ega,
Ndinochena ngenyi’wo? Maropa aJesu ega.

Ndinosunungurwa ndi, Maropa aJesu ega.
Ndinoawona basi,  Maropa aJesu ega

Hakuna chimwe chiro, Maropa aJesu ega.
Kurekera zvitadzo, Maropa aJesu ega.

Ndorusimbiro rwangu,  Maropa aJesu ega.
Nekururama kwangu, Maropa aJesu ega

Mbiri, Mbiri ndoimba, Maropa aJesu ega.
Rukudzo ndinounza...Maropa aJesu ega.
hymns.chorus:
O, akanakisa, Anondichenesa
Basi ndinoziva, Maropa aJesu ega

hymns.title: Muudze Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Unoneta mwoyo wako here?
Muudze Jesu, Muudze Jesu
Unosuwa neurombo here?
Muudze Jesu ega

Masodziarikudonha here?
Muudze Jesu, Muudze Jesu
Mune zvitema zvaigwa here?
Muudze Jesu ega

Murikutya dambudzo’ro here?
Muudze Jesu, Muudze Jesu
Iye uchakubatsira iwe
Muudze Jesu ega

Watya rufo runouya here?
Muudze Jesu, Muudze Jesu
Unodisa umambo hwaJesu
Muudze Jesu ega
hymns.chorus:
Muudze Jesu, Muudze Jesu
Shamwari vazikanwa
Hakuchina umwe wakadaro
Muudze Jesu ega

hymns.title: Kunonaka Kuda Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Kunonaka kuda Jesu
Kumudaira kwazvo
Kuzorora pachitsidzo
Ngekuti wakadaro

O! kunaka kuda Jesu
Ndachena neropa’ro
Ndapona ngekudaira
Kuna Muponesi’vo

Hunde, zvakanaka kwazvo
Kusimbira kwaJesu
Kugashira kuna Iye
Rufaro neupenyu

Ndinofara ndakadzidza
Kusimbira kunemwi
Ndinoziva ndichagara
Pamwe nemwi narini
hymns.chorus:
Jesu, Jesu, ndasimbira,
Ndakabatsirwa naYe
Jesu, Jesu anondipa,
Mwoyo kusimbirazve

hymns.title: Musi Werufaro
hymns.lyrics:
Musi wakanakisisa
Apo ndakakusarudza
Mwoyo wangu wafarira
Mwari wangu naM’ponesi

Rapera’ro, basa guru,
Ndiri waTenzi, ngewangu
Andipfuwa, ndatewera
Ndafara mukudaidzwa

Zvino zorora mwoyo’wo
Funga ngeizvi zviro zvo
Usapatsane naTenzi
Ndiye une zviro zvese
hymns.chorus:
Musi werufaro, Jesu wandisamba mwoyo
Wandidzidzisa kurinda, Nekufara kunamata
Musi werufaro, Jesu wandisamba mwoyo

hymns.title: Toenda KuZion
hymns.lyrics:
Uyai imwi mwese munodisa Tenzi
Tinoimba rwiyo rwake
Tinoimba rwiyo rwake
Nekumira patyo nechigaro chake

Tese tinoimba tinoziva Mwari
Tisati taswika apo
Tiri vana vekudenga
Totaura idi, Totaura idi

Tinofara pano ngezvake zvaMwari
Tisati tasvika apo
Tisati tasvika apo
Musha weZioni, Musha weZioni

Ngatiimbe kwazvo, tinorega kutya
Totewera Immanuel
Totewera Immanuel
Kunyika kudenga, Kunyika kudenga
hymns.chorus:
Toenda kumusha, musha waMwari kudenga
Toenda kuZioni
Kwakanakisa kwaMwari

hymns.title: Ndaponeswa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinoda kutaura kuti
Ndaponeswa ngeropa’ro
Pamsana’po pemutsa wake
Ndichagara kumusha’ko

Ndinofara ngekuti Jesu
Auya kundiponesa
Ngekuti kupenya kwake’ko
Kuri kunditungamira

Ndinotondera Muponesi
Ndichiri kufunga ndiye
Ndirikuimba nguva dzese
Ngerudo rukuru rwake

Ndichamuona Mambo wangu
Ndoita mutemo wake
Achiri kunditungamira
Dakara kumusha kwake

Chiripo chiremba kudenga
Chinondimirira ini
Tichaenda ngekukasika
Kumusha wake’wo Tenzi
hymns.chorus:
Ndaponeswa,
Ngeropa rake, reNyenye
Ndaponeswa,
Zvendichiri mwana wake

hymns.title: Kugara Petyo Pemvura Yeupenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Tinozogara patyo payo
Mvura yeupenyu
Jesu anozomira iyo
Kuchingamidza’su

Apo taneta nekufamba
Tafara kugara
Uko mvura inowerera
Tinoona simba

Ndizvo uyanyi kuna Kristu
Mvura yeupenyu
Munozoona ruponeso
Rwagadzirwa isu
hymns.chorus:
Tinozogara patyo payo
Mvura yeupenyu’wo
Jesu ndiye mvura idi
Mvura yeupenyu’wo

hymns.title: Tinomira Senyi Murutongwa
hymns.lyrics:
Apo Jesu anounganidza
Vanhu vese pamberi pake
Tinomira senyi mukutongwa
Pamusi werumuko rwake?

Tinonzwa here inzwi raJesu
Muranda wakanaka iwe
Zvimwe tinodedera nekutya
Tinobviswa pahope yake

Ndizvo ngatirindire nemwenje
Iri kupenye zvakanaka
Kuti apo mukwambo auya
Tagadzirira kundopinda

Mwoyo yedu irikunangisa
Apo Jesu ari kudenga
Tinombo mirira nekutiwa
Dakara rwendo’ru rwapera
hymns.chorus:
Achaunganidzira mapfunde
Asi anopisa hundiwo
Tinomira senyi murutongo
Rwemusi mukuru uyo?

hymns.title: Zita Rangu Rakanyorwa Here?
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi handinagise pfuma dzepasi’po
Ndinochema kupinda mudanga kum’soro
Mutsamba reumambo hwenyu hwekudenga
Mundiudze M’ponesi, kuti ndakanyorwa

Tenzi zvitadzo zvangu zvawanda sejecha
Asi ropa’ro renyu rinondiponesa
Zvechitsidzo’cho chenyu chanyorwa mutsamba;
Zvitema zvakatsvuka,
Ndinozvichenura

Musha wakanakisa, Dzimba dzekupenya
Nevanhu vane mbiri, Nenguvo dzachena
Hakuna zvakaipa, izvo zvinopinda
Ngerosi dzinorinda, Here ndakanyorwa
hymns.chorus:
Ndinoda kuziva kuti ndakanyorwa
MuTsamba reUpenyu, Kuti ndakanyorwa

hymns.title: Kutonga Kwawamba
hymns.lyrics:
Kurikuwamba kutonga kwaMwari
Mabhuku anozarurwa
Mabasa ese nezvifungo
Mwari anozotonga

Kutonga kunowamba kunaiwo
Vakarara’vo vakafa
Pakarepo vari kupona
Vese vanozotongwa

Tichamira senyiko isu apo
Zviro zvese zvapangidzwa?
Kubva mabhuku ekudenga
Vangani vachamira
hymns.chorus:
Tichazomira senyiko,
Pamusi mukuru uyo?
Tinozoraswa naye here?
Zvimwe tinoponeswa’vo

hymns.title: Apo Mambo Anopinda
hymns.lyrics:
Mambo wedu atidayidza
Kuchidyo chake che kudenga
Tomira senyi mukutongwa
Mambo apinda

Mambo Jesu ane chiremba
Pakange pazoiswa minzwa
Nembiri yake ticham’ona
Mambo apinda

Zvakaigwa zvichaoneswa
Apo tapinda pakutongwa
Zvemumwoyo tinozviwana
Mambo apinda

Achafara pakutiona
Kuti tapfeka nguwo chena
Ndizvo kunesu kunonaka
Mambo apinda

Tenzi, tinokumbira mutsa
Kuti tese tinozomira
Munzwimbo dzedu nekusatya
Mambo apinda
hymns.chorus:
Apo Mambo apinda, Kuzotitonga
Tichamira senyi apo, Mambo apinda

hymns.title: Kuunza Misumbu
hymns.lyrics:
Dyara mangwanani, mbeu’dzo dzemutsa
Dyara masikati, nemumanheru
Mira kupupura, nguva yekucheka
Tichafara nekuunza misumbu

Dyara mukujeka, dyara pane bvute
Usatye makore, m’basa raJesu
Basa richapera, minda yichachekwa
Tichafara nekuunza misumbu

Yenda nekuchema, dyara kuna Tenzi
Kana nekushaya kufadza kwedu
Kuti taripedza, achachingamidza
Tichafara nekuunza misumbu
hymns.chorus:
Unza misumbu, unza misumbu
Tichafara nekuunza misumbu
Unza misumbu, unza misumbu
Tichafara nekuunza misumbu

hymns.title: Vapinzenyi
hymns.lyrics:
Inzwa inzwi reMufudzi
Kunze kugwenga redima
Arikudaidza hwai
Dzakarasika’ko kure

Ndiyani anobatsira
M’fudzi mukuru wemutsa?
Kuti aone dzaraswa
Nekudzipinza mudanga

Inzwanyi dziri kuchema
Kugomo guru kugwenga
Tenzi anoti kunesu
Endanyi kutswaka dzangu
hymns.chorus:
Pinzanyi, Pinzanyi, Dzese dzarasika pinzanyi
Pinzanyi, Pinzanyi, Unza dzese kuna Jesu

hymns.title: Kuponesa Varikufa
hymns.lyrics:
Ponesa vese’wo varege kufa
Muvabvise muzvavo zvitema
Chemera vatadzi, nekuvaudza
Kuti Jesu anovaponesa

Kana vamuramba, Arikumira
Amirira vese kugashira
Muvatete ivo, teta ne mutsa
Asunungure vanodawira

Mukati mwe mwoyo yevanhu vese
Zviri zvifungo’zvo zvakaigwa
Itanyi ngerudo, dirira tsitsi
Zvichamera kuva zvakanaka

Ponesa vese’vo vanhu vaJesu
Tenzi anopa simba rebasa
Kuvadzokesera kunzira duku
Kuti muponesi wavafira
hymns.chorus:
Ponesa vese’wo, Varikufa’yo
Jesu ane mutsa, Kuponesa

hymns.title: Ndinoda Kutaura Soko
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinoda kutaura
Soko rekudenga
RaJesu, mbiri yake,
RaJesu watida
Ndinoda kutaura
Soko ngereidi
Rinondigutsa mwoyo,
Ndiro rega basi

Ndinoda kutaura
Soko roshamisa
Rinopinda kufunga,
Kwedu kwekurota
Ndinoda kutaura,
Rakandibatsira
Saka ndauya hangu,
Kukutaurira

Ndinoda kutaura
Soko rinofadza
Nekuritaurazve,
Rinonakisisa
Ndinoda kutaura,
Ngekuti vamwe zve
Havasati varinzwa
Iro soko rake

Ndinoda kutaura
Soko kune avo
Vakarinzwa kare’ko
Vachiri kudisa
Apo tirikudenga,
Ndichaimba rwiyo
Rwe soko’ro rimwero,
Randakadisa’wo
hymns.chorus:
Ndinoda kutaura soko rekuponesa
Soko’ri rinokosha, rerudo rwaJesu

hymns.title: Tsvakanyi Vakarasika
hymns.lyrics:
Tsvakanyi vese vakarasika
Nekuvaunza kwaMponesi
Soko raJesu kutaurira
Uya kuneni, Iye ati

Tsvakanyi vese vakarasika
Kuvaratidza kuna Jesu
Kutungamira muiyo nzira
Yeruponeso neupenyu

Ndizvo ndinoda, ngekuti Jesu
Vandidayidza kum’teera
Kuvabatsira vakarasika
Nekuna Jesu kuvaunza
hymns.chorus:
Yendai kure... pamakomo’yo
Unzai vafambi... kumusha
Pinzai m’danga... raMuponesi
Jesu Nyenye... yabayiwa

hymns.title: Kudaidzwa Kwevacheki
hymns.lyrics:
Kure nepatyo’yo minda
Yazara nemisumbu
Yaibva yese mubani
Nezve pachipukutu

Vatumire mangwanani
Zve nepamasikati
Vatumire pamanheru
Kwese kwese vacheki

Imwi Mwari atumira
Unganidze nge simba
Ndizvo basa’ro rapera
Muchafara kumusha
hymns.chorus:
Tenzi we kupupura’ko, Mutinzwe tochemera
Vatumire’vo vabati, Ichiripo zvenguva

hymns.title: Ngatibate Basa
hymns.lyrics:
Ngatibate basa varanda vaMwari,
Ngatitewere nzira yaJesu tenzi,
Ngeinzwi rake’ro tinosimbiswazve,
Ngatite nemasimba basa rake

Ngatibate basa kugutsa vanoda,
Kune tsime yedi unza vakaneta,
Tinoshumaira, Jesu vatifira,
Pamchinjiko wake wakatiponesa

Ngatibate basa riripo revese,
Umambo hwedima hwuchazoputswa’di
Nezita raJehova rinozokudzwa,
Kuti soko revangeri rinokura

Ngatibate basa kuti rizopera,
Vacheki vachadzika kundopupura
Ndizvo tichagara naJesu kumusha,
Tichaimba narini, Tazoponeswa
hymns.chorus:
Tichiri… kubata… Tichiri kubata,
Ngatisi… mbirire… dakara tenzi auya

hymns.title: Bata Basa, Husiku Hunouya
hymns.lyrics:
Usiku hunouya, bata basa renyu,
Bata richipo zuva, bata usiku,
Bata pamangwanani, bata masikati,
Usiku hunouya, rinopera’di

Usiku hunouya, bata basa renyu,
Iyo muchazorora, ngatibate’di,
Zvino irirpo nguva, bata nemasimba,
Usiku unouya, basa rapera

Usiku hunouya, bata basa renyu,
Denga’ro rakatsvuka, repamanheru,
Bata, irikupera, nguva’yo yebasa, ,
Usiku hunouya, basa rapera

hymns.title: Mangwanani
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi muchanzwa ndoimba,
Zve pamangwanani,
Ndinonamata kunemwi,
Ndinochema imwi

Ndinoda Mweya Mutsvene,
Unditungamire,
Itanyi nzira ichene,
Kuneni munzira

Avo vanhu varikuda,
Vachapiwa tuso,
Mwari anova chengeta, ,
Nemutsa nenhowo

hymns.title: Ngarikudzwe Zita
hymns.lyrics:
Ngatiimbe pamwe tese,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi,
Mbiri yaMambo’yo Mwar,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi

Jesu zita remasimba,
Kune tsime yedi unza vakaneta,
Tinoshumaira, Jesu vatifira,
Pamchinjiko wake wakatiponesa

Ngatibvume zvinyangadz ,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi,
Tachenurwa ngeroparo, ,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi
hymns.chorus:
Mwese kudzanyi zita raTenzi;,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi,
Rine simba kuponesa,
Kudza zita’ro raTenzi

hymns.title: Tendanyi Mwari
hymns.lyrics:
Tendanyi Mwari Jehova,
Imwi pasi nekudenga,
Kudza Baba neM’rumbwana,
NeMudzimu Unoyera. Amen

Tiri wana wa Mambo, wa Mambo, wa,
Mambo; Tiri wana waMambo, Toimba pa
rwendo; Jesu Mutungamiri, Isu,
hatichazotyi; Titerere kwa ari,
Toimba pa rwendo

Tinoenda kumusha, kumusha, kumusha,
Tinoenda kumusha, Toimba pa rwendo,
Tinoenda kumusha, Apo kusina dima,
Jesu ari kupenya, Toimba pa rwendo

Nge rufaro toenda, toenda, toenda,
Ngerufaro toenda, Toimba pa rwendo,
Hatiregi kuimba, Mwoyo iri kushinga, ,
Dakara tinoswika, Toimba pa rwendo

hymns.title: Ndinoimba Simba Guru raMwari
hymns.lyrics:
Ndoimba simba raMwari wakwidza makomo,
Waparadzira nyanza’yo, Wavaka kumsoro, ,
Ungwaro hwaita zuva kutonga sikati,
Mwedzi upenye usiku, Nedzese nyenyedzi

Ndoimba mutsa waTenzi wagadzira chidyo,
Wakasika zviro zvese, ngeinzwi rake’ro,
Tenzi zvishamiso zvenyu zvinoonekwa’yo,
Ndinozviona kwese’ko, Zvimwe nekumsoro

Miti yese nemaruva zvinokudza Imwi,
Makore nechampupuri zvatumirwa nemwi,
Zvisikwa zvese ngezvenyu, Munozvichengeta, ,
Zviro zvese pasi pano, Zvese munoziva

hymns.title: Kudzanyi Mambo
hymns.lyrics:
Kudzanyi Mambo arikudenga,
Imbai ngerudo runoshamisa,
Mudziwiri wedu, atichengeta,
Agere mumbiri, awirikidzwa

Taura zvake simba nemutsa,
Kujeka kwake kuriko kwese,
Tonzwa kutinhira kudenga kwake,
Zviripo pamsoro, nepamakore

Munochengeta zviro’zvo zvese,
Munopa mweya, neupenyuzve,
Zvipo zvenyu zviri pasi, kudenga, ,
Muzuva, mudima, m’dowa nem’mvura

Tirivaduku, nevemhukuta,
O, Baba wedu, tinosimbira ,
Musiki wezvese, neMuchengeti, ,
Mununuri wedu, nezveShamwari

hymns.title: Baba Tinouya Kunemwi
hymns.lyrics:
Baba tinouya, Munotibatsira,
Kumwezve hakuna tingaende,
Pasi pane dima, Imwi musipo’ba,
Munotinyaradza, Tichengete

Munotiponesa kune zvakaipa,
Mumwoyo mutipe kuzorora,
Hatine masimba, Mutipe kushinga,
Ruwoko rwesimba, Tinobata

Mutipe’vo mutsa, Wako tinozowa,
Kuti tinotiza muchitema,
Mutitungamirire dakara tisvike,
Kumusha mutswene, Tinogara
hymns.chorus:
Baba tinouya, Tinoshaya;,
Munotibatsira, Munotinzwa

hymns.title: Musandipfuure Tenzi
hymns.lyrics:
Musandipfuure Tenzi,
Inzwai ndochema ,
Apo mwadaidza vamwe,
Musandipfuure

Ndipenyi’wo wenyumutsa,
Ndinokumbira,
Ndirikumupfugamira ,
Nekudaira

Ndinomusimbira Jesu,
Ndinokutsvaka ,
