Rapanyi’wo mwoyo wangu,
Kundiponesa

Muritsime rangu Tenzi ,
Zve neupenyu,
Hakuchina Mubatsiri ,
Asi’mwi Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Muponesi, Inzwai ndochema,
Apo mwadaidza vamwe,
Musandipfuure

hymns.title: Nguva Yakanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Nguva’yo yekunamata,
Naiyo takomborerwa,
Inotipa kukumbira,
Kuna Baba wekudenga,
Munguva dzekutambudzwa,
Mwoyo yedu yanyaradzwa,
Yapukunyuka kubatwa,
Ne’yo nguva yekutenda

Nguva’yo yekunamata ,
Tapinda’vo kukumbira ,
Kuna Iye warindira   ,
Isu kutikomborera ,
Ngekuti wandidaidza  ,
Mutsa wake ndasimbira  ,
Vachabvisa zvakaipa   ,
Panguva yekunamata

Nguva’yo yekunamata,
Ndinodisa kunyaradzwa,
Sepagoma’ro rePisgah,
Ndoona musha kudenga,
Murumuko rwekusafa,
Chipo changu ndichapiwa,
Ndichati apo ndakwira,
Ndapinda ngekunamata

hymns.title: Basa Reviki
hymns.lyrics:
Basa reviki rapera,
Sabata rimwe rawamba,
Mwoyo wangu muzorore,
Musi wakakomborerwa

Kudza Mwari wakatipa,
Ruzororo rwakanaka,
Wakomborera Sabata,
Kupinda misi yebasa

Ngoma dzedu dzinokwira,
Serusensi rwekudtenda,
Kuna Jesu tigashire,
Kuzorora kwatapira

Runyararo rwemumwoyo,
Ririchitsidzo chaMwari,
Arikutigadzirira,
Ruzororo rwekudenga

hymns.title: Nguva Yakanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Murindire nhasi, nguva yapfupika,
Rinda musatadze, MaKristu namata,
Nyama yanyorova, mandu inesimba,
Rinda unamate, Jesu uchauya

Muka mukurara, rega kupokana,
Chipo chirichako, zorora kudenga,
Rindira MaKristu, Jesu warindira,
Dakara dikita rabuda pahuma

Daira Jesu’wo iripetyo mhandu,
Sungisa mapfumo, achauya Jesu,
Nguva ichiripo musanonokezve,
Rindira maKristu, rindira namata
hymns.chorus:
O ri… ndira, O na…mata,
Rindira masikati nemudima ,
MaKristu rindira

hymns.title: Musarikanganwe Sabata
hymns.lyrics:
Musarikanganwe Sabata raMwari,
Riri rakanaka kupinda misi yese,
Rinounza zororo, rudo nerufaro ,
Kunaka kwekudenga kunojeka naro

Chengeta Sabata, mum’kudze’di Jesu,
Wakati, Ndirinzira, Idi Neupenyu,
Kuti timuteere Jesu pasi pano ,
Anotipa kudenga kugara ikwoyo

Musi unoyera, ngatiimbe nhasi,
Zviyimbo zvekutenda Jesu Muponesi ,
O, Mponesi wemutsa, ngerudo rukuru ,
Tatenda ngechitsidzo, munogara nesu
hymns.chorus:
Tinotenda ngeSabata, musi waMwari,
Tinotenda ngeSabata, musi waMwari

hymns.title: Musi Wekuzorora Nerufaro
hymns.lyrics:
Musi wekuzorora, Musi werufaro ,
Musi wekubatsira vakanaka avo,
Musi’wo zvengerosi dzichiri kukudza,
Ozofugama pamberi paMwari, Jehova

Musi wekubatsira avo vatambudzwa,
Semunda wakanaka, Edeni yoyera,
Setsime yerufaro mupasi renyota,
Musi’wo sepaPisgah, Toona kudanga

Musi wekutondera basa reMusiki,
Musi kutipangidza, Todisa zva Mwari,
Musi wekutipazvo zvimwe zvakanaka,
Totsvaka ruzororo, rwe musha kudenga

hymns.title: Chikoro CheSabata
hymns.lyrics:
O, Chikoro cheSabata
Nzwimbo yakanaka
Mwoyo urikutondera
Kupinda m’Sabata

Pano mwoyo wakatanga
ZvaJesu kuziva,
Nekutsvaka nzira yake
Ndawana Sabata

Pano Jesu wakamira,
Wakandidaidza,
Kuti ndinomusarudza,
Muiri Sabata
hymns.chorus:
Sabata… ranaka…, Sabata… ranaka…
Mwoyo urikutondera, Kupinda m’Sabata

hymns.title: Tachengetwa Viki Rese
hymns.lyrics:
Mwari watichengeta muiri viki rese
Nhasi tiri kutsvaka chikomborero chake
Sabata rakanaka kupinda rimwe zuva
Sabata rakanaka kupinda rimwe zuva

Tirikutswaka mutsa ngezita’ro raJesu
Touya kubatsirwa, bvisa zvitema zvedu
Tinozorora nhasi kubva basa reviki
Tinozorora nhasi kubva basa reviki

Ndizvo maSabata’o angadaro kunesu
Tichabatsirwa navo, kunaka muupenyu
Dakara tichatorwa kuna Jesu kudenga
Dakara tichatorwa kuna Jesu kudenga

hymns.title: Tinofara Ngemusi
hymns.lyrics:
Tinofara ngemusi
Wakapiwa ngemutsa
Unotifadzisisa
Sekujeka kwedenga

Musi wekunamata
Kuimba nekutenda
Nekufunga ngebasa
ReMusiki wedenga

Sabata rinokosha
Musi wekuzorora
Nekutipa kuziva
Ndiwo takomborerwa

hymns.title: Jesu Unoponesa
hymns.lyrics:
Tanzwa kunakisisa, Jesu aponesa
Iro soko raura, Jesu aponesa
Ziwisa nyika dzese, Kumhiri’yo kwenyanza
Tenzi anotituma, Jesu aponesa

Tumiranyi panyanza, Jesu aponesa
Udzanyi vanyangadzi, Jesu aponesa
Imbanyi’vo zvitsuwa, Kana vari panyanza
Pasi richazorinzwa, Jesu aponesa

Imbanyi mudambudzo, Jesu aponeswa
Ngeupenyu nerufo, Jesu aponeswa
Imbanyi nekupfawa, Mwoyo unoda mutsa
Imbiranyi paguva, Jesu aponeswa

Ipa inzwi pamweya, Jesu aponesa
Kuti ndudzi dzizoda, Jesu aponeswa
Daidza kuponeswa, Mumakomo neninga
Rwiyo rwekukurira, Jesu aponeswa

hymns.title: Muponesi Aneni
hymns.lyrics:
Muponesi garai neni
Handichafamba ndega
Ndinoda kuziva kuti
Munonditungamira

Muponesi garai neni
Handina’ba masimba
Asi munesimba imwi,
Munozondibatsira

Muponesi garai neni
Muupenyu hwangu’wo
Mukutambudzika kwangu
Nezvemurufaro’wo

Muponesi garai neni
Mundione munzira
Kuti ndizoswika ini
Kumusha wekudenga
hymns.chorus:
Ndizvo mwoyo hautyi, Munditungamire’di
Ndinoenda kwese kwese, Ndikuteera ini

hymns.title: Muchinjiko Unoshamisa
hymns.lyrics:
Apo ndinozotondera
Muchinjiko waM’ponesi
Zviri zvangu ndinoshora
Zvese’zvo hazvibatsiri

Ona maropa anobva
Musoro diti mawoko
Hakuna rudo rumweba
Neurombo hwakadaro

Kana ini ndakashata
Ndasunungurwa naIye
Chiro chimwe handichadi
Asi muchinjiko wake

Kuti ndirinazvo zvese
Zviri chipo chidukuzve
Urwo rudo rwakadaro
Runoda upenyu hwese

hymns.title: Jesu Ndishamwari
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu ndishamwari wedu,
M’takuri wezvitadzo
Isu tinokomborerwa
Unonzwa minamato
O tashaya runyararo
Tinorwadzwa mumwoyo
Kuti tisabvumira’zvo
Zvese kuna Jesu’yo

Kuti isu tinoyedzwa
Zvimwezve tatambudzwa
Tisarasa rudairo
Namata kuna Jesu
Ndiye shamwari wedi’ko
Kutakura dambudzo
Unonzwa kutadza kwedu
Bvumira kuna Jesu

Kuti tashaya masimba
Taneta nemutoro
Muponesi Mubatsiri
Bvumira kuna Jesu
Vashamwari vakushora?
Namata kuna Jesu
Iye unokutambira
Kumbira kuna Jesu

hymns.title: Jesu Arikudaidza Iwe
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu arikudaidza iwe udzokere kumushazve,
Ngenyi Unoda kufamba kure kubva kurudo Rwake?

Jesu arikumirira iwe, wakaneta Uzorore,
Wunza mitoro yese kwaAri, Unozokomborerwa.

Jesu arikumirira iwe, Uya zvino Uya zvino,
Uunnze zvese zvitema zvako, Uya usanonoke

Jesu arikukuteta iwe, Inzwa zvino mazvi Ake,
Avo vaanonzwa vachafarira, Uyai zvino mwese.
hymns.chorus:
Wa...daidza, Wa...daidza,
(Arikudaidza nasi Arikudaidza nasi)
Jesu Arikudaidza iwe namusi
(Jesu Arikudaidza iwe’daidza iwe namusi

hymns.title: Rega Apinde
hymns.lyrics:
Kune mweni pam’siwo za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Ange aripo kare za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Zarura achiripo Zarurira Mutswene Jesu mwana wa Mwari Za ... rura
(Rega apinde Jesu apinde)

Zarura mwoyo wako za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Zarura anga ende Za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Zarurira shamwari Ano kurWira mweya’ Owa newe narini Za ... rura
(Rega apinde Jesu apinde)

Inzwa onyengerera Za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Zwino sarudza Iye Za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Akamira pam’siwo Ano kupa rufaro Zita Rake rokudzwa Za ... rura
(Rega apinde Jesu apinde)

Gashira Wekudenga Za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Achaku’tira m’tambo Za ... rura (Rega apinde Jesu apinde)
Achakusunungura Zwepasi: zwazopera Okutora kumusha Za ... rura
(Rega apinde Jesu apinde)

hymns.title: Makafanira Kubarwa Zwe
hymns.lyrics:
Mutongi akauya kuna Jesu, Kuzo bvunza nenzira yeupenyu;
Tenzi Akamupindura Akati, "Barwa nyi zwe patswa," (patswa)

Vana vevanhu tereranyi izwi, Rataurwa nedi na Jesu Tenzi,
Usaite iri soko re nhando, "Barwa-nyizwe patswa" (patswa)

Imwi muchapinda munezororo, Munoimba rwiyo newa poneswa,
Muwane upenyu husinga gumi, "Barwa-nyizwe patswa." (patswa)
hymns.chorus:
Barwa nyizwe patswa, (patswa) Barwa nyizwe patswa, (patswa)
Nge idi, idi ndinoti kunewe, "Barwa nyizwe patswa" (patswa)

hymns.title: Uya Mununuri Uya
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinzwe Tenzi muwe nemutsa neni; Mununuri Uyai
Mweya wangu unodisa Imwi; Mununuri Uyai

Handinaba nzwimbo yekurara Mununuri Uyai,
Nditarisai Ndawane Upenyu: Mununuri Uyai.

Nzira yangu inondi tambudza, Mununuri Uyai
Ndakatarisira rudo rwenyu, Mununuri Uyai.

Musarase kuzwishora kwangu, Mununuri Uyai.
Mundi nzwe mukunamata kwangu, Mununuri Uyai.
hymns.chorus:
Ndapumhuka kure kumakomo; Ndapumhuka kure nemusha,
Onditorei ndipinzei mudanga Mununuri Uyai

hymns.title: Anokwanisa Kununura
hymns.lyrics:
Angatinunura! Daidzira kwese; Ano vanunura vanonzwa;
Mumoyo mukuru, wevanyangadzi, Jesu onunura ano uyayo.

Angatinunura! Ngezwedi here? Kune Simba here ringanunura
Ndiudze neidi aka urawa Angandiponesa kuna Satani

Angakununura shinga usatye, Mushandire Jesu; Anoponesa
Usatye Satani, Simba na Jesu, Usazopokane shinga umire
hymns.chorus: Anotinunura, Anoponesa. Uri hama yangu, Dawira Jesu.

hymns.title: Tinowakira Padombo
hymns.lyrics:
Tinozowakira paDombo, Jesu Dombo remako...re
Tinozomira takashinga, Cham’pupuri Chouya,

Vamwe vanowaka pajecha, Pandangariro dzepfuma;
Vamwe pachitema nehondo, Pambiri nerufaro.

O wakira paDombo redi; Nheyo yedi yakasimba,
Rine vimbo inokurira; vimbo yeruponeso.
hymns.chorus:
Tozo...wakira paDo...mbo Kristu
(Tozowakira padombo Kristu) (Tozowakira padombo Kristu)
(Pamve) Tozowakira padombo Kristu, Padombo guru.

hymns.title: Ndiudze Nyaya YaJesu
hymns.chorus:
Ndiudze nyaya yaJesu Nyora mumwoyo wangu;
Iyi nyaya inokosha Yakanakisa kwazwo.

hymns.title: Jesu Mufudzi Unodiwa
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu ari Mufudzi, anokudaidza
Mukati me-danga’mo kuchine nzvimbo.
Uya  kuchinasi uno apo uchimutsva,
Pinda muiro danga, danga iro redi.

Jesu ari Mufudzi, wakafira iwe
Anodaidza zvino, Mfambi uya kuneni;
Kunze kune dambuzo, uya unodanwa,
Pinda muiro danga, danga iro redi.

Pinda, usanonoke, kunze kune mhumi,
Dzinozokukuwadza, dzakapanduka kwazvo.
Jesu ari Mufudzi, anokudaidza,
Pinda muiro danga, danga iro redi.
hymns.chorus:
Nge rudo Jesu anodaidza, Mfambi zve uya zvino;
Ari kundirekerera ini, Jesu Mufudzi wangu.

hymns.title: Wayerwa Unoreruka
hymns.lyrics:
Apo m’tongi otiyera, Kana takafanira
Tichamira sendarama, Kana senhando here?

Tonzwa mazwi erufa-ro: "Waita zvakanaka!"
Kana mazwi anotyisa; "Hauna kukwanira?"

Ngatinzwe mweya mutsvene Apo tichada mutsa,
Kana tanonoka Mwa-ri, Anounza magumo?
hymns.chorus:
Tichazoyerwa nem’temo Tichareruka
Tichazoyerwa naTenzi Tichareruka

hymns.title: Wakakomborerwa Awo Wanoita
hymns.lyrics:
Inzwa mazwi aMuponesi Ndiwo mazwi eupenyu.
Inzwa utondere Jesu akati, "Vakomborerwa vaiti."

Hakutibatsiri kunzwa kwedu mitemo nezvitsidzo;
Kuzvinzwa, kuzviita hakuponesi; Vakomborerwa vanoita.

Vanozopinda mumusha vakasunungurwa zviitema
Vasukwa, nembiri, zvino narini, Vanodya muti veupenyu.
hymns.chorus:
Vakakomborerwa vakarurama, komborerwa, komborerwa,
Vakakomborerwa vano’ta  m’temo komborerwa, komborerwa.

hymns.title: Hakuna Mumwe
hymns.lyrics:
Hakuna hama kupinda Jesu, Hakuna, neimwe!
Hakuna umwe kurapa vese, Hakuna, neumwe!

Hakuna umwe mukuruzveba, Hakuna ne-umwe!
Asi Anozviita muduku, Hakuna neumwe!>

Hakuna nguva asipo Iye, Hakuna neimwe:
Kana usiku rudo ruripo, Hakuna neimwe.

Hakuna umwe akamborambwa, Hakuna neimwe! neumwe!
Kana munyangadzi ha’murambi, Hakuna!neumwe!

Hakuna chipo chikuruzveba, Hakuna nechimwe!
Hangatinyimi musha kudenga, Hakuna neumwe!
hymns.chorus:
Anoziva nanhamo Jesu, Anotungamira tese,
Hakuna umwe kupinda Jesu, Hakuna!neumwe.

hymns.title: Upenyu Mukutarisa
hymns.lyrics:
Pamuchinjiko pane upenyu, Jesu Ati, "Nditarise."
Pasi nepfuma ngezvenhando, Pamberi ndoona zvakanaka.

Apo ndakamutarisa Jesu, Iye Akanyemwerera,
Kuti ndava mumatambudzo, Muchinjiko unondisimbisa.

Ndinozotarisa muchinjiko, Ndosimbira muchinjiko;
Hakuna anozoputsika Vanosimbira simba redenga.
hymns.chorus:
Mune u-penyu muku-tarisa muchinjiko.
(Upenyu m’kutarisa pam’chinjiko vaKristu,)
Upenyu hwakanaka kutarisa Kalvari
(Upenyu hwakanaka tarisa paKalvari, pakalvari.)

hymns.title: Achidaidza
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu arikudanira kumusha, kudana iwe neni,
Arindira pamusiwo nemwoyo, Rindira iwe neni.

Musanonoke achimudaidza Kunyengerera imwi,
Ngenyiko tisinganzwi mutsa wake, Mutsa kunewe Nemi.

Nguwa irikukasika kupfu’ra Kupfu’ra iwe neni,
Bvute, nedima, rufaro zvouya Uya kunewe neni

Funga ngerudo akatitsidzira Tsidzira iwe neni
Kana takatadza \‘nosunungura, Osunungura tese.
hymns.chorus:
Uya kum’sha, Imi maneta uya.
(Uya) (Kum’sha)
Jesu arikumudaidza kwazvo, O munyangadzi uya

hymns.title: Zambara Razarurirwa Ini
hymns.lyrics:
Zambara rakazarurwa Kuti ini ndipinde;
Muchinjiko waM’ponesi Tichauona apo.

Zambara rakazarurwa Kuti vese vapone.
Vapfumi kana varombo, madzinza kana ndudzi.

Pamberi ngatifambenyi, richakandozarurwa,
Gashiranyi rudo Rwake, Chiremba nem’chinjiko.

Hunde mhiriyo kwerwizi Totura muchinjiko
Totakura ‘cho-chiremba Toda Mwari kudenga.
hymns.chorus:
Mutsa wakadzama kwazvo kuti andizarurire,
Ini...ini...Rasiyirwa ini.
(Ini) (ini.)

hymns.title: Murapi Mukuru
hymns.lyrics:
Murapi m’kuru uripo we mutsa, ndiye Jesu.
Anofarisa warombo, Inzwai izvi raJesu.

"Zwitadzo zwa sunungurwa" Inzwai izwi raJesu.
Fambanyi naYe kudenga, Tigere’ko naJesu.

Mbiri kuNyenye yaMwari, Ndinodawira Jesu,
Ndinodisa zita iri raMuponesi Jesu.

Zwimwe ndatadza ndinoda Kunzwa zita ra Jesu,
Mwoyo wangu wanyaradzwa Ngezita’ro ra Jesu.

Apo iye achauya nembiri ne upenyu,
Tichafara kutaura ruponeso rwaJesu.
hymns.chorus:
Zita Rake ritendzwe, Zita rake rikudzwe
Zita Rake riimbwe; Jesu hunde Jesu

hymns.title: Hamuna Nzvimbo YaJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Uzerea ne kunetswa, Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?
Wabatwa nemirau, Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?
O, Amire pamusiwo, O gugudza-gugudza!
Munzwe onyengerera Ha’na nzwimbo ya Jesu?

Unopambadza nguwa, Hana basa ra Jesu?
Usapambadza Simba, Ha’na basa raJesu?
Hauyedzi kukunda, Kana kuwana Mweya;
Daidza warasika; Ha’na basa raJesu?

Unotswaka upfumi, Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?
Usinga bati basa, Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?
Rufaro ne upfumi, Ndizvo zviro unoda,
Kuyedza kuzvifadza; Ha’na nguva ya Jesu?

Watakura zvenhando, Ha’na m’chero va Jesu?
Haunaba misumbu, Ha’na m’chero va Jesu?
Hauna kana chiro, kuripa basa rako;
Hauwani rufaro, Wokumbana na Jesu?

hymns.title: Ndirikuuya Tenzi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndanzwa izwi renyu, Randidana Tenzi;
Ndigeze neropa renyu, RepaKalvari,

Handina masimba, Munondisimbisa;
Mondigezisa ndichene, Ndichene sechero,

Jesu ondidaidza, kune runyararo,
Kurudo nerusimbiro, rwepasi nedenga.

Rukudzo muropa, Kudzai tsitsi dzake,
Kudzai Chipo cha Tenzi, Arisimba Redu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndouya Tenzi! Uya kunemwi;
Ndigezei neropa, RepaKalvari.

hymns.title: Jesu Akaripa Zwese
hymns.lyrics:
Muponesi ati, "Hauna masimba,"
Rinda unamate, Ndinokupa zvese.

Tenzi ndazoona Munesimba rese,
Munobvisa hosha ne mwoyo we dombo.

Handina kunaka kungadiwa tsitsi,
Nguwo ya-ngu ndogeza muropa renyenye.

Pachigaro chenyu ndichamiranemi,
Ndicha isa zwese pamakumbo Ake.
hymns.chorus:
Jesu M’nunuri, zvese ngezwake,
Zvitema zvakatsvuka "zwachena Sechero"

hymns.title: Nanda Rinochenisa
hymns.chorus:
Tsime iro ndoriwona Iro rinondichenesa;
Kudza Tenzi! Rochenesa, Kudza Tenzi rochenesa.

hymns.title: Ndinodayira
hymns.lyrics:
Baba ndouya kwamuri; Hakuna umwezwe!
Kuti mandisiya ndeda; O ndinoendepi.

Mwana wenyu ndom’daira, ndinzwe simba renyu,
Zvidiso zvangu zvazadzwa, mune ino nguva.

Muvambi verudairo, Ndotarisa imwi,
Ndogashira chipo chenyu; Ndiponeswe nacho.
hymns.chorus:
Ndodaira iye zvino, Jesu wandifira,
Ropa Rake raparara, kuchenesa ini.

hymns.title: Ndichaimba Ne Rudo RwaJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndicha i...mbira Jesu Iye wa...kandidisa
(Ndicha-i...)     (Iye wa...)
Akari...siyadenga Akafa pa Kari-va-ri
(Akari...)

Ndisati...ndachema Jesu aka...ndichemera
(Ndisati     Suaka)
Ndisati...ndanamata Akandi namatira
(Ndisati)

Okudza...makwerudo Hakuzi...kanwikwese
(Okudza...)	     (Hakuzi...)
Kutizwi...tema zvangu Zvacheneswa sechero
(Kutizwi)

Handina...rudo rwaJesu Ndomuku...dza narini
(Handina)   (koaka)
Tenzi mwo...yo waneta Ndizadzeyi nerudo
(Tenzimwo)
hymns.chorus:
Ndoimba...rudo rwaJesu, Ndomuku...dzanarini
(Ndoimba...)       (Ndomuku...)
Wakandi...fira ini Ndoimba rudo rwake
(Wakandi...)

hymns.title: Petyo, Kune Mwi Tenzi
hymns.lyrics:
Petyo, Petyo, ne mwoyo venyu, Ndiswendedze imwi munokosha
Ndifungatireyi paditi, Ndiyige muninga, yezororo,
Ndiyige "Muninga, yezororo."

Petyo, Petyo, handina chiro chemupiro kuna Jesu mambo;
Chete mwoyo unechitema, Ndicheneseyi ne ropa renyu;
Ndicheneseyi ne ropa renyu.

Petyo, Petyo, zve kuva wenyu, Ndino siya zvese zvechitema
Rufaro rwacho, nekuzvida, Ndipenyi Jesu
Akarowerwa, Ndipenyi Jesu akarowerwa

Petyo, Petyo, ndichikupona, Dakara ndiswike m’mbiri
Yenyu, Ndinozowa wenyu narini,
Petyo Muponesi, petyo nemwi,Petyo Muponesi, petyo nemwi

hymns.title: Rita Rinoyera
hymns.lyrics:
Zita rakanakisisa, rinopfuura ese,
Rakapiwa naye Baba, Kumu Rubgwana Wake.

Rounza chikomborero, Ndoimba ndichifara,
Zita Rake ndoribvuma, Ndichazoriparidza.

Nyaya yerusununguro nerudo ndichaimba
Ndichazo rikudza zita rinopfuura ese.
hymns.chorus:
Iro rinoyera; Zita rinoyera
(Royera!)(Royera!)
Rabva kuna Baba, Ra’ya pasi
Rauya ne ngirosi; Ra’ya pausiku
(Royera) (Royera)
Zita ra Tenzi Jesu.

hymns.title: Kwete Ini Asi Kristu
Kujeka Mumwoyo
hymns.chorus:
O! kupenya kwakanaka kupenyera mu mwoyo,
Jesu ano bvisa nhamo anopenya mumwoyo.

hymns.title: Sezwo Ndaponeswa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndine ngoma yandinoda sezwo ndaponeswa;
Yamununuri naMambo Sezwo ndaponeswa.

Ndina Kristu Oyerisa sezwo ndaponeswa.
Rudo rwake ndurudisa sezwo ndaponeswa.

Ndine mbowo yakanaka sezwo ndaponeswa.
Anodzinga kutya kwese Sezwo ndaponeswa.

Andi gadzirira musha sezwo ndaponeswa,
Kwandicha gara narini sezwo ndaponeswa.
hymns.chorus:
Sezwo-ndaponeswa, Sezwo ndaponeswa
Ndokudza Muponesi, Sezwo ndaponeswa,
Ndokudza zita raM’ponesi

hymns.title: Anoda Zwe Ini
hymns.chorus:
Anondida, anondida, anondida ini,
Anoda zviduku zvese, anodazve ini.

hymns.title: Yakakomborerwa Nguwa Yemunamato
hymns.lyrics:
Nguwa yekunamata mwoyo uno pfawa
Touya kuna Jesu M’ponesi wedu
Nekutenda touya, Kuchishangu chedu
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo

Nguwa yekunamata, Tenzi oswedera
Ane tsitsi kunzwa vana vachichema
Zvese tinozviisa pamakumbo ake
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo

Nguwa yekunamata, apo vano yedzwa
Toisa kuna Tenzi anobatsira
Nemwoyo wekunzwira obvisa zvinetso
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo.

Panguwa yem’namato Tinomusimbira
Zwikomborero zwese tinozwiwana;
Mukusimbira iye hakuna dambudzo
Orapa wakaneta, Zvakanaka kuwayo.
hymns.chorus:
Mukunamata Tinokomborerwa
Orapa wakaneta Zvakanaka kuwayo.

hymns.title: Jesu Huya Utikomborere
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu imi mati "Pakaungana, Wawiri, watatu, munozowapo"
Tinomudaira, Tomunamata; Jesu uyai muzotikomborera.

Je-su makasangana nesu kare Asi iwa ne-su nekumagumo
Uya Muponesi, mutipe tsitsi; Tenzi tigashire; tino namata.

Ita mazwi edu amuimbire Inzwa zvikumbiro zvedu kunemwi;
Simbisa rudairo rwedu kunemwi, Chenesai rudo nzira ijeke.
hymns.chorus: Jesu u-ya uzo tikombo-rere Je-su kombo-rera, Ugare petyo.

hymns.title: ’Ndiri Wenyu Tenzi’
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiri wenyu Tenzi, Ndanzwa Izwi, Rataura nerudo,
Ndinoda kusimba murudairo. Ndiwe petyo nemwi.

Ndipirenyi kubasaro renyu, nesimbaro retsitsi
Mweya wangu utarise imwi, nerudo ruwe rwenyu.

Ndine rufaro Tenzi panguva ndiri-pamberi penyu,
Ndichipfugama nemwizve Mwari Tichitaurirana.

Kune rudo rwondisingazivi, Dakara ndiswikeko;
Rufaro rwo-ndisingasvikiri, Dakara ndiwe nemwi.
hymns.chorus:
Ndipfuwe-nyi Petyo naTenzi: (Pe-tyo pe-tyo)
Petyo nemuchinjiko. Ndipfuwenyi ndiwe
Petyo naTenzi, Petyo nedivi renyu.

hymns.title: Ndifanane NaJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ngandifane naJesu
Ave Mponesi wangu
Ndizadzenyi nerudo
Ndipfawire senjiwa
Ngandifambe saJesu
Murwendo rweripasi
Ndiri murombo m’mweyo
Garai neni Mponesi

Kana achinzwa shiri
Dzimwe dzichiputsika
Adzi itire mutsa
Ngeidi anondinzwa wo
Anonditungamirira
Nekundiregerera
Ngandi itwe mutswene
Garai neni M’ponesi

Ngandifane naJesu
Mukurarama kwangu
Ndizorore kunemwi
Panzwimbo inyerere
Ndibarwe patsva ini
Nerudo rwake Jesu
Ngandiwe nerutendo
Garai neni M’ponesi

hymns.title: Petyo Ne Muchinjiko
hymns.lyrics:
Petyo nemuchinjiko
Pane tsime kwaro
Mvura yekurapa
Yabva kuna Jesu

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Mutsa wandiwana
Apo ndajekeserwa
Kupenya kwaJesu

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Ndonuona Jesu
Ndibatsire kufamba
Mumabvute awo

Petyo nemuchinjiko
Ndorinda ndowimba
Dakara ndizoswika
Mhiriyo kwerizi
hymns.chorus:
Petyo, Petyo nem’chinjiko wenyu
Ndipo panozorora
Mwoyo wangu wese

hymns.title: Kufamba NaMwari
hymns.lyrics:
O bvumai ndifambe nemwi
Sezvakaita Inoki
Mubate ruwoko rwangu
Nditaurirane nemwi
Kana nzira yoshayikwa
Ndibvumei ndifambe nemwi

Handingambo fambi ndega
Dutu ririkuvuvuta
Mirawu yakateiwa
Wawengi wanondi yedza
Ese aya matambudzo
Tenzi bvumai ndifambe nemi

Kuti mandipa zororo
Zvepasi zvinova nhando
Ndozofamba neku-shinga
Ndotakura muchinjiko
Dakara ndione Zioni
Tenzi bvumai ndifambe nemi

hymns.title: Rudo Runoshamisa Rwa Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Panzwimbo yakakwirira
Mwoyo wangu unotenda
Ndiyani angatsanangura
Neurwu rudo rwaJesu

Rufaro pamasikati
Nerujeko panedima
Mushonga mudambudzo
Irwo rudo rwo rwaJesu

Tariro yesununguro
Mubatsiri ndaputsika
Muupenyu nemukufa
Ndirwo uru rudo rwaJesu
hymns.chorus:
Rwoshamisa, Rwoshamisa, Ururudo rwaJesu
Runotishamisa isu, Ururudo rwaJesu

hymns.title: Ndinomuda Kwazvo
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinomuda kwazvo
Tenzi kune zviro zvese
Makandipa runyararo
Rusingaparadzwi

Ndinoziva muripetyo
Kunepasi rino
Ndofunga imwi chete
Kune ipi ngoma

Imwi mandisunungura
Ngandifarisise
Ndisinaba rudo rwenyu
Ini ndinga tsamwa

Tenzi wangu anokosha
Ndomuitirenyi
Kuti nzira yakanaka
Ndozofamba nemwi
hymns.chorus:
Hazvisati zvataurwa, Zverudo rukuru
Hazvisati zvataurwa, Ropa racheniswa

hymns.title: Ndotondera Kalvari
hymns.lyrics:
Ndomutewera kweseko
Ndadzidza kumusimbira
Ndotondera kundifira
Pam’chinjiko we Kalvari

Ndofarira m’temo wake
Ndoda anditungamire
Rudo rwake rwakanaka
Rwayerera paKalvari

Ndinofamba ndisingatyi
Ndofara naKristu petyo
Ndosimbira ndichaona
Shamwari ye paKalvari
hymns.chorus:
Jesu anditungamira, M’rwendo rwese
Nguva dzese, Ari shamwari yeidi
Ndinotondera Kalvari

hymns.title: Tora Hako Pasi
hymns.lyrics:
Ungatore hako pasi
Nerufaro rwaro rwese
Asi ndipe hangu Jesu
Anogara narini

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Anondi nyaradza mweya
Naya ndinozoimba

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Ndione kufara kwake
Kondifadza munzira

Ungatora hako pasi
Undipe hangu Jesu
Ndinosimbira m’chinjiko
Dakara ndimuone
hymns.chorus:
Tsitsi dzake dzakadzama, Nerudorwo rukuru
Rununuro rwakakomba, Chitsidzo che upenyu

hymns.title: Kuzvipira Kuna Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Tora upenyu hwangu
Huzvipire kunemwi
Tora mawoko angu
Ayite rudo rwako

Tora makumbo angu
Amuitore basa
Tora izwi ndiimbe
Kunemwi nguva dzose

Tora muromo wangu
Uta’re soko renyu
Tora upfumi hwangu
Ndisasare nechiro

Tora nguva dzangu
Dzimukudze narini
Toranyi pfungwa dzangu
Mudziitise basa

Tora zvidiso zvangu
Zviite zviwe zvenyu
Toranyi mwoyo wangu
Uwe chigaro chenyu

Toranyi rudo rwangu
Tenzi ndinozvi pira
Tora huini hwangu
Huwe hwenyu narini
hymns.chorus:
Ndisambe ngeropa reNyenye
Ndasambwa, ndachena sechero
Tenzi ndomupa upenyu nezvese
Ndiwe wenyu narini

hymns.title: Ndawana Shamwari
hymns.lyrics:
Ndawana shamwari
Yakandida ndisingazivi
Akandipfuwa nerudo
Akandisunga kwa’ri
Mwoyo wangu wasungwa
Nepfundo-ro rakasimba
Jesu ndiri wako ini
Uriwangu narini

Ndawana shamwari
\‘Yoshamwari yakandifira
Handi upenyuba chete
Asi akazvipira
Zwe ndinazvo handizvangu
Ndakamuchengetera
Mwoyo, simba, upenyu zvese
Ngezvake narini

Ndawana shamwari
Akapiwa masimba ese
Kundichengeta munzira
Inoyenda kudenga
Mbiri iri kupenyayo
Kuti indisimbise
Ngandirinde ndisewenze
Pamberi ndozorora

Ndawana shamwari
Inemutsa idi nerudo
Ndimutungamiri kwaye
Anenzero nesimba
Kuna iye anondida
Ndinowana masimba
Korufo rungakurira?
Ndiri wenyu narini

hymns.title: Izwi Ra Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndanzwa izwi
Jesu Ati Uya uzorore
Iwe waneta
Urarepo paditi pangu
Ndauya ndaneta
Ini Tenzi ndakasuwa
Ndawana zororo
Rino-fadza kuna iye

Ndanzwa izwi
Jesu Ati, Ona ndinokupa
Chimwa mvura yeupenyu    Kuti urarame
Ndauya ndamwa kunaIye
Mvura yeupenyu
Nyota yapera ndapona
Kuna’ye M’ponesi

Ndanzwa izwi,
Jesu Ati, ndini mwenje wenyu
Nditarise kwakuyedza
Ndichakupenyera
Ndawona nyenyedzi
Nemwedzi kuna Jesu
Ndichafara mukujeka
Ndipedzise rwendo

hymns.title: Ndiri Wenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinoda kuwawenyu
Tenzi ndidzidzisenyizve
Ndoita rudo rwenyu
Tenzi Ndibatsirenyi

Chinyi rufaro neupfumi
Imwi musipozve
Ndinosiya zvese zvepasi
Ndiwane zvenyu

Ndosiya rufaro rwenyika
Uyanyi kuneni
Ndinozoperera kunemwi
Mundinyaradze
hymns.chorus:
Ndiriwe…nyu Tenzi,
Ngeidi ndiri wenyu
Ndinotsi…dza Tenzi,
Tenzi ndiri wenyu’di

hymns.title: Kunakayi!
hymns.lyrics:
Zuva rakanakisa Rakapinda ese
Totorasa pfungwa dzenyika
Tofunga naMwari

Mazwi erudo akanaka
Kubva kuna Iye
Ku’nza masodzi enhamo
Ot’svitsa kudenga

Kuti tidzinge zvitema
Tayedza tatadza
Iye anoona mwoyo
Anotibatsira

hymns.title: Tenzi Tipatsanisenyi Ne Chikomborero Chenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi tipatsanisenyi
Nechikomborero zve
Tipe rufaro nefaro
Tikurire netsitsi
Otipenyi masimbawo
Tichafamba mugwenga

Tomutenda nekukudza
Neinzwi revhangeri
Michero yeinzwi renyu
Izadze mwoyo yedu
Tivimbike nguva dzese
Tiwanikwe muidi

Achakavanda mazuva
Ngati ape kwa Muri
Ngatishinge misi yese
Titize tisanete
Kudakare tigoona
Mbiri yenyu kudenga

hymns.title: Panzwimbo yakakwirira
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiri kukwira munzira
Yekudenga misi yese
Ndichi namata munzira
Tenzi ndikwidzei kudenga

Handidi zvangu kugara
Apo pane kupokana
Asi vamwe vangagara
Tenzi ndimise kudenga

Ndoda kugara kudenga
Kana Satan’ Andinetsa
Rudairo rwangu rwese
Ngerwe kugara kudenga

Ndoda kukwira kum’soro
Ndione kupenya kwenyu
Ndino namatira kuti
Tenzi ndiise kum’soro
hymns.chorus:
Ndisimudzenyi ndimiseyi,
Nerudawiro kudenga
Panzwimbo yakakwirira,
Tenzi ndimise kudenga

hymns.title: Usakumbire Kuregererwa
hymns.lyrics:
Usade kuregererwa kune basa
Mira usewenze, kwese ungaiswe
Kukona kwake kuri kupiwa iwe
Gashira uwane basa rekudenga

Usade kuregererwa, wadaidzwa
Chikasika iwe kuita basaro
Minda yatoibva vacheki vashoma
Farira kuita basa rake Tenzi

Usade kuregererwa
Kunengozi mukunonoka kuita basa rake
Uchinyengererwa neinzwi raTenzi
Jesu anemutsa uya uponeswe
hymns.chorus:
O huya… usawe senyope,O huya… mira
usewenze; Usade kuregererwa
Ungazonzwi achiti kunewe, hauchina basa

hymns.title: Upenyu Hwenyu Kuneni
hymns.lyrics:
Pona mukati mangu
Jesu mamba wangu
Iwanyi mupinduro
Kumibvunzo yangu
Pona mukati mangu
Mutonge muzvese
Ini ndigopangidza
Vese mbiri yenyu

Muiri watopirwa
Usina chitema
Reganyi mbiri yenyu
Ipenye mukati
Pasi ngarinyarare
Muiri ugove
Muranda akativa
Anotumwa nemwi

Nenhengo dzavo dzese
Dziteerere \‘mwi
Dzagadzirira basa
Rabva kuna Tenzi
Dzorinda dzisingatyi
Kurwadza nekutya
Nekuzaridzwa neMwi
Nepfungwa dzenhando

Ndirinde nditerame
Ndisinga dzvongami
Ndokurindirayi
Kana murikundida
Pona mukati mangu
Jesu mambo wangu
Iwanyi mupinduro
Kumibvunzo yangu

hymns.title: Upenyu Hwenyu Kuneni
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi ndipfuwe petyo nemwi
Ndigumbatirenyi
Petyopo mumaoko enyu
Ndinoda zororo

Tenzi ndipfuwe petyo nemwi
Ndisamusiyenyi
Ndofara mumawoko enyu
Handi-chapumhuki

Ndipfuwenyi nemweya wenyu
Ndifanane nemwi
Ndimutse ndisambe
Ndinatse dakara ndichene
hymns.chorus:
Petyo nerudo rwenyu, Ndipfuwenyi kumusoro
Petyo Petyo nerudo rwenyu, Ndipfuwe
kunemwi k’msoro

hymns.title: Kwese Ndina Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Kana ndina Jesu Ndinoenda kwese
Ndoenda kwese anotungamira
Kuti asipo handina rufaro
Kwese ndina Jesu handityi chiro

Kwese ndina Jesu handisi ndega
Kana vamwe vandisiya aneni
Kana nzira izere matambudzo
Kuti Jesu aneni ndinofara

Kwese ndina Jesu ndingararako
Apo dima repasi randibata
Ndinoziva kuti achandimutsa
Kwese ndina Jesu musha wofadza
hymns.chorus:
Kwese Kwese, Handizo tyiba
Kwese ndina Jesu handityi chiro

hymns.title: Famba Mukupenya
hymns.lyrics:
Famba mukupenya kwaTenzi
Kukutungamire Mweya unobva kudenga
Uno dzinga dima

Famba mukupenya kweidi
Kwemanzwi a Mwari
Mwenje unokutungamira
Mutendi wa Tenzi

Famba mukupenya kwake
Kana kunedima
Dima rotiza kupenya
Kwe zuva raMwari

Famba mukupenya
Uzive rudo rwake
Mwari Ukama hwedu mupasi
Huchanaka kumsoro
hymns.chorus:
Fa…mba mukupenya 3x
Famba mukupenya kwaMwari

hymns.title: Waripi Wakohwi
hymns.lyrics:
Vacheki varipi vanocheka
Misumbu inochekwa kuminda
Nemajeko basa ngariitwe
Usamire dakara tapedza

Endanyi munzira mundotsvaka
Mbeu ingakure mune zvtse
Tswakai kwese musingasiyi
Unganidzai vese kumusha

Minda yaku ibva kwese kwese
Pasi rakamirira kuchekwa
Vacheki vashoma, basa iguru
Tikanonoka tinozoshaya

Vana vevanhu unzanyi majeko
Muvunganidze mbewu  dzaTedzi
Batai basa Tenzi auye
Mozopiwa rufaro kuenga
hymns.chorus:
Varipi vacheki, Ndiyani o’ya anotibatsira
Ndiani achatibatsira, kuunganidza iyi    mwanda

hymns.title: Kunowa Nenyeredzi Here?
hymns.lyrics:
Ndirikufunga nekunaka kweNyika
Iyo ndichasvika kowira
Netsitsi ndichamira naMponesi
Ndichawa nenyeredzi here

Musimba raTenzi ndoda kunamata
Ndiwe semuwani wemweya
Nyeredzi yekupenya, ingawe yangu
Pamusi unotyisa kwazo

Ndichafara kuwona usu hwaJesu
Ndomupa rukudzo narini
Zvichandifadza mumusha wendarama
Kuti ndikawana nyeredzi
hymns.chorus:
Ndichawa nenyeredzi here chiremba
Mumanheru zuva rowira
Ndomuka ndaponeswa tove kumusha
Ndichava nenyeredzi here

hymns.title: Taura Kumweya Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Taura neni Jesu, neinzwi remutsa
Taura zvakanaka, hausari wega
Zarura mwoyo wangu, unzwe inzwi renyu
Mweya wangu um’kudze, nekumufarira

Taura nevana vako, uvatungamire
Vazadze nerufaro, vadzidze kurinda
Kuti nekuzvipira, tiwe vana vako
Umambo ngausvike tizoona Tenzi

Tauranyi sekare, ndionise nzira
Ndiite basa rangu, ndiite mutemo
Ndiite ndim’kudze nekumupa mbiri
Ndichabvuma kutumwa ndimuremekedze
hymns.chorus:
Taura nekupfawa’ro inzwi rerudo
Uchazoba mukundi unossununguka
Tenzi tauranyi zve, inzwi rekupfava
Chindiudzanyi kuti hausi wega

hymns.title: Kwanhasi Basi
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi handinamatiri zvamangwana
Mundibvise muchitema nhasi chete
Ndisazotaura inzwi renhandoba
Namayi muromo wangu, nhasi basi

Ndisewenze ndinamate kwazo Tenzi
Ndiwe nemutsa mumanzwi nemubasa
Ndisimbisenyi, kuita inzwi renyu
Ndide kuzvipira ini, nhasi basi

Kanazve nhasi upenyu hungapere
O ngandisimbiswe ini nemwi Tenzi
Saka, handinamatiri zvamangwana
Ndibatenyi, ndichengete, Tenzi nhasi,
Amen

hymns.title: Murindi Ndiudze
hymns.lyrics:
M’rindi nditaurire
Nekuyedza kweZioni
Zvioniso zvekuuya kwake
Zwaonwa here
M’fambi simuka ona
Kunze koda kuyedza
Zvipfekedze nguwo dzako
Kwaedza chimuka

M’rindi, ona kupenya
Kovhenekera zvese
Zvionso pasi rese
Manenj’ emusi m’kuru
Apo tsuri inorira
Kum’tsa vese vakafa
Kubva munyika ne nyanza,
Vapfeka kusaora

Murindi ona kupenya,
Kwegore reSabata
Vese vanodaidzira,
Umambo hwave petyo
Mufambi ndoona mbiri
Nyikayo yeKenani
Nemusha wakanakisa,
Wakakwirira kwazvo

Muguta’ro rendarama,
Pachigaro chopenya
Pana mambo akanaka
Otonga nyika yese
Umo mumakomo ayo,
Maranzi anopenya
Mumhendero menzizidzo
Munokura maruva

Murindi nyika yapetyo,
Michero nemaruva
O mhiriyo kunofadza
Mitiyo ye Edeni
Inzwa mavi anoimba
Owungira mumweya
Ne mazana anoimba
Tese tichazo vako

hymns.title: Ndinoenda Kwamunoda Kutindiende
hymns.lyrics:
Hakungavi kumakomo,
Kana ne munyanza
Kusiri mberi kwe hondo
Mwari achandida
Kana achidaidza neinzwi
Kunzira dziri kure
Ndichapindura ndichiti
Tenzi ndo’nda kwamunoda

Kuda nhasi kune manzwi,
Anodiwa nashe
Kuda zvino kune m’fambi
Wandingano tsvaka
Tenzi kuti imi muneni,
Kana nzira yoipa
Ndichabvuma ndichizoti kwamuri
Ndoparidza zvamunoda

Kune kanzwimbo kaduku,
Mukukohwa munda
Pandingashandira imi,
Jesu akandifira
Ndosimbira zvese kunaye,
Ngekuti munondida
Ndoita nemwoyo wese
Ndichawa zvamunoda
hymns.chorus:
Ndoenda komunoda’mi Mwari,
Kumakomo ne Mapani.;
Ndotaura zvamunoda imi’she,
Ndichaita zvamunoda

hymns.title: Manzwi Ekushatirwa Asabvumirwe
hymns.lyrics:
Manzwi akashata
Asabva mundimi dzangu
Kuti mwoyo wangu ini
Usamushatise imwi

Rudorwo rwakaperera,
Ukama hunoyera
Rungakasika kuparadzwa
Nechiro chiduku

Manzwi ekushatirwa
Haanaki kutaura
Manzwi akaipa
Anoputsa upenyu hwese
hymns.chorus:
Nagatidanane, adaro Tenzi
Vana itayi mutemo waTenzi
Ngatdanane, adaro Tenzi
Vana itayi m’temo wake

hymns.title: Nguva Yekupupura
hymns.lyrics:
Anofamba achichema
Ane mbeu dzerudo
Asingarari pabasa
Anozopiwa tsitsi

Dova rinobva kudenga
Ropenyiswa nezuva
Uchazopiwa michero
Nemabasa matswene

Dyara chete usanete
Ubate usingatyi
Shinga usingatsamwiswi
Uchakohwa rufaro
hymns.chorus:
Chichenjera iwe m’rimi, Mapfunde akuibva
Kwakusvika kupupura,  Minda yese yaibva

hymns.title: Kurumidzanyi Zuva Renyu Rakanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Kupura kwepasi kwaswedera
Tenzi anodana vacheki vake
Kure nepetyo mapfunde aibva
Aibva kuti apinzwe mudura

Mangwanani asina kuchenaba
Arikukasika kuswedera
Mapfunde akaraswa muchitema
Ngaaunganidzwe nguva ichipo

Zvanaka kusevenza nerudo,
Tsime rakanaka rekudenga
Tokokwa tosundwa neurwu rudo
Runotipa michero yakawanda
hymns.chorus:
Swendedza musi, Takura mwanda
Swendedza musi, kumusha

hymns.title: Ndinomudai Zvikuru
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi ndinom’da kwazvo
Ndine ubofu ne’rombo
Nditungamire ndisimbe
Kunemwi kunesimba

Ndipfekedzenyi kupfava
Nguwo yangu yaipa
Ndidzidzise nekusimba
Ndokumbira kusimba

Nditungamire ndifare
Musipo ndoputsika
Fambanyi muneni kwese
Muri zvese kuneni

Handichatyi chinouya
Kufara kana nhamo
Mweya wangu unomuda
Munondi nunura
hymns.chorus:
Nguva dzese nguva dzese,
Tenzi ndinomudisisa;
Nguva dzese Nguva dzese,
M’ponesi ndichengete

hymns.title: Kuchengeterwa Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndachengeterwa Jesu
Nesimba raMwari
Kusina zvakaipa
Kana ndina Jesu

Ndachengeterwa Jesu,
Ndi’te zvamareva
Nezvamunoda imwi,
Kuita basa renyu

Ndachengeterwa Jesu,
Nomweya munyoro
Ndasiyana nenyika
Ndazvininipisa

Ndachengeterwa Jesu
Ini ndiri wenyu
Ndizove wenyu chose
Ndizove wenyu chete
hymns.chorus:
Ndachengeterwa Jesu. Mwari ndinouya
Handidi Chiro! Chiro! Chiro!  Imwi muri zvese

hymns.title: Mwari Wangu Neni
hymns.lyrics:
Ndine shamwari yangu
Yandinodisisisa
Anorudo rwakanaka
Anondida kwazvo
Handisaigara kure,
Ndoda ave petyo
Tichagara pamwepo
Iye, neni

Ndoziya nekuneta
Iye anoziva
Sezvo achindidaidza
Ndoda kubatsirwa
Anonditungamiririra
Nenzira’no penya
Zve tinofamba tese
Iye, neni

Ndomu’dza zvangu zvese
Rufaro ne nhamo
Ndom’dza zvinondifadza
Nezvisingafadzi
Anondiudza zvva’noda
Nekuyedza kwangu
Tichataura tese
Iye, neni

Anoziva ndinoda
Kubatsira mweya
Zvino anoti ndiende
Kunotaurira
Vamwe norudo rwake vo
Nokufa kwake zve
Tinobatira pamwe
Iye, neni

hymns.title: Nzira Yese
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu unotungamira
Chinyi chandingatsvaka
Ndingashora mutsa wake
Achinditungamira
Ndinorunyararo rwake
Nokugara kwaari
Ndinoziva kuti Iye Jesu anobatsira
Ndinoziva kuti Iye Jesu anobatsira

Jesu anotungamira
Munzira dzangu dzose
Achindipa tsitsi dzake
Achindipa wupenyu
Kana nzira ichirema,
Kana ndava nenyota
Kune tsime rine mvura, Riri paDombo iri
Kune tsime rine mvura, Riri paDombo iri

Jesu anotungamira
O rudo rwake rwese
Ndichapiwa kuzorora
Mumba maBaba vangu
Kana ndoenda kudenga kwatisingavori
Urwu ndirwo rwiyo rwangu Jesu  atungamira
Urwu ndirwo rwiyo rwangu Jesu  atungamira

hymns.title: Ndiripano Nditumei
hymns.lyrics:
Inzwa Jesu odaidza
Ndiani osewenza
Minda yese yatoibva
Ndiyani achakohwa
Tenzi anodaidzira
Achazokupa tuso
Ndiani achapindura
Ndiripano nditumei

Kana usingabiri nyanza
Kana kushumaira
Shumaira vahedheni
Vakakutenderedza
Kana usiri ngirosi
Kana usiri Pauro
Taura rudo rwaJesu
Uti akatifira

Kana usiri murindi
Parusvingo rweZioni
Uchinongedza kudenga
Kuno vapa upenyu
Neminamato nezvipo
Woita kuda kwake
Ungafanane naAroni
Kubatsira M’porofiti

Apo mweya iri kufa
Tenzi achidaidza
Usazoti neunyope
Handikwanisi basa
Ita basa ra’nokupa
Farira basa rake
Kasika kumupindura
Ndiripano nditumei

hymns.title: Pamakumbo AJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Pamakumbo ake Jesu
Ndonzwa manzwi erudo
Nzwimbo iyo inokosha
Ndoida nguva dzose
Pamakumbo ake Jesu
Ndichaona zvekare
Rudo rwake runokosha
Rwapfuwa mwoyo wangu

Pamakumbo ake Jesu
Ndipo ndonoponeswa
Apo ndinosiya zvese
Nditore kuzorora
Pamakumbo ake Jesu
Ndonamata ndochema
Ndo gashira tsitsi dzake
Ndofara nguva dzese

Ndikomborerenyi Tenzi
Ndorinda pamakumbo
Ndiringisenyi nerudo
Ndione usu hwenyu
Ndipenyi pfungwa yaJesu
Kuti ndiyere saye
Kuti ndiwe neumbowo
Hwekuti ndina Jesu

hymns.title: Ndino Muda
hymns.lyrics:
Ndomuda, ndomuda, ndomuda Tenzi
Ndomuda Imwizve Muponesi wangu
Ndomuda ndomuda Munozviziva
Mabasa angu ese anopangidza

Ndofara, ndofara, Ndoofaraini
Kufara kwangu kwese hakuperi
Ndorindira pfuma yangu ikoko
NaJesu, newese, Nengirosizve

O Jesu M’ponesi Mandiponesa
Upenyu neruponeso ngezvenyu
Ruri rwiyo rwangu nezita renyu
Ndinofarisisa nemutsa wenyu

Ndiyani wofanana nemwi Tenzi
Anonyemwerera Nekundida ini
Ndinozo mukudza, Nengoma dzese
Nenzizi dzemutsa dzinondifadza

hymns.title: Dombo Remakore
hymns.lyrics:
Dombo remakore,
Ndiwigenyi kunemwi
Rega mvura neropa,
Zvakabza parutivi
Ndibatsirenyiwo,
Mundibvise zvitema

Harisi basa rangu,
Ringamufadza imi
Kusi kudisa kwanga,
Kana kuchema kwangu
Zvese hazvindisambi,
Ndimi munoponesa

Handina chekumupa,
Ndouya kum’chinjiko
Ndinoda kupfekedzwa,
Ndinokumbira tsitsi
Ndotizira kutsime,
Ndisambenyi M’ponesi

Kuti ndava parufu,
Maziso \‘ngu apfigwa
Ndosvika nyika itsva,
Ndoona muchitanga
Muridombo rekare,
Ndiwigenyi kinemwi

hymns.title: Nheyo Yakasimba
hymns.lyrics:
Nheyo yakasimba, Yakaiswa na iShe
Yakaiswa kutisimbisa isu isu
Hapana zvaanga ataura zve iye
Iye wakatizira kuna Muponesi
Iye wakatizira kuna Muponesi

Musatye ndine mwi, O musanete zvenyu
Nokuti ini ndiri, Mwari wenyu
Ndinopa masimba, okuti mugomira
Makabatwa nesimba, neruoko Rwangu
Makabatwa nesimba, neruoko Rwangu

Kana ndichifamba mumatambudziko
Mutsa wenyu wakawanda kwandiri’ni
Nomukati momurazvu womoto
Ini ndichakuchengeta usatya
Ini ndichakuchengeta usatya

Uyo unotsamira kuna Jesu
Haazombo kandwi kuvavengi
Nyangwe Satani achiedza sei
Iwe uchaponeswa na She, wesimba
Iwe uchaponeswa na She, wesimba

hymns.title: Tenzi Mufudzi Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi mufudzi handishayi ba
Anonditungamira zvakanaka
Onditungamira mumvura kwazvo
Ne mweya wapumhuka owuunza

Kana ndive mumubvuri worufu
Handityi kuti muchitungamira
Handizotyi kana bvute rekufa
Ngekuti imi Tenzi muneni

Imwi mawarira tafura rangu
Mazadza ndiro nezvikomborero
Musoro wangu mauzodza imwi
Chinyi ndokumbira, munazvo zvese

Kunaka nerudo zvinova neni
Nawo mazuva eupenyu hwangu
Ndozogara mumba make Jehova
Muupenyu hwake husingaperi

hymns.title: Mudyi Wenhaka Yeumambo
hymns.lyrics:
Mudyi wenhaka ngenyi uchirara
Uchiwona musha wavepetyo
Muka umire upfeke chishangu
Chimbidza nguva yakupfuura

Ndidzi dzenyika dziri kunyongana
Dziri kubvunda kwazvo nekutya
Inzwa mzkumbo engoro dzobvunda
Mudyi wenhaka usanonoke

Usanyengedzwe nezviro zvenyika
Rufaro rwayo rwunopfuura
Siya ruchiva nepfuma yepasi
Mudyi wenhaka chisiya zvese

Misa musoro ziso ritarise
Uwone mbiri yaJesu mambo
Wona kupenya kwake kumakomo
Mudyi wenhaka imba ufare

hymns.title: Musiki Na Mambo Wangu
hymns.lyrics:
Musiki mambo wangu
Zvese ngezvenyu
Chipo chenyu ndiro
Tsime rezvikomborero
Chipo chenyu ndiro
Tsime rezvikomborero

Ini chisikwa chenyu
Kune zvipo zvenyu
Rukudzo rwangu harunga
Kwani zvipo zvenyu
Rukudzo rwangu harunga
Kwani zvipo zvenyu

Tenzi ndomupenyi
Zvese zviri zvenyuRudo rwenyu runoda
Mwoyo, chipo chiduku
Rudo rwenyu runoda
Mwoyo, chipo chiduku

Zadza mweya wangu
Nesimba remutsa
Manzwi nezvidiso zvangu
Zvese zvive zvenyu
Manzwi nezvidiso zvangu
Zvese zvive zvenyu

hymns.title: Inguvai Dzeusiku
hymns.lyrics:
Murindi wemuZioni,
Zvinoyavanguvai?
Hweva yoobuda here?
Kwava kuyedza here?
Tariro yako yava nokujeka?
Tariro yako yava nokujeka?

Miganhu yese yenyika,
Taipfuura here?
Tosvika here m’zororo?
Toona nyika here?
Toona here umambo hwa petyo?
Toona here umambo hwa petyo?

Kopenya zuva rabuda, Ngatida’dzire kwazvo;
Toona hweva yabuda, Ichipenyesa kwazvo
Vadairi ruponeso rwa’petyo
Farayi ruponeso rwa’petyo

Chiratidzo chaonesa,
Idi nyika ya’petyo
Pamberi ngati kasike,
Zororo rave petyo
Manzwi enyu ngaadaidze rufaro

hymns.title: Kuzowa Riniko
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi kuzowa rini musati masvika
Mwoyo yedu yaneta nekumumirira
Yowa rini iyo nguwa inopenya kwazvo
Kupenya kwembiri nekuwonekwa kwenyu

Kozowa rini Tenzi mubude kumusha?
Matononoka Tenzi vamwe vadzokera
Tenzi vatendi venyu vazara nezvivi
Vashoma vakamira murufaro rwenyu

Mutsai vakarara, chemai vamuke
Vanoyera ngavati, Tenzi aswedera
Mwenje yedu ipfute zviunu zvisungwe
Vese vagadzirire kumuona Tenzi

hymns.title: O Kuwa Nerudairo
hymns.lyrics:
Ruda’ro rusingadzoki
Kana pane mhandu
Rusingabvundiswi
Mukushaya nenhamo

Rudairo rusingachemi
Kana runganetswe
Asi nguva yokutambura
Rodana Mwari

Rudairo runopenya
Kana mudambudzo
Kana munjodzi
Haruzotyi, nekupokana

Rusingatyiswi nepasi
Kana nekushorwa
Rusingazombonyudzwi
Munyanza yechitema

Ndipeny’urwu rudairo
Kana ko-uyeyi
Ndicharaira rufaro
Rusingaperi

hymns.title: Kufadza Kukuru
hymns.lyrics:
Runofadza rusimbiro,
Tichitambudzika
Runotipa simba m’nzira dzedu
dzenhamozve, dzenhamozve

Runonongedza kuzororo
Kuchatonga Jesu
Kwatichaona vadiwa, Tisingapatsani
Kwatichaona vadiwa, Tisingapatsani

Nyika isisna chitema,
Hina zviyedzo
Kune rufaro narini kusina kutsamwa
Kune rufaro narini kusina kutsamwa

Nyika isina masodzi,
Isinazve rufu
Vanopinda iyo nyika vovasengirosi
Vanopinda iyo nyika vovasengirosi

Kasika nguva kupera,
Timuone Tenzi
Timuone sezvo muri, Tisvike kumusha
Timuone sezvo muri, Tisvike kumusha

hymns.title: Tenzi Semufudzi
hymns.lyrics:
Muponesi semufudzi,
Titungamirireyi
Murufaro tigutseyi,
Tigadzirire dengaKomborerwa Jesu wedu, Imwi makatitenga
Komborerwa Jesu wedu, Imwi makatitenga

Tirivenyu tifadzeyi,
Tichengete munzira
Tidzivirire chitema,
Titsvake tarasika
Komborerwa Jesu wedu, Tinzwe tichinamata
Komborerwa Jesu wedu, Tinzwe tichinamata

Matsidza kutigashira,
Kana takanyangadza
Mune tsitsi munengoni,
Dzekuti sunungura
Komborerwa Jesu wedu, Tichadzoka kwamuri
Komborerwa Jesu wedu, Tichadzoka kwamuri

hymns.title: Tariro Yakakomborerwa
hymns.lyrics:
Rukariro rwedi
Rwaka komborerwa
Rwusina newara irwo
Rufaro rwenyika

Iriko nyeredzi
Inodzinga dima
Yatumira kufukidza
Inokunda guva

Inzwi rerufaro
Rinosimudzira
Rorasa zvese nekutya
Roti mwari rudo

Inzwi reKalvari
Roti Wanunurwa
Nyeredzi’yo yekupenya
Tariro yedenga

hymns.title: Hakuna Usiku Uko
hymns.lyrics:
M’nyika isingaperi,
Mune guta dzwene
Haizombopfuuri
Hakuna usiku

Mazambara \‘nokosha
Muneguta dzvene
Nzira ngedze ndarama
Hakuna usiku

Mazambara Ha’pfigwi
Mune guta dzvene
Nzira ngedze ndarama
Hakuna usiku

Zuva harizopenyi
Mumusha mutsvene
Nyenye ndiyo kupenya
Hakuna usiku
hymns.chorus:
Mwari achapukuta, Masodzi avo vese
Hakuna kutya nerufo, Hakuna usiku

hymns.title: Kristu Anouya
hymns.lyrics:
Angave mangwanani zuva robuda
Apo kupenya kwave kudzinga dima
Apo Jesu anowuya nembiri
Nemakore kutora vake

Angave masikati kana manheru
Zvimwe pangave pakati peusiku
Ku’ye kujeka wembiri yake Tenzi
Owuya kutora vake

Apo masangano odana Hosana
Anodzika nevatsvene nengirosi
Anetsitsi pahuma yake nembiri
Jesu ogashira vake

O rufaroyi! Uko kusina kufa,
Nekurwara, nekusuwa nekuchema
Tozokumbana naTenzi kumakore
Owuya kuzotora vake
hymns.chorus:
O Jesu ndirini rini, Tisati taimba
Anouya Hariruya! Hariruya! Amen
Hariruya! Amen

hymns.title: Hona Mukwambo
hymns.lyrics:
Warindira here m’kwambo ouya ouya
Warindira here m’kwambo ouya ouya
Ona ouya Ona ouya
Pfeka urindire m’kwambo o’ya

Mwenje yenyu ngaipfute ouya, ouya
Mwenje yenyu ngaipfute ouya, ouyA
Ona anouya nekukasika
O mweya rinda m’kwambo ouya

Tese tichazondo muchingamidza, ouya
Tese tichazondo muchingamidza, ouya
Idi ouya, idi ouya
Tinozomuchingamidza ouya

Tichaimba Hareruya ouya
Tichaimba Hareruya ouya
Ona ouya, Ona ouya
Imba Hareruya m’kwambo o’ya
hymns.chorus:
Ona mukwambo ouya, ouya
Ona mukwambo ouya, ouya
Ona ouya, Ona ouya!
Pfeka urinde mukwambo o’ya

hymns.title: Hatizivi Nguva
hymns.lyrics:
Hat’zivi nguva Iyo Tenzi anouya
Zvioneso zvekuuya zvotaura
Apo ouya tozofara zvikuru
Hatizivi nguva

Wane kupenya wanoda ruponeso
Kune idi muzvinyorwa zvake
Zvioniso zvinoti achauya zve
Hatizivi nguva

Ngatirindire nemwenje inopfuta
Tozo sebenza dakara Tenzi auye
Toimba nekufarira uyo musi
Hatizivi nguva
hymns.chorus:
Owuya... ngatirinde titende
Owuya... Hariruya! Hariruya!
Owuya nembiri yababa mumakore
Hatizivi nguva

hymns.title: Tokumirira Nekurindira
hymns.lyrics:
Hatizivi nguvapo Jesu
Achauya pasi pano
Zvimwe pamanheru usiku
Kana mangwanani kwavo
Atitaurira tirinde
Ne mwenje yagadzirirwa
Kuti Jesu achationa
Tiri kum’rindira Iye

Ndinotondera mutsa wake
Kuti wakatiponesa
Wakasiya imba dzembiri
Kuwuya kuzotifira
Ndinofunga kuti afadzwa
Apo isu vanhu vake
Tofara mukuwuya kwake
Nekumurindira Iye

O, Jesu muponesi wangu
Ndinosimbira kunemwi
Kuti apo munozowuya
Munozondi chingamidza
Zvimwe vamwe vachakutiza
Sezvo ngewawo Mutongi
Ini ndinokuchingamidza
Nekukurindira Imwi
hymns.chorus:
Tikumirira Nekurindira,
Tikumirira, Tichiri kukurindira

hymns.title: Zuva Rinopenya
hymns.lyrics:
Kuyedza kunosvika
Jesu anouya
Kuti azotora vana vake
Vaende kumusha

Rinozaraurwa vhangeri
Mupasi iri rese
Haanonoki mukwambo
Pakurira tsuri

Dzinomuperekedza kwazvo
Idzo’ngirosi
Apo anozotora vake
Kopera urombo

Vakafa vedu vekare
Tichazovavona
Masodzi ekuchemerana
Achazo pukutwa
hymns.chorus:
Toona musi unopenya, unovheneka usiku
Aya maranzi anopenya ano wonekwa

hymns.title: Batisisa Dakara Ndiuye
hymns.lyrics:
Chitsidzo chake, Kuwadawiri
Ona ndouya, Kugashira vangu
Batisisanyi, njodzi huru
Musazorareba, Rinda namata

Tomurindira mwenje \‘chipfuta
Anouya sembava pausiku
Zvino apetyo, Hatizi’ musi
Miti yootunga, zhizha rapetyo

Tariro iri painzwi rake
Kuonekwa kwaTenzi wedu
Chitsidzo ichi, chopinda zvose
Ona ndinouya, batisisayi
hymns.chorus:
Batisisanyi!, Chitsidzo chake
Umambo hwake hwopiwa imwi
Pinda mu’faro, Mutonge neni
M’chapiwa zviremba, Mira murinde

hymns.title: Rufaro Mupasi
hymns.lyrics:
Farai Tenzi owuya! Mugashire mwese
Mugadzirirenyi nzwimbo
Mwese mumukudze
Mwese mumukudze
Mukudze, mwese mukudze

Farai Tenzi otonga, Mukudzenyi vanhu
Apo minda nematombo
Zvichikudza mambo
Zvichikudza mamboZvichikudza kudza mambo

Achazotonga nemutsa, Ndidzi dzioneswe
Mdir’ ekururama Kwake
Rudo rwoshamisa,  Rudo rwoshamisa
Rwoshamisa rudo Rwake

hymns.title: Kuva Ikoyo
hymns.lyrics:
Tinotaura  nenyika
Yakanaka inopenya
Nyika iyo  yakanaka
Zvofadza  sei kuwayo
Nenzira dzine ndarama
Nemadziro anopenya
Kunoshamisa, zvofadza sei
Kwayo naTenzi

Hakuna zvitema uko
Neurombo nekuedzwa
Iko kusina zviedzo
Zvofadza seyi kuwayo
Tino taura nerudo
Nenhumbi dzinopfekwayo
Sangano dzwene ririko
Zvofadza senyi kuwayo

Nomukati mezviedzo
Ndogadzirira kudenga
Ndichazozviziva ini
Ndozonzwa senyi kuwayo
Tichafamba muminda’yo
Munembiri yakanaka
Newatswene nengirosi
NaJesu achazowayo

hymns.title: Ishe Taungana
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi taungana
Muno mumba yenyu
Uyanyowo zwotapinda
Mumba yenyu tswene

Iyo mwoyo yedu
Inokuchemera
Nawo mweya wedu uyu
Unokuchemera

Kukudza kwenyu
Baba tinokunzwa
Kuzarurwa inzwi renyu
Nemwi timunzweyi

Mutigadzirire
Isu vanhu venyu
Kana tichifa tidzoke
Muvu iro renyu

hymns.title: Ngoma Yekupatsana
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi ndinomuimbiranyizve
Pamwe rwiyorwo rwekupatsana
Tomukudza tichimunamata
Torindirazve norunyararo

Tipenyi runyararo munzira
Timuke tindorare tinemwi
Muchengete miromo mwoyo
Yamunamatanyi mumba muno

Tipeyi runyararo muupenyu
Muve chidziviriro munjodzi
Apo muchapedza matambudzo
Tenzi tidane kurunyararo

hymns.title: Kana Ndirimutadzi
hymns.lyrics:
Kana ndiri mutadzi, Jesu wakandifira,
Wakafa kuti ini ndichagara kudenga.
Senhawani pamuti, ndinopona naJesu.

A, rudo-rwo rwaJesu, runopinda pamsoro.
Runodzama senyanza, runogara narini.
Rudo rwakandi-ona apo ndiri-kusada.

Kana ndirimutadzi, ndirikumuda Jesu,
Kuda kwangu aziwa, zve neurombo hwangu.
Ne-upenyu ne-mwoyo Jesu anochengeta.

hymns.title: Hapana Musha
hymns.lyrics:
Hatina musha panyika
Hatifari kuva pano
Zvinofadza mweya yedu
Kutswaka musha unowuya
Kutswaka musha unowuya

Hatina musha panyika
Tinoda musha \‘rikure
Zita rawo Izioni
Unopenya nguva dzose
Unopenya nguva dzose

Musha une runyararo
Vafambi vachazorora
Da ndine mapapiro
Ndayiuya ndizorore
Ndayiuya ndizorore

Mweya wangu chinyarara!
Mwari anoziva nguva
Ndichaita kuda kwake
Iye ondipa zororo
Iye ondipa zororo

hymns.title: Zita Rino Kosha
hymns.lyrics:
Tora zita rake Jesu
Iwe mwana wenhamo
Rinozokupa zororo
Tora ufambe naro

Tora zita rake Jesu
Riwe chidziwiriro
Kana wave muzviyedzo
Ridane mum’namato

Tora zita rake Jesu,
Rinofadza mumwoyo
Apo achitigashira,
Tichazomuimbira

Tichapfugamira Jesu
Towa pamberi pake
Tomupfekedza chirenba
Tapedza rwendo rwedu
hymns.chorus:
Zita ri... nokosha
Rinotipa rufaro
Zita ri...nokosha
Rinotipa rufaro

hymns.title: Chitsidzo Chakakomborerwa
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu ndewangu Ndofara sei! Ndoraura mbiri Yekudenga;
Mudyi wenhaka ndakatengwa, Ndasambwa muropa reNyenye.

Ndinozvipira, nekufara, Zvno ndowona rufaro rwangu.
Ngirosi dzino-dzika pasi, Dzounza rudo netsitsi zve.

Ndinozvipira, ndozorora; Ndinofara ku-na Muponesi,
Ndakarindira, Ndamirira, Ndazadzwa ne-ku-naka kwake.
hymns.chorus:
Ndiyo nyaya-nerwiyo rwangu, Kukudza Tenzi zuva rese,
Ndiyo nyaya-nerwiyo rwangu, Kukudza Tenzi zuva rese.

hymns.title: Mbiri Kuzita Rake
hymns.chorus:
Mbiri kuna’ye, Mbiri kuna’ye,
Ropa rake rakati-samba Mbiri kuna’ye

hymns.title: Nzira Yake Newe
hymns.lyrics:
Unoda kuraramira Jesu vohere? Ungafamba naye here panzira?
Ungamupe here yese mitoro yako? Bvumira kuda kwake.

Unoda kusunungurwa na Jesu here? Unoda runyararo rwake here?
Unoda kuponiswa usazo putsike? Bvumira kuda kwake.

Unoda zororo muvushe hwake here? Ungedza simba rakevo here?
Ungamushandira nemwoyo wese here? Bvumira kuda kwake.
hymns.chorus:
Masmb’ Ake angakupindura, Ropa rake rino sunungura,
Ropa rake rinokuchenura; Mwoyo, nekuzokusunungura.

hymns.title: Rudo Kumusha
hymns.lyrics:
Kunonaka kwese nerudo kumusha,
Rufaro ruwande nerudo kumusha,
Runyararo rurimo, nekunzwana kwese’ko,
Zvese zvinofanzwa nerudo kumusha.

Varombo vatuswa nerudo kumusha,
Vapfumi vokwira nerudo kumusha,
Kamusha kanofadza, neguta revamambo,
Kwese kunonaka nerudo kumusha.

Mwari anofara nerudo kumusha;
Kudenga kwake kune rudo kumusha;
Apo Jesu owuya kutitora kumusha,
Tichafara tese nerudo kumusha.

Ndinova waJesu nerudo kumusha
Kufa kwake kwakapa, rudo kumusha.
Ndinozorora ndisi ngatyizwe zwechitema
Ticha komborerwa nerudo kumusha.
hymns.chorus: Nerudo, kumusha. Zvese zvinofadzwa nerudo kumusha.

hymns.title: O Rimi Remwoyo Unopona
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinoda rimi remoto,
Rakapenyera vatsvene;
Rakaita vade denga,
Nekushinga mudambudzo!

Uripiko mweya Tenzi,
Wakashingisa Abrama;
Wakapfawisa Pauro,
Wamupa simba redenga.

Simba makapa Erija,
Harichipo here nhasi;
Rakapenyesa Mozisi,
Rapa Jobo rukuriro,

Tenzi tonderayi kare,
Mutipenyi tsitsi itswa;
Apo tomupanyi mwoyo,
Tidireyi mweya wenyu.

hymns.title: Simba Riri Muropa
hymns.lyrics:
Ungasununguke muchitema? Riripo simba mumaropa;
Ungakurire here chitema? Riripo simba muropa.

Ungasununguke mukuchiwa? Riripo simba, mumaropa
Uya paKalvari unochena Riripo simba muropa.

Munoda kucheneswa sechando Riripo simba, mumaropa,
Mavara asambwa neroparo Riripo simba muropa.

Munoda here kumushandira! Riripo simba mumaropa;
Unoda kuimba nekukudza; Riripo simba muropa.
hymns.chorus:
Kune simba rinoshamisa, Muropa reNyenye...
Kune simba rinoshamisa, Mumaropa’wo eNyennye.

hymns.title: Hakuna Dima Jesu Owuya
hymns.lyrics:
Hakuna zve dima Jes’ owuya; Hakuna zve dima Jes’ owuya
Hakuna zve dima Jes’ owuya, Kuzotora vake’vo.

Hakuna kusuwa Jes’ owuya; Hakuna kusuwa Jes’ owuya,
Hakuna kusuwa Jes’ owuya; Kuzotora vakevo

Hakuna kuchema Jes’ owuya; Hakuna kuchema Jes’ owuya,
Hakuna kuchema Jes’ owuya; Kuzotora vakevo

Vachaimba rwiyo Jes’ owuya; Dzekuchingamidza Jes’ owuya,
Vachafara pamwe Jes’ owuya Kuzotora vakevo.
hymns.chorus:
O tora vake kum’sha, O tora vake kum’sha,
Hakuna zve dima Jes’ owuya Kuzotora vakevo.

hymns.title: Hama Yeidi Ndi Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Shamwari kwayo ndi Jesu
Kana uri mumadambudzo
Ucharapa mwoyo zve, Uchakupa masimba
O hama yeidi ndiJesu

Hama yandawana ndiye Jesu!
Achaunza runyararovo
Kutsamira kwaari, Handichazotyi chiro
O hama yeidi ndiJesu

Kana ndifambe muurombo
Nemuchando chemuJordani
Handizombotyi chiro, Muponesi aripo
O hama yeidi ndiJesu

Kana tovungana kumusha,
Nevadaviri vari mberi
Tichaimba parwizi, Tichamukudza Tenzi
O hama yeidi ndiJesu
hymns.chorus:
Hama yeidi ndiJesu, Hama yeidi ndiJesu
Anozokusimbisa, Anonzwa wodaidza
O hama yeidi ndiJesu

hymns.title: Mbiri Ngaiwe Kuna Mwari
hymns.lyrics:
Mbiri kuna Mwari nezva’kaita
Wakada pasi Wakapa M’rumbwana
Wakafira izvo zvitema zvedu
Wazarura m’siwo tipinde tese

O ruponeso rwatenga ropa
Chitsidzo chaMwari kuvadaviri
Munyangadzi m’kuru anodaira
Jesu anosunungura ipapo

Zvikuru waita wazvidzikisira
Tofara zvikuru nayeM’rumbwana
Asi kushama nekufamba kwedu
Kunokura apo taona Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Kudzayi M’ponesi, Pasi ngarimunzwe
Kudzayi M’ponesi, Vanhu ngavafare
Uyai kuna Baba neMurumbwana
Mumupenyi mbiri Nezv’Akaita

hymns.title: M’tsvene M’tsvene
hymns.lyrics:
M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Mwari Samasimba
Tinomuimbira pamangwani ese
M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Mune nyasha huru
Umwe mitatu pamwe chetezwe

M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Vose vanodaro
Vakapfugamira Imwi Mwari wedu
M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Vachimunamata
Makaperera simba nerudo

M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Hamuvonwi Imwi
Mbiri yenyu huru haivonekwiba
M’tsvene, M’tsvene, M’tsvene
Ndimwi M’tsvene mega
Makarurama nekunakazve

hymns.title: Akandi Buritsa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndakarwanziwa Jehova atsamwa
Zvitema zvakandipfuwira pasi
Ndakachema ndiri’mo mumatope
Tenzi akandiburitsa kunzezwe

A’ndimisa padombo petyo naye
Matsiko angu asimbiswa pano
Handizomboputsiki ndiripano
Ndomirira ndizopfeka chiremba

A’ndipa rwiyo, rutswa rwerukudzo
Ndoruimba usiku nesikati
Mwoyo wangu wazara nerufaro,
Ndichazokudza mununuri wangu

Ndichaimba tsitsi dzake kuneni
Zve nekunaka kwake kune vese
Ndichazoimba ruponeso kwese
Dakara vese vasimbire Mwari
hymns.chorus:
A’ndiburitsa mumatope,
Andimisa ini padombo
Nhasi andipa rwiyo m’mwoyo,
Rwekukudza, hareruya

hymns.title: Jesu, Mponesi Nditungamire
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi nditungamire,
Mukati mezviyedzo
Mananda andi bata,
Ndimwi dombo ndiwige
Ndimi mutungamiri,
Tenzi nditungamire

Semwana onyaradzwa,
Munga nyaradze, nyanza;
Mananda anomudzwa,
Kana mati nyarara!;
Imwi Tenzi wenyanza,
Tenzi nditungamire

Apo ndasvika nyanza,
Mananda ondityisa
Handichinazororo,
Ndotsamira kunemi
Ngandinzwe imimoti,
Ndinokutungamira

hymns.title: Munyaradzi Awuya
hymns.lyrics:
Paradza soko, kune munhu wese
Kana kuneawo, wakasungwa mwoyo
Ndimi dzewatendi, ngadzidaidzire
Munyaradz’ awuya

Usiku hwapera, zuva rinobuda
Ronyaradza mhere, nekutya kwewese
Muma komo ese zuva rakasika
Munyaradz’ wauya

Mambo wewa mambo,Murapi mukuru
Ipa rusununguko wabatwa wese
Nemumatirongo, rwiyo ngarwunzwikwe
Munyaradz’ awuya

Rudo runoyera, handingakwanisi
Kuti nditaure, tsitsi dzinoyera
Ini munyaradzi, ndiwe nekupenya
Munyaradz’ awuya!

Rega maungira, akwire kudenga
Watswene wedenga, wachipindurawo
Mukuimba rudo rwake rusingafii
Munyaradz’ awuya
hymns.chorus:
Munyaradz’ awuya,  Munyaradz’ awuya
Mudzimu mutswene, chitsidzo chababa
Paradzira soko kune munhu wese
Munyaradz’ awuya

hymns.title: Uya! Mufambi, Uya
hymns.lyrics:
Munyika mauri urimufambi
Inzwa wodaidzwa Mwana! Wangu

Kunyika yenzara, Ibva kwairi
Uya kurufaro, Mwana wangu!

Nyika yemirenga, wongwarira iwe
Waneta momwoyo, mwana wangu

M’siwo wakashama, uchiri wangu!
Ndichirikukuda mwana wangu

Wapumhuka kure, woenda mberi?
Dzok’ usunungurwe, mwana wangu!

Kudya kwagadzirwa, unodikanwa!
Uya kuzororo, mwana wangu!

Hauna shamwari, kana nemusha
Ndichirikukuda, mwana wangu!
hymns.chorus:
Uya! M’fambi uya! Uya kumusha!
Wakapumhuka kure, uya kumusha

hymns.title: Uya Mutadzi, Uya
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu anodana mutadzi uya!
Tichiri kunamata mtadzi uya
Ichiri nguva yako mtadzi uya
Nguva yekumuziva, m’tadzi uya

Wakaremerwa here, mutadzi uya!
Jesu anokubatsira m’tadzi uya!
Jesu haakunyengedzi, M’tadzi uya!
Jesu anokununura m’tadzi uya

Inzwa onyengerera, m’tadzi uya!
Uya uzokomborerwa, m’tadzi uuya!
Jesu achizeweza, m’tadzi uya!
Tichikunamatira, mutadzi uya

hymns.title: Ndapa Upenyu Hwangu Kwemuri
hymns.lyrics:
Ini ndakufira, Nda’paradza ropa
Kuti utengiwe, Upiwe upenyu
Ini ndakakufirazve, Iwe wandipenyi?
Ini ndakakufirazve, Iwe wandipenyi?

Ndakasiya umba, Yababa yembiri
Ndakauya pasi, redima nenhamo
Ndakazvisiira iwe, Wakandisiirenyi?
Ndakazvisiira iwe, Wakandisiirenyi?

Ndakatambudzika, zvinorwadza kwazvo
Pamusana pako, kuti ununurwe?
Ndakazvitakurira’we, Wanditakurirei?
Ndakazvitakurira’we, Wanditakurirei?

hymns.title: Aunza Ruregerero Rwangu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndakamuona pamuti,
M’kurwadzwa neropa
Akanditarisa ini
Ndakamira petyo

Ini handizokanganwi
Kutarisa kwake
Kwakati afira ini
Iye anyerere

A’tarisazwe akati,
Ndok’regerera
Ropa rapararira’we,
Ndafa kut’upone

Rufo rwenyu rwapangidza
Kuipa kwangu
Kuwandikai kwe tsitsi,
Dzinosunungura

hymns.title: Fambai Zvinyoronyoro
hymns.lyrics:
Nyararai, nyararai, Kunozewezwa
Nyararai, nyararai, Tererai inzwi

Nyararai, nyararai, nzvimbo itswene
Iyi Altar younza, Soko zwe

Nyararai, nyararai, muchinamata
Tonzwa nezve Eden, neino nguva

Nyararai, nyararai, Tarisa tsitsi
Nyararai, nyararai, Rindira Tenzi
hymns.chorus:
Fambanyi zvinyoro, Tenzi arimo;
(Fambai zvinyoro-nyoro)
Fambanyi zvinyoro, Ngatiswedere
(Fambai zvinyoro-nyoro)

hymns.title: O, Kufamba Na Mwari
hymns.lyrics:
Kufamba pamwe naMwari
Kufamba kwek’denga
Murimwenje unopenya
M’nzira yekudenga

Dzika njiva inoyera
M’tumwi wakanaka
Ndinochiwenga chitema
Cha’mubvisa k’neni

Ndakafara m’urunyararo
Ndichikutondera!
Ndasara ndisina chiro
Pasi harindipi

Ndibatsire kukurira
Zvinondifadzazvo
Ngandizvikurire ndinamate
Imwi chete

hymns.title: Jesu Muponesi Anoshamisa
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi akatichenura
Tenzi anoshamisa
Takanunurwa nem’tengo!
Tenzi anoshamisa!

Ndom’tenda neropa rake
Tenzi anoshamisa!
Randidzosa kuna Mwari
Tenzi anoshamisa!

Akasamba mwoyo wangu
Tenzi anoshamisa!
Zvino arikutonga’mo
Tenzi anoshamisa!

Ofamba neni munzira
Tenzi anoshamisa!
Anondichengeta
Iye Tenzi anoshamisa!

Anoti ndikurire
Tenzi anoshamisa!
Ndikurire nguva dzese
Tenzi anoshamisa!

Ndinomupa mwoyo wese
Tenzi anoshamisa!
Pasi harina rutivi
Tenzi anoshamisa!
hymns.chorus: Jesu wangu Muponesi anoshamisa!      Jesu wangu Muponesi anoshamisa!

hymns.title: Madonhwe Ezvikomborero
hymns.lyrics:
"Zvouya zvikomborero",
Ndicho chitsidzo chake
Kuchazotumirwa mutsa
Kuna M’ponesi

"Zvouya zvikomborero",
Zvinotimutsira zve
Pamakomo nemikana,
Sekunaya kwemvura

Zvouya zvikomborero
Titumirenyi Tenzi
Tipenyizve mweya mutsva
Kudzanyi inzwi renyu

Zvouya zvikomborero
Dayi zvauya nhasi
Kuna Mwari Tinobvuma
Jesu tisambe zvino!
hymns.chorus:
Zvikomborero zvikomborero zvedu
(Zvikomborero zvedu)
Unotidonhera mutsa, Toda zvikomborero

hymns.title: Runyararo Rwakanaka, Chipo Chamwari
hymns.lyrics:
Kuno’ya kumwoyo wangu
Rwiyo rwekufara kwazvo
Ndinoramba ndichiruimba
Runyararo rwaMwari

Rwakapiwa naye Kristu
Wandiripira mungava
Hakunazve imwe nheyo
Runyararo rwaMwari

Apo ndamupa chiremba
Mwoyo unerunyararo
Ndawana chikomborero
Runyararo rwaMwari

Runyararo kuna Jesu
Sezvo ndiri petyo naye
Basi pane runyararo
Runyararo rwaMwari
hymns.chorus:
Runyararo chipocho chekudenga
Runyararo rwoshamisa
Rwuri chipo chaMwari

hymns.title: Rwiyo Rwangu
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu M’nunuri wangu
Muri rwiyo rwangu
M’ponesi munyaradzi
Mumatambudziko

Muri chishangu changu
Muupenyu hwese
Kana ndava mudima
Apo ndinochema

Tenzi ndomusimbira
Shamwari yeidi
Ndinomuda kupinda
Vanhu vese pasi

Muri rufaro rwangu
Mupasi redima
Ndofara nemwi kwazvo
Mudangaro renyu
hymns.chorus:
Jesu m’mununuri wangu, muri rwiyo rwangu
Handina imwe hama inopinda imwi

hymns.title: Jesu Ane Hanya Here
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu anehanya here
Mwoyo wangu woda rwiyo
Apo ndakuremerwa ndasuwa
Nenzira yokunetesa?

Jesu ane hanya here
Apo nzira ine dima?
Apo zuva radoka, hwa’siku
Anozova petyo here

Jesu ane hanya ndotadza
Kumirira zviyedzo?
Handina zororo mudambudzo
Kana ndichichema seyi?

Jesu ane hanya apondoti
Vadiwa sarayi?
Mwoyo worwadza nekutsemuka
Ichi chiro here kwa’ri
hymns.chorus:
Hunde, ane hanya neni,
Anzwa urombo hwangu
Apo misi yareba usiku hworebesa
Tenzi aneni

hymns.title: Rinda Wakatiwira
hymns.lyrics:
Musha unosimbirwayo
Umo musina urombo
Hunde, wakakomborerwa
Tozorora tese umo

Kuti mutoro warema
Uyo wapiwa namwari
Musha uyo unodisa
Rinda, rinda usashore

Kuti nzira inemhinzwa
Funga akayitakura
Kuti mwoyo watambudzwa,
NaIye wakatambudzwa.

Ramba wakatsungirira
Usarege kunamata
Kuzorora kwaswedera
Rinda, rinda usashore
hymns.chorus:
Rinda, rinda wakatiwira,
(rindira)
Rinda, rinda wakatiwira,
(rindira)
Rinda, rinda usingashori
(Rindira)  (rindira) (usashore)

hymns.title: Handisi Ndega
hymns.lyrics:
Handisiri ndega kwete ndina Jesu
Anondifadza ini, nokuti aneni
Handizoshayi shamwari ndina Jesu
Ini ndinopinduka, Iye haapinduki

Handineti, kwete, ndakamutsamira
Mweya wangu wofara, kuzorora kwa’ri
Handi zvibatsiri, kuti ndiri ndega
Asi ndinaye Jesu, akandichengeta

Hunde ndarindira, Ati ndirindire
Ndashama kuti Tenzi ngenyi Anonoka
Hunde ndinofara Rufaro rukuru
Ndine nheyo yeidi, Iri Tenzi wangu
hymns.chorus:
Handisiri ndega ndina Jesu
Watsidza kusandis’ya
Kundisiya ini ndega, ini ndega

hymns.title: Chimwe Kuna Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi rudo rwenyu makandipa
Tenzi ndisamunyime nechiro
Nerudo ndim’kudze, ndizadze chitsidzo
Ndomuunziranyi chipo zvino

Pachigaro chem’tsa mondimirira
Ndomutarisa murudairo
Ndibatsire kutakura muchinjiko
Rwiyo munamato Ndomupanyi

Ndipenyi mwoyo, Unodairika
Kuti zuwa rese rizoona
Mabasa erudo nemamwe emutsa
M’pumhuki awanwa zvekunemwi

Zvipozvo ndinazvo, Ndinozviunza
Kunemwi Tenzi, kana zvidini
Kana ndamuona, Mweya wangu
Uchazofara narini, Nemwi Tenzi

hymns.title: Nheyo Imwe
hymns.lyrics:
Sangano rinenheyo, Iri Tenzi Jesu
Rakasikwazve Nemvura neizwi Rake
Wadzike kudenga woriita mutsvitsa
Wakaritenga neropa nekurifira

Daidza ndudzi dzese, Sangano ngerimwe
Sungo yeruponeso naTenzi umwezve
Zita rimwe, tendo rimwe, Kubarwa kumwe
Rine tariro imwe, rine tsitsi dzese

Kana richitambudzwa, Vanhu vachishama
Kana richiparadzwa, Padombo pariri
Asi vadairi vachema, Kowarini
Nekukasika kuchema kuchazopera

Mukati mezviyedzo, Mukati mehondo
Sangano rorindira, Rugare narini
Rinozokomboorerwa, Nembiri narini
Sangano rokurira, rowa nezororo

hymns.title: Nditungamire O Jehova
hymns.lyrics:
Nditungamire Jehova
Ndiri mfambi munyika
Munesimba, handinaba
Ndinokumbira imwi
O Mponesi!, O Mponesi!
Ndimwi munotigutsa   Ndimwi munotigutsa

Iro tsime reupenyu
Rizarurireny’ ini
Munditungamirirenyi
Negore renyu dzvene
O, M’ponesi!, O M’ponesi!
Chiwayi simba rangu  Chiwayi simba rangu

Kuti ndaswika Jor’dani
Bvisayi kutya kwangu
Muzondiperekedzenyi,
Mundisvitse Kenani
O, M’ponesi!, O M’ponesi!
Ndinozomukudzayi Ndinozo mukudzayi

hymns.title: Nyikayekumusha
hymns.lyrics:
Kumusha! O kumusha!, Kwakasununguka!
Hakuna usiku, Mangwanani basi
Ndinoda uyo musha, Ndinouchemera
Musha usina kurwadza wondoda kusvika
Musha usina kurwadza wondoda kusvika

Tenzi ari kumusha, Nengirosi dzake
Hakuna chitemayo, Kana nezviyedzo
Nzwiyo dzekumusha’yo ndodzinzwa munzebe
Kuti ndofunga nemusha, Ndinobva ndachema
Kuti ndofunga nemusha, Ndinobva ndachema

Vagari vekumusha, Vanondidaidza
Urombozve nerufo hazvisopindimo
O nyika inodiwa!, Iri kumusosro!
Kristu tiunze kumusha werudorwo rwenyu
Kristu tiunze kumusha werudorwo rwenyu

hymns.title: Garire
hymns.lyrics:
Kana njiva-ichirira-Zvotipa chiko-mborero
(Kananjiva) (ichirira) (zvotipachi) (komborero)
Zvinondifu-ngidzamusha-wakanaka we Garire
(zvindindifu) (ngidzamusha) (wakanaka) (weGarire)

Chrous
O Garire rakanaka iroJesu ayidisa,
O Garire rakanaka Uya undi imbirezve

Mukana-unemaruva-Kune shiri-dzinoimba
(Mumukana) (wemaruva) (kuneshiri) (dzinoimba)
Dzichikudza Mwari wadzo, Petyo nairo Garire
(Dzichikudza) (Mwari wadzo) (Petyo petyo) (neGarire)

Kana ndichi-verengazve-Naiyewa-kandifira
(ndoverenga) (ndoverenga) (naiyeyo) (vakandifira)
Ndinodisa kutewera Akange ari Garire
(Ndinodisa) kuwera (akangea) (rigarire)

hymns.title: Kuchengetwa Mumaoko AJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndachengetwa na Jesu, pachipfuwa chake,
Rudo rwakaparadzwa, Mweya wozorora,
Tereranyi ngirosi, Dzoimba kwandiri,
Mumundawo wembiri, Munyanza inokosha.

Ndachengetwa naJesu, Kubva mudambudzo,
Nezviyedzo zvepasi, Handityi chitema,
Ndabviswa mukusuwa, Nemukutya kwese.
Asara matambudzo, nemasodzi mashoma.

Jesu, bako remwoyo, Iye andifira;
Dombo iro rekare, Ndosimbira imi
Ndomira ndakatiwa, Dima ripfuure;
Ndomirira dakara, Zuva ritirobuda.
hymns.chorus:
Ndachengetwa na Jesu, Pachipfuwa chake,
Ropa rakaparadzwa, Mweya wozororo.

hymns.title: Ndanzwa Tenzi Wandidana
hymns.lyrics:
Ndanzwa Tenzi wandidana, Neinzwi rakanyorwa;
Aya manzwi ndinoanzwa, Uya Undi-tewe-re ini.

Kana nzira inedima, Makumbo angu anete,
Asi mwoyo unofara, Ndichimutevera minzira.

Jesu munditungamire, Mundipe rujeko rwenyu,
Mundishingise netsitsi, Ndichimutevera munzira.

Mugwenga nditungamire, Ndipe mana yekudenga,
Ndinomuda nguva dzese, Ndichimutevera munzira.

Ndipinzei mumwoyo menyu, Ndigumbatirenyi Tenzi,
Netsitsi ndisimudzeyi, Ndichikutevera munzira.
hymns.chorus:
Ndinotora muchinjiko, Ndichimuteera Tenzi;
Kwese ndinomutevera, Ndinofamba, naye Munzira.

hymns.title: Maranzi Anopenya Emutsa Wababa
hymns.lyrics:
Maranzi emutsa wababa, Anobva kumba yake,
Asi otichengetesa, mwenje mupasi rino.

Pasi razara nedima, mananda otinhira;
Vazhinji vakarindira, kuona mwenje yedu.

Pfutisanyi mwenje hama! vamwe varimudima,
Varikuyedza mudima, Kusvika kumagumo.
hymns.chorus:
Rega mwenje yeny’-ipenye, ipenyere munyanza!
Zvimwe pan’-anyura m’nyanza
Uyo mungaponese

hymns.title: Mira Se Gamba
hymns.chorus:
Iwa gamba, Iwa gamba, Iwa gamba,
Utarise mhandu.

hymns.title: Ndanga Ndada Kuva Mudairi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndanga ndoda; kuva m’dairi,
Ndanga ndoda, kuva MuKristu,
Wakaipa oti; Enda hako Mweya,
Ne umwezve, musi uchauya.

Wange wo’da; Uya nhasizve;
Wange wo’da; Usa dzokeba,
Jesu odaidza, ngirosi dza’petyo,
Wonamatirwa, mufambi uya.

Wange wo’da; wononokazve;
Wange wo’da; Asi wasara,
Hazvikubatsiri, iwe wazoraswa!
Zvonzwisa urombo, "Ndarasiwa'

hymns.title: Pamuchinjiko
hymns.chorus:
Pamuchinjikondakaona kupenya,
Apo m’toro wemwoyo wabviswa (wabviswa)
Ndipo ndakazowamba kuona,
Zvino ndinozofara kwazvo.

hymns.title: Mukudzenyi Mukudzenyi
hymns.lyrics:
Mu-ku-dze-nyi! Jesu mununuri wedu!
Imba nyika nerudoro rwake!
Mu-ku-dze-nyi Ngirosi huru yembiri;
Mupe iye simba nerukudzo!
Jesu mufudzi ne mutungamiriri,
Ano tungamira nguva dzese.

Mu-ku-dze-nyi! Jesu mununuri wedu!Akatifi-razvitema zvedu;
Dombo redu, tariro yeruponeso!
Mu-ku-dze-nyi Jesu, arowerwa ipambiri!
Akatisunungura,
Rudo rwake runoshamisa.

Mu-ku-dze-nyi!, Jesu mununuri wedu!’
Wekudenga woimba, Hosana!
Jesu Tenzi,Achazotonga narini;
Mupe ch’remba, Mupristi naMambo!’
Kristu ouya achazotonga pasi
Simba, mbiri zvose ngezva Tenzi.
hymns.chorus:
Mu-ku-dze-nyi! Taura ukuru hwake!
Mu-ku-dze-nyi!’Imba ne rufaro.

hymns.title: Ndiani Osarudza Tenzi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiyani Osarudza Tenzi Nzira mbiri chisarudza!

Zvuru zvasarudza kumira, Kurutivi-rwo rwechitema.

Uyayi, mirayi naTenzi, Ndiye chete ane-upenyu.
hymns.chorus:
Chi...sa...ru...dza,
(Musarudze nhasi, masarudze nhasi),
Pakati pe’di nechitema.

hymns.title: Ini Ndini Nzira
hymns.chorus:
Ndi...rinzira...,Idi...upenyu...
(Ndirinzira, ndirinzira, Ndirinzira Idi upenyu)
Hawu uyi kuna Baba asineni.
Ndiri...rinzira...,Idi...upenyu...
(Ndirinzira, ndirinzura, Ndirinzira Idi upenyu)
Hawu uyi kuna Baba aineni.

hymns.title: Rega Jesu Auye Mumwoyo Wako
hymns.lyrics:
Kuti waremerwa nechitema
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
Kuti uchida upenyu hutsva
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo

Kana uchida kuchenurwa
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
Aripo matsime ekusambwa
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo

Kana wanetsva nematambudziko
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
Kana mumwoyo muyine nzwimbo
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo

Kuti shamwari dzisine idi?
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
Anova shamwari yakanaka
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo

Uchida kuimba nevatsvene
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
Woda kupinda mune zororo
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo
hymns.chorus:
Kwapera kupokana,
Nhasi usa murambe
Chizarura musiwo,
Bvumira Jesu mumwoyo

hymns.title: Handi Zomusiyi Imwi
hymns.lyrics:
Handizokusiyi iwe
Handizokurambiba
Ndinozokutungamira
Pamusana petsitsi
Usatyeba chakaipa
Tora mazano angu

Apo mhepo yakubata
Ndidane m’munamato
Ndichakugumbatira iwe
Ndikutungamirire
Ndicharuramisa nzira yako
Muzviyedzozvo

Kuti denga rapenya
Kose, kose kwajeka
Rufaro rwozoyerera
Zvino zvose zvofara
Ini ndinozova newe
Ndinokutungamira

Kana mwoyo wa’ne dima
Wazara kupokana
Ndinozokujekesera
Nemukati memhute
Mureza mureza
Ini ndinozousimudza

hymns.title: Ndiudze Nyayayekare
hymns.lyrics:
Nd’udze nyaya yekare, Yezviro zvekudenga
Yekupenya kwaJesu, Nerudo rwaJesu
Taura nyaya zvinyoro, Semwana muduku
Zvondiri wakane  Ndisisinasimba

Nd’udze nyaya yekare,Neinzwi reidi
Funga ini mutadzi,Akafirwa naye
Ndiudze nguva dzese Kuti uchizowa munyaradzi
Panguva yematambudziko

Nd’udze nyaya yekare, Une zvaunotya
Pasi risinambiri, Rinondi konjera (womera)
Hunde nyika yembiri, Iri kuwonekwa
Nd’udze nyaya yekare! Jesu ochenura
hymns.chorus:
Nd’udze nyaya yekare, Nd’udze nyaya yekare
Nd’udze nyaya yekare, Yerudo rwaJesu

hymns.title: Jesu Mwenje Wepasi
hymns.lyrics:
Ngirosi dzinoimba, Jesu mwenje wepasi
Mbiri kunaye mambo, Jesu mwenje wepasi

Ndudzi dzese farayi, Jesu mwenje wepasi
Farayi newedenga, Jesu mwenje wepasi

Wedenga womukudza, Jesu mwenje wepasi
Kristu Tenzi narini, Jesu mwenje wepasi

Muchinda werukudzo, Jesu mwenje wepasi
Zuva rekururama, Jesu mwenje wepasi
hymns.chorus:
Famba mumwenje, Uya kumadonhwe ane tsitsi
Uti penyere nguva nenguva, Jesu mwenje wepasi

hymns.title: Musi Wadzokazve
hymns.lyrics:
Musi wezororo wauya zve
Wakakomborerwa pakusika
Apo Tenzi akamisa basa
Kuti zvese zvive murunyararo

Kuti misirenyi, Uyu musi
Kudzidza kuita rudo rwake
Ano tinzwa Apo tinokwidza
Minamato, zve nenzwiyo nzedu

Chitinzwayi Tenzi wemapasi
Nemutsa chinzwayi vana venyu
Tonderayi nechitsidzo chenyu
Pangidzayi vanhu tsitsi dzenyu

Baba imwi muri vimbo yeduMunotirwira, M’notungamiraMuri m’chengeti wedu mu’penyuNgandiwe wenyu narini Baba

hymns.title: Mutsa Wake Werudo
hymns.lyrics:
Muka mwoyo murufara, Imba rukudzo rwaTenzi
Anoda ndimuimbire, Mutsa wake wakanaka

Akandivona muzvivi, Akandidisisa kwazvo
Ndiye akandiponesa, Mutsa wakanaka

Kana mukati memhandu, Kana pasi rindishore
Anotungamira mweya, Mutsa wake wakanaka

Kanapo matambudziko, Azowandisisa seyi
O mira nemweya wangu, Mutsa wakanaka
hymns.chorus: Mutsa wake wakanaka, Mutsa wake wakanaka

hymns.title: Simukiranyi Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Simukiranyi Jesu, Warwi wem’chinjiko
Musimudze mureza, Musingaurasi
Mukunde nekukunda, Achitungamira
Mhandu dzese dzitize, Kristu iye Tenzi

Simukirayi Jesu, Wadainzwa uya
Pindayi mukukana, Nemusi wembiri
Warume m’musandiire, Kukana nemhandu
Singayi mudambudzo, Murwise nesimba

Simukirayi Jesu, Vimba simba rakeHondo ichakukunda, UsazvisimbireChipfekayi vhangeri, Namata urindeWodanwa kudambudzo, Usazoshayikwe

Simukirayi Jesu, Hondo ichaperaKune mhere yehondo, TichazokuriraKune achakurira, Opiwa chirembaAchatonga naMambo, Nekusingaperi

hymns.title: Varikupinda MuJerusalem Itsva
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiyani awo wanoungana, Pamberi pechigaro chaMwari
Wanokudzazve Jesu, Nemaropa eNyenye

Vakadavira m’zita raJesu, Vamwe vavo vachiri vaduku
Vakanzwa tsitsi dzake, Nemaropa eNyenye

Avo vakanzwa zvemadambudzo, Jesu wakavapa runyararo
Kuzorora mumweya, Nemaaropa eNyenye

Vakaita mubasa raJesu, Vakana kukana kwakanaka
Vachafara narini, Nemaropa eNyenye

Vaponeswa vamira panynza, Chitema kufa zvese zvapera
Rufarozve narini, Nemaropa eNyenye
hymns.chorus:
Varikupinda muJerusalem idzva, Vasambwa nemaropa eNyenye
Varikupinda muJerusalem idzva, Nemaropa eNyenye

hymns.title: Wakaneta Here?
hymns.lyrics:
Wakaneta watambudzwa mumwoyo here
Uya kuneni uwane zororo

Aneyi chinganditungamira kwaari?
Mavanga mumavoko nemakumbo

Anopfeka chiremba cherukudzo here?
Hunde chiremba cheidi chemhinzwa

Ndinowaneyi mukumutevera iye?
Nhamo nematambudziko mazhinji

Anondipeyi mukusimbira kwaari?
Anopedza urombo nekuchema

Iye anoramba kundigashira here?
Anokubvuma zvepasi zvapera

Anokomborera here mukumutsvaka
Vese vatsvene vopindura Hunde

hymns.title: Ona Tenzi Pamusiwo
hymns.lyrics:
Ona Tenzi pamusiwo!, Anogugudza zvinyoro
Yavenguva akamira, Usa shore Tenzi wako

Atitenga kwari zvese, Ndatama nenguvo chena
Zora maziso uone, Bvisa zvese zvakaipa

Inzwa inzwi’ro rembowo, Anokupa kusarudza
Iwe unodziya chete, Chigadzira nzira dzako

Basa rake ra’kupera, Tsitsi dzake dza’kupera
Akaipa nga’pezve, Anoera ayerezve

Muviri wake \‘nedova, Anokumirira iwe
Muka, zarura musiwo, Da’dza mudiwa apinde

Chimupinza mweni wako, Ugozorora maari
Ukumbanirane Naye, Ugozodya pamwe naye

hymns.title: Nyika Ye Kenani
hymns.lyrics:
Kune nyika yakanaka, Rufaro rwayo ngerwangu
Kune zuva rinopenya, Dima repasi rapera

Tenzi ozofamba neni, Kusangana kweukama!
Ndiye anotungamira, Munyika’yo yerufaro

Kunhuwira kwakanaka, Kunozobva kune miti
Nemaruva akanaka, Kune mvura yeupenyu

Denga rese rozara, Nenzwiyo dzakanaka kwazvo
Ngirosi dzoimba pamwepo, Nechita chevatsvene
hymns.chorus:
Nyika iyo yeKenani!, Ndinodisa kusvikayo
Ndichaona zvakanaka zvenyikayo iri yangu
Ine dzimba dzagadzirirwa ini iko kudenga

hymns.title: Rakakomborerwa Pfundo
hymns.lyrics:
Ngarikomborerwe, Pfundo-ro rerudo!
Rweukama hwe uKristu, sehwekumusoro

Pamberi pababa, To’nza minamato
Nedonzo, nezvidiso, zvedu zvese ngezvimwe

Tino’kowerana mitoro nenhamo!,
Tinonzwirana urombo mukutambudzika

Kuti tapatsana, Tinonzwa urombo
Kut’tine rusimbiro! Tichazo kumbana

hymns.title: Muka, Mwoyo, Muka!
hymns.lyrics:
Muka mwoyo wangu, Bvisa kutya kwese
Mupiro weropa vakapirwa ini
Ur’pamberi penyupo, Ur’pamberi penyu
zvino; Zita rangu raka nyorwa

Ari kumusoro, Kumirira ini
Nekundinunura, Neropa’ro rake
Iye Akatifira, Aparadza ropa rake
Riri pachigaro chemutsa

Madzvadzi mashanu, Epa Karivari
Ondinamatira, Nekundimirira
Oti musunungure, Otizve musunungure
Musarege mutadzi afe

Baba anomunzwa, Anoyera wake
Haanga musiyi, Mwana wake ega
Mweya wake wonzvika, Uchitaura uchiti
Wabarwa patsva kuna Mwari

hymns.title: Uya Kuna Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Kuna Jesu, kuna Jesu, Kuna Jesu zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu,Kuna Jesu zvino

Kuponeswa, kuponeswa,Kuponeswa zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu,Kuponeswa zvino

Akwanisa, akwanisa,Akwanisa zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu, Akwanisa zvino

Wadaidzwa, wadaidzwa, Wadaidzwa zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu,Arindira zvino

Arindira, arindira,Arindira zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu, Arindira zvino

Musimbire, musimbire,Musimbire zvino
Zvino uya kuna Jesu,Musimbire zvino

Komborerwa, kombrerwa,Komborerwa zvino;
Zvino uya kuna Jesu,Komborerwa zvino;

hymns.title: Hakuna Zita SeraJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Tinoda zita raJesu, Kukunda amwe ese
Rinozadza wekudenga, Rinofadza vepasi

Hakunazve rimwe zita, Kana mwoyo wasuwa
Hakunazve rimwe zita, Kana mwoyo wofara

Ndinovimba ndicham’ona, Ouya ane mbiri
Ndinovimba ndichatorwa, Mweya wangu wofara

Kuti achida ndishande, Mumunda make Tenzi
Ndoda andikomborere, Mumazvi nemabasa

Kana oda kuti ndife, Ndingafire kwaari
Ndoda kuti ndisimbire, Nekugara kwaari
hymns.chorus:
Zita rake rinokunda amwe ese
Zita rake rinokunda amwe ese

hymns.title: Taura Inzvi Rimwe RaJesu
hymns.lyrics:
Inzvi rimwe raJesu, Shamwari yeidi
Tiudze tifare, Zvaakakuitira

Inzvi rimwe naJesu, Kwete muchinjiko
Netsitsi tichapinda, Kumusha wedenga

Inzvi rimwe naJesu,Kwete muchinjiko
Uti ndinoda Tenzi,Akandifirawo

Inzvi rimwe naJesu, Usinganonoki
Unyope mubasa,Hwunounza urombo

Inzvi rimwe naJesu, Kana wonyorova
Simuka mukuneta, Anokusimbisa
hymns.chorus:
Inzvi rimwe naJesu, rinotibatsira
Inzvi duku naJesu, imba unamate

hymns.title: Ridza Matare Ekudenga
hymns.lyrics:
Ridzanyi matare kune rufaro!
Mweya wapumhuka wadzoka
Baba wom’gashira ari munzira
Omugashira mwana wake

Ridzanyi matare kune rufaro!
Mupumhuki agashirwazve
Mweya waponeswa kubva muzvivi
Wabarwa patsva aponeswa

Ridzanyi matare kune mutambo!Ne ngirosi ngadzi imbewoVaudze rufaro usvike kweseMunyangadzi abarwa patsva
hymns.chorus:
Mbiri ngirosi dzinoimba
Mbiri marimba anorira
Hondo yekudenga senyanza huru
Yoimba vasununguka

hymns.title: Jesu WeNazareta Arikupfuura
hymns.lyrics:
Wungano iyi ngeyenyi, Irikukasika kwazvo?
Kuungana nguva dzese Mhere mhere’yi ngeyenyi
Ungano yakapindura,Ndi Jesu ari kupfuura
Ungano yakapindura,Ndi Jesu ari kupfuura

Ndiyaniko uyu Jesu, Anomhanyirwa nevese?
Mweninyiko anogona, Kutora ungano yese?
Manzvi akapindura zve,Ndi Jesu arikupfuura
Manzvi akapindura zve,Ndi Jesu arikupfuura

Jesu! uya ayifamba, Mukati mevane nhamo
Wachiunza kuna iye, Varwere kuzoponeswa
Bofu rakafara kunzwa, Ndi Jesu ari kupfuura
Bofu rakafara kunzwa, Ndi Jesu ari kupfuura

Anouya nzwimbo dzose, Tinoona tsoka dzake
Anotibatsira nekutiraramisa, Nguva dzose
Ngati simuke tidane Jesu weNazareta
Ngati simuke tidane Jesu weNazareta

Uyanyi vakaremerwa!, Kune musha nezororo
Nemwi makapumhuka, Uyayi muzopiwa tsitsi
Imwi vaedzwi vuyayi, Jesu weNazareta uyo
Imwi vaedzwi vuyayi, Jesu weNazareta uyo

Kana woramba kudanwa, Uchiramba rudo rwake
Uchafuratirwa naye, Iwe urikumuramba
Vanonoka vanonoka, Jesu weNazareta apfuura
Vanonoka vanonoka, Jesu weNazareta apfuura

hymns.title: Kwasara Makumi Mapfumbamwe
hymns.lyrics:
Kwakasara makumi mapfumbamwe, Mudanga iro rehwayi
Imwe yarasika kure, Kubva pazambararo rendarama
Kure kumakomo anotonhora, Kubva kune mufudzi vakanaka
Kure kune mufudzi vakanaka

Makumi mapfumbamwe ari pano, Haanga kwaniri here?
Mufudzi akati imwe hapana, Yakapumhukira musango
Kana nzira yakashatisa sei, Ndo’enda kugwenga kundotsvaka
Ndoenda kugwenga, kundotsvaka

Vaponeswa havazivi udzamuhwu,
Hwemvurayo, yakabirwa Kuti awane hwayi yake,
Kure kure kugwenga yakachema Yavapetyo nekuda kuti ife
Kure Kure kugwenga yakachema  Yavapetyo nekuda kuti ife

Tenzi iri ropa rabvakupiko, Rataona pamakomo
Rakateukira akarasika Asi mufudzi amudzora
Kongenyi maoko ane madzvadzi, Akabaiwa neminzwa usiku
Akabaiwa neminzwa usiku

Makomo ese arikutinhira, Nekunzwika mumawere
Kudaidzira kunobva kudenga, Farayi hwai yaonekwa
Ngirosi dzinoimba pachigaro, Ngekuti hwayi yavamwa
Farayi ngekuti hwai yavanwa

hymns.title: Musakundwe Nezviyedzo
hymns.lyrics:
Musakundwe nezvi yedzo zvakaipa
Kukunda kumwe kunokupa simba
Kana semurume, Kunda ruchiva
Unangise Jesu, unobatsirwa

Rega shamwari nemanzwi enhando
Remekedza zita raMwari wako
Iva nepfungwa kwadzo zve nemutsa
Unangise Jesu, unobatsirwa

Vakurira vanopiwa chiremba
Tichazokurira nerudairo
Tinopiwa simba nam’ponesi
Unangise Jesu, unobatsirwa
hymns.chorus:
Kumbira muponesi, kuti akubatsire
Anoda kubatsira, unozobatsirwa

hymns.title: Kuchema Hakundi Ponesi
hymns.lyrics:
Handinga ponesvi, kana dai ndicheme,
Hazvinga bvisi kutya, Kana kubvisa zvivi,
Kuchema inhando

Basa \‘ribatsiri, kana zvandinoita,
Ne pfungwa dzakanaka, hadzi shanduri mweya;
Basa \‘ribatsiri

Kana kurindira, hakundi batsiriba
Asi kuti ndifire, tsitsi nemutsa wake,
Kurindir’ inhando

Chete rudairo, kana Kristu m’ponesi,
Nebasa Rake rese, Tibatsirenyi Tenzi,
Muti ponesewo
hymns.chorus:
Jesu akandifira, Pamuti akatambura;
Anondisunungura, Ndiye anogona

hymns.title: Mweya Yatambudzwa Uyai
hymns.lyrics:
Uya mweya yatambudzwa, Tenzi anemutsa,
Muchazopiwa zororo, Mukamusimbira

Jesu aparadza ropa, Kuti komborera
Chipinda zvino muropa, Kuti ucheneswe

Hunde Jesu ndiyo nzira, Idi nezororo,
Daira zvino kwaari, Unokomborerwa

Uya muchita choyera, Ugashire mutsa
Ugare munyika iyo, Izere rufaro
hymns.chorus:
Musimbire, musimbire, M’simbire zvino
Ane rudo ane rudo, Unoponeswa

hymns.title: Izraeri Mufudzi Akanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Tarisa Izraeri, Mufudzi weidi
Anodana zvakanaka, Hwai dzake duku!

Ati Dzibvumire, Kuti dziuye kwandiri
Ndiye anokomborera, Tenzi we ngirosi

Tinounza nekutenda,Tenzi chikotsayi
Zvinotava nerufaro,Tava wenyu chose

hymns.title: Kudza Zita RaJehova
Ndinomudai Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndinomudayi Jesu, Ndiri’ye murombo
Mweni ne mufambi, Handina neupfumi
Ndoda rudo rwaJesu, Ruzondinyaradza
Nekunditungamira, Muve simba rangu

Ndoda mwoyo waJesu, Mundipewo mutsa
Ndionese zviyedzo, Neurombo hwangu
