Ndinoda Mweya m’tsvene, Ugondidzidzisa
Undionese Jesu, Muponesi wangu

Ndinomudayi Jesu, Ndichamuonayi,
Muri murarabungu, Pachigaro chenyu,
Pamwe nevana venyu, Ndichafara kwazvo
Kuimba murukudzo, Nekuona Tenzi

hymns.title: Mwari Mubatsiri
hymns.lyrics:
Mwari mubatsiri wedu, Nesimbiro yedu
Bako redu munhamodzo, Musha une mbiri

Mubvutero reumambo, Ndoona zororo
Handingatyi nechiroba, Kuti ndii nemwi

Kare musati masika, Makomo, nepasi
Imwi makange mavapo, Moveko narini

Kwamuri churu, Chemakore chinofananaNeusiku humwe,Kana mangwanani mamwe

hymns.title: Mira Usingatenheki
hymns.lyrics:
Mira usingatenheki, Umire segomo
Mwey’ unosimbira Tenzi, Unosimba sedombo

Hakuna chimwe, Chingachengeta zvakanaka
Kupfuura maoko, Anerudo aJesu

Itirayi zvakanaka, Vanomusimbira
Vanozorora muidi,Varipamitemo

hymns.title: Kune Rudairo Rumwe
hymns.lyrics:
Kune rudairo rumwe,Handizhinjiba kwete
Rwuri chishangu chaMwari
Runoda mabasa chete

O Tenzi regererayi,Mtemo wenyu wasvibiswa;
Iwo wakachena asi,
Chitema chausvibisa

Sunungura kusachema, Bvisa kusachema m’mwoyo
Tibatsire kuchengeta
M’temo wenyu wese Tenzi

hymns.title: Tichasangana Mhiri Kwe Rwizi
hymns.lyrics:
Tichasangana parwizi, Uko kusina bopoto?
Kune kupenya narini, Nerufaro rwemweya

Tosangana pachitsuwa, Apo mhepo yazopera
Tosangana nerufaro, Pamahombekombeyo

Tozosangana kumusha, Kwazara nekupenya
Kwakavakwa nematombo, Nezvinokosha

Tozosangana naTenzi, Apo achauya pano?
Tingazive rudo rwake, Nekuzogara naye
hymns.chorus:
Tichazosangana, mhiriyo kweuru rwizi
Uko kusina dambudzo, Tosanganayo here?

hymns.title: Beulah Nyika Yakanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Ndiri kufamba munyika, Musina nechiro
Asi imwi makazadza, Nzira nemaruva
Nyika iyi yeBeulah, Yakanaka kwazvo
Nokuti ndinaye Tenzi, Zuva nesikati

Hakuna nebvute rose, Kana nedimazve
Mbiri yenyu inovepo, Zuva nevusiku
Nzvimbo dzakanaka, Dzinoimba nengirozi
Dzino nzvikwa kwese kwese, Dzondifadza ini

Ndozofamba murufaro, Kumusha wedenga
Mwoyo wangu unofara, Zuva nesikati
Mazambara ekudenga, Ndave petyo navo
Nekuti nzira iyoyi, Ndeye kumusoro
hymns.chorus:
Nyika yakanaka kwazvo, ndinoidisisa
Nyika iyi yechitsidzo ndiri kuivona

hymns.title: Mukana Wakanaka We Eden
hymns.lyrics:
Nyika yakanaka Eden
Kwakateramira
Mumwoyo yevakaneta
Munoiswa simba

Mumwoyo me anochema
Zuva rinopenya
Ngirosi dzoimba nzwiyo
Kubva kure kure

Ndiwo musha waM’ponesi
Nechita chasambwa
Pamapomhoyo embiri
Vanoimba rwiyo
hymns.chorus:
Nyika yakanaka Eden, Musha wevatswene
Ndinofamba mumaruva, Ndorota nezororo

hymns.title: Kristu Kana Baraba
hymns.lyrics:
Ndoiteyi naJesu, Ari mberi kwangu?
Anemhinzwa pam’soro, Ane nguwo tsvuku

Ndoregera gororo, Munhu anozvida
Kanakutizve Jesu, Uyo acharambwa?

Mubvunzo’yu mukuru, Ndopindura sei?
Mutsa unorindira, Uchiri kubvunda!

Ndozomira seyiko, Kana ndide pasi?
Kana nemwi maKristu, Murimuzviedzo

Zvino uyu mubvunzo,  Chinyi mupinduro?
Ndorovera Baraba, Ndiregere Jesu
Ndonorovera Baraba Ndichirega Jesu
Ndonorovera Baraba Ndichirega Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Zvino uyu m’bvunzo, Chinyi mupinduro?
Ndomurovera Jesu, Ndirege Baraba

hymns.title: Unzai Zvegumi Zvese Mudura
hymns.lyrics:
Inzva manzvi ematsamba ekare, Unzai zvegumi zvese mudura
Iva nechitsidzo chisingaperi, Chitsidzo chakecho Mwari

Unoda kuziva simba remudzimu, Unzai zvegumi zvese mudura
Nekunzwana naye nguva nenguva, Kukupa zvikomborero

Chinyi chapatsana nemwi naMwari? Unzai zvegumi zvese mudura
Zviunzei munzira inodikanwa, Adurire zvikomborero

Zvipire mwoyo kuna Tenzi Mambo, Wopa zvegumi zvese mudura
Simbirira kune zvitsidzo zvake, Umupe nemwoyo wose

Ngaanzvikwe maungira erwiyo, Tichiunza zvegumi mudura
Nerufaro Halelujah toimba, Totenda zvikomborero
hymns.chorus:
Unzai zvegumi zvose m’dura
Mundiedze, ati Jehova
Ndinomupa zvikomborero
Hauna nzvimbo yekuzvigashira

hymns.title: Zororo RaJehova
hymns.lyrics:
Musi wakomborerwa, Jehova azorora
Wechinomwe wevhiki, Wasarudzwa Mutsvene

Mwari wakapedzisa, Basa rake kusika
Ndizvo wakayerisa, Musi wake Sabata

Vamwe vakapindura, Vanoda wekutanga
Kuti idi munoda, Tsvakayi mumatsamba

Vese vane’di voti, Vanhu vakapindura
Mubhuku hamunaba Kuti vakapindura

Ndizvozvo ndakatsvaka, Ndakavona Sabata
Ndakatevera Mwari, Kuchengeta’ro idi
hymns.chorus:
Tinofara, Tinofara
Tinofara nemusi, zororo raJehova

hymns.title: Runyararo Mupasi Redima
hymns.lyrics:
Runyararo, mupasi redima? Ropa raJesu rozevezera

Runyararo, mumabasa ese? Kuita kuda kwake izororo

Runyararo, mumatambudziko? Pana Jesu towana zororo

Runyararo, hama dziri kure? Muna Jesu tose tochengetwa

Runyararo, hatizivi mberi? Asi Jesu ari pachigaro

Runyararo, mubvute rerufo Jesu abvisa rufo nesimba

Zvazokwana zvepasi zvaguma Jesu adaidzira kudenga

hymns.title: Jesu Ndokutewera
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu ndokutewera, Muri kundidaidza
Ndinouya kuenda, Nemwi kumusha’ko

Maziso angatadze,Makumbo akuhunwa
Ndaneta asi Imwi, Murisimba rangu

Urombo nekushaya, Zvitadzo zveubenzi
Zvingandiputsa, Asi ndinokutevera
hymns.chorus:
Ndokutevera, Ndokutevera
Ndokutevera kwese unoenda

hymns.title: Kusha Mbewu Dzemutsa
hymns.lyrics:
Ngati-ungeyi maranzi,Akaraswa munzira
Ngati chengeteyi mbeu, Ngatiraseyi hundi
Tiwane zororo redu, Tikomborerwe nhasi
Nemwoyo wekutivira,Bvisa mhinzwa munzira

Hatina hanya nerwiyo, Dakara rwazopera
Hatifariri maruva, Dakara azopera
Hationiba kunaka, Kwedenga muzhizha
Kana kuri patsanisa, Kunere muchirimo

Dai tichiziva, Kuti mwana angatonhorwa
Kuti asina kufuka, Zvisingatinetsiba
Mwana angaona here, Kuti takazarirwa
Kuti tingazarirwa here, Neminembo yeminwe

Minwe iyo yatonhora, Inoti tondedzazve
Nemabasa akaipa, Emunzira yekare
Inotitondedza seyi, Nezvakaipa zvedu
Tisazo kushe mhinzwaka, Asi maruva kwazvo
hymns.chorus:
Kusha mbewu dzemutsa, Kusha mbewu dzemutsa
Kusha mbewu dzemutsa, Tokohwa gare gare

hymns.title: Chinyararai
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi kuri kuvhuvhuta! Mananda atokwira!
Nedenga rese ratosviba, Hatina pekuvanda
Motirega here tife, Musarare tofa
Nguva yese yazara nengozi, Nenyanza yavaguva

Tenzi nemwey’ unorwadza!, Ndokotama kunemwi
Mwoyo wangu unotambura!, Muka mundiponese
O mananda echitema, Oda kundinyudza
Nda’kufa, nda’kufa Tenzi wangu, Kasika ndiponese

Tenzi kutya kwazopera, Zvese zvazozorora
Nenyanza yazoteramira, Denga razovapetyo
Chimiriranyi mununuri, Musandisiyeka
Ndichasvika kumahombekombe, Ndizorore ikoko
hymns.chorus:
Mananda anonditeerera, Nyarara
Kana kushatirwa kwenyanza
Mashavi kanavanhu, kana chiyi
Mvura hainganyudzi ngarava
Muna Tenzi wenyanza nepasi
Zvese zvichanditeerera
Nyararai, nyararai
Zvese zvichanditeerera, Nyararayi

hymns.title: Ndina Muponesi Anoshamisa
hymns.lyrics:
Ndina muponesi anoshamisa,  Anondishamisa ini
Anondiviga mubako redombo, Kune nzizi dzerufaro

Ndina muponesi anoshamisa, Anorerutsa mitoro
Anondimisa handizotenheki, Ndiye anondipa simba

Nguva dzese anondikomborera, Ndozadzwa nembiri yake
Mbiri kuna Mwari ndomuimbira, Ndiye mununuri wangu

Kuti ndapfeka mbiri ndozokwira, Tokumb’ naye m’makore
Ruponeso rudo runoshamisa, Toimba tese kudenga
hymns.chorus:
Anondiviga mubako redombo
Rinobvisa nyota yese
Aviga vupenyu murudo rwake
Ofukidza neruoko, Anondifukidza ini

hymns.title: Mununuri Wedu
hymns.lyrics:
Mununuri wedu anotioneka tose
Mutungamiri nemunyaradzi wedu

Mweni anotipa mweya, nekunaka kwose
Kuti aone mwoyo wekuzorora

Inzvi rake tinorinzwa, mumanheru ose
Rinonyaradza nekuonesa denga

Zvese zvimiro tinazvo nekuriro dzese
Nepfungwa dzese dzinoyera ndedzake

Netsitsi dzake dzione, kunyorova kwedu
Garaivo nesu tifanane nemwi

hymns.title: Nyangwe Zvitema Zvatsvuka
hymns.lyrics:
Nyangwe zvitema zvatsvuka, Zvichachena sechando
Nyangwe zvitema zvatsvuka, Zvichachena sechando
Kana zvatsvuka sengura, Zvichacheneswa,
Nyangwe zvitema zvatsvuka
Nyangwe zvitema zvatsvuka, Zvichachena sechandoZvichachena sechando

Inzvi rinokudaidza: Dzokera kuna Mwari
Inzvi rinokudaidza: Dzokera kuna Mwari
Anemutsa mukuru, Ane rudo zve
Inzvi rinokudaidza
Inzvi rinokudaidza: Dzokera kuna Mwari
Dzokera kuna Mwari

Achakukanganwira, Zvitema zvako zvose
Agozvi kanganwa zvese, Zvitema zvako zvese
Tarisai kwandiri, Mwari adaro
Achakukanganwira
AchakukanganwiraZvitema zvako zvese,
Achazozvikanganwa

hymns.title: Kandirayi Tambo Yeupenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Kandirayi Tambo yeupenyu, Kune hama’yo tingaponeswe
Hama yomumwe, ndiyani zvino, Angakande tambo yorubatsiro

Kandirayi tambo kasikayi, Seyi muchimira nguva huru?
Onayi onyura, kasikayi, Pindayi nengarava yeupenyu

Vakandireyi varimungozi, Avo vavakunyura munyanza
Mananda ezviyedzo nenhamo, Achavakandira’ko kwakadzama

Nguva yokununura yopera, Vachayenda kure iye zvino
Hama, kasika usanonoke, Chivakandira tambo youpenyu
hymns.chorus:
Chibatsirayi! Chibatsirayi!, Umwe anorasika
Chibatsirayi! Chibatsirayi!, Umwe ari kunyura

hymns.title: Tsamira Mumaoko A Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Tsamira maoko aJesu, Unobatsirwa, batsirwazve
Kuti uchimusimbirazve, Uchazofara

Tsamira maoko aJesu, Anokujekesera nzira
Chimutevera nerufaro, Inzva inzvi rake

Tsamira maoko aJesu, Unza matambudziko ako
Mutoro unokuremera, Ipa kuna Tenzi

Tsamira maoko aJesu, Zvino chisiya zvese kw’ari
Ane mutsa, anerudozve, Anoona zvese
hymns.chorus:
Tsamira mumaoko ake, Simbira murudo netsitsi
Tarisa kudenga kumusha, Tsamira kuna Jesu

hymns.title: Ndina Mponesi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndina mponesi anondimirira, Kana ndisina shamwari dzepasi
Anondichengeta, nemutsa ne nyasha, Dano Tenzi vangu varivakowo

Ndinaye Baba, akandipa ini, Tariro yeupenyu iri idi
Achandidaidza kwaari kudenga, O daro arega ndauya newe!

Ndine nguwo yakachena kwazvowo!, Yakarindira kuti ndiyione!
O kuti ndoyigashira ichipenya, Newe ungagashira yako here?

Ndakapiwa runyararo idi, Urwovo shamwari dzenyika dzisina
Muvambi nemupi wacho ndiJesu, Namatira ur’ piwezve newevo

Jesu akuwana, udzawo vamwe, Kuti Jesu ndi Muponesi wako
Namata, Jesu avaunze kumbira, Unopindurwa, sezvo ndapindurwa
hymns.chorus: Ndokunamatira, Ndokunamatira, Ndokunamatira, Ndokunamatira

hymns.title: Upenyu! Kupi?
hymns.lyrics:
Upenyu kupi? Hwuri mumweya
Mubopoto, mukunyarara hwurimo
Mubvunz’ unotyisa, upenyu! Kupi?
Mubvunz’ unotyisa, upenyu! Kupi?

Upenyu kupi? O! Upenyu! Kupi?
Mumbiri nevapona? Kana kuraswa?
Muchimwe cheizvi, Upenyu! Kupi?
Muchimwe cheizvi, Upenyu! Kupi?

Upenyu! Kupi?, Ingakowere seyi
Murufaro rusina idi rwenyiko
Gadzira mubvunzo, Upenyu? Kupi?
Gadzira mubvunzo, Upenyu? Kupi?

Upenyu! Kupi?, O shamwari funga
Nekukasika, Mwari achatonga
Nhas’ ungamisire, Upenyu! Kupi?
Nhas’ ungamisire, Upenyu! Kupi?

Upenyu! Kupi?, O! Upenyu! Kupi?
Usarare kana kufadzwa nenyika
Funga nemubvunzo, Upenyu! Kupi?
Funga nemubvunzo, Upenyu! Kupi?

hymns.title: Kudaidza Iwe Neni
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu M’ponesi weBeterehem! Waberekwa m’urombo, mudanga
O cha’va chiro chinoshamisa, Kutsvaka iwe neni
Kutsvak’ iwe neni, Kutsvak’ iwe neni
O cha’va chiro chinoshamisa, Kutsvak’ iwe neni

Jesu M’ponesi paKarivari, Waripa m’ngava ndasunungurwa
O cha’va chiro chinoshamisa, Kundifira ini
Kundifira ini,  Kundifira ini
O cha’va chiro chinoshamisa, Kundifira ini

Jesu M’ponesi, uyo wekare Apo ndange ndichikupumhuka
Akanyengerera mweya wangu  Kudaidza ini
Kudaidza ini, Kudaidza ini
Akanyengerera mweya wangu, Kudaidza ini

Jesu M’ponesi odzika pasi Chitsidzo chakanaka tinoda
Ndichamuona odzika pasi, Odzikira ini
Odzikira ini, Odzikira ini
Ndichamuona odzika pasi Odzikira ini

hymns.title: Mwenje Titungamire
hymns.lyrics:
Mwenje, nditungamire, Mudima tungamira
Ndiri mudima,  Kure nemusha tungamira
Ndichengete, Handidi kuona zvirikure
Tsiko rimwe chete

Kare ndaisa kumbira, Kuti ndibatsirwe
Ndaizvisarudzira, Zvino nditungamire
Ndaidisa nzira inopenya
Ndaidada, ndikanganwireyi

Simba renyu randikomborera, Tungamira
Munzvimbo dzese, Dzakaipa, nedzakanaka,
Nengirosi dzichinyemwerera,Dzo ndaida,
Ndanga ndisinadzo

hymns.title: Nzira Yenyu Basi
hymns.lyrics:
Nzira yenyu basi, Kana inedima!
Ndibate ruoko, Ndipangidze nzira
Handingasarudzi, handinga giniba
Asi ndisarudzire, Kuti ndifambe nemwi

Umambo ndehwenyu, nenzira ndeyenyu
Musim’ ndoraswa, Baba m’kombe wangu
Zadza nerufaro, sezvamunoda imwi
Ndisarudzireyi sekuona kwenyu

Ndisarudzireyi, shamwari nezvese
Ndisarudzire hama, nhamo neupfumi
Ndisasarudzeba, zvikuru nezvese
Iva simba rangu, muchengeti wangu

hymns.title: Mwoyo Uneurombo Uyanyi
hymns.lyrics:
Mwoyo uneurombo, Mazis’ eubofu
Kuda’ra kunofadza, Jesu ane mwenje

Rufaro’rwo rwenyika, Harumbotigutsi
Rudo rune rufaro,  Nekuti harufi

Kristu anotipa, Kunyaradza kwedenga
Iwe wasara here? Pinduka upone

Runyararo nerudo, Rwake zvakadzama
Jokwe rake inyore, Inyore narini
hymns.chorus:
Uyayi o muno remerwa
Nemitoro’yo ndinomupa zororo
Torayi jokwe, mudzidze neni nekuti
Ndakapfava m’mwoyo, Muwane zororo remweya

hymns.title: Mambo Wedu
hymns.lyrics:
Ngoma dzakanakisa, Nemusi mutsvene
Tinotenda M’ponesi, Upenyu nenzira

Waidisa vapwere, Apo ari pasi
Kana ari kudenga, Achirukutida

Tinoda kumukudza, Nekunzwa nenyaya
Dzake achirimo, MuGarire rekare

O Tenzi muponesi,  Tomupfugamira
Kuti muti batsire, Kuponera imwi
hymns.chorus:
Tenda, Tenda, Muponesi wedu
Tenda, Tenda, Tenda mambo wedu

hymns.title: Inopenya Iye Zvino
hymns.chorus:
Inopenya, iye zvino, Ichikupenya nyenyedzi!
Inopenya, iye zvino, Yeruponeso, nyenyedzi

hymns.title: Inzwa Mazwi Aterere
hymns.lyrics:
Inzva manzvi aterere, Anoimbwa kudenga
Jesu anotonga pasi Denga rose rofara
Agerepo pachigaro, Jesu otonga pasi
Hariruya! Hariruya! Hariruya! Amen

Mambo otonga narini, Ngaatonge narini
Hakun’ acham’patsanisa, Neawo makanemba
Zvisikwa zvetsitsi dzenyu, Zvamirira kum’ona
Hariruya! Hariruya! Hariruya! Amen

Kasikayi muponesi, Unzayi zuva renyu
Kuti mhere yozoridzwa,  Pasi rinozopfu’ra
Tochiimba nemarimba,  Mbiri kuna mambo wedu
Hariruya! Hariruya!  Hariruya! Amen

hymns.title: Mumwe Achapinda Ne Mazambara
hymns.lyrics:
Mumw’ achapinda nezambara, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Kune mbiri yandamirira, Ndiwe here, Ndini here?
Mumwe \‘chafamba pandarama, Kune miono yakanaka
Todya rufaro rwataurwa, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ achatura muchinjiko, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Vamwe vachapiwa ndarama,  Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achazoona mambo, Matambudziko azopera
Ozofara naye narini, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ achapfigirwa musiwo, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Inzvi roti handikuzivi, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achadana, haanzvikwi, Otambura m’siwo wapfigwa
Mumwe oshaya mubairo, Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

Mumw’ anoimba rukuriro, Gare, gare, gare, gare
Tomukudza nevaponeswa,  Ndiwe here? Ndini here?
Mumwe achazochingamidza, Vadiwa vepasi rapfuura
Tozova mumbiri narini,  Ndiwe here? Ndini here?

hymns.title: Mazuva Opfuura
hymns.lyrics:
Kune mwoyo asurukirwa, mazuva opfuura
Kane mwoyo yakaneta, mazuva opfuura
Kana tichingafara, tiri murwendo rwedu
Tiite zvakanaka, mazuva opfuura

Hakuchina kutukana, mazuva opfuura
Reg’ usu hwako hwupenye, mazuva opfuura
Pasi rineurombo, rizere nekuchema
Simudza vaputsika, mazuva opfuura

Mapfundo ese erudo, mazuva opfuura
Toasiya mumasure, mazuva opfuura
Mbeu’dzo tinodya, Dzinovamba kukura
Dzojekesa mumwoyo, mazuva opfuura
hymns.chorus:
Opfu’ra, opfu’ra, opfu’ra, opfu’ra
Tiite zvakanaka, mazuva opfu’ra

hymns.title: Kune Nzvimbo Yakanaka
hymns.lyrics:
Kune nzvimbo yakanaka, Petyo pana Baba
Nzvimbo isina chitema , Petyo kuna Baba

Kune nzvimbo yerufaro, Petyo kuna Baba
Apo takumbana Naye, Petyo kuna Baba

Kune nzvimbo yezororo, Petyo kuna Baba
Nzvimbo iyo yerufaro, Petyo kuna Baba
hymns.chorus:
O Jesu Mununuri, makatuma pasi
Mutisvededze isu, petyo kuna Baba

hymns.title: O Nditakure
hymns.lyrics:
Ndoona rini’ko musi, Apo vaponeswa Vaswika Zioni
Musha werufaro kwazvo

O ndichanzva Hariruya, Rwoimbwa nechita
Nerufaro chichaimba, Rwiyo rwenunuro

Onayi mbiri yosvika, Iyo m’fambi anoda
Inonyaradza vachemi, Rufaro rwosvika
hymns.chorus:
O nditakure, nditakure, kuZioni
O chinditakura kuguta’ro revatsvene

hymns.title: Mukuyedzwa Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Mukuyedzwa, Jesu ndimirireyi
Tenzi kuti ini, ndisamusiye
Kuti ndotenheka, nditsiureyi
Musandibvumire, kuputsikazve

Pasi nerufaro, Rwakarambidzwa
Neupfumi hwaro, Zvisandi ku’adza
Mugonditondedza neGetsimani
Kana muchinjiko, weKarivari

Kana ’mi maunza, urombo, nhamo
Kana ndirwadziwe, munzira pasi
Bvumira ndione, r’woko rwenyu
Bvumirayi kuti ndimusimbire

hymns.title: Wakaunza Zvipo Kuna jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Vaunza kuna Jesu, zvipo zvavo zvese
Rudo kuna M’ponesi, Rwaita vamupe
Manzvi ese emutsa, kubatsira vamwe
Zvese-zvo zvipo zvavo akazvigashira

Pakange pane m’fambi, ayidawo kupa
Akaonawo zvipo, zvo vaipa Tenzi
Ayidisa zvikuru kuti ape chipo
Akamirawo petyo asina nechiro

Achema ati, Tenzi ndimwi mune mutsa
Tora zvese, ndinazvo, nemwoyo wechivi
Jesu akapindura, Chikuru chipo chako
Kupinda zvimwe zvese, zvaunzwa kuneni
hymns.chorus:
Waunza kuna Jesu, chipo chakanaka!
Ita, Ndamupa mwoyo, pamakumbo ako

hymns.title: Nditoreyi Ini
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu Tenzi ndinochema, Ndofa asi m’kabatsira
O unzayi ruponeso, Nditoreyi ini

Handinaka rubatsiro, Asi imwi mandifira
Mungandi’te zvamunoda, Nditoreyi ini

Hapana zvandagadzira, Zvitsidzo zvangu ndotyora
Asi ndiponeseyiwo, Nditoreyi ini

Ndiri pamakumbo enyu, Ndiiteyi sezvamunoda
Pedzisayi basa renyu, Nditoreyi Tenzi

Kuti ndibate nesimba, Ndimutsirireyi mwoyo
Ndichaita kuda kwenyu, Nditoreyi Tenzi

Kana basa razopera, Hondo yepasi yapera
Ndinozokuchemerayi, Nditoreyi Tenzi
hymns.chorus:
Nditoreyi im’! Nditoreyi ini!
Kristu wandifira ini, nditoreyi ini

hymns.title: Tinofara Kubatira Tenzi
hymns.lyrics:
Tinofara kubatira Tenzi, Tinobvuma kumubatira
Basa iro Tenzi anotipa, Tinoita nekutendeka

Tinofara kuparadza shoko, Nerudo kune vanhu pasi
Jesu arikupenya kwaBaba, Anotipa zvikomborero

Nekupfava totevera Tenzi, Tinofamba nekuperera
Topangidza vamwe kuna Tenzi, Nevanyangadzi kugwayana
hymns.chorus:
Tomubatira, toenda mberi
Tine rufaro, Tomubatira
Pano mumunda wake

hymns.title: Yakafanira Nyenye
hymns.chorus:
Mbiri, Hariruya, Kudza Hariruya!
Mbiri, Hariruya! Kunyenye.

hymns.title: Mawoko Maviri
hymns.lyrics:
Ndichazo musevenzera Jesu
Ndomutenda nemuromo
Nzeve dzangu dzichazomunzwa
Ndomuimbira neinzwi

Ndichazofamba munzira yake
Inoenda kudenga’yo
Maziso kufunda Bhaibheri
Nerudo rwake Kristu

Ndine mwoyo wekumupa Jesu
Mweya umwe aponese
Upenyu humwe murusando
Zvese zvangu ngezvakewo
hymns.chorus:
Tenzi tinouya,
Tinouya tiri vana
Tenzi tinouya,
Tidzidze nemi

hymns.title: Gogo, Gogo
hymns.lyrics:
Gogo, gogo, ndiani? Arindira akanaka!
Mufambi weumambo zve Asati awonekwa
A! mweya wangu, zaruravo mwoyo
Chishamiso chipinde’mo mukati

Gogo, gogo, Achipo, Arindira, Oshamisa
Handinyore kuzarura, zvo zvite zvakurisa
Zvadzikisa midzi yazvo, Kutenderedza
m’siwo; Kuti usazarure

Gogo, gogo, Achipo? Arindira, Akanaka
Anogogodza musiwo, nechiremba
chemhinzwa; Arindira nemutsa, Tenzi
akarindira; Woreg’ aripo here

hymns.title: Fukidzwa Neupenyu Hwake
hymns.lyrics:
Nangisa Jesu, Hana chitema;Upenyu hwake, hwapiwe’ni
Upenyu hwangu nechitema, Hwafukwa nehwake kuchena

Zvironda zvechitema zvadzama, Zvakatsvuka, Mweya unotya
O kufukidzwa nemwi Jesu, Ndosunungurwa nemutemo

Ndoda kuziva rusununguro! Jesu ondipa nguwo chena
Ndaigashira, yangu ndarasa, Ndinopfeka upenyu hwenyu

Ndadzorerwa nerufo rwangu, Ndaruramiswa nemwi Tenzi
Ndaereswa neinzwi renyu, Ndozogashira mbiri yenyu
hymns.chorus:
Ndofukidzwa neupenyu hwake
Ndozoziva upenyu hwese
Upenyu hwangu hwechitema
Hwafukwa nehwake huchena

hymns.title: Da’Dzira Hondo
hymns.lyrics:
Da’Dzira Hondo, mhandu yapetyo, Sim’dza mureza waTenzi
Pfeka chishangu, Simbayi mese, Simbirayi painzwi rake

Farayi mukumbane nemhandu, Idi rinokurirazve
Chishangu nemureza zvipenye, Tichakurira, hatitadzi

O Mwari wevese chitinzwayi, Tibatsireyi netsitsi
Hondo yazopera, takurira, Tingazopfekawo zviremba
hymns.chorus:
Vakani simudzayi mureza
Gadzirira, nyeweranayi
Enda mberi, Daidza Hosana!
Kristu m’tungamiri wehondo

hymns.title: Nditungamire Muponesi
hymns.lyrics:
Tenzi nditungamire, Munzira yangu yose
Ndachengetwa, ndinemwi, Ndichagara murudo

Muribako’ro rangu, Cham’pupuri chauya
Handizotyi ndinemwi, Ndinosimbira imwi

Ndisvitse kumagumo, Cham’pupuri chapera
Ndozosvika nyika’yo, Masodzi opukutwa
hymns.chorus:
Tenzi, kuti ndisarasike m’nzira
Mukuchinja kwenguva, Nditungamire Tenzi

hymns.title: Zvakaroverwa Pamuchinjiko
hymns.lyrics:
Kwava noumwe wakafa panzwimbo yangu, Kuti mweya sowang’ upone
Wabvuma kufamba m’nzira yemuchinjiko, Kuti asunungure ini

Anemutsa, rudo, nenyasha kuneni, Anochenesa mwoyo wangu
Handichina kuraswa, ngasununguka, Zvaroverwa pam’chinjiko

Ndichabatirira kuna muponesi, Ndichafara ndiri murwendo
Ndine rwiyo momwoyo nepamuromo, Zvitema zvangu zvazobviswa

hymns.title: Handichina Nechangu, Zvese Ngezvenyu
hymns.lyrics:
Inguva inorwadza, Zvakadini yeurombo
Apo ndati kuna Jesu, Zvese zvese ndezvangu
Hapana nechenyuba, Zvese zvese ndezvangu
Apo ndati kuna Jesu, Hapana nechenyuba

Asi’ ye akandiwana, Ndakam’vona pamuti
Nemwoyo wangu ukati, Zvino zvimwe ndezvangu
Nezvimwevo ndezvako, Zvino zvimwe ndezvangu
Nemwoyo wangu ukati, Nezvimwe ndezvako

Misi yose mutsa wake, Unondibatsira, wondipfavisa
Ndichiti zvangu zvova zvishoma,  Zvako zvova zvizhinji
Zvangu zvava zvishoma, Wondipfavisa ndichiti
Zvako zvava zvizhinji

Rudo rwenyu rwakakwira, Nekudzama kupinda
Nyanza nedenga zvino-ka, Handichina nechangu
Zvese zvazova zvenyu, Handichina nechangu
Zvese zvazova zvenyu, Tenzi rudo rwakurira

hymns.title: Garai Makafara
hymns.lyrics:
Mwoyo yedu ngaifare, Tinogununguneyi
Kana ivo Baba vedu, Vachingotichengeta?

Apo achitungamira, Kana izvo zvitema
Zvinozotikurirazve, Jesu anotibatsira

Kana tichirega basa, Tino rwadziwa mwoyo
Mumvuri unoswedera, Kuzodzinga rufaro

O! vatsvene vanogara, Vachifarisisazve
Nzira yavo inopenya, Idayi zvakanaka
hymns.chorus:
Ngatifare, ngatifare, Tinovona kupenya
Nzira yebasa yakanakisa, Kana tichifara

hymns.title: Zororo Ravakaneta
hymns.lyrics:
Kune musha wevatsvene, Vozorora munyika
Uko muponesi wangu, Akandigadzirira

Andigadzirira imba, Inogara narini
Kwandichazogara hangu, Kunyika iyo itsva

Hakuzovi nekurwara, Hakunazve urombo
Asi ndicha pfekedzwazve, Chiremba cheupenyu

Hakuzovi norufu zve, Rumborera ruchabva,
Vaponeswa vachafara kuna Jesu ouya.

Imbayi vadyi venhaka, Farai muchienda
Muchazozarurirwazve, Mazambara eZioni
hymns.chorus:
Kune zororo ikoko, kunezororo ikoko
Kune zororo ikoko, ravakaneta
Pamhendero yeJordani, Nemumunda weEdeni
Panomuti weupenyu kunezororo

hymns.title: Letsa phala Molebeli
hymns.chorus:
U e letse molebeli, E utloahale hole...
Molimo O ea u roma, lokolla ba litlamong.

hymns.title: Morena O Se A Le Monyako
hymns.chorus:
Monyako... monyako; Morena O teng monyako;
O ea tla... O ea tla O se A le monyako.

hymns.title: Fahleho Li Tla Bonana
hymns.chorus:
Fahleho li tla bonana ka nqane ho sebaka,
Fahleho li tla bonana, le Jesu Mopholosi.

hymns.title: O Ea Tla
hymns.chorus:
O ea tla, O ea tla kapele, O tla lefats’eng lena hape;
Baeti ba khathetseng ba tla ea khanyeng, ha ’Moloki A tla ho busa.

hymns.title: Na Hae Ho Sa Le Hole?
hymns.lyrics:
Na hae ho sa le hole na? Ke botsitse molebeli,
A re bosiu bo ea fela; ’Me ho fihla meso,
Joale u se hlole u lla; Empa tsamaea akofa,
U tla fihla matsatsing ao, A se nang ho fela.

Ke botsitse bo lebotho, Pina ea lebotho e re;
“Re tla loana ka sebete, Ka lerumo feela.”
Joale o se hlole u lla, U mpe u mamelle ntoeng;
U tla fumana moputso, Ha u se u hlotse.

Ke botsitse lintho tsohle; Li re ka lentsoe le le leng:
“Nako e se e tla feta, Lehae le hlahe.”
Joale u se ke ua lla, Liponts’o li ntse li ata,
Tsohle li se li korotla, Li batla phomolo.

Hae ha ho sa le hole, Oho!khothala moeti;
Motsamai hlakola meokho, Tseleng ee pholileng,
Joale u se ke ua lla, Re tla kopana kapele;
Litlhopeho li felile, Motseng oo khutsitseng.

hymns.title: Lebelang Bahalaleli
hymns.chorus:
O ’a tla! Jesu Oa tla; bona! O tla A le khanyeng;
O tla ho busa ka hlolo, E oa tla Jesu Oa tla.

hymns.title: Mahakoe
hymns.chorus:
Tje ka naleli mesong,bona moqhakeng oa Hae;
Ba tla phatsima botleng, moqhakeng oa Hae.

hymns.title: Ha Lekolulo Le Lla
hymns.lyrics:
Ha lekolulo le se le lla, le nako e se feta,
Ho tla fihla tsatsi le emeng joalo.
Ba pholositsoeng lefats’eng, ba tla bokelloa bohle,
Ha ba bitsoa holimo ke tla ba teng.

Ka nako eo e ntle, ha ba se ba tsosoa bohle;
Ba tla ba le seemo se secha bohle,
Ba khethiloeng ha ba se ba bokeletsoa hona teng.
Ha ba bitsoa holimo ke ke tla ba teng,

Ha re sebeletseng Morena le be le likele;
Re bueng ka lerato la Morena,
Ha re eshoa mosebetsi oa rona o tla bo fela,
Ha ba bitsoa holimo ke tla ba teng.
hymns.chorus:
Ha ba bitsoa leholimong,
Haba bitsoa Leholimong
Ha ba bitsoa leholimong
Ha ba bitsoa holimo ke tla ba teng.

hymns.title: Letsang Lekolulo
hymns.chorus: O oa tla hape, O oa tla hape, Jesu O oa tla hape.

hymns.title: Na Re Tla Phutheha Nokeng?
hymns.chorus:
E re tla phutheha nokeng, eona e ntle, e ntle haholo-holo
Le bona bahalaleli, nokeng e mathang teroneng.

hymns.title: Ke Tla U Latela
hymns.chorus:
Ke tla latela ’Moloki, Ea nchoeteng sefapanong;
Leha ba bang ba u lahla, Ka mohau ke latele.

hymns.title: Ho Mohloli
hymns.lyrics:
Mohloli o teng oa mali, A tsoang ho ’’Moloki;
Baetsalibe ba kena teng, Ba hlatsuoe libe,
Ba hlatsuoe libe, Ba hlatsuoe libe,
Baetsalibe ba kena teng, Ba hlatsuoe libe.

Lesholu le shoang le’a thaba, Ho bona mohloli;
Le ’na ha ke le lits’ila, Nka hlapa selibeng,
Nka hlapa selibeng, Nka hlapa selibeng,
Le ’na ha ke le lits’ila, Nka hlapa selibeng.

Mali a Hao Konyana ’shoang, Ha a na le phokolo;
Ha bohle ba lopollotsoe, Ba pholosoe sebeng
Ba pholosoe sebeng, Ba pholosoe sebeng,
Ha bohle ba lopollotsoe, Ba pholosoe sebeng.

Haesale ke bone tumelo, mohloli o folisang;
Lerato la Hao le pelong, Ho fihlela ke ’shoa,
Ho fihlela ke ’shoa, Ho fihlela ke ’shoa,
Lerato la Hao le pelong, Ho fihlela ke ’shoa.

Morena O ntokiselitse, Leha ke sa ts’oanela;
Theko ea neo ea mali, “Bophelo ba gauda,”
Bophelo ba gauda, Bophelo ba gauda,
Theko ea neo ea mali, “Bophelo ba gauda.”

Ho teng pina e monate, Ke rorisa poloko;
Leleme le kokotletsang, Le nts’itsoe lebitleng.
Le nts’itsoe lebitleng, Le nts’itsoe lebitleng,
Leleme le kokotletsang, Le nts’itsoe lebitleng.

hymns.title: Ke Soeufale Joaloka Lehloa
hymns.chorus:
Ke, soeufale joaloka lehloa.
Ntlhatsoe ke soeufale joaloka lehloa.

hymns.title: Utloang Lipeni Li Ea Oa
hymns.lyrics:
Utloang peni lia oa, mamelang li ’oa;
Tsohle ke tsa Jesu, O tla li nka tsohle.

Ts’ere, ts’ere fela, mo liatlanyaneng,
Re li neha Jesu, re bana ba Hae.

Ka ha re le bana, re na le peni; ’e ha re holile, re tla eketsa.
Le ha li le ’nyane, re ea mo rata; O nka mpho ea rona, A
bososela.
hymns.chorus:
Ts’ere, ts’ere ts’ere, ts’ere, utloang li ea oa,
Tsohle ke tsa Jesu, O tla li nka tsohle.

hymns.title: Jesu Oa Nthata
hymns.chorus:
E Jes’oa nthata, E Jes’oa nthata,
E Jes’oa nthata, ke joetsoa lengolong.

hymns.title: Maotonyana A Hlokomele
hymns.chorus:
A maotonyana, A hlokomele,
Le leng le le leng; Le be ho Jesu.

hymns.title: Re Thaba Leratong
hymns.chorus:
Ke Molimo O tletseng lerato; Re ba Hae, re ts’oana le Eena,
Re thabisoa leratong; Tsela e bonolo
Le re Thusa le khopolong Ho ba mosa bathong.

hymns.title: Tsoelang Pele Bakreste
hymns.lyrics:
Tsoelang Pele bakrese ho ea mane ntoeng,
Fapano sa Jesu se le ka pele,
Kreste ke Molaoli, loants’ang le sera,
Tiisetsang Jesu Ke Eena ea fenyang.

Sera se baleha moo ho leng hlolo;
Masole hlomelang le ee ho loana,
Le bona bademona ba ’thothomela
Phahamisang mantsoe tlerolang.

Makhotla a matla tsosang kereke,
Baena hatang le bahalaleli
Ha ho karohano ke ’mele o mong
Kopano e teng ho eena leratong.

Ho shoele Marena, e, le ba matla,
Phutheho ea Jesu e eme joalo,
Mabitla a ke ke a bona hlolo
Re na le Morena ea sa hloleheng.

Tsoellang batho, a re kopaneng,
Ka mantsoe a rona pineng ea hlolo,
Khalalelo pooko ho Eena Kreste
E le ka ho sa feleng e tla ’ne binoe
hymns.chorus:
Tsoelang pele bakreste hona teng ntoeng,
Fapano sa Jesu se le ka pele.

hymns.title: Itlhokomele Moea Oa Ka
Tsoha Khothala Moea Oa Ka
hymns.lyrics:
Molimo O ea U bitsa, Ka lentsoe le utloalang;
Ke Eena ea fang moputso, Litakatsong tsa hao

Leru la lipaki le teng Le ka u bolokang
Lebala tse kamorao, Tsoela pele tseleng.

Ke ’Moloki Ea qalileng Lebelo la rona,
Re tla bea maotong a hae Moputso oa rona.

hymns.title: Ke’a Tla Sefapanong
hymns.chorus:
Ke ts’epile Morena, Konyana ea Golgotha;
Ke inama fapanong, Mpoloke Jesu joale.

hymns.title: E Le ’Na
hymns.lyrics:
Morena k’utloa ha ’ntse u nesa mahlohololo;
A khorisang ba nyoriloeng, le ’na hle a ka ’nele.

Ntate ea pelo-hlomohi, se mphete ’na molibe
Leha u ka mpheta hle ’se ntime lehlohonolo.

’Me leha ke le mosenyi fela ke hlolohetsoe
Lefats’e le ntsoareletse mpholose u ntsoarele.

Se mphete moea oa ’nete, khantsetsa le lifofu
Paka ka Jesu, bua lentsoe la khotso ka ho ’na.
hymns.chorus: E le ’na, e le ’na, a ke a ’nele le ’na.

hymns.title: Ntlatse Joale
hymns.chorus:
U ntlatse joale hle, Jesu tlo ntlatse joale;
Ntlatse ke boteng ba Hao, tlo U ntlatse hona joale.

hymns.title: Ke Ea U Hloka
hymns.lyrics:
Kea u hloka Jesu, Uena Mopholosi,
Lentsoe la hao Jesu, ke le khothatsang,

Kea U Hloka Jesu lula haufi le ’na
Teko ke ea li ’hlola ha u le haufi.

Kea U hloka Jesu, thabong le bohlokong;
Phakisa hle U tle, ’phelo ha se letho.

Kea U hloka Jesu, nthute thato ea hao,
U phethe ka ho ’na, lits’episo tsa hao.

Kea U hloka Jesu, moea ’halalelang,
Nketse oa hao ruri, mora oa Molimo.
hymns.chorus:
E Uena kea U hloka, ka linako tsohle
Mphe lehlohonolo, ke tla ho Uena.

hymns.title: Kea Inehela
hymns.lyrics:
Hohle Jesu ke inehela, Eena tokolohong;
Ke tla mo rata kamehla, ke ts’epe Eena feela.

Hohle ke inehela Jesu, ke khumama maotong;
Menyaka ea lefats’e, ke e lahlile nkuke hle.

Hohle k’inehela Jesu, ’Moloki nketse oa hao,
Ke utloe moea oa hao Jesu, ke tsebe hore O’aka.

Hohle k’inehela Jesu, ke utloa moea oa ’nete,
Thabo ea poloko, khalalelo lebitsong la Hae.
hymns.chorus:
Kea inehela, ke lahle tsohle;
Hohle ho Uena ’Moloki ea inehela.

hymns.title: Tje Ka Ha Ke Le Tje
Re Tsose Hape
hymns.lyrics:
Re ea u boka Molimo ka Mora,
Ka Jesu Ea shoeleng ’me A tsohile.

Re ea U boka Molimo ka moea,
Leseli le re bonts’itse ’Moloki.

Khalalello ho Konyana ’hlabiloeng,
Ee e jereng libe tsohle tsa rona.

Khalalelo ho Molim O mohau,
Eo A re rekileng, A ba re tsamaisa.

Re tsose hape re tlatse lerato,
Re tsosoe le ka mollo oa leholimo.
hymns.chorus:
Alleluya Khalalello Alleluya Amen,
Alleluya Khalalelo, Re tsose hape.

hymns.title: Nako Ho Itlhoekisa
hymns.lyrics:
U ke u nke nako ea ho itlhoekisa,
Bua le morena Lentsoeng la Hae;
Etsa setsoalle Thusa ba fokolang,
Se lebale letho masehong a Hae.

U ke u nke nako ea ho itlhoekisa,
Lefats’e lea luma, Bua le Jesu;
Ka ho sheba Jesu, Ts’oana le Eena,
Metsoalle ea hao E ’mone ho uena.

U ke u nke nako ea ho itlhoekisa,
A u etelle pele Linthong tsohle;
Thabong bofutsneng Latela Jesu,
U shebile Eena Le ho mo ts’epa.

U ke U nke nako ea ho itlhoekisa,
U ikhutse moeeng A u laele;
U tsamaisoe mehleng ea lerato
U tla ts’oanela ts’ebetso holimo.

hymns.title: Lula Le ’Na
hymns.lyrics:
Lula le ’na tsatsi le likele, ho ea ntsofala morena lula,
Ha ho teng bathusi le khothatso thuso ea bahloki lula le ’na.

Le bophelo bo feta ka pele, thabo le khanya ea fats’e lena,
Tsohle li’a feta li’ ea nyamela, uena ea sa feteng lula le ’na.

Ha ke kope le lentsoe le fetang, tje ka ha u na le barutuoa
Khothatso le kutloelo-bohloko, u se ke ua ntahla lula le ’na.

Ke u batla ka linako tsohle, matla a hao a fenya Satane
Ke mang ea nkalosang tje ka uena, bohlokong le thabong lula le’na.

Ha U le teng ke tleloa ke matla, le oona mahlomola ha a teng,
Ha ke ts’abe lefu le lebitla, ke lihotse ha u lula le’na.

hymns.title: Tsatsi Le Ea Likela
Tsatsi La Moea Oa Ka
Sets’abelo Tsatsing La Sefefo
hymns.lyrics:
Morena Fika la rona, le ’ts’abelo teng sefefong;
Re boloke teng likotsing, le letsatsing la sefefo.

Jesu moriti oa rona, Sets’abelo teng sefefong
Ha ho ts’abo le’a sera, sets’belo teng sefefong.

Moroallo leha o ka tla, Sets’abelo teng sefefong;
Re ipata ho Molimo, Sets’abelo teng sefefong.

Lefika lee le ratehang, Sets’abelo teng sefefong
Eena mothusi Oa rona, Sets’abelo teng sefefong.
hymns.chorus:
Lefika leo le leng matla, Moriti O teng mochesong;
Motsamaisi Oa rona, sets’abelo teng sefefong.

hymns.title: Oa Ntsamaisa
hymns.lyrics:
Oa ntsamaisa ho hotle, O nthomella mats’eliso,
Se ke se etsang hohle hae, Tsoho la hae lea nkhula.

Ha ke etsa le lefifing Kapa botleng ba Edene,
Botle, metsing le lifefong, Ke ntse ke huloa ke ntate.

Morena nka ts’oara atla sa hao ke sa belaele,
Ke thabile tseleng ea ka, Ha ke huloa ke Molimo.

Mosebetsi o felile, Hlolo ke neoa ka mohau,
Ha nka ke ka ts’aba lefu, Ke Molimo O nts’elisang.
hymns.chorus:
O! O! Eena ka sebele O ntataisa ka letsoho,
Ke eena Jesu ea nkhulang, Ke tla mo sala morao.

hymns.title: Ke Khotso Moeeng
hymns.lyrics:
Ha khotso e le teng tseleng ea ka, Ha bofutsana bo le teng;
Leha ho le joang, O nthutile hore ke re
Ke khotso moeeng oa ka.

Leha Satane a ntlela ka teko, Ke ba le monahano oo,
Hore Jesu O nkutloela bohloko;
O nts’olletse mali a Hae.

Le sebeng ke tletse le eona thabo, Sebe sa ka ka botlalo;
Se khokhothetsoe sefapanong sa Hae,
Boka Morena moea oa ka.

Jesu akofisa pono ea tumelo, Le ea ho tlosoa ha maru
Lekolilo le lle Morena ’theohe
Le teng esale khotso moeeng.
hymns.chorus:
Ke khotso...le moeeng...
Ke khotso
Ke khotso le moeeng.

hymns.title: Ho Its’etleha Matsohong A Sa Feleng
hymns.lyrics:
A setsoalle, le nyakallo, matsohong a sa feleng,
Lehlohonolo, le khotso ea ka, matsohong a sa feleng.

Monate ho tsamaea leetong, matsohong a sa feleng;
Ho khanya joang tseleng kamehla, matsohong a sa feleng.

Ke tla ts’oha eng ke ts’abe le eng matsohong a sa feleng?
Ke na le khotso ho Morena, matsohong a sa feleng.
hymns.chorus:
Its’etlehe (ho Jesu Morena) O bolokehe kahohle;
Itsetlehe (ho Jesu Morena) Matsohong a sa feleng.

hymns.title: Ke Talima Uena
Haufi Le Molimo
hymns.lyrics:
Haufi le Molimo—haufinyana! Leha sefapano se ka ntlisa,
Ke tla ’ne ke bine,--haufi le Molimo, Haufi le Molimo—Haufinyana!

Ke le molahlehi,--Ho se seli, Lefifi le ntahla—Ka sama lejoe,
Ke tla atamela haufi le Molimo Le moo torong ea ka—Haufinyana

Tsela a e hlahe –e nyolohang, Hohle moo nthomelang, --u ’nehe mohau,
Manyeloi a mpitsa—a re, ke finyelle, Haufi le Molimo—Haufinyane.

Monahanong oa ka—Ka leboha, Ke tsoa mahlomoleng—Ka ’ha Bethele,
Mahlomoleng a ka—Ke tla atamela, Haufi le Molimo—haufinyana.

Lapha se ngi phaphela phezulu, Se ngi dlule ilanga nenyanga
Ngohlabel’ ingoma, ngi bheke phezulu; Eduze, Nkosi yam’, ‘duze kuWe!

hymns.title: Emang Lefikeng
hymns.lyrics:
Tiisetsang ho Molimo lefats’eng, Le har’a meferefere eohle,
Ke eena fika le matla ’ohle. Ha sera se re loants’a.

Tiisetsang le emele ho loka, Le bete pelo, tieang tumelong,
Jesu ke eena ea tla le thusa, Melekong ea lefats’e.

Tiisetsang, emelang ’nete eohle, Leha bothata bole boholo,
Lefika ke lona le tla thusa, Har’a bothata bohle
hymns.chorus:
A re emeng fikeng, re tieng lefikeng, Fika la Jesu Kreste,
’Me ha re ka hlola, Re tla kopana, Ka har’a bohle teroneng.

hymns.title: Lefika Le Tiileng
hymns.lyrics:
Ke ts’epile Jesu feela, ke Eena lefika la ka;
Nke ke ka its’epa bo ’na, ke tsepile Eena feela.

Lefifi le teng pel’a ka, ke se otsele Morena.
Lifefo li ngata tseleng, tse ntahlisang le tumelo.

Lits’episo ke tse tiileng, ho bohle ba mo ts’epileng.
Leha ke le ea fokolang, Jesu ke sa U ts’epile.

Ha lekolillo le lla, ke tla ea le ’na ho Eena;
Ke apesoe khalalelo ke tle ke ts’oane le Eena.
hymns.chorus:
Jesu Kreste ke Lefika,
Hohle ho hong ho tla feta,
Hohle ho hong ho tla feta.

hymns.title: Ts’epa U Mamele
hymns.lyrics:
Ha re tsamaea le Morena leseling,
Khanya ee a e bonts’ang tseleng
Ha re phetha thato, O nts’a na le rona,
Le ba O ts’epang ba O mamelang.

Ha ho na moriti, Leha e le leru,
Li tlosoa ke ho bososela;
Ha ho pelaelo, ts’abo le likhapha,
Tse ka bang teng ha re mamela

Ha ho na le boima, Leha e le ts’abo;
Re putsoa haholo ts’ebetsong
Ha ho ts’enyehelo le hona ho hloenya,
Lehlohonolo le teng kutlong.

Ha re na ho supa, Thabo ratong la Hae
Ha re e eso ho lahle tsohle,
O bonts’a lerato, le eona thabo,
Ke tsa bao feela ba ts’epang.

Setsoalleng se setle, Re tla lula maotong,
Kapa re tsamaee le Eena
Ha bua re etse, Moo a romang re ee,
Ho se ts’abo ha e se kutlo.
hymns.chorus:
Ts’epa utloa, ha ho tsela e ’ngoe
Ea ho thaba ho Jesu, Ts’epa U mamele.

hymns.title: Molimo O Be Le Lona Bohle
Re Ke Ke Ra Arohana
hymns.lyrics:
Thabong re kopana le metsoalle ka nakonyana,
Empa ho tla ts’oabo ea hore re tla arohana.

Ts’epo e teng ha baratuoa ba re: “Salang hantle”
Ha tsohle li fetile; re tla lula teng kaofela.

Ha ho teng “salang—hantle,” lehaeng lane le letle,
Empa pina tsa thabo le khotso li tla binoa teng.
hymns.chorus:
Leholimong ha ho ’arohanoe; arohanoe;
Fats’eng le letle la thabo, ha ho arohanoe.

hymns.title: Ho Robala Ho Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Robala ts’epong ho Jesu,
Moo ho seng motho ea ka llang;
Khatholohong e monate,
Sera se ke ke sa u ts’osa.

Robala ho Jesu Hantle,
Uena mootseli joale!
Ea ts’epileng ho phomola,
Lehlohonolong kamehla.

Robala Khotsong Ea Hae!
Tsoho ea Hae e leng ts’epo;
Ha ho ts’abo, malimabe,
Hona matleng a ’Moloki.

Robala ’me u tla tsoha,
Ha lekolilo le tla lla;
U robe tlamo lebitleng,
U tsohe u le ea sa shoeng.

hymns.title: Ke Tla Mo Tseba
hymns.chorus:
Ke tla... mo tseba, ke tla mo tseba, ke pholositsoe,
Ke tla ema le Eena, A na le maqeba liatleng tsa Hae.

hymns.title: Mphe Bibele
hymns.lyrics:
Mphe Bibele naleli ea ho khanya,
Ho khothatsa molahlehi fefong;
Ha ho teng fefo see se ka le patang.
Hoba Jesu O tlil’lo pholosa.

Mphe Bibele molaetsa O ts’epehang,
Leseli la Hao le ntsamaise;
Molao, ts’episo lerato hammoho,
Ho fihlela bosiu bo nyamela.

Mphe Bibele ’me mponesetse tsela,
Nthute kotsi ea mebuso ena;
’Bone lane la poloko le tuke,
Le bonesetse tsela ea khotso.

Mphe Bibele lebone la bophelo,
Le phahamise ’bitleng le butsoeng;
Mponts’e leseli le tsoang leholimong,
Mponts’e khalalelo ea Jordane.

hymns.title: Mpinele ’Ona Hape
hymns.lyrics:
U mpinele ’ona Hape, mantsoe a bophelo,
Ke bone botle ba ’’ona, Mantsoe a bophelo,
Ke mantsoe a botle, A nthutang tumelo.

Jesu oa neha bohle, Mantsoe a bophelo,
Baetsalibe mamelang, Mantsoe a bophelo,
A fumanoa feela, A isa ho Jesu.

Ua bolele ho bohle, Mantsoe a bophelo,
A tlisa khotso ho bohle, mantsoe a bophelo,
Jesu ke ’Moloki, Eena re hloekisang.
hymns.chorus:
Ke mantsoe a matle ruri, a makatsang ruri,
Ke mantsoe a matle ruri, a makatsang ruri.

hymns.title: Nokeng Ea Jordane
hymns.chorus:
Re tla phomola lefats’eng le letle....(le letle)
Botaleng mane mose lebopong,
Re bina pina ea Moshe le Konyana,
Re be le Jesu hona teng.

hymns.title: Thabo Haufinyane
hymns.lyrics:
Thabo e tla ba teng qetellong, Ha bakotuli ba fihla,
Mantsiboea ka mangata, hona Jerusalema.

Lintle pina tse li tla binoang, Lipelo li tletse thabo,
Re boka Jesu morena Motseng oa Jerusalema

Hloeko thabo li re emetse, Meahong metle ea gauta;
Jesu O ea e lokisa, Hona teng Jerusalema.
hymns.chorus:
Thabo haufinyane, Thabo e sa feleng,
Thabo kapele bakotuli ba tla ea hae ’moho

hymns.title: Monahano O Monate
hymns.lyrics:
Ho tla monahano, ho ’na O monate;
Ke haufi le hae kajeno ho feta pele.

Haufi tlung ea Ntate, meahong e mengata.
Haufi moo Jesu a busang leoatleng le letle.

Ke haufi ho ea hae, Ke role moroalo,
Sefapano sa khathatso, ke roale moqhaka
hymns.chorus:
Haufi hae, lehae la ka;
Haufi hae kajeno ho feta pele.

hymns.title: Lefats’e Le Letle-Letle
hymns.lyrics:
Fats’e le teng le letle-letle, Tumelong le bonoa hojana,
Ntate O re lebeletse teng, O re lokisetsa litulo.

Re tla rorisa botle bola,Ka lipina tse nyakallatsang,
Ha re ka ke ra hlokofala, eseng ka baka la phomolo

Ho Ntate oa rona holimo, re tla isa pina tsa Pako,
Ka neo ea hae ea lerato, le matlotlo a khalalelo.
hymns.chorus:
Monateng kapele, re se re tla kopana bohle
Monateng kapele, re se re tla kopana bohe

hymns.title: Re Kolobetse
hymns.lyrics:
Re kolobetse ka matla a Hao, Ke lerato, la Morena ’Moloki.

Har’a ts’oanela, re silafetse Re hlatsoe moo ts’ileng ea sebe.

Moea oa leholimo theoha; Re kopa mohau re tle haufi.

Mamelang ’ntsoe le tsoang holimo, Le re: U moratuoa Oa nkhahlisa.
hymns.chorus: Re ea u rapela Morena Jesu, Ka ’rato le moea re kolobetse.

hymns.title: Mohloli Oa Mahlohonolo
Moea O Halalelang
Pelo E Hlatsoehileng
hymns.chorus:
Ntlhatsoe kantle le ka hare ka mollo;
Leha ho le joang ha ke hane, sebe sona se shoe ruri se

hymns.title: Na U Hlapile Maling
hymns.lyrics:
Na u tsoa ho Jesu ho ea hlapisoa,
U hlapile maling ’Konyana;
Na u ts’epile Eena kajeno na?
U hlapile maling ’Konyana.

Na u tsamaea le Eena ’Moloki?
U hlapile maling’Konyana?
Na u phomola ho ea thakhisitsoeng?
U hlapile maling ’Konyana?

Ha monyali a ’tla u tla ba motle?
U hlapile maling ’Konyana?
U itukeisetsa ho aha ’seling?
Le ho hlapa maling ’Konyana.

Lahla aparo tse tletseng lits’ila,
’Me u hlape maling a ’Konyana<brHo teng mohloli o hlatsoang le moea,
Tlo u hlape maling a ’Konyana.
hymns.chorus:
U hlapile maling,... malilng a hlapisang le moea?
Na aparo tsa hao li ntle li ea benya? U hlapile maling a
Konyana.

hymns.title: Ke Lelerile
hymns.lyrics:
Ke lelerile Morena, Ke se ke tla hae;
Tse tsa sebe ke li tetse , Nate U nthole.

Ke sentse lilemo tse ntle, Ke se ke tla hae.
Ketla ke lla ka likhapha, Ntate U nthole.

Ha ke ne ke lahlehile, Ke se ke tla hae,
U nkise teng leholimong; Ntate U nthole

Pelo ea ka e sitiloe, Ke se ke tla hae.
Joale ke fumane Jesu, Ntate U nthole.

Ke hloka mali a hae, Ke se ke tla hae;,
Ntlhapise ke soeufale, Ntate U nthole
hymns.chorus:
Ke tla hae, Ke tla hae,
Ha ke sa solla, Mpulele leholimo; Ntate U nthole.

hymns.title: Ea Utloang
hymns.lyrics:
Mang le mang, ea utloang a ke a re: “Tlo!
A hoe mantsoe a molemo fats’eng,
A bolele hohle moo ho leng batho,
Le ha e le mang a tle.

Leha e le mang ea tlang se liehe,
Joale tsela e butsoe u ka kena,
Jesu ke ’nete tsela e phelisang,
Le ha e le mang a tle

“Leha e le mang polokeho e teng,
Leha e le mang a lule le ruri,
Leha e le mang, bophelo ba ’nete;
Le ha e le mang a tle
hymns.chorus:
Le ha e le mang, le ha ele mang,
A bolelle bohle ba mona fats’eng,
Ntate oa bitsa, O re, \"ba tle hae,”
Le ha e le mang a tle.

hymns.title: Faphang Morena
hymns.lyrics:
Rorisang matla ’Jesu, Mageloi a iname;
Tlisang moqhaka ’borena, le faphe Morena,
Tlisang moqhaka ’borena, le faphe Morena.

Lona ba le khethiloeng, le le ba seng ba kae
Mo tlotleng ea le bolokang, le faphe Morena,
Mo tlotleng ea le bolokang, le faphe Morena

Mefuta eohle le lichaba, lefats’eng lena;
Bohle ba ke ba mo nee tlotlo, ba faphe Morena,
Bohle ba ke ba mo nee tlotlo, ba faphe Morena.

Le bahalaleli, mane oelang maotong a Hae,
Re bine ka ho sa feleng, re faphe Morena;
Re bine ka ho sa feleng, re faphe Morena.

hymns.title: Jesu Morati Oa Ka
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu morati oa ka, Ke fofela ho uena,
Ha lifefo li ntlela, Ke tleloa ke meroallo,
Mpate, ao! Moloki, Fefo se be se fete,
Ke kene polokehong, U be u nkamohele.

Ha ho ts’abelo se seng, Ke shebile ho uena,
Ao u se ke oa ntahla, Uena u mphahamise,
U ts’epo eohle ea ka, Thuso e tsoa ho uena,
U nkhurumetse hloho, Ka lipheo tsa hao.

Ke batla uena Kreste, Ho fetisa ntho tsohle,
U tsose le ba oeleng, U folise bakuli,
Ho halalela uena, ’Na ke moetsalibe,
Ke tletse ts’ila, sebe; U tletse khalalelo

U tletse khalalelo, E patang libe tsa ka,
Ho tle noka e folisang, U mpoloke bohloeking,
U noka ea bophelo, Ha ke noe tokolohong,
U mele pelong ea ka, Ke tsohele bophelong

hymns.title: Thabo Ea Pelo
Se Seng Ka Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Se seng ka Jesu, ho hong ka Jesu oa ka,
Se seng ka poloko ea Hae, se seng ha hoba A nchoetse.

hymns.title: Jesu Kea Ho Rata
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu kea U rata, kea tseba U oa ka; Ke lahla tsohe bothoto le sebe,
Mohauheli oa ka, ’Moloki oa ka, Ha ke U ratile Jesu, ke joale.

Ke U rata hoba U nthatile pele; Ua nthekela ts’oarelo sefapanong,
Ke U rata hoba u roetse meutloa, Ha ke U ratile Jesu ke joale.

Ke tla U rata bophelong le lefung; Ke tla u boka ha ke ntse ke phetse,
Leha serame sa lefu se le ho ’na, Ha ke U ratile Jesu ke joale.

Litulo tsa khalalelo le tsa thabo; Ke tla U roka hona leholimong,
’Me ke bine ke ntse ke roetse moqhaka, Ha ke u ratile Jesu ke joale.

hymns.title: Ke Fela Maling A Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ke’ng se ka ntlahtsoang sebeng? Ke fela mali a Jesu,
Ke eng se ka ntloekisa? Ke fela mali a Jesu.

Ke kae moo nka hlatsuoang? Ke fela maling a Jesu,
Ke kae moo nka ts’oareloang? Ke fela maling a Jesu.

Ha ho teng poelang—Ke fela maling a Jesu,
E seng ho lokeng ha ka—K e fela maling a Jesu.

Ts’epo ea ka le khotso ke fela maling a Jesu,
Ho loka hohle ha ka—Ke fela maling a Jesu.

Khanya! Khanya ke bina—Ke fela maling a Jesu,
Teboho tsee ke li fang—Ke fela maling a Jesu
hymns.chorus:
A! Kea ohlokoa a nketsang bosoeu,
Ha ke tsebe ho hong, Ke fela mali a Jesu.

hymns.title: Bolella Jesu
hymns.lyrics:
U khathetse, pelo e bohloko, bolella Jesu, bolella Jesu;
U soabile thabong tsee fetileng, bolella Jesu fe’la.

Na u sitoa ho thiba meokho, bolella Jesu, bolella Jesu
Na u na le libe tsee patiloeng, bolella Jesu fe’la.

Na u ts’aba masoabi a leng teng, bolella Jesu, bolella Jesu;
U chesehela ho tseba tse tlang, bolella Jesu fe’la.

U khathatsoa ke ho ts’oha lefu, bolella Jesu bolella Jesu,
Na u lakatsa ’muso oa Kreste, bolella Jesu fe’la.
hymns.chorus:
Bolella Jesu, bolella Jesu, ke motsoalle oa ’nete,
Ha ’teng motsoalle kapa moena, bolella Jesu fe’la.

hymns.title: Ho Hotle Ho Ts’epa Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Jesu, Jesu, ke ea mo ts’epa, Ke Mo lekile hohle;
Jesu, Jesu, ea molemo, ruri ke ts’epa Uena.

hymns.title: Le Monate Letsatsi
Re Ea Sione
Topollo
hymns.chorus:
Topollo! Topollo! E leng ka maling’konyana
Topollo, topollo, Ke ngoana Hae kamehla.

hymns.title: Re Tla Phomola Pela’ metsi
hymns.lyrics:
Re tla phomola pel’a metsi, Metsi a hloekileng;
Jesu re tla mo bona teng, O re lebeletse.

Ha re khathetse ke leeto, Re tla lula hantle,
Pel’a seliba sa bophelo, Seliba se secha.

Tlo ho Jesu Kreste u tiisoe, U tsebe ho ema,
Ke eena metsi a bophelo, Noa u se k’a nyoroa.
hymns.chorus:
Re tla phomola pel’a metsi, Re phomole pel’a metsi,
Re phomole pel’a metsi, A liba sa bophelo.

hymns.title: Re Tla Ema Joang Kahlolong
hymns.lyrics:
Ha Jesu a bokella lichaba, Pel’a Hae ho bonahala,
Re tla ema joang pe’la kahlolo, Tsatsing le leholo la tsoho.

Na re tla utloa ’Moloki ha a re: “Mohlanka ea bileng khabane”,
Kapa re tletse ts’abo le tepello, Re falalitsoe teroneng.

O tla bososela ha a ba bona; A bona lets’oao la Hae,
A ba apesa ka botle ba khanya, Ba khumama maotong a Hae.

A re falimeheng re be chalimong, Mabone a uke haholo;
Ha monyali a memela bohaling, Re be re itukisitse.

Lipelo li lebile leholimong, Ka mamello re emetse;
Ha ts’iu tsa bojaki li felile, Re tla itihela maotong a Hae
hymns.chorus:
O tla bokella koro seotlong, Empa ’moko o tla qhaloa;
Re tla ema joang pel’a kahlolo? Tsatsing le leholo la tsoho.

hymns.title: Na Ke Ngoliloe Teng?
hymns.chorus:
Na ke ngoliloe, teng bukeng e ts’oeu e ntle,
Bukeng ea ’muso oa Hau, Na ke ngoliloe teng?

hymns.title: Kahlolo E Beiloe
hymns.lyrics:
Kahlolo e teng khoro li butsoe; Re tla ema joang tsatsing leo,
Ho ahloloa bobe le botle; Moahloli ha tla ahlola.

Kahlolo ea tla qala ka bafu, Ba phelang ba tla latela;
Kahlolo ea Hae e tla ema, Teng khorong tsona tsa Molimo.

Re tla ema joang ho batlisisoeng, Libe tsa rona ba li senoloa,
Melato e ahlotsoe hohle—hohle; Ho se teng boikarabelo.
hymns.chorus:
Re tla ema joang tsatsing leo, Re tla ema joang tsatsing leo;
Na ekaba re tla fumanoa Re haelloa kapa re hlatsoitsoe.

hymns.title: Ha Morena A Kena
hymns.chorus:
Ha Morena a kena, Ha Morena a kena,
Ho tla ba joang uena le ’na Kreste ha ’kena.

hymns.title: Re Roetse Mangata
hymns.lyrics:
Re jala kamehla peo ea ho loka,
Hoseng, mots’ehare le mantsiboea;
Re se re emetse nako ea kotulo,
Re tla thaba re a roetse mangata.

Re jala lefats’eng le ha’ra meriti,
Ha re ts’abe le phoka ea mariha;
Re se re tla qeta pele mosebetsi,
Re tla thaba re a roetse mangata.

Re jalla Morena le ka mahlomola,
Ka meokho ka linako tse ngata,
Ha lillo li fela re se re tla ’mona,
Re tla thaba re a roetse mangata.

hymns.title: Li Kenyeng
hymns.chorus:
Li kenyeng, li kenyeng, Li tsoa mo naheng e mpe;
Li kenyeng, li kenyeng, malahleha a Jesu.

hymns.title: Pholosang Balahlehi
hymns.chorus:
Thusang balahlehi ba hlokomeleng;
Jesu O mohau Oa boloka.

hymns.title: Batlang Malahleha
hymns.lyrics:
Batlang malahleha ka bonolo,
E leng ba hlahlathang lithabeng;
“Tlong koano ho ’Na,” ke thomo ea Hae,
U e bolele teng kajeno.

Le batleleng Jesu malahleha,
Ba pelo tse tletseng bohloko;
Ba huleleng tseleng ea poloko,
Ba supiseng tsel’a bophelo.

Ke tla ea hoba Jesu A mpitsa,
Ke tla mo latela kamehla;
Ke tlamelle pelo tse robiloeng,
Ke ba supisa Jesu tsela.
hymns.chorus:
Le eeng hole, hole lithabeng,
Khutlisang malahleha, malahleha hape,
Mohlapeng oa ’Moloki oa ka,
Jesu ea hlabetsoeng ba-etsalibe.
Bass
Le eeng hole—hole koa lithabeng,
Khutlisang hape;
Moo mohlapeng oa malahleha ’Moloki,
Jesu Konyana ea balibe.

hymns.title: Ke Rata Ho Pheta Pale
hymns.lyrics:
Ke rata ho pheta pale ea leholimo,
Ka Jesu khalalelong, le ka rato la Hae;
Ke rata ho e pheta, Hoba e le ’nete,
E nkholisa takatsong, Ho fetisa tsohle

Ke rata ho e pheta, pale e makatsang,
Ho feta le gauta tsa toro tsa rona;
Ke rata ho e pheta, E nts’ebelelitse,
’Me ke ka baka leo, ke ratang ho e pheta.

Ke rata ho e pheta pale ee monate,
’Me ha ke tla e pheta, E ba ntle haholo;
Ke rata ho e pheta, ho batho ba bang,
Ha ba eso ho utloe, thomo ea Molimo.

Ke rata ho e pheta, ho ba tsebang hantle
Ba rata ho e utloa.Le joaleka ba bang;
Ha ke le khalalelong, pina ea ka e ncha,
E tla ba eona eane, Ee ke e ratileng.
hymns.chorus:
Ke rata ho e pheta, pale e halalelang,
Pale ea khale—khale, ea rato la Jesu.

hymns.title: Pitso Ea Bakotuli
hymns.chorus:
Morena roma ba-kotuli Re ea u rapela;
Ba rome ho ea nka mangata, Nako e-so fete.

hymns.title: Sebetsang
hymns.chorus:
Sebetsang... khothalang...Sebetsang...khothalang...
A re ts’epeng Morena A be a fihle.

hymns.title: Sebetsa Bosiu Bo ’’a Tla
hymns.lyrics:
Sebetsa ’siu bo ea tla, sebetsa ka meso;
Sebetsa phoka e teng, ’lemo se thoasa,
Sebetsa le sa phahama, sebetsa ts’ehareng,
Sebetsa s’iu bo ea tla, ho sa sebetsoeng.

Sebetsa ’siu bo ea tla, le teng mots’ehareng,
Phetha nako ts’ebetsong; phomolo e ea tla,
Sebelisa metsotso, hohle ho ka bang teng;
Sebetsa ’siu bo ea tla, ho sa sebetsoeng.

Sebetsa ’siu bo ea tla, tsatsing le phirimang;
Sebetsa le ea fubela
Sebetsa ka sholane, le khitleng ea bosiu,
Sebetsa le lefifing, se ho felile.

hymns.title: Hoseng Kameso
Ho Lehlohonolo Lebitso
hymns.lyrics:
Mphe maleme a sekete, Ho rorisoe ’bitso la Hae;
Khalalelo ea Molimo, Ho rorisoe ’bitso la Hae.

Jesu ke ea re ts’elisang, Ho bokoe ’bitso la Jesu,
Ke pina ho moetsalibe; Ho bokoe ’bitso la Jesu.

O roba matla a sebe, Ho bokoe ’bitso la Jesu,
Re itlhatsoa maling a Hae; Ho bokoe ’bitso la Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Lehlohonolo, lehlohonolo; Le teng lebitsong la Jesu;
Lehlohonolo, lehlohonolo, Le teng lebitsong la Jesu.

hymns.title: Bokang Molimo
hymns.lyrics:
Batho bohle ha re bokeng, Molimo; O re phelisang,
O bokeng bohle holimong, Bokang Ntate, Mora, Moea.

Bokang Molimo, Morena, Mpho tsohle li tsoa ho Oona;
Mokeng tlase le holimo, Bokang Ntate, Mora, Moea.    Amen.

hymns.title: Ke bina Matla ’Molimo
hymns.lyrics:
Ke bina matla ’Molimo a entseng lithaba;
Ao a alileng leoatle le sona sebaka,
Ke makatsoa ke kelello ee entseng letsatsi,
Khoeli ho busa bosiu, E, le linaleli.

Ke bona le ona mosa, Oo re fang le lijo,
Entse’ le ’ona makhotla ka lentsoe la Ona;
Re bona tsee re makatsang le ka hohle—hohle
Tsohle li ea re makatsa ke tsa ’ona tsohle.

Lipalesa tse makatsang, Le joang le lifefo,
Tsohle li paka ka ’Mopi; Leha li thotse tu!
Ke Eena ea li phelisang Ea li fepang hohle,
Re ka balehela ho-kae? Kae le kae Oa bona.

hymns.title: Khumamelang Morena
hymns.lyrics:
Rokang Morena Ea halalelang,
Le ke le bineng ka lerato la Hae;
Ke thebe ea rona le ts’reletso
Ea apereng khalalelo le pako.

Bolelang matla le mosa oa Hae,
Ea apereng khanya le eona phatsimo;
Koloi tsa bohale ba Hae ke maru,
Tsela ea Hae e lefifi sefefong.

Hlokomelo ea hae ke ee fetisang,
E boleloa moeeng ’khanya ka leseli;
Seling, Lithabeng le hona lithoteng,
Me e khutsitse phokeng le hona puleng.

Bana ba lerole Ba ba fokolang,
Ho Uena re ts’epile matla a Hau;
Mohau oa Hao o teng ka ho sa feleng,
Mopi le Motsoalle le Molopolli.

hymns.title: Ntate Re Tla Ho Uena
hymns.lyrics:
Ntate re tla ho Uena, Ke Uena thuso, U re sireletse, rea u ts’epa;
Fats’e lea nts’ofala ha Uena U le sieo; E ba mots’elisi Natat’a
rona.

Re pholosoe bobeng, ba meleko eohle, U be mots’elisi, tseleng ena;
Rona rea ts’aba, Uena re khothatse, Ka ’tsoho le matla, re pholose.

Re nehe mohau, Bea ’tsoho la Hau, Tlosa maoto a rona sebeng sohle,
U re tataise, mats’oenyehong ’ohle, Re tle re lule le Uena khanyeng.
hymns.chorus: Ntate re tla ho ’Uena, Se re lahle; Re tla re fokola, U re utloe.

hymns.title: Se Mphete
hymns.lyrics:
Se mphete ’Moloki oa ka, Utloa ’llo sa ka,
Ha u ntse u bitsa batho, Se mphete le ’na.

Moo teroneng ea mohau, Ke hauheloe,
Ke khumame ka boinyatso, Nthuse tumelong.

Hoba ha ke ts’epa uena, Ke tla u batla,
Mpholise moea o kulang, Uena mpoloke.

U seliba sa ts’eliso, Se fetang tsohle,
Ha ke na e mong lefats’eng Ha e se uena
hymns.chorus:
Jesu, Jesu, utloa sello hle!
Ha u ntse u bitsa ba bang, Se mphete le ’na.

hymns.title: Lebelang Le Rapele
hymns.chorus:
Lebela u rapele,Lebela rapela,rapela;
Lebela lefifing le mots’ehare Mokreste lebela.

hymns.title: Botle Nako Ea Thapelo
hymns.lyrics:
Botle nako ea thapelo! E mpitsang mona lefats’eng,
Ke bolela kopo tsa ka, Ho Ntate moo a mpiletsang;
Mohla ke le mahlomoleng, Ke bona pholoho le teng,
Ke phonyoha moo molekong, Ka nako ea ho rapela.

Botle nako ea thapelo! Ke tla isa kopo ea ka,
Ho Eena eo ea ts’epang; Ho halaletsa moeti,
O ntaela o re, ke ’matle, Ke lumele mohau oa hae,
Tsohle tsa ka li ho eena, ke lete nako’a thapelo.

Botle nako ea thapelo!ke fumane khothatso teng,
Ke tsamaea ke le thabong ke bone hae ke ea fihla
Ke tsoha ke le ea sa shoeng ke kena moo bosafeleng
Ke luluetse sebakeng sala hantle moo thapelong.

hymns.title: Mosebetsi oa Matsatsi A Tseletseng
Letsatsi La Phomolo Le Thabo
hymns.lyrics:
Letsatsi la phomolo, Letsatsi la thabo,
Mofelisi oa lillo, Ea khanyang ka botle;
Mats’oele a holimo, A pel’a terone,
A bina khalalello, Ho Uena Molimo.

U seliba see koellang, Komellong ea naha,
U ts’upiso ea tsela, E isang holimo;
Letsatsi la hlaboso, E tsoang ho rateng,
Ka lona re tsohela, Tsohle tse phahameng.

Ke letsatsi le letle, Tsatsi la lerato;
Ke tsatsi la ho ithuta, Lintho tsa holimo,
Ke la lehlohonolo, Tsatsi la phomolo,
Re batla ho phomola, Tulong, ea-ne ee ntle.

hymns.title: Sekolo Sa Sabbatha Se Monate
hymns.chorus:
Sabbatha.... e ntle, Sabbata...e ntle,
Pelo ea ka hlokomela, Tsatsi la Sabbatha.

hymns.title: U Se Lebale Sabbatha
hymns.chorus:
Le amohele ka thabo tsatsi la Sabbatha,
Le amohele ka thabo tsatsi la Sabbatha.

hymns.title: Re Bolokiloe Veke E ’Ngoe
hymns.lyrics:
Re tsoile vekeng e ’ngoe, Molimo ’re tlisitse;
Re batleng hlohonolo, re mo lete kajeno;
Letsatsi le letle lee ka pele ponts’o ea tse ka pele,
Letsatsi le letle lee ka pele ponts’o ea tse ka pele.

Ha re kopa mohau, ka bitso la ’Moloki,
Re bonts’e sefahleho, tlosa lihlong tsa rona,
Re lahle tsa lefats’e re phomola tsatsing lee,
Re lahle tsa lefats’e re pomola tsatsing lee.

Ha re tla U rorisa, re utloe boteng ba Hao,
Re bone khalalelo, ha re tlile lebaleng,
U re nee Morena, mosebetsi o sa feleng,
U re nee Morena, mosebetsi o sa feleng.

A evangeli ea Hao e ts’elise bakhethoa,
E hlole le bokhopo e tlise tokoloho,
Ka lisabbatha tsohle, re buse le Morena,
Ka lisabbatha tsohle, re buse le Morena.

hymns.title: Tla Ka Pula
Re Utloile
hymns.lyrics:
Re utloile ka Jesu, Morena ’Moloki,
Bolella chaba tsohle ka Jesu Morena;
Hoeletsang liphahameng le holim’a lithaba,
Jesu O oa le bitsa, Jesu Mopholosi.

Bolellang baetsalibe, Ba tliseng ho Jesu
O tla ba hlatsoa libe ba hloeke kahohle.
Binang lihleke-hleke, ho utloale mahaheng,
Fats’e le tla phomola, Jesu Oa boloka.

Hlabang mokhosi hohle, ka Jesu Morena,
Ka lefu le bophelo ba Jesu Morena;
Bua le ka sephiring Ka mohau oa Jesu,
U tla hlola lebitla ka Jesu Morena.

Lithabeng le lithoteng ka matlung, le kantle,
Hohle Molimo O teng O tseba ka hohle;
Motho le ha’rapela le sephiring sa pelo,
Molimo O’a mo utla O utloa haholo.

hymns.title: Ke Na Le ’Moloki Ho ’Na
hymns.chorus:
Joale nke ke ka ts’oha, A nkise moo A ratang;
Ke tla ea ke sa belaele, Ke ntse ke mo latela.

hymns.title: Ha Ke Boha Sefapanong
Jesu Motsoalle
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu Motsoalle ea jereng, Melato le makhopo,
Ke sebaka se setle joang, Ho Molimo thapelong!
Ha ngata re itima khotso, ka mokhoa’sa tsoanelang
Ha re sa ise likopo, ho Molimo thapelong.

A na re na le liteko? A ho teng mats’oenyeho?
Re se ke ra nyahamisoa, Ho Morena thapelong,
Re ka bona kae motsoalle Ea utloelang bohloko,
Jesu o tseba phokolo, Ho Morena thapelong.

Ha re na le ho imeloa, Ke meroalo ea rona,
Jesu, ’Moloki, Phemelo, Ho Morena thapelong,
Ha u nyatsoa ke metsoalle, U bolellle Morena,
’Me o tla u sireletsa, A be a u ts’elise.

hymns.title: Jesu Oa Bitsa.
hymns.chorus:
O...nts’a...bitsa, O...nts’a bitsa.
Jesu O bitsa ka mohau joale.

hymns.title: Bula A Kene.
hymns.lyrics:
Moeti o teng monyako; Bu. . .la kene(bulela Jesu)
Ke khale A eme teng bulela Jesu, Mo bu’ele A e-s’o fete.(bulela Jesu)
Jesu ngoana’ Molimo, ’mo bulele a kene ’Bu. . .le. . .le. . .

.U bule pelo ea hao mo bulele, ha U lieha O tla feta,(bulela Jesu)
Mo...bulele, O ntsa eme monyako, Oho tiiisetsa thabong,(bulela Jesu)
A lule ka ho uena mo... bu...le...le(bulela Jesu)

Utloa ha A nts’a qeka, mo...bu...lele, joale U khethe Eena(bulela Jesu)
Mo...bulele, O nts’a eme monyako, Oho tiisetsa thabong,(bulela Jesu)
Mo rorise hle Eena, mo bulele...(bulela Jesu)

Mo amohele joale, mo...bulele, O tla etsa mokete,(bulela Jesu)
Mo...bulele, U tla be U ts’oareloe, ho tlosoe tsa lefats’e(bulela Jesu)
U isoe leholimong, mo...bulele(bulela Jesu)

hymns.title: Le Tsoaloe Hape.
hymns.lyrics:
’Musi O tlile ho Jesu bosiu,
Ho botsa ka poloko le leseli;
Moruti A etsa karabo e ntle,
“Phetang le tsoaloe hape.”

Bana ba batho le mameleng lentsoe,
Le builoeng ke Jesu Morena,
Se keng la etsa thomo ea lefeela
“E ka khona U tsoaloe hape.”

Lona ba le ka kenang moo phomolong,
La bina pina le ba lopollotsoeng;
Bophelo bo sa feleng ke ba lona,
“Phetang le tsoaloe hape.”

hymns.title: Tlo ’Moloki E Moholo Tlo
hymns.lyrics:
.Nkutloe Morena U be mosa ho ’na, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na;
Moea oa ka o lakatsa uena, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na.

Ha ke na mo nka its’ireletsang, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na,
A k’u ntalime ke bone khanya, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na.

Tsela ena ea ka ea nkhathatsa, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na,
Mahlo a ka a bone lerato, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na.

.U se hane ho inyatsa ha ka, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na;
Mamela ho rapela ha ka, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na.
hymns.chorus:
Ke lelerile hole lithabeng, ke lelerile hole le hae;
Oho! Nkuke  u nkhutlisetse hae, tlo ’Moloki tlo ho ’na.

hymns.title: O Na Le Ho Lokolla.
hymns.lyrics:
.U hoeletse ka matla eona tokoloho eo,
Ho lokolla bona ba nang le hlompho;
Mollong ho lahleloe bona ba sitiloeng,
Jesu O tla lokolla ba tlang ho Eena

Na a ka lokolla—U bolela ’nete?
Na a teng le matla ao a ka nthusang?
Mpolelle ka Kreste Ea thakhisitsoeng,
Na a ka ntokolla le ho Satane?

Na a ka lokolla! U tiee u be matla,
U se ke ua ts’aba its’ooarelle ka Jesu;
U se ke ua ts’aba its’oarlle ka Jesu,
Leleka pelaelo ema ho Eena.
hymns.chorus:
O tseba ho u lokolla,
O na le pholoso,
Uena he ngoana oeso,
U mo lumele

hymns.title: Re Tla Aha Lefikeng.
Mpolelle Pale ea Jesu
hymns.chorus:
Mpolellle pale ea Jesu, U e ngole le pelong;
U mpolelle ea bohlokoa, ee monate ho feta.

hymns.title: Leratong Ka Bonolo Oa Bitsa.
hymns.lyrics:
Molisa ea lerato, Oa u bitsa joale
Lesakeng la poloko, Phomolo, tulo li teng;
Tlo ka matla a senna, Tlo u sa le mocha,
Kena hona lesakeng Kena tseleng ea ’nete.

Molisa Ea lerato, O  iteletse uena,
O bitsa ka bonolo, tlo ho ’na moleleri;
Akofa hoba kotsi e teng, Tlo, U ea bitsoa hle,
Kena hona lesakeng, Kena tulong ea khutso.

Tieho ke bothoto; Liphiri li tletse,
Li batla malahleha; Ho bolaea’likonyana,
Molisa Ea lerato; Oa u bitsa joale,
Sakeng la polokeho, Moo ho leng teng litulo.
hymns.chorus:
Ka bonolo Oa bitsa; Tlo moleleri tlo koano ho ’na,
Ke ’mona A eme ka mamello, Jesu Molisa oa ka.

hymns.title: Lekantsoe ’Me U Chatsi
hymns.lyrics:
Mohla moahloli A re, Lekanyetsang bofelo,
Re tla ba tje ka gauda? Kapa tje ka lefifi..

A re tla utloa ha ho thoe, “Mohlanka ea khabane;
U sebelitse hantle, Kapa U chatsi, na?”

Na re tla mamela moea, ha ntse re kopa mohau,
Kapa re tla lieha, Ho be ho  llaeloe ts’enyo.
hymns.chorus:
U lekantsoe ke Morena, ’Me u chatsi;
U sebelitse hantle, Kapa U chatsi?

hymns.title: Ba Lehlohonolo Ba Etsang.
Che Ha Teng.
hymns.lyrics:
Ha teng motsoalle ’a ts’oanang le Jesu, che le a mong! Che le a mong!
Ha teng ea ka re phekolong moea, che le a mong! Che le a mong.

Ha teng ea phahameng ho mo feta che ha eo che ha eo
Hape ha  teng ea ikokobelitseng, che ha eo che ha eo.

Ha e teng nako eo a seng haufi che ha e teng che ha e teng,
Ha bo teng siu boo a sa   khothatseng ha bo eo ha bo eo.

O kil’a lahla mohalaleli che le a mong che le a mong,
Kapa a lahla moetsalibe che le a mong che le a mong.

O kil’a lahla mohalaleli che le a mong che le a mong,
Kapa a lahla moetsalibe che le a mong che le a mong.
hymns.chorus:
Jesu O tseba mathata a rona O re thusa tsatsing lohle
Ha ho motsoalle ea ts’oanang le Jesu che ha eo che ha eo.

hymns.title: Sefapanong Bophelo Bo Teng.
hymns.lyrics:
Moo sefapanong bophelo bo teng, Jesu O n’a re ke shebe,
Menate ea lefats’e ha se letho hobane tse ntle li pele.

Ke hona ke sa tsoa bona Jesu, A nthabele hofetisa
Ha meleko e mphihlela ke fumana matla teng sefapanong.

Ke tla talima kamehla eohle ke bolokile ts’episo,
Ea ts’epileng matla a Jesu A ke ke a hloloa ke moleki.
hymns.chorus:
Ho bona...bophelo teng...bo botle...sefapanong...
Poloko...tokoloho...tse bonoang...sefapanong....

hymns.title: Pitso.
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu O nts’a u bitsa ka bonolo,O bitsa uena le ’na;
O u emetse monyakong oa pelo, ’lebetse uena le ’na.

Re luletseng Jesu A re buella, buella uena le ’na,
Re liehelang ho utloa mohau, Mohau oa hau le ’na?

Nako e akofile e ea feta, E feta uena le ’na,
Meriti e ’ea tla le bosiu ba lefu, Li tlela uena le ’na.

Hopola ka ts’episo e makatsang, Tsepiso ea hau le ’na
Leha re sitiloe O ea ts’oarela, Tsoarela uena le ’na.
hymns.chorus:
Tlong hae, tlong hae, Lona ba khathetseng, tlong hae,
Jesu O nts’a ho bitsa ka bonolo,  MoetsalibeU tle hae!

hymns.title: Khoro E Buletsoe.
hymns.lyrics:
Ho na le khoro e butsoeng, Menyakong e khanyang,
Hlaseli la sefapano, Ts’enolo ea lerato.

Khoro eo e buletsoe, bohle ba tlang polokong,
Barui, bafumanei, Le bafo le Marena.

Itlhahaneleng ka matla, Ha khoro e sa butsoe,
Amohelang Sefapano, Ponts’o eo ea lerato.

Mose oane re tla beha, sefapano sa joale,
Re roale moqhak’a rona, Bophelong ratong la Hae.
hymns.chorus:
O mokakang mohau ona, Khoro e buletsoe le ’na!
Le ’na, le ’na? E buletsoe le ’na!

hymns.title: Ngaka E Kholo.
hymns.lyrics:
Ngaka e kholo e haufi, Jesu ngaka ea batho,
O ts’elisa ba nyahameng, Utloang hle ntsoe la Jesu.

Ho isoe khanya ho Konyana, Ke lumela ho Jesu,
Ke rata bitso la Jesu Bitso leo la Jesu.

Bitso la hae le leleka, Ts’abo, bobe, le tsuo,
Moea oa ka oa nyakalla, Bitsong le letle la Jesu.

Mohla a tlang le meqhaka, Ea bophelo le khanya,
Re tla lula lehlakoreng, Re bolele litaba.
hymns.chorus:
O binoa leholimong, O ratoa le ke batho
O monate hakakang Jesu ea ratehang.

hymns.title: Ha U Re Letho Ka Jesu.
hymns.lyrics:
U tletse litakatso, ha u na tulo ea Jesu?
U ts’oeroe ke lefats’e, ha u na tulo ea Jesu.
Bona O eme monyako, O nts’a kokota joalo;
Utloa ha a u qeka, ha u na tulo ea Jesu.

U ntse U senya nako, ha u sebeletse Jesu?
U senya matla a Hae, ha u sebeletse Jesu.
Ha u loants’e sebe na, U leke ho sokolla;
U sa tlise le ea mong, ha u sebeletsse Jesu.

U batla tsa lefats’e, ha u na nako ea Jesu?
Mosebetsi o motle, ha u na nako ea Jesu.
Boiketlo le leruo, U batla mafeela-feela,
U loana ho ithabisa, ha u na nako ea Jesu.

Makhapetla ’lefeela, ha ho tholoa’a Jesu?
Ha u na letho liathleng, ha ho tholoan’a Jesu.
Ha u boloke letho, Ha fumane tefo;
Ha u na eona thabo, Ha u kopana le Jesu.

hymns.title: Kea Tla Morena.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke utloa lentsoe la hao,
Le mpitsa Morena,
Ho ntlafatsoa maling a hao,
A tsoang moo Kalfari.

Ke tla ka phokolo,
Matla a hau uena,
U ntlhoekise libeng tsohle,
Ke be ea hloekileng.

Ke Jesu ea mpitsang
Tumelong, leratong
Lits’episo le moo khotsong,
Fats’eng leholimong.

Rorisang mali a hae,
Rorisang poloko,
Rorisang neo ea Morena,
Tiiso ea rona.
hymns.chorus:
Kea tla Morena,
Ke tla ho uena,
U ntlhatsoise moo maling
A tsoang moo Kalfari.

hymns.title: Jesu O Lefile.
hymns.lyrics:
Matla a fokola
’Moloki O rialo,
Lebela u rapele,
Ho ’na thola tsohle.

Ruri joale, Morena,
Ke bona matla a hao,
A fetola lepera,
A nolofatsa pelo,

Ha ho letho le ho ’na,
Le lokelang mohau,
Ke hlatsoa seaparo,
Maling a Konyana.

Ha ke ema teroneng,
Pel’a Hae phethehong,
Meqhaka e roleloa
Maotong a Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Jesu O lefile,
’Na ke molato,
’Be ne se nkhoramese,
O se hlatsoisitse.

hymns.title: Mohloli O Hlatsoang.
hymns.chorus:
Ke bona moo ho hlapuoang, Joale ke kena tlhatsuong;
Bokang Morena Oa ntlhatsoa, O oa ntlhatsoa, e Oa ntlhatsoa

hymns.title: Ke Lumela
hymns.lyrics:
Ntate ke tlisa ho Uena;
Ha ho ea ka nthusang;
Ha U ka ntahla, Ua ntlohela,
Na ke tla ea ho-kae?

Ke lumela ho Mor’a Hao,
Nke ke utloe matl’a Hao,
U ntokolle litakatsong,
Nakong ee ts’oanelang.

Mong—tumelo, ho Uena,
Ke lelatsa mahlo;
Ke amohele mpho eo,
Moea oa ka o phele.
hymns.chorus:
Joale ke na le tumelo,
Hore Jesu O nchoetse;
O ts’olotse Mali a Hae,
Ho ntokolla sebeng.

hymns.title: Ke Bina Ka Rato La Jesu.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke bina ’rato la Jesu Eena ea nthatileng,
O tlohile  holimo, A tla ho shoa Golgoth

Pele ke e-s’o ho lle, Jesu O tla ntelela;
Leha ke es’o rapele O ile a nthapella.

A boteng ba lerato lefats’e ha le tsebe;
Ha libe tse kang tsa ka le tsona li ka ba ts’oeu.

Ha ke na se molemo, O ne A ka nthata joang?
Morena U nkhapile, nthuse hore ke ’rate.
hymns.chorus:
Ke bina lerato la Hae, Jesu ke tla ’moka,
O nchoetse ke tla phela, ke tla bina lerato.

hymns.title: Haufi-Ufi.
Lebitso Le Halalelang.
hymns.lyrics:
Lebitso le letle hohle, Monate pelong ea ka,
Le ne le neoe ke Ntate, Mora’ Hae ea ratoang.

Le tlisa ho hotle ho ’na Ke lona pina ea ka,
Ke rorisa bitso la Hae, Ke le phete hape-hape.

Ekare nka ’na ka bina Topollo ena ea Hae,
Lona ke tla le rorisa Lebitso la Hae Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Bitso le halalelang, bitso le halalelang,
Le tsoang molomong oa Ntate holimo.
Le tlisoa ke mangeloi, bosiu bo khutsitseng,
E leng lebitso la Jesu.

hymns.title: Se Be ’Na E Be Kreste.
hymns.lyrics:
E se be ’na, Eena A holisoe,
A phahame, A bonoe A tsejoe,
E se be ’na e be Kreste chalimong,
Kreste monahanong le teng lentsoeng.

E se be ’na, ke Kreste ea ts’elisang;
O hlakola khapha tse ts’olohang,
O phahamisa maoto a khathetseng;
E se be ’na, Krest’a tlose ts’abo.

Kretse fela, ha ho mantsoe a lahloang,
Kreste fela, ho se bosaoana;
Kreste fela, e seng ho ikholisa,
Kreste fela, ho sa fumanoe ’na.

E se be ’na, Kreste O ’nea tsohle,
Kreste matla le bophelo ba ka;
Kreste fela ’meleng, bophelong, moeeng,
Kreste fela le ka ho sa eeng kae.

hymns.title: Khanya Pelong
hymns.chorus:
A! Ke leseli le letle ke letsatsi ka pelong;
Jesu O tlosa masoabi ke letsatsi ka pelong.

hymns.title: Ke Pholositsoe.
hymns.lyrics:
Ho teng pina ee ke ’ratang, ha ke pholositsoe;
Ea ’Moloki Morena ’ka ha ke pholositsoe.

Kreste O teng Ea nkholisang ha ke pholositsoe,
Ke tla etsa thato ea Hae Ha ke pholositsoe.

Ke na le paki ee tiileng, ha ke pholositsoe,
Ea lelekang pelaeo, ha ke pholositse.

Ke lokiselitsoe lehae ha ke pholositsoe,
Ke tla lula ka ho sa ’eng-kae ha ke pholositsoe.
hymns.chorus:
Ha ke pholositsoe, ha ke pholositsoe ke khanye bitsong la Hae’
Ha ke pholositsoe ke tle ke halaletsoe.

hymns.title: O’a Nthata.
hymns.lyrics:
Molimo O bona thaha e’oa,
Oa e hlokomela;
Ha A rata linonyana,
Kea tseba Oa nthata.

O khabisa le likhahla,
O li nea monko;
’Me ha A rata litlama,
Kea tseba Oa nthata.

Molimo O li bopile,
Tsohle le tse kholo;
Ha A na ho li lebala,
Kea tseba O’a nthata.
hymns.chorus:
O khabisa le likhahla,
O li nea monko;
’Me ha A rata litlama,
Kea tseba Oa nthata.

hymns.title: Nako E Ntle Ea Thapelo.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke nako ea thapelo, a re ikokobetseng,
Re atamela Jesu Motsoalle ’rona;
Re lumela ho Eena ke khato ea rona,
Ke pheko mokhathaleng, ho monate ho ba teng

Ke nako ea thapelo ha Jesu ’atamela,
Ka kutloelo-- bohloko ho bana ba Hae;
Ha A re re lahlele  meroalo ho Eena,
Ke pheko mokhathaleng, ho monate ho ba teng.

Ke nako ea thapelo ha ho le ba lekoang,
Ba tlisa masoabi a bona ’Moloking,
Ka kutloelo—bohloko, Oa tlosa ohle,
Ke pheko mokhathaleng, ho monate ho ba teng,

Ke nako ea thapelo, ha re mo lumela;
Ka ’nete re le ba hlohonolofetseng,
Re tla lokolloa hohle ha re mo ts’epile
Ke pheko mokhathaleng, ho monate ho ba teng.
hymns.chorus:
Nako ’a thapelo, nako e ntle joang;
Ke pheko mokhathaleng, ho monate ho ba teng.

hymns.title: Jesu Hlohonolofatsa.
hymns.lyrics:
Jesu U itse ha ho phutheliloe, Bobeli, boraro Uena U ba teng.
Re lumela lentsoe re khumamile, Jesu tlo U re hlohonolofatse.

Jesu U no ’le teng le nakong tsohle, Empa re ea U rata ka ho sa eng kae,
Tlo hle U hlohonolofatse,Utloa U re amohele ha re rapela.

Jesu U lokise mantsoe a rona, U be teng le merapelong ea rona;
Ts’epo ea rona e lule ho Uena, E khanye e be ts’oeu tsela ea rona.
hymns.chorus: Jesu tlo hlohonolofatse bohle, Jesu hlohonolofatsa U be haufi.

hymns.title: Nkhulele Haufi.
hymns.chorus:
Nkhule-le teng haufi, Morena moo U shoetseng,
Haufi-ufi Morena nkhule ke Uena ea ntlamileng.
Ho Uena ke ’nehela bocha, Ka matla a maholo;
Moea oa ka o lebe ho Uena, O fihle ho Jesu.

hymns.title: Nke Ke Ts’oane Le Jesu.
hymns.lyrics:
Nke ke ts’oane le Jesu Eena Morena oa ka,
Lumela  Mopholosi oa ka U lule le ’na;
Nke ke ts’oane le Jesu hona mona lefats’eng,
Ke hloka tsa moea lula le ’na Mopholosi.

Nonyana ha e lla O talima ka mosa,
O bona le tse oeleng ka ’nete O tla nkutloa;
O lisa tsela ea ka, A tle a e lokise,
Ke batla khalalelo, lula le ’na Mopholosi.

Nke ke ts’oane le Jesu, ke be joalo kamehla;
Ke rata ho phomola litulong tse khutsitseng,
Ke be ea tsoetsoeng bocha  ka thato ea Hao Jesu.
Nke ke be le tumelo lula le ’na Mopholosi.

hymns.title: Haufi Le Sefapano.
hymns.lyrics:
Haufi le sefapano selibeng se setle,
Metsi a ho phekola a hlahang ho Jesu.

Haufi le sefapano mosa o ’no nthole,
Ke moo ke bonesetsoang lerato la Jesu.

Haufi le ho Konyana ke batla ho lula,
Nthuse matsatsi ’ohle ke ’ne ke latele.

Ke tla lebella haufi ke ts’epe kamehla,
Ke tle’ be ke eo fihla ka mose ho noka.
hymns.chorus:
Pela sefapano ke ntse ke rorisa,
Ke teng moo moea oa ka o tla ’no phomole

hymns.title: Ke Tsamaea Le Molimo.
Lerato Le Makatsang La Jesu.
hymns.lyrics:
Litulong tse phahamileng, Moea oa ka o rorisa,
Ke mang ea ka bolelang ka lerato leo le makatsang.

Le na le khotso bosiu, le khanya le mo lefifing,
Ke sehlare se folisang, lona ’rato lena la Jesu.

Ke ts’oarelo ts’epo ho ’na ke thuso ho ’na ha ke oa.
Bophelong le lefung tsohle ke ’rato lena la Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Rato lena le makatsang, rato lena la Jesu;
’Rato lena  le makatsang, rato lena la Jesu.

hymns.title: Ke Ea U rata Morena.
hymns.chorus:
Ha ho’a boleloa hohle, Ka ’rato le ntletseng.
Ha h’oa boleloa hohle, Mali A ntlhatsoitseng.

hymns.title: Ke Hopola Golgotha.
hymns.lyrics:
Moo a nkisang teng ke tla ea, ke ithule ho mo ts’epa,
Ke ’ne ke hopole hore O bolailoe  Golgotha.

Ke thabela mohau oa Hae, ke huloe ke rato la Hae,
’Rato la Hae le monate, ke le halaletsang bohle.

Ke tsamaea ka sebete, Jesu a le haufi le ’na,
Ke ts’epa ho bona Jesu ka tsatsi le leng Golgotha.
hymns.chorus:
Jesu O nkisa le hohle, Jesu O tla nkisa le tseleng.
Ke motsoalle Ea ts’epehang, ke hopola Golgotha.

hymns.title: Mphe  Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Bophahamo ba mohau! Bophara ba lerato!
Botlalo ba tokoloho, Ts’episo e sa feleng.

hymns.title: Boitelo Bo Tletsen.
hymns.chorus:
Ntlhatsoe maling a Konyana (a Konyana)
Ntlhatsoe maling a Konyana (a Konyana)
Ntlhatsoe mohloling (mohloling)

hymns.title: Ke Se Ke Fumane Motsoalle
Lentsoe La Jesu.
Moloki Ke Rata Hoba Ua Hau.
hymns.lyrics:
’Moloki le ’na ke be oa Hao; U nthute,
U nthute; Nka etsa thato ea Hao Ntate, U nthuse joale.

Tsa lefats’e tsohle na ke eng; O se teng, O se teng?
Ke tla li tlohella ho Uena, U ruo la ka.

Ha ke furalla tsa lefats’e, Tlo haufi;
Tlo haufi; Ho Uena ke fihlela tsohle, Ts’eliso ea ka.
hymns.chorus:
Ke oa Hao (Jesu), Ke oa Hao (Jesu), Ena ke kano ea ka;
Ke oa Hao (Jesu), Ke oa Hao(Jesu), Morena hona joale. .

hymns.title: Ho Monate Joang.
hymns.lyrics:
Le monate joang tsatsi,
Lee le halalelang;
Ha re lahla tsa lefats’e,
Re sheba Molimo.

A mantsoe a khotso, a monate
A tsoang ho Eena,
A tsosang ea inyatsang;
Ho ea leholimong.

’Me ha ho tlosoa libe,
Le ho li furalla;
Eena ea u bonang pelong,
O romela mohau.

hymns.title: Re Qhalanye Morena.
Mobung O Phahameng.
hymns.chorus:
Mphahamise Morena ’ka, Mobung oo o phahamileng,
Sebakeng se fetang sena, Morena mpee holimo.

hymns.title: U Se Ke Ua Itatola.
hymns.lyrics:
’Se ke ua itatola, ts’ebetso e kholo;
Lokela ho etsa se tsoang ho Molimo,
Memo ena ea Hae, U ntse u e neoa,
Amohela, ’me ho molemo ho etsa.

’Se ke ua itatola, Morena Oa bitsa;
Ha u ntse u hana, U mo utloe joale,
Masimo a butsoitse, basebetsi ba kae,
U nyakallele Moreneng ts’ebetsong.

’Se ke ua itatola, kotsi e teng tiehong;
Rato le nyatsitsoeng, ha le na ho khutla,
Ha mohau o bitsa, ’me o supa tsela,
Ha Jesu a eme, tlo u tla ts’oareloa.
hymns.chorus:
Tlo hle tlo (joale) ’se ke ua itatola,
Tlo hle tlo (joale) lokela ts’ebetso;
’Se ke ua itatola karabo e ka re:
U khesitse lerato ’musong ha u ee.

hymns.title: U Phele Ka Ho ’Na
Nkhulele Haufi Le Uena.
hymns.chorus:
Haufi-ka lerato, nkhulele ho Uena,
Nkhulele ho Uena haufi.
Haufi ka khoele tsa lerato, nkhule,
Nkhulele leholimong, haufi ka lerato,
Nkhulele leholimong, haufi nkhulele ho Uena.

hymns.title: Kae Le Kae Le Jesu.
hymns.chorus: Kae le kae, Kae le kae; Ts’abo e sieo, Ha ke na le Jesu nka ea kae le kae.

hymns.title: Tsamaea Leseling.
hymns.lyrics:
Tsamaea ’seling la Morena, Le u tsamaisang;
Moea oa Hae o tsoang ’holimong, O tlose lefifi.

Tsamaea ho la evangeli, lentsoeng la Molimo,
’Seli le tsamaisang bocheng, batho ba Morena.

Tsamaea ’seling leha lefifi le le tseleng,
Le tla tebela lefifi Morena a ba tle.

Tsamaea leseling U tla, tseba rato la Hae,
Setsoalle, sena sa lefats’eng se setle holimo.
hymns.chorus:
Tsa...maea leseling...
(Le letle la Molimo)
(KAOFELA) Tsama’a ’seling la Molimo.
Tsa...maea leseling...
(Le letle la Molimo)
(KAOFELA) Tsama’a ’seling la Molimo.
Tsa...maea leseling...
(Le letle la Molimo)
(KAOFELA) Tsama’a ’seling la Molimo.

hymns.title: Ba Kae Bakotuli?
hymns.lyrics:
Ba kae bakotuli ba kotulang, mangata a molemo masimong
Nkang sekele tsa ’nete le sebetse le se tlohe teng ho eso phuthoe.

Tsoelang mapatlelong le a batle mabele a ka ba teng maholeng,
Batlang litseleng se feteng letho, bokellang tsohle hae holimo.

Masimo a butsoa hole-hole, lefats’e le emetse kotulo;
Bakotuli ba sieo empa he, mosebetsi oona o moholo.

Tlang ka sekele bana ba batho, ’me le bokelle tlhaku tsa gauda;
Sebetsang mong-a-teng A be A tle thabang le eena kotulong ea Hae.
hymns.chorus:
Ba kae bakotuli?ho tla tla mang ho neoa khalalelo le bona,
Ke mang ea tla thusa ho bokella ngata tse tsoang masimong a sebe.

hymns.title: Na Ho Tla Ba Teng Linaleli?
hymns.lyrics:
Ke hopola kajeno fats’e le letle, ke tla fihla teng ka phirima;
Ka mohau oa ’Moloki ke tla ba haufi na ke tla roala linaleli?

Ka matla ’Morena ke leke ho etsa ke buse le meea timelong,
Ke tle ke roale naleli tse phatsimang letsatsing leo A tla rokoang.

Thabo e tla ba kakang mohlang ke ’monang ke bea liperela maotong.
Ho tla ba monate moo motseng oa gauda ha ke tla roala linaleli.
hymns.chorus:
Na linaleli li tla ba teng moqhakeng ha letatsi le tla likela...
Ha ke tsoha tulong eo e khutsitseng na ke tla roala linaleli.

hymns.title: Bua Moeen Oa Ka.
Molebeli Mpolelle.
hymns.lyrics:
Morena ha ke rapelle tsa ka moso,
Ke se ke ka u siteloa hona joale;
Ke se ke ka bua ke sa inahana,
Bea selebeli molomong kajeno.

Ke tla khothalla ts’ebetso ke rapele,
Ke tla ikokobetsa hona kajeno;
Phakisa ho mpha matla ke u hlonephe,
Ke lumele ho ineela hona joale.

’Me leha bophelo ba ka bo ka feta,
Lits’episo tsa Hao li ke li nts’ehetse;
’Me le tsa ka moso ha ke li rapelle,
Nts’ehetse, nkhule Morena hona joale.

hymns.title: Molebeli Mpolelle.
Ke Tla Ea Mo O Ratang.
hymns.lyrics:
E ka ba holimo lithabeng kapa honaleoatleng;
Kapa e seng pele le noeng,  Morena O tla ntlhoka,
’Me leha A ka mpiletsa moo, litseleng se sa tsejoeng.
Ke araba Morena oa ka, ke tla ea moo U ratang.

Kapa ho teng mantsoe ao, Moena, A ka A phetang,
Kapa joale tseleng ea sebe, ho teng ea lahlehileng,
’Moloki ha  ka ntsamaisa, tseleng ena lefifi
Ke tla bua ka thomo ea Hao, le eona thato ea ’Hao

Ruri tulo e teng thoko, kotulong ea lefats’e,
Moo nka ba le ho sebetsa teng, ke sebeletse Jesu.
Tsohle ke li bea ho Uena, kea tseba U ea nthata.
’Me ke tla etsa thato ea Hao, ke be se U se ratang.
hymns.chorus:
Ke tla ea moo u ratang Morena, Thabeng, thoeng, leoatleng,
Ke tla bua thato ea Hao Morena, ke be seo U se ratang.

hymns.title: Mantsoe A Khalefo A Se Tsoe.
hymns.chorus:
Le ke le rataneng (Le rataneng) Ho bua ’Moloki (Le rataneng),
Bana utloang taelo ea Ntate; (Ke taelo ea Ntate)
Le ke le rataneng, (Le rataneng) Ho bua ’Moloki,
(Le rataneng) Bana utloang taelo ea Hae.

hymns.title: Nako Ea Kotulo.
hymns.lyrics:
Eo a tsoang a ntse a lla,
A ntse a hasa peo ea hae.
A ntse a tletse lerato,
O ea hlohonolofatsoa.

Ho oa phoka ea holimo,
Letsatsi le chabetse,
Ho nea tse hlokehang;
Ho bats’epehi bohle.

Jala peo u se khathale,
U se ke oa ba le ts’abo
Tiisetsa hona bothateng,
U tla kotula botle.
hymns.chorus:
Hlokomela he uena molemi!
Mabele a matle;
Kotulo e haufi,
Bona masimo a masoeu.

hymns.title: Akofa Tsatsi La Thabo.
hymns.lyrics:
Kotulo ea lefats’e e haufi,
Morena bitsa bakotuli ba Hao.
Hole le haufi koro e butsoitse;
E se e loketse ho ke’ngoa seotlong

Moso ola o sa khutleng thabong,
O nts’o atamela ka lilemo;
Koro ee qhalantsoeng ke sona sebe,
E phuthoe hlabula le e-so fete.

Ho hotle ho sebetsa ka lerato,
Nokana e teng e tsoang leholimong,
Ke lerato leo le re emelang,
Ts’imong boinehelong bo re makatsang.
hymns.chorus:
Akofa... tsatsi thotang...mangata;
Akofa... tsatsi re iseng mangata.

hymns.title: Ke U Hloka Hakakang.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke U hloka hakakang, bofumeng le phokolong;
Kea thothomela U nkule, ’matlafatse U mphe pono.

U nkapese ka bonolo, kobo ea ka e lits’ila,
U nthute ke ea fokola, kea rapela mphe matla.

Ha U nkhula ke tla phela, ke tla oa ha ke its’epile,
Tsamaea le ’na bophelong Uena U tsohe ho ’na.

Ha nka hlaheloa ke tse ling, thabo le hlokofalo;
Ke tla ’ne ke be ho Uena, U ntse U le Mothusi
hymns.chorus:
Ka linako tsohle, Morena ke u hloka joang;
Ka linako tsohle, ’Moloki U nts’ehetse.

hymns.title: Ke Boloketsoe Jesu.
hymns.chorus:
Ke bolokeloe Jesu, Ke oele maotonga Hae;
Ha ke lakatse, letho, letho, E ba tsohle-tsohle.

hymns.title: Eena Le ’Na.
hymns.lyrics:
Ke na le motsoalle oa bohlokoa, ea ratoang.
O nthata ka bots’epehi, nke ke ka mo lahla.
Ke mo rata a be haufi, re tle re tsamae,
Le ho lula hammoho Eena le ’na.

Ha ke fela ke tennoe, ’nkutloele bohloko;
Ha A re ke its’etlehe, A thaba ho nthusa,
O ntsamaisa tseleng e tletseng khalalelo,
Re qoqa hammoho Eena le ’na.

Ke mo joetsa ka ts’oabo, le ka eona thabo;
Le ka tse tla nthabisang, Le ka tse nkhopisang,
O mpolella ho ts’oanelang,hore ke leke joang;
