Fa re go rapelela, Tla moleofi.

hymns.title: Ke Go Swetse Wena
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Go Swetse Wena, Ka Tsholola Madi,
Gore O bolokwe, O rudis’we losong,
Ka go ineela botshelo, Wena O mphile eng?
Ka go ineela botshelo, Wena O mphile eng?

Tlung Ya Rara Seding, Kgalalelo Ya Me,
Di saletse fifi, Batho ba timetseng;
Ke di tlogeletse wena, O ntlogeletse eng?
Ke di tlogeletse wena, O ntlogeletse eng?

Ka Bogela Wena, Go Gaisa Puo,
Mo kutlong botlhoko, Go go ntsha mo phupung,
Ke go belegetse tsotlhe, O mpelegetse eng?
Ke go belegetse tsotlhe, O mpelegetse eng?

hymns.title: Ke Bonye Yo O Pegilweng
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Bonye Yo O Pegilweng, Botlhokung Le Mading,
A nteba A sotlegile, Ke eme mokgorong.

Ga Nkake Ka E Lebala Yone Tebo Ele;
E ne ’kete e ntshekisa Ka loso lwa Gagwe.

Tebo Ya Bobedi Ya Re "Ke Go Itshwaretse;
Ke sule gore O tshele, Madi a a duetse

Lefa Ke Senola Loso Lwa Gagwe Ka Dibe,
Bosaitseweng jwa tshegofatso, Ke ishwaretse.

hymns.title: Didimalang Lotlhe
hymns.lyrics:
Didimalang Lotlhe, R’utlwa Go Seba,
Didimalang reetsang, Lo tsee mafoko.

Didimalang, Fano Go Boitshepo,
Mo sebesong seno, Sa thomo e ntle.

Didimalang, Fano, A Re Rapeleng,
Re utlwe Edene Lobakeng lona.

Didimalang, Kwalang Tshwaro Ya Gagwe;
Didimalang, mme lo Leteng Morena.

hymns.title: Go Tsamaya Le Modimo
hymns.lyrics:
Go Tsamaya Le Modimo, Ka’isong Ya Godimo,
’Sedi go phatsima tseleng E nkisang go Kwana.

Boya Moya O Boitshepo Morongwa Yo’ Montle;
Ke ya di ila dibe tse Di Go lelekileng.

A Lobaka Lo Lontle Jang, Lwa Boitumelo.
Mme go setse mo go se kakeng ga ba ga tlatswa.

Sesetwa Se Ke Se Ratang, Lefa E Le Sefe,
O nthuse go se latlha ke Obamele Wena.

hymns.title: Kreste O Letlantse Dibeng
hymns.lyrics:
Kreste O Letlatse Dibeng, Mmolok’o Gokgamatsang.
Re rekolotse O duetse, Mmolok’o gakgamatsang.

Ke Mmakela Madi A Ntlhatswang, Mmolok’o
gakgamatsang
Yo ntetlantseng le Modimo, Molok’o gakgamatsang.

O Ntlhapisitse Mo Pelong, Mmolok’o Gakgamatsang.
Mme ke Ene yo’e busang; Mmolok’o gakgamatsang.

O Tsamaya Gaufi Le Nna, Mmolok’o Gakgamatsang.
Mme O ntshegetsa ka metlha, Mmolok’o gakgamatsang.

O Nnaya Thata Ya Phenyo, Mmolok’o Gakgamatsang.
Le phenyo nakong ya teko, Mmolok’o gakgamatsang.

Ke Mo Neile Pelo Ya Me, Mmolok’o Gakgamatsang.
Fatshe ga le na kabelo Mmolok’o gakgamatsang.
hymns.chorus:
Mmoloki yo’gakgamatsang ke Jeso wa me,
Mmoloki yo gakgamatsang Jeso wa me.

hymns.title: Re Tla Nelwa Ke Masego
hymns.chorus:
Go na masego, (Alt.T.&B.Marothodi a sego?)
Masego re’a senka; Re welwa ke tshegofatso,
Mme re lopa masego.

hymns.title: Kagiso E E Monate? Neo Ya Modimo
hymns.lyrics:
Go Tsena Mo Pelong Ya Me, (Ya Me)
Boitumelo le boikhutso, (khutso),
Ke e opela gape gape, Kagiso ya Modimo.

Ka Jeso Kagiso E Teng, (E Teng),
Molato wa me O duetse’ (duetse),
Ga go motheo o sele, Wa neo ya lorato.

Ke Sena Go Rwesa Jeso, (Jeso),
Ke bonye kagiso pelong, (pelong),
Khumo ya sego go Ene, Kagiso e monate.

Go Jeso Kagisong Ke Ntse, (Ke Ntse),
Ka ke ntse ke le gaufi, (gaufi),
Ke bona kagiso fela, Lorato lwa Modimo.
hymns.chorus:
Kagiso neo e tswang kwa godimo,
Kgakgamatso ya kagiso, Kagiso ya Modimo.

hymns.title: Morekolodi Wa Me
hymns.lyrics:
Morekolodi Wa Me, O Kopelo Ya Me,
Mmoloki Monkgomotsi, Ke le mafutsaneng.

O Tsholofelo Ya Me, Ka Dingwaga Tsotlhe,
Fa lefifi le mpipa, Keledi di rotha.

Ke Ikanya Mmoloki Tsala Ya Me Ruri,
Gonne ke ya Go rata Bogolo go tsotlhe.

O Boitumelo Jwa Me Fatshing Je Ja Sebe,
O tla nna boitumelo Jwa me legodimong.
hymns.chorus:
Morekolodi wa me, Ke opela Wena;
Ga ke na tsala epe, E e tshwanang le Wena.

hymns.title: A Jeso Wa Tlhokomela?
hymns.lyrics:
A Jeso’a Tlhokomela Fa Ke Futsafaletse Kopelo?
Ke le bothateng, Mo patikegong, Mme ke lapis’wa ke tsela?

A Jeso’a Tlhokomela Fa Tsela Ya Me E Le Lefifi?
Fa letsatsi le phirima ’sigo, A O nna fa go gaufi?

A Jeso’a Tlhokomela Fa Ke Paletswe Ke Thaelo’thata?
Mo boputsaneng, Ke se na thuso Ke lela bosigo jotlhe.

A Jeso’a Tlhokomela Fa Ke Re "Sala Sentle Moratwa,"
Pelo’a me e batla go phatloga, A ke lefela? Wa bona?
hymns.chorus:
E oa tlhokomela k’itse, O itse futsana jwa me;
Metlheng ya bothata, Kea itse Mmoloki Wa tlhokomela.

hymns.title: Legae Je Go Se Phetogo
hymns.lyrics:
Legae Je Go Seng Phetogo, Setlhabi Le Bofutsana;
E, ke legae ja masego; Ke mang yo o sa le rateng?

Fa O Le Tlas’a Morwalo Wa Gago Mono Lefatseng,
O eletse bonno jole, Leta O se ngongoroge.

Fa Go Le Mitlwa Mo Tseleng, Gopola Ka Yo’e Rweleng
Fa O futsafala pelo Go futsafetse Morena.

Dira Lefifing, Botlhokung, Telo, Thapelo E Lebetswe;
Go tla tsatsi ja boikhutso, Leta O se ngongoroge.
hymns.chorus:
Leta, mme O se ngongorege,
Leta, mme O se ngongoroge,
Leta, leta, O se ngongorege.
T. &B.Leta leta, leta O se ngongorege,
Leta, leta, leta, o se Ngongoroge,
Leta, leta, leta,leta, leta, O se ngongorege.

hymns.title: Bojosing? Nnyaa Ga Ke ’Si
Jeso ’Rato Lwa ’Go O Lo Mphile
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso Rato Lwa ’Go O Lo Mphile,
Ga nkake ka gana, Morena’ me;
K’obama loratong, Ke dira ikano,
Ke lere tshupelo, Sengwe sa’Go.

Boutlwelong Botlhoko, Wa Nthapelela,
Ke leba go Jeso, Ka tumelo;
Nthusa mo mokgorong, Ke bolela rato,
Pako le thapelo, Sengwe sa’Go.

O Mphe Pelo Tota, Tshwano Sa’go,
Gore go bonale mo malatsing;
Tiro ya lorato, Le ya Pelonomi,
Motimedi a bonywe, Sengwe sa’Go.

Nna Le Tse ’Leng Tsa Me, Dineo Tsa ’Go,
Boipelong botshelong Morena’me.
Mme fa ke Go bona, Ke tla nna polokong
Goya bosakhutleng, Sengwe sa’Go.

hymns.title: Motheo Wa Phuthego Ke Jeso Morena
hymns.lyrics:
Motheo Wa Phuthego Ke Jeso Morena,
Ke lobopo lo losa, Ka madi le metse;
O tsile go e senka Go nna boitshepo,
Ka madi O rekile A ba A e swela.

Ba Ba Tswang Tshikeng Tsotlhe, Botlhe Bangwe Fela,
Morena mongwe fela, Tumelo, Go tsalwa;
E itshepisa leina Le le lengwe fela,
E na le tsholofelo, E mo tshegofatsong.

Lefa Ka Go E Sotla, Batho Ba E Leba,
Lefa baba ba thuba Lefika ja yone;
Baitshepi ka tumelo Ba re, "Go fitlha leng?"
Bosigo jwa go lela E tla nna jwa pako.

Tirong Dipitlaganong, Le Dintweng Tsa Yone,
E letile kagiso Ya ka bosakhutleng;
Ponong ya kgalalelo, E segofadiwe
Mme ka phenyo phuthego E tla nna boikhutsong.

hymns.title: O Nkgoge Wena Jehofa
Lefatshe Ja Kwa Gae
Lephoi Lengwe Le Dikala
hymns.lyrics:
Lephoi Lengwe Le Dikala,
Tse di dirang boitumelo
Di na le sengwe kgakala,
Se se nkisang Galelia.

Kwa Dithunyeng, Le Kwa Bontleng,
Kwa ’nonyane di opelang,
Dipako tse di bolelang,
Ka tse di Kwa Galelia.

Fa Re Bala Ka Ga Yo O
Tsamaileng mo lewatlang,
Ke eletsa bogolo go
Mo latela Galelia.
hymns.chorus:
Galelia, Galelia, Kwa Jeso O ratileng teng;
Galelia, Galelia, Tla o nkopelele gape.

hymns.title: Ke Polokong Mabogong A Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Polokong Mabogong, Fubeng Sa Ga Jeso,
Tshireletso loratong, Ke ikhutsa sentle.
Utlwa mantsw’a ba’ngele, A a tlang kwa go nna,
A tswa kwa kgalalelong, ’Watleng ja jas’pera.

Ke Polokong Go Jeso, Polokong Tshenyegong;
Dithaelong tsa lefatshe ’Ba ga se nntshe kotsi,
Kgololo bofutsaneng, Kgololo mo poifong;
Thaelo ga di sa le kae, E , le dikeledi.

Jeso Tshireletso’a Me, Jeso O N’a Ntshwela,
Mo Lefikeng ja Metlha, Ke tla ikhanya teng.
A ke lete boitshokong, Sigo bo bo fete,
Ke be ke bone moso, Tsibogong ja gouda.
hymns.chorus:
Ke polokong mabogong Fubeng sa ga Jeso,
Tshireletso loratong, Ke ikhutsa sentle.

hymns.title: K’utlwa Mmoloki A Bitsa
hymns.lyrics:
K’utlwa Mmoloki A Bitsa, Ka Lentswe Je Le Bonolo;
Ke utlwa mafoko a reng, "Tla ntatela, Ka metlha yotlhe."

Lefa Tsela E Ntshofala, Le Nao Tsa Me Di Lapile,
Pelo ya me e itumetse Ka ke latela tseleng yotlhe.

Jeso O Fa Pele Ga Me, O Mphatsimisetse’ Sedi,
O ntsosolosa bokweng, Ka ke latela tseleng yotlhe.

Mo Mogogorong Wa Nkgoga, O Mpha Mana A Godimo;
Nakong tsotlhe kea Go batla, Ka ke latela tseleng yotlhe.

O Ntshole Loratong Lwa ’Go, O Ntshole Mabogong A ’Go,
Ka tshwaro ya ’Go ntsholetsa, Ka ke latela tseleng yotlhe.
hymns.chorus:
Ke tla tsa’a mokgoro wa me, Mme ke latele Mmoloki;
Kwa O nkisang ke latele , Ke tsamae le Ene tseleng.

hymns.title: Tshwaro’a Rara Ya Phatsima
hymns.lyrics:
Tshwaro’a Rara Ya Phatsima Ntlung Ya ’Gwe Ya Lesedi,
Mme rona O re laela Go gasa sedi bathung.

Fifi Ja Sebe Le Gone, Go Kgorotlha Makhubu;
Ba letile ba’ eletsa ’Sedi jemo go lona.

Tshuba Lobone Lwa Gago; Mongwe Yo Mo Sefefong,
Yo lekelang letsibong, Fifing o ka timela.
hymns.chorus:
A masedi a a tuke, A ye kgakala bathung.
Ba ba anapang lefifing Gongwe ba ka bolokwa.

hymns.title: Mokreste Tsoga
hymns.chorus:
O tlhomame, O tlhomame,
O tlhomame, leba mmaba matlhong.

hymns.title: Batlile Go Kgonwa
hymns.lyrics:
Batlile Go Kgonwa Tumelong,
Batlile g’amogela Kreste
Kete mongwe o re, "Tloga moya, ya koo,
Ke tla Go bitsa ke bonye nako.

Batlile Go Kgonwa, Tla Janong;
Batlile, O se retologe,
Jes’Wa go laletsa, Bangele ba fa,
Oa rapelelwa, A ko O tle.

Batlile, Thobo E Fetile;
Batlile, mme go tla tshenyego.
Batlile go ’fenya, Batlile, thetelo.
Telo e botlhoko, Ke latlhilwe.

hymns.title: Ao Mmoloki O Tsholotse Madi
hymns.lyrics:
Ao, Mmoloki O Tsholotse Madi, Kgosi Ya Swa?
A O na’ka neela tlhogo Ya ’Gwe nna seboko.

A Ke Ka Ditiro Tsa Me, A Suleng Setlharing?
Kutlwelo-botlhoko, rato, Lo lo gaisa tsotlhe.

Ga Nka Ke Ka Duela Rato Lo Ka Bofutsana;
Fa Morena kea intsha nka Dira sone fela.
hymns.chorus:
Mokgorong, mokgorong, kwa ke bonyeng sedi,
Mme morwalo wa me ka o rolwa.
Ka tumelo ka bona lesedi,
Mme janong ke mo boitumelong.

hymns.title: Mmakeng Mmakeng
hymns.lyrics:
Mmakeng, Mmakeng, Jeso Morena Wa Rona,
Opelang tlhe lorato lwa Gagwe.
Mmakeng, mmakeng, baengele kgalalelong;
Thata, tlotlo, lo di Mo neele.
Jaaka modisa, Jeso O tla re disa,
A re tshola mo letsatseng jotlhe.

Mmakeng, Mmakeng, Morekolodi Wa Rona,
O tlhokofaditswe A re swela.
Ke fika ja poloko ya bosakhutleng,
Mmakeng, Mmakeng, Jeso yo’bapotsweng.
Mo tumiseng, Yo re futsafaletseng,
A re rata go se na tekanyo.

Mmakeng, Mmakeng, Morekolodi Wa Rona,
Go opelwa hosana ’godimong.
Jeso, Mmoloki ’busa ka bosakhutleng,
Mo rweseng, Moperisiti kgosi.
Jeso O ’e tla mo phenyong ya lefatshe,
Thata, le tlotlo, ke tsa Morena.
hymns.chorus:
Mmakeng, Mmakeng bolelang bogolo jwa ’Gwe;
Mmakeng, Mmakeng, lo le boitumelong.

hymns.title: Mang Yo O Moreneng
hymns.chorus:
Tlhopha, janong, Tshiamong, bosuleng, O fa kae.
Tlhopha, Janong, Tshiamong, bosuleng, O fa kae.
T.&B.
Mang yo o Moreneng, Mang yo o Moreneng,
Tshiamong, bosuleng O fa kae?

hymns.title: Jaaka Nku Thabeng Serameng
Fa O Lapisitswe Ke ’Be Tsa ’Go
hymns.lyrics:
Fa O Lapisitswe Ke ’Be Tsa ’Go, Mma Jeso A Tsene Pelong;
Fa O eletsa go tshela sesha, Mma Jeso A tsene pelong.

Fa O Lelela Janong Boitsheko, Mma Jeso A Tsene Pelong;
Metswedi e tlhatswang e gaufi, Mma Jeso a tsene pelong.

Fa Go Le Sefefo Se Segolo, Mma Jeso A Tsene Pelong,
Fa go le mo go se keng ga tlatswa,
Mma Jeso A tsene pelong.

Fa Tsala Di Satlho’e Di Ikangwa, Mma Jeso A Tsene Pelong,
Bona gore lo tla tsalana jang, Mma Jeso A tsene pelong.

Fa O Tla Tsena Kopelong Bantleng,
Mma Jeso A tsene pelong,
Fa O tla tsena mannong boikhutsong,
Mma Jeso A tsene pelong.

CHORUS YA BOFELO
Janong ga ke belaela; Janong ga ke Mo Latlhe;
Janong ke butse pelo, Mme Jeso O tsena mo teng.
hymns.chorus:
Janong, latlha pelaelo; Janong, O se Mo latlhe;
Janong, O bule pelo; Mma Jeso A tsene pelong.

hymns.title: Ga Ke Na Go Tlogela
Mpolelelang Polelo
hymns.lyrics:
Mpolelelang Polelo, Ka Tse Sa Itsiweng,
Ka Jeso kgalalelong Ka Jeso loratong.
Lo mpolelele sentle, Jaaka mo ngwanyaneng,
Ke bokoa ke lapile, Ke mo bofutsaneng.

Mpolelelang Ka Bonya’ Ntle Ke Tlhaloganye,
Thekololo ’kgamatsang, Phodiso ya sebe.
Mpolelelang gantsi, Ntle ke se lebale,
Monyo wa phakela o Feta motshegari.

Mpolelelang Yone Fa Lo Boifa Gore,
Ke gatswa ke lefatshe, Kgalalelong ya jo.
E, fa kgalalelo eo E ntlhabela moyeng,
Lo mpolelelang gape; Jeso Oa go tlatsa.
hymns.chorus:
Mpolelelang polelo, Mpolelelang polelo,
Mpolelelang polelo, Ka Jeso loratong.

hymns.title: Utlwang Ba’ngele Ba Re
hymns.chorus:
Re tsama’a seding, je le lentle,
Tlang kwa phatsemong ya tshegofatso,
Le re phatsimela nako tsotlhe, Jeso sedi ja ’fatshe.

hymns.title: Gape Go Bo’a Tsatsi
hymns.lyrics:
Gape Go Bo’a Tsatsi Ja Boikhutso,
Le segofaditswe ke Jehofa;
Fa O re laotseng go ema tirong,
Mme botlhe ba tle ba nne kagisong.

A Re Emiseng Letsatsi Je Go
Ithuta thato ya ’Gwe, r’ utlwe;
Mme O tla utlwa fa re tlhatlosa
Merapelo le pako tsa rona.

Morena Wa Mafatshe O Reetse,
Utlwa ntswe ja bana ba ’Go tshwarong;
Tsholofetso ya ’Go e tlhomane,
Bonatsa tshwaro go ba timetseng.

Rra Tsholofelo’a Rona Godimong,
Thata, taolo tsa ’Go dia re goga
Botshelong ke modisa le tsala,
Kgalalelo, bogolo, ke tsa ’Go.

hymns.title: Rato Lwa ’Gwe Bopelonomi
hymns.lyrics:
Tsogela Boipelong Mo’a Me, Mme Baka Morekolodi;
O batla kopelo go nna, Rato lwa ’Gwe pelonomi.
Rato lwa ’Gwe, rato lwa ’Gwe, Bopelonomi kgololo.

A Mpona Ke Le Tshenyegong, Mme A Nthata Ke Le Gone;
A mpoloka mo tatlhegong, Bopelonomi bogolo.
Rato lwa ’Gwe, rato lwa ’gwe, Bopelonomi bogolo.

Lefa Baba Ba Le Bantsi, Bobipo Bo Thiba Tsela,
O nkgoga ka pabalelo, Bopelonomi bogolo.
Rato lwa ’Gwe, rato lwa ’gwe, Bopelonomi nonofo.

Fa Sepitla Jaaka Leru Je Lentsho Se Tla Se Duma,
O la A nna gaufi le nna, Bopelonomi molemo.
Rato lwa ’Gwe, rato lwa ’Gwe, Bopelonomi molemo.

hymns.title: Emelang Jeso
Ba Ke Bomang
hymns.lyrics:
Ba Ke Bomang Moseja’ Dintelo,
Ba feta melelwane ya phupu,
Ba re, Jeso boloka? Ba tlhapile mo mading.

Ba Ke Bone Ba Bokaung Jwa Bone
Ba bonyeng Jeso, mme mo botlhaleng,
Ba supa tshwaro ya ’Gwe, Ba tlhapile mo mading.

Ba Ke Ba E Rileng Bofutsaneng,
Ba bona boikhutso go Jeso,
Kagiso e’ itshekileng, Ba tlhapile mo mading.

Ba Ke Ba Erileng Mo Teng Ga Ntwa,
Ba ema gone kwa go molelo;
Jeso O re, "Tlang kwano," Ba tlhapile mo mading.

Ba Bolokilwe Ka Bosakhutleng,
Sebe, loso, bofutsana tse di
Fedile; ba boipelong, Ba tlhapile mo mading.
hymns.chorus:
Ba tsena ka dikgoro Jerusalema,
Ba tlhapile mo mading;(a Kwana)
Ba tsena ka dikgoro Jerusalema,
Ba tlhapile mo mading.

hymns.title: A O Lapile
hymns.lyrics:
A O Lapile Tshotlegong, A O Tlalelong? "Tla Go Nna,"
A re "O tle mo Boikhutsong.

A O Na Le Tshupo Go Nkgogela Go Ene?
Diatleng, naong tsa ’Gwe, go na le dintho.

A O Na Le Serwalo Se Rwalang Ke Kgosi?
E, serwalo sa tlhomamo, Sa mitlwa.

Fa Ke Mmona, Ke Latela, Fano, Ke Na Le’ng?
Ke bofutsana, tiro le Selelo.

Fa Ke Mo Ngaparela O Na Le’ng Bofelong?
Bofutsaneng le tirong, ke Fetile.

Fa Ke Re A Nkamogele, A O Tla Re Nnyaa?
Go ka feta ’godimo le Lefatshe.

Fa Ke Dira Tsotlhe, A O Tla Ntshegofatsa?
Baitshepi le babolawa, Ba re, E.

hymns.title: Bonang Mmoloki Mojako
hymns.lyrics:
Bonang Mmoloki Mojako, Oa Kokonya, Oa Kokonya,
Ga A bolo go leta teng, Ga O dire ope jalo.

O Go Tlhagisa Go Reka Gouda E E Lekilweng;
Itlotsa matlho O bone, Ntsha ’labe tse di go wena.

Utlwa Lentswe Ja Mosupi, O Na’a Tlhopho Ya Bofelo;
O kgopilwe, O mololo. Tlhoafala O tsogologe.

Tiro Ya ’Gwe E Ya Fela, O Tloga A Sa Rapela;
Yo’ leswe, a a nne leswe, Yo’ boitshepo, a nne jalo.

O Kolobetswa Ke Monyo, Mme O Mo Pelong Ya Gago.
Tsoga O bule mojako; Mo ree se lete Moratwi.

Mo Tsenye, Mo Itumelele; Mme O Tla Ikhutsa Go Ene,
Mme mo puong e monate O tla lalela le wena.

hymns.title: Ke Tsenye Fatshing Ja Nala?
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Tsenye Fatshing Ja Nala,
Ke ruile khumo ya jone;
Kwa phatsimong boitumelong,
Kwa bosigo bo fetileng.

Ke Tsenye Fatshing Ja Nala,
Ke ruile khumo ya jone;
Kwa phatsimong boitumelong,
Kwa bosigo bo fetileng.

Ke Sepela Le Mmoloki,
Mme ke tsa’a kgang e ntle Nae,
Mme O nkgoga ka seatla,
Gonne fa ke legodimong.

Go Tla Monko O Monate,
O tswa tlharing tse ’sa omeng,
Le thunyeng tse di sa swabeng,
Kwa dinokeng tsa botshelo.

Phefo E Nteretse Tumo
Ya pina tsa kwa godimo,
Di opelwa ke ba’ngele,
Kopelong ya thekololo.
hymns.chorus:
Wena Beula Fatshe lentle
Ka ke eme mo go wena
Ke lebele kwa moseja,
kwa ke agetsweng manno teng,
Mme ke bona kgalalelo,
Gae ja me ka bosakhutleng.

hymns.title: Go Sego Kopano
hymns.lyrics:
Go Sego Kopano Ya Rona Loratong,
Botsalano fano ’kete Jwa kwa legodimong.

Kwa Pele Ga Rara, Re Thela Thapelo;
Re mongwe mo dilong tsotlhe, Le gone kgomotsong.

Re Ya Lelelana, Re Thusanya Tirong,
Re ya futsafalelana Le kutlong botlhoko.

Fa Re Kgaogana, Re Utlwa Botlhoko;
Mme re tla nna re kopana Pelung Tsholofelong.

hymns.title: Tsoga Moya Wa Me
Tlang Go Jeso
Ga Go Ina Lepe Je Lengwe
hymns.lyrics:
Ga G’ina Lepe Je Lengwe Je Le Tshwanang Le Jeso,
Ke boipelo jwa ba’ngele, Le Mokreste lefatshing.

Ga Go Je Le Tshwanang Najo; Bofutsaneng Jwa Pelo,
Ga go je le tshwanang najo Boitumelo jwa pelo.

E, Ka Jone Ke Tla Mmona, Mogang O Tla Bonala,
Ka jone A nkamogele, A nkgomotse mo moyeng.

Fa’ Rata Ke Mo Direle Ka Metlha Tshimong Ya’gwe,
Foo go gontle fa Jeso A Ntshegofaletsa tsotlhe.

Fa A Rata Gore Loso Lo Nkame Tsopa Le Swang,
Foo go gontle fa Jeso e Le boitumelo jwa me.
hymns.chorus:
Leina ...lentle...Ga go je le tshwanang jwa pelo,
Leina...lentle...Ke leina la ga Jeso.

hymns.title: Janong Bua Ka Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Janong Bua Ka Jeso Tsala E Rategang,
Re thamise bolela Se O se diretsweng.

Janong Bua Ka Jeso; Ka O Itshwaretswe.
Mme O leka ka tshwaro Go ya gae godimong.

Janong Bua Ka Jeso; Mokgoro ’A Se Gore,
Ke rata Mompoloki Ene yo O ntshwetseng.

Janong Bua Ka Jeso; O Se Senye Nako;
Pelung e latlhang tiro Go tla bofutsana.

Janong Bua Ka Jeso; Tumelong E Kgalang,
Nanoga ’koeng jotlhe, Mme O Mo nee tsotlhe.
hymns.chorus:
Fokonyana ka Jeso, Le re thusa tseleng,
Fokonyana ka Jeso, Pineng le thapelong.

hymns.title: Itumeleng Lona Ba Legodimo
hymns.lyrics:
Itumeleng Lona Ba Legodimong,
Ka moya o boileng nageng;
Bona Rara O mo kgatlhantsha tseleng,
O amogela yo’ lapileng.

Itumeleng Lona Ba Legodimo,
Ka motimedi yo letlantsweng;
E moya o bolokilwe mo sebing,
Ngwana yo o tsetsweng mo boseng.

Itumeleng Mme Lo Dire Modiro,
Ba’ngele b’opela mo phenyong.
Bolelang lefoko ja boitumelo
Ka moya mongwe o o tsetsweng.
hymns.chorus:
Tlotlo, ba’ngele b’opela jang,
Tlotlo ka tumo ya harepa.
Ke mophato wa ba ba rekolwetsweng,
B’opela pina tsa kgololo.

hymns.title: Keng Bontsi Jo
hymns.lyrics:
Keng Bontsi Jo Bo Tlhoafatseng Bo Fetang B’itlhaganetse,
Ba phuthega metlha yotlhe? Ke khuduego yang tswe-tswe?
Bontsi jwa araba jwa re "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."
Bonsti jwa araba jwa re "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."

Ke Mang Jeso Yo? Ke Ka Ntlhang
A tshikinyang motse thata?
Moyeng yo fetang O na le Go tshikinya bontsi Ene,
Gape ba fetola ba re "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."
Gape ba fetola ba re "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."

Jeso Ke Ene Yo’ Kileng A Tsama’a Mo Bofutsaneng;
Mme ba ba imelwang gotlhe, Ba le’e balwetse go Ene.
Fofu sa ipela g’utlwa: "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."
Fofu sa ipela g’utlwa: "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."

Kajeno Jaaka Foo, Gotlhe Re Ka Bona Kgato Tsa ’Gwe;
O eme fa go rona, nnyaa O tsena gore A tla’ nne;
A ga re na go goa re re: "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."
A ga re na go goa re re: "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."

Tlang Lotlhe Ba Lo Imelwang,
Go boitshwarelo, kgomotso;
Lona ba lo timetseng koo, Boelang go Rara O tshwaro.
Baraedwi phemelo gaufi, "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."
Baraedwi phemelo gaufi, "Jeso Monasara Oa feta."

Mme Fa O Gana Pitso E, O Senya Rato Lwa Gagwe,
O tla boa ka maswabi, Ka O ganne pitso ya ’Gwe.
Go tla twe, "O diegile", "Jeso Monasara fetile."
Go tla twe, "O diegile", "Jeso Monasara fetile."

hymns.title: Go No Go Bolokegile
hymns.lyrics:
Go No Go Bolokegile Tse Di Naente Naene Mo Sakeng,
Mme nngwe e le kwa ntle kwa dithabeng,
Kgakala le kgoro tsa Gouda;
Kwa ntle kwa dithabeng nageng,
Kgakala le Modisa yo o bonolo,
Kgakala le Modisa yo o bonolo.

"Morena Tse Maente Naene Di Fa: A Ga Dia Lekana?"
Mme Modisa’ fetola, "Nngwe ya me, e timetse kgakala,
Mme lefa tsela e le maswe,
Ke ya go batla nku ya me nageng,
Ke ya go batla nku ya me nageng."

Ga Go Ope Yo’ Itsileng, Boteng Jwa Metse A Tlotsweng;
Fifi je Morena O fetileng, Pele a bona nku ya ’Gwe,
Kwa nageng a e utlwa e lela,
E lwala, e le gaufi le go swa,
E lwala, e le gaufi le goswa.

Morena Madi A’mo Tseleng Ang A Motlhala O’mo
thabeng?
"A thologetse yo’ na timetse, Modisa a ese mmuse."
"Morena ’atla tsa ’Go di gagotswe’ng?"
"Di phuntswe ke mitlwa Bosigong jono,"
"Di phuntswe ke mitlwa bosigong jono."

Mme Gotlhe Dithabeng Kwa Tumong, Go Tlhatloga Majweng
Kgoo e yang kgorong ya legodimo,
"Ipeleng Ke bonye nku ya me,"
Ba’ngele ba opela teroneng
"Ipeleng Morena O lere ya ’Gwe."

hymns.title: S’ Ineele Thaelong
hymns.lyrics:
S’ Ineele Thaelong, Gonne Ke Teofo,
Phenyo ’tla go thusa Go gapa mongwe,
O tlhabane senna, Fenya dithato,
O lebe go Jeso, O tla’ fetisa.

O Nyatse Bakgopo, Le Dithogako,
O tlotle Modimo, Se nyats’ina ’Gwe.
O nne mo tlhoafalong, Bopelonoming,
O lebe go Jeso, O tla ’ fetisa.

Modimo O Fa Yo’ Fenyang Serwalo,
Re fenya tumelong, Lefa re ka wa;
Mmoloki wa rona, Tla re nonotsha,
O lebe go Jeso, O tla ’fetisa.
hymns.chorus:
Kopa Mmoloki thuso, Kgomotso le nametso;
O rata go go thusa, O tla ’O fetisa.

hymns.title: Telo G’ E Mpoloke
hymns.lyrics:
Telo G’e Mpoloke Le Ke Le Dikeledi,
Ga di mphodise poifo, Ga e tlhapise dibe-
Telo g’e mpoloke.

Tiro G’mpoloke-tsa Me Tse D’itshekileng,
Kgopolo e boitshepo, Ga ’kake ya nsafatsa-
Tiro g’e mpoloke.

Teto G’e Mpoloke-ke Timela Molatung,
Ke utlwa ’ntswe ja tshwaro; Fa ke leta ke tla swa-
Teto g’e mpoloke.

Tumelo Poloko-k’ikhanya Morwa Gago,
K’ikanya tiro ya ’Gwe, Ke tshabela go Ene-
Tumelo poloko.
hymns.chorus:
Jeso O la’ ntelela; A ntshwela kwa mokgorong;
Jeso O tla nkgolola, Mme O tla mpoloka.

hymns.title: Tlang Lotlhe Ba Lo Leng Sebeng
hymns.lyrics:
Tlang Lotlhe Ba Lo Leng Sebeng, Morena O Tshwaro,
O tla lo naya boikhutso Fa lo Mo ikanya.

Jeso O Tsholotse Madi Go Re Na’a Masego;
Ikineng janong mo mading A a itshekisang.

E Jeso Ke Nnete, Tsela, E Isang Boikhutsong;
Dumelang janong go Ene Lo segofaditswe.

Tlang Janong Tsenang Baitsheping, Lo Ye Kgalalelong,
Agang fatsheng ja godimo, kwa boitumelong.
hymns.chorus:
Mo ikanyeng, Mo ikanyeng, M’ikanyeng janong;
Oa lo boloka, Boloka janong.

hymns.title: O Bitsa Dikwana
hymns.lyrics:
Bona Modis’a Israele, O Eme A Bitsa,
Utlwang O bitsa dikwana, Mme Oa d’itsholela.

O Re, "Lo Ba Leseng Ba Tle, Mme Lo Se Ba Nyatse
Gonne Morena O tletse Go ba segofatsa."

Morena Re Ba Tlisitse, Mo Boitumelong,
Bogolo ka re ba ’Go, Le bana ba rona.

hymns.title: Lo Bakeng Jehofa
hymns.lyrics:
Lo Bakeng Jehofa, Mmakeng Kgotleng Tsa ’Gwe,
Lo Mo tlotleng. ’Godimong godimo,
Tumisang lorato, Tshwaro ya ’Gwe e ka that’a ’Gwe.

Janong Terompeta E Tumise Phenyo,
Tumo ya ’Gwe. Teng go nne hareba;
Tse di dumang sentle, Tumisang kopelong ’Ina ja ’Gwe.

Fa Lo Mmaka Pakong, Tumisang Ka Tlhale,
Tse monate! O naya botshelo;
Mo’a mongwe le mongwe, tumise Ene; Bakang Jehofa.

hymns.title: Ke Ya Go Tlhoka Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Ya Go Tlhoga Jeso, Ka Ke Bofutsaneng;
Moeti le mojaki ’Ke na tsa lefatshe.
Ke tlhoka rato lwa ’Go, Go nkgomotsa tseleng,
Go nkgoga pelaelong, Go nna thata ya me.

Ke Tlhoka Pelo’a Jeso Go Utlwa Tlalelo,
Go bolela teko’a me, Go nthusa botlhokung.
Ke tlhoka Mo’a Boitshepo Go nthusta gore k’eng
Go mpontsha ka ga Jes’u, Go ntshupetsa Kwana.

Ke Ya Go Tlhoka Jeso, Mme Ke Tla Go Bona,
O le mo kgalalelong, teroneng jwa Gago,
Teng le b’o ba rekileng, Ke tla itumela
G’opela pako tsa ’Go, leba Morena, Amen.

hymns.title: Modimo Thuso Ya Rona
O Tla Ema A Tlhomane
hymns.lyrics:
O Tla Ema A Tlhomane Le Jaaka Dithaba;
A ikhutse jaaka lefika Yo ikanyang Jehofa.

No Go Se Tse Ka Femelang Salem Sentle Jalo,
Jaaka mabog’a sa khutleng A ’mo baitsheping.

Dira Molemo Morena Ba Go Ngaparelang,
Ba nna boammaaaruring jwa ’Go, Ga ba tloge molaong.

hymns.title: Molao’ Batla Tumelo
hymns.lyrics:
Molao ’Batla Tumelo E Le Nngwe E E Tshedileng;
E e reng Modimo Oa re : Ditiro tse di tshedileng.

Morena Re Itshwarele Molao Wa’go’ Tlhapaditswe
One ka o itshekile Ga re o tlhaloganye fa.

Itshwarela Thopo’a Tempela, Tlosa Boitshepololo,
Re thuse ka ntlha Morwao, Go tshegetsa mola’wa ’Go.

hymns.title: Re Tla Rakana Moseja
hymns.lyrics:
Re Tla Rakana Moseja, Kwa Go Se Yong Dintelo?
Kgalalelong e sa khutleng, Kwa go seng bofutsana?

Re Tla Rakana Tsibogong, Re Fetile Difefong?
Re tlhome seitsetsepetso, tsibogong ja godimong?

Re Tla Rakana Kwa Motseng, Kagong Tse Di Phatsemang?
Marakong a jasepera’ O o agetsweng rona?

Re Rakane Le Mmoloki, F’a Tla Go Tsaya Ba ’Gwe?
A re tla itse tshwaro ya ’Gwe, Re nne teronong ya ’Gwe?

CHORUS YA BOFELO
E re tla rakana, Re tla rakana moseja.
E re tla rakana gone, Kwa go se yong dintelo.
hymns.chorus:
A re tla rakana, Re tla rakana moseja?
A re tla rakana gone, Kwa go se yong dintelo?

hymns.title: Ke Feta Mogogorong Oo Ba Reng
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Feta Mogogorong Oo Ba Reng O Budutu,
Mme ke fitlhela tsela e e tletseng dithunya.
Go nna ke molapo wa Beula, o o montle,
Gonne ke tsamaya le Mmoloki molekane.

Ga Go Na Moruti O O Ka Fifatsang Tsela,
Gonne phatsimo ya kgalalelo e ka metlha;
Mme melodi e opelwang ke ba legodimong,
E utlwala mo mogogorong o, e nkgomotsa.

Mme K’eta Boipelong Go Ya Motseng Wa Lesedi,
Boipelo jwa me bo ntse bo gola, le phatsimo.
Mme k’atamela kgoro tsa ’gosi jwa godimo,
Gonne tsel’e tlhatlogela ’gosing jwa lorato.
hymns.chorus:
Ao Beula, ao Beula, wa tlhokega go nna,
Ka ke bona fatshe je lentle ja tsholofetso.

hymns.title: Ke Edeneng Kwa Go Gontle
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Edeneng Kwa Go Gontlhe, Botshe Tidimalong
Pedung tse di futsafetseng, Wena o nne tlotso.

Mo Pelong Ya Yo O Lelang, Go Phatsima Tsatsi,
Ja kgwaso ya baengele, Ba opelang kgakala.

Go Legae Ja Mmoloki, Teng Le Ba ’Tlhapileng;
Lefatshing ja kgalalelo, Go kopelo e ntsha.
hymns.chorus:
Ke Edeneng kwa go gontlhe, Gaeng ja baitshepi,
Gantsi ke le mo tlalelong ke Lora boikhutso jwa ’Go.

hymns.title: Ke Tla Dirang Ka Jeso?
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Tla Dirang Ka Jeso? O Eme Fa Janong,
A ’pere bofudibu, Le mitlwa mo tlhogong.

Ke Golole Legodu, Je Le Ikgodisang?
Boleo gongwe Mmoloki? A go tla ganwa mang?

Potso E E Masisi, ’Lekanyo Se Eme.
Boutlwelo-botlhoko, bo sa ntse bo le teng.

Setulong Sa Katlholo, O Latlha Lefatshe?
O ntse O goa thata, O re le bapolwe.

Ga Se Moleofing Fela, Pots’e Tlang Ka Thata;
E utlweng ba lo balaelang Mo nakong ya teko.

CHORUS YA BOFELO:
E ke potso janong; Karabo ’tla nna eng?
Ke tla bapola Barabas Ke golole Kgosi.
hymns.chorus:
E ke potso janong; Karabo’ tla nna eng?
Ke bapole Kgosi Jeso, Barabas’a tshele?

hymns.title: Utlwang Foko A Baebele
hymns.lyrics:
Utlwang Foko A Baebele A Metlheng,
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong."
Dirang boineelo jwa bosakhutleng,
Lo ikanye tsholofetso.

Lo Senka Kitso’a Moya O Boitshepo?
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong"
Mme lo tshele Nae mo botsalanong,
Fa a naya tsholofetso.

O Kgaoganngwa Keng Le Morena, Gago?
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong"
Di lereng jaaka di solofeditswe.
O tla lo thelela ’sego.

Tsholeletsang ’Pelo Morena Lona,
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong."
Baka ka boikanyo tsholofelong,
Pelung e O e ruileng.

Tsholeletsang Pako Mo Magodimong,
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong."
Re tsose aleluja boitumelong
Ka re na le tsholofetso.
hymns.chorus:
"Lereng tsa bosome polokelong,
Lo nteke," go bua Jehofa.
"Mme ke tla lo tshelela sego
Je go seng bonno go le amogela."

hymns.title: Boikhutso Jwa Jehofa
Dikagiso
Jeso Ntla Go Latela
hymns.chorus:
Ntla Go latela, Ntla Go latela,
Ntla Go latela Kae le kae ko’nkisang.

hymns.title: Re Gaseng Pelonomi
hymns.lyrics:
A Re Seleng Tlheng Dithunya, Tse Di Tletseng Mo Tseleng,
A re bolokeng mabele, Mitlwa, mmoko, re latlheng,
A re fitlheleng kgomotso Mo masegong a jaanong,
A re tloseng ka boitshoko Mitlwa yotlhe mo tseleng.

Keng Re Sa Rateng Dipina, Tse Di Tswang Mo Nonyaneng,
Keng fa re sa tlhokomele Dithunya tse di ratwang?
A re rateng lotlhabola, Fa re sale go jone,
Jaaka re le mo maregeng Lobakeng lwa serame.

Fa Re Itse Ngwanyana, Yo O Re Senyeditseng,
A tla tsoga’ nyeletse, Re sa tlhole re na nae,
Re ka gana jang go bonwa Re mo leba maswabing
Lefa a dirile tshenyo, Ke e e itshwarelwang.

Fa Re Mmona A Rapame, A Gatsetse Mo Losong,
E re ke wa re kaela, Ka ga tse di fetileng,
E re ke wa re buisa, A re jana mo losong,
Jalang tlheng bopelonomi, Re tla roba kganteje.
hymns.chorus:
Re gaseng pelonomi, Re gaseng pelonomi,
Re gaseng pelonomi, Re tla roba kganteje.

hymns.title: Morena Bona Sefefo
hymns.chorus:
Diphefo, makhubu, di tla nkutlwa, He kgaotsang’
A ke lewatle je le tlolang, A temona, a batho, a eng le eng,
Ga o kake wa nwela mokoro, Ka mung wa lobopo a le mo
teng;
Di tla le utlwa lentswe ja Me ; He kgaotseng, He kgaotsang,
Di tla le utlwa lentswe ja me, He lo kgaotseng.

hymns.title: Mmoloki Yo Gakgamatsang
hymns.lyrics:
Mmoloki Yo Gakgamatsang Ke Jeso,
Morena wa me Mmoloki,
O fitlha mo’a me ’farong lwa lefika
Kwa dinokeng tsa kgatlhego.

Mmoloki Yo Gakgamatsang Ke Jeso,
O tlosa morwalo wa me,
O ntshwere ga nkake ka tshikinyega,
O nna’a nonofo ka metlha.

O Rwesa Nako Tsotlhe Ka Masego,
Mme O di tlatsa bo-Ene,
K’opelela Modimo kgalalelo,
Ka Morekolodi wa me.

Mogang Ke Tsogang Phatsimong Ya Gagwe,
Go Mo kgatlhantsha mo marung,
Poloko ya Gagwe, lorato lwa ’Gwe
Ntla ’pela le ba sa balweng.
hymns.chorus:
O fitlha mo’a me ’farong lwa lefika,
Je le sirang mo sekakeng;
O fitlha ’tshelo jwa me ratong lwa ’Gwe,
O mpipa ka s’atla sa ’Gwe,
O mpipa ka s’atla sa ’Gwe.

hymns.title: Morekolodi A Ise Re Salang Sentle
hymns.lyrics:
Morekolodi A Ise A Re Salang Sentle,
A re tlogelela Mogomotsi go nna.

A Tla Go R’itumedisa, Moyeng Yo ’Ithatisang,
Fa a ka bona pelo e E mo ratang.

Re Utlwa Lentswe Ja Gagwe, Ke Je Le Bonolo,
Le tlosa phoso mme le gomotsa pelo.

Molemo O Re Nang Nao, Phenyo Re E Bonang,
Le kgopolo e boitshepo ke tsa Gagwe.

M’wa O Boitsheko Le Tshwaro Nna Pelo Tlhomogi,
Baakanya pelo tsa rona Jaaka Wena.

hymns.title: Le’ Be Tsa’go Di Fubitse
hymns.lyrics:
Le’ ’Be Tsa ’Go Di Fubitse Di Tla Nna Tshweu, Tshweu.
Le’ ’be tsa ’go di fubitse Di tla nna tshweu, tshweu.
Lefa di ka nna mokgona, Di tla nna ditshweu
Le di ka nna letlhololo, Le di ka nna letlhololo,
Di tla nna ditshweu tshweu Di tla nna ditshweu tshweu.

Utlwang Ntswe Je Le Rapelang, Ao Boelang Modimong,
Utlwang ntswe je le rapelang, Ao boelang Modimong,
O boutlwelobotlhoko Mme O lorato;
Utlwang ntswe je le rapelang, Utlwang ntswe je le
rapelang,
Ao boelang Modimong, Ao boelang Modimong.

’Tla Itshwarela Tlolo Tsa ’Go, Mme O Tla Di Lebala
’Tla ishwarela tlolo tsa ’go, Mme O tla di lebala.
"Lebang go Nna lona batho," Go bua Modimo;
’Tla itshwarela tlolo tsa ’go, Tla itshwarela tlolo tsa ’go,
Mme o tla di lebala, Mme O tla di lebala.

hymns.title: Latlhela Mogala
hymns.lyrics:
Latlhela Mogala Kwa Lefifing,
Mongwe o teng yo o ka bolokwang;
Morwa ’rra mongwe foo go tla ya mang,
Go latlhela mogala kotsing ya ’gwe?

Dira Ka Bonako Le Ka Thata,
A O nnela eng, O diegelang.
Bona wa tiba akofa janong
Mme ka mokoro tsamaya, tsama’.

O Latlhela Bathung Ba Ba Kotsing,
Ba tibang botlhokung kwa
O ’seng O nne: Phefo tsa thaelo le bofutsana,
Di tloga di ba isa kwa botenyeng.

Nako’a Poloko E Tlog’e Fela
Ba tloga ba ya kwa bosakhutleng;
Akofa morwa rra ga go nako,
Mme latlhela mogala ba boloke.
hymns.chorus:
Latlhela thapo, Latlhela thapo,
Mongwe o ya kgakala,
Latlhela thapo, Latlhela thapo,
Mongwe wa tiba janong.

hymns.title: Ikaega Mabogong A Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Ikaega Mabogong A Jeso, O Tla Go Thusa Tla Go Thusa;
Fa O ikanya rato lwa ’Gwe O go tlatsa pako.

Ikaega Mabogong E Jeso, O Tla Phatsemisa Tsel’a’go;
Mo latele fela boipelong, Utlwa ntswe ja Gagwe.

Ikaega Mabogong A Jeso, Lere Tlalelo Tsotlhe Tsa ’Go:
Morwalo o o bekete O Lere go Morena.

Ikaega Mabogong A Jeso, Foo I Lese Tsotlhe Go Ene
O tletse lorato mo pelong, G’a Ifale matlho.
hymns.chorus:
S.&T.
Ikaega mabogong a Gagwe,
Mo ikanye; tsa’a tshwaro ya’Gwe;
Ikaega, leba gae godimo,
Mobogong a Mmoloki.
A.&B.
Ikaega mabogong a ’Gwe Mo ikanye;
Ikaega mabogong, tsa’a Tshwaro ya ’Gwe,
Ikanya mme O lebe legaeng godimo,
Mabogong a Mmoloki.

hymns.title: Ke Na Le Morapeledi
hymns.lyrics:
Ke Na Le Morapeledi Kgalalelong
Mmoloki yo rategang tsala ya me;
Mme janong O mpabaletse ka bonolo,
Ao Mmoloki wa me e nne wa gago!

Ke Na Le Rara, O Mphile Tsholofelo,
Ya bosakhutleng, e e boammaruri;
Mme O tloga A mpiletsa kwa go Ene,
Mme ke eletsa A go amogela.

Kobo E E Ntle-ntle E E Tshweu,
Kgalalelong e letile pono’a me;
Mme fa ke e amogela e phatsima,
Tsala’ me amogela nngwe le wena.

Ke Neilwe Kagiso ’Kete Ke Noka,
E sa itsiweng ke tsala’ lefatshe;
Keresete ke Mung, Keresete Mofi,
Nke O ka newa kagiso ya Gagwe.

Fa Jes’a Go Bonye Bolelela Bangwe,
Gore Mmoloki wa me ke wa gago;
Rapela Mmoloki ba tle kgalalelong,
Thapelo ’tla ’rajwa jaaka go wena.
hymns.chorus:
Mmoloki wa ’go le wena;
Mmoloki wa me A re wa ’go le wena.

hymns.title: \"Bosakhutleng Kae\"
hymns.lyrics:
\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\" Bo Fofa Loaping;
Modumong tidimalong, ntse bo gone:
Potso e masisi- \"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"
Potso e masisi- \"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"

\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\" Ao Bosakhutleng! Kae ?
Polokong kgalalelong kana tshenyegong?
Gongwe bobeding jo- \"Bosakhutleng! Kae?
Gongwe bobeding jo- \"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"

\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\" O Ka Rua Jang
Tsa lefatshe jeno le tlhokolomogo
O’ s’O tlhomanise- \"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"
O’ s’O tlhomanise-\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"

\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\" Tsala Tlhokomela;
Modimo O tloga O dira katlholo;
Tsatsing je ja gago "Bosakhutleng! Kae?"
Tsatsing je ja gago "Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"

\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\" Ao, Bosakhutleng Kae?
Tsala, se robale, se ye le lefatshe,
Araba potso e-\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"
Araba potso e-\"Bosakhutleng! Kae?\"

hymns.title: Jeso Mmoloki
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso Mmoloki Bethelema O Tsaletswe Mo Bojelong,
ditlhonyeng;
’Ne ’le kgakgamatso, bakang Ene, A batla nna, e nna.
A batla nna e,nna. (A batla nna,)
A batla nna e nna(A batla nna)
’Ne ’le kgakgamatso, bakang Ene, A batla nna, e nna.

Jeso Mmoloki Kwa Khalefari, O La A Ntuelela A Nkgolola;
’Ne le kgakgamatso, go nnile jang? A swela nna e nna.
A swela nna e, nna, (A swela nna)
A swela nna e, nna, (A swela nna)
’Ne le kgakgamatso, go nnile jang? A swela nna e nna.

Jeso Mmoloki, Ene Wa Gale, Ke Sa Le Kgakala Le Lesaka,
’Ka bonolo A bua le mo’a wa me, A bitsa nna, e, nna,
A bitsa nna e, nna, (A bitsa nna)
A bitsa nna e, nna, (A bitsa nna)
’Ka bonolo A bua le mo’a wa me, A bitsa nna, e, nna

Mmoloki O Tla Tswa Legodimong, Go Itumedisa
tsholofetso
Ke tla Mmona A fologa loaping, A tlela nna, e nna.
A tlela nna e, nna, (A tlela nna,)
A tlela nna e, nna, (A tlela nna.)
Ke tla Mmona A fologa loaping, A tlela nna, e nna.

hymns.title: Sedi Je Le Nolo
hymns.lyrics:
Sedi Je Le ’Nolo Mo Lefifing, Ntsamaisa:
Go lefifi, ke kgakala le gae; Ntsamaisa:
Ntshegetsa ’nao ga ke lope pono
Ya kgakala Gaufi go ntekane.

Gale Ne Ke Sa Rapele Ke Re, Ntsamaisa:
’Ne k’itlhaolela tsela mme janong Ntsamaisa:
Ke ne ke ithata ke sa boife,
Se nkgakologelwe boikgodisong.

O Ntse O Ntshegofatsa, Mme O Tla Nna O Nkgoga
Dikgweng, majeng, nokeng tse bogale Go ya mosong,
Mme mosong baengele ba ’nyenya,
Ba ke ba ratileng gale, janong.

hymns.title: Tsela ’Go Morena
Pelo E Futsafetseng
hymns.chorus:
Tlang (e tlang) kwano go nna, (Lona) Lotlhe ba lo lapileng,
Lo imelwang (moyeng) Ke tla lo lapolosa: (Tlang lo)
Itseeleng
Jokwe wa me, Ithuteng ga me, Gonne ke bonolo,
Boingotlo pelong; Lo tla iponela tapologo.

hymns.title: Kopelo Tsa Boipelo
hymns.lyrics:
Kopelo Tsa Boipelo, Tsatsing Je Je Lentle,
Re tla baka Mmoloki, Botshelo le tsela.

O Ratile Banyana, Fa’ Na’le Lefatsheng,
Le a le legodimong Wa re Rata r’a itse.

Re Rata Pako Tsa ’Gwe, G’utlwa Dipolelo,
Tsa A le Galelia Wa bogologolo.

Mmoloki Yo O Sego, Re Khubama Fano,
Re lopa O re thuse Go tshelela Wena.
hymns.chorus:
Re opela Dipako tsa Kgosi, (ya rona),
Re opela kgalalelo’a Kgosi.

hymns.title: Naledi E Ntle
hymns.chorus: ’Sa phatsima, ’sa phatsima, Naledi’a polok’a Modimo.

hymns.title: Utlwang Mantswe A Boidiidi
Mongwe O Tla Tsena
hymns.lyrics:
Mongwe O Tla Tsena ’Ntleng Jole Kganteje, Kganteje,
A lekele tsa kgalalelo, K’wena? Ke nna? K’wena? Ke nna?
Tsam’e mebileng ya gouda, Pono tse dintle a di bone,
A nne modirong wa natefo: K’wena? Ke nna? K’wena? Ke
nna?

Mongwe O Tla Rola Mokgoro Kganteje, Kganteje,
O tla amogela serwalo, K’wena? Ke nna? K’wena? Ke nna?
Kgosi kgalalelong a ’bone, A gololege bofutsaneng,
Boipelong jo bo sa khutleng: k’wena? Ke nna? K’wena?
Ke nna?

Mongw’o Tla Mojako O Tswetswe, Kganteje, Kganteje,
Utlwa ’ntswe le re "’Ke go itse," k’wena? Ke nna? K’wena?
Ke nna?
O tla bitsa a sa utluwe, O tla ganelela lefela.
A tlha’le tu’lo ya baitshepi: k’wena? Ke nna? K’wena? Ke
nna?

Mongw’o Tl’opela Le Bafenyi, Kganteje, Kganteje,
Le ba rekolotsweng ka madi k’wena? Ke nna? K’wena?
Ke nna?
O tla dumedisa tsibogong, Baratwi kwa go seng kgaogano,
A bolokilwe kgalalelong: k’wena? Ke nna? K’wena? Ke
nna?

hymns.title: Go Ba Ba Tlhokang Kgomotso
hymns.chorus:
A feta, (a feta) A feta, (a feta)
Re ka dira molemo, fa matsatsi a feta.

hymns.title: ’Nno Bo Teng Jwa Tidimalo
hymns.lyrics:
Nno Bo Teng Jwa Tidimalo, Gaufi Modimong,
Kwa sebe se sa tshwenyeng teng, Gaufi Modimong.

’Nno Bo Teng Jwa Kgomotso Ntle, Gaufi Modimong,
Nno jo re bonang Mmoloki Gaufi Modimong.

Nno Bo Teng Jwa Kgololego, Gaufi Modimong,
Kwa boipelong, kagisong, Gaufi Modimong.
hymns.chorus:
Jeso Morekolodi, Yo tswang kwa Modimo,
Tshegetsa, re letile, Gaufi Modimong.

hymns.title: K’eletsa Jang Tsatsi
hymns.lyrics:
K’eletsa Jang Tsatsi Jele Barekolodwi Ba
Tlang b’apere bosweu, Sion, gaeng ja boitumelo

Ntla Utlwa Dialeluja Tse Tswang Boidiiding,
Ke le moweng wa legodimo, Ntla opela nabo.

Kuang! Moso O Gaufi, Moeng Wa O Eletsa
O phimola keledi tsotlhe, Phenyo lobopo.
hymns.chorus:
O nkisa teng nkisa teng Thabeng Sion
O nkisa motseng wa lorato Kwa go ntseng baitshepi.

hymns.title: Mo Nakong Ya Teko
Ba Lere Kwa Go Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Ba Lere Kwa Go Jeso, Dimpho Naong Tsa ’Gwe,
Lorato mo Mmoloking, Lwa natetsha dimpho,
Ditiro tse molemo, Di thusa batlhoki,
Ga go mpho mo go tsone E e nyatsegileng.

Ntle Ga Bafi Ba Bangwe Ga Ema Motlhoki;
’Bona neo tsa bone, E potlana molemo,
A tlala tlhologelo Go na’a lefa e nnye;
Ija! Ga a na sepe Fa pele ga Kgosi.

Bofutsaneng A Goa, "Morena Yo’ ’Nolo,
Tsaya se ke Go nayang, Pel’a me ya boleo."
E Jeso bonolong A re, "S’e bale potlana,
Le’ tsotlhe di tlhokega, Ya ’go ya di gaisa."
hymns.chorus:
O ka leretse Jeso Mpho e e rategang?
’Re "pelo’a me Morena" E bee naong tsa ’Gwe.

hymns.title: Jeso Morena O Nthuse
hymns.lyrics:
Jeso Morena O Nthuse, Gonne Fa O Seyo K’a Swa
Atametsa polok’a ’Go, O ntsee jaaka ke ntse.

’Ke Na Thuso Ke Molato, Madia ’Go A Nthologetse
O ka ntira jaak’ O rata, Mme ntsee jaaka ke ntse

Ga Go Se Nka Se Baakanyang, K’itshenyetsa Tse
gaisang;
Mpoloka ka ’ina ja ’Go, O ntsee jaaka ke ntse.

K’obama Fa Pele Ga ’Go, Mpona Mmoloki Naong Tsa ’Go;
Simol’la wetsa tir’a Go, O ntsee jaaka ke ntse

Fa O Na Le Tiro Ya Me, Ntlatsa Safatsa Pelo’a Me;
Dira mo go nna le ka nna, O ntsee jaaka ke ntse

Bofelong Tir’e Fedile, Go Lolwe, Phenyo E Bonywe,
Ke tla nna ke goa fela, O ntsee jaaka ke ntse
hymns.chorus:
Ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse, Ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse.
Atametsa polok’a ’Go, O ntse jaaka ke ntse
T.& B.
Ntsaya, ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse, Ntsaya, ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse
Ntsaya, ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse, Ntsaya, ntsa’a jaaka ke ntse

hymns.title: Boipelong Tirong
hymns.lyrics:
Boipelego Tirong Ya Morena, Re Ya K’atla Tse
d’ithatisang
Go dira se re ka se neelwang; Re tla latela thom’a rona

Boipelong, Bolela Polelo Ya Rato Lwa ’Gwe Mono
’fatshing;
K’reste kgalalelo ya Rara O nna tshego ja Gagwe fela

Re Isa Batimedi Mmoloking, Baleofi Kwaneng Ya
Modimo
Re latela Morena boikobong Tselenge Oe tsamaileng.
hymns.chorus:
Direla Jeso, Ka boipelo, ka boipelo
Direla Jeso, Tshimong ya ’Gwe lefatshing
T & B.
A re direleng Morena, Ka boipelo e, ka boipelo;
A re direleng Morena, Tshimong ya ’Gwe lefatshing.

hymns.title: E Ya Tshwanela Kwana
hymns.chorus:
Tlotlo haleluya! Mmakeng haleluja!
Tlotlo haleluya! Go Kwana.

hymns.title: Atla Pedi Go Direla Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
’A Tla Pedi Go Direla Jeso,
’Leme longwe lwa go Mmaka,
’Tsebe pedi f’A nkgakolola,
’Leme longwe go opela.

’Nao Pedi Go Tsamaya Tsela
E yang makgotleng ’godimong;
Matlho mebedi a Bibela, ’Bolelang,
’Rato lwa Jeso.

Ke Pelo Nngwe Go E Naya Jeso,
Mowa mongwe go bolokwa,
Tshelo bongwe tirelong ya ’Gwe,
Nna fela go nna wa Gagwe.
hymns.chorus:
Re etla Morena,Mosong wa nyana jwa rona,
Re etla Morena, Go ithut’ Wena.

hymns.title: Khokho, Khokho ?
hymns.lyrics:
Khokho, Khokho, Mang Yo Koo? O Letile,montle Jang!
Ke Moeti wa segosi, ’Ise go bonw ’o ’jalo;
A! mowa wa me O ka se Bulele yo ntseng jalo?
Bulele yo ntseng jalo?

Khokho, Khokho,’sa Le Teng, O Letile,o Montle.
Mojak ’o thata go bulwa ,Gonne methanthanyane
Ka dithapo tsa yone e ’Thatheletse setswalong,
’Thatheletse setswalong.

Khokho, Khokho, ’Sa Le Foo ? O Letile, Mo Bontleng;
’Atla se ’ntho s’a khokhonya Tlas’a tlhogo e rweleng
Mitlwa matlho a Mmoloki, Yo o pelotelele, Yo o pelotelele.

hymns.title: Leba Go Jeso
hymns.lyrics:
Leba Jeso G’a Na Boleo;
Rara mpalela tshelo jwa ’Gwe.
Botshelo jwa me jwa boleo,
Bo bipe ka botshelo jwa ’Gwe

Tlol’e Dirile ’Ntho Tse Boteng;
Bofubidu mo’a me wa tshaba.
Go apes’wa Jeso ke Wena,
Ke polokong mola’o ntshekisang.

Nka Itse Fa Ke Bolokilwe,
Jes’O tshotse kobo e tshweu:
’’Morena kea e amogela
Ke apara ’tshelo jwa Gago.’’

Tetlanyo Ke ’ Bona ’Song Lwa ’Gwe’
Ke siamisitswe tshelong jwa ’Gwe
Kutl’a foko ja ’Gwe ’ntshepisa;
Morena’ m’A tla kgalalelong.
hymns.chorus:
Bo bipe ka botshelo jwa ’Gwe,
Foo ke tla itse tlalo jwa ’Gwe;
Botshelo jwa me jwa boleo,
Bo bipe ka botshelo jwa ’Gwe.

hymns.title: Lo Utlwatseng Ntwa<
hymns.lyrics:
Lo Utlwatseng Ntwa, Mmaba O Gaufi;
Banera lo e tsholetseng
Lotlhe tlhomelang, Mme lo tlhomameng.
Lo ikanyeng mo fokung ja ’Gwe.

A Re Tsweleleng Re Yeng Kwa Mmabeng,
Re itse fa re tla fenya.
Banera a e phatsime seding,
Re lwa tshiamong Re tla fenya.

Wena Modimo Utlwa Re Bitsa,
Re thuse rotlhe ka tshwaro;
Ntwa e fedile, Phenyo e bonywe,
Re rwale k’rona ’Gosing jwa ’Gwe.
hymns.chorus:
Lo lweleng banera batlhabani,
Etle’tsegang, bolelang gotlhe.
Tswelang pele lo goeng Hosana,
K’rest’O laola Baikanyegi.

hymns.title: Nkgoga Ke Se Timele
Go No Go Le Mongwe Yo Na A Ntshwela
hymns.lyrics:
Go Ne Go Le Mongwe O Na Ntshwela,
Gore sethobogwa ke tshele,
Mme tsela ya mokgoro O na’ tsamaya,
Go itshwarela ’be me tsotlhe.

O Bonolo, Lorato Le Pelonomi
F’A ntlosa mabebe mo pelong,
Mme ’’ga go tshekiso’’ k’itse ke golotswe,
Ka ’be tsa me tsotlhe ’bapotswe.

Ke Tla Kampa Mmoloki Mme Ke Sa Tloge
Ke tla eta boitumelong,
Ka kopelo ’pounameng, kopelo pelong
Gore ’be tsa me di tlositswe.
hymns.chorus:
O di kokothetse mokgorong wa Gagwe,
O ratile go di belega
Ka tlalelo Jeso O ile mokgorong!
Mme A ya teng le dibe tsa me.

hymns.title: A Bothokong, Bofutsana
hymns.lyrics:
A! Botlhoko, Bofutsana, J’o Kileng Jwa Nna Nakong,
Fa ke ne ke re go Jeso, ’’Gotlhe ga me, ga ’Go nnya’
Gotlhe ga me, ga ’Go nnya, Gotlhe ga me ga ’Go nyaa,’’
Fa ke ne ke re go Jeso, ’’Gotlhe ga ga me, ga ’Gonnya’.

Mme A Mphitlhela; Ka Mmona A Le Madi Setlharing;
Mme pelo ya me ya seba ’’Gongwe ga me, gong’ ga ’Go,
Gongwe ga me, gong’ ga ’Go, Gongwe ga me, gong’ ga
’Go,’’
Mme pelo ya me ya seba, ’Gongwe ga me, gong’ ga ’Go.’’

Ka Metlha Tshwaro Ya Gagwe, E Fodisang, E Tletseng,
Ya nkokobetsa, ka seba, ’’Ga me gonnye go ga ’Go,
Ga me gonnye go ga ’Go, Ga me gonnye go ga ’Go
Ya nkokobetsa, ka seba,’’Ga me gonnye go ga ’Go.’’

Lo Godimo Ga ’Godimo, Lo Boteng Go Lewatle,
Lo fentse rato lwa Gago, ’’Ga me nnya, gotlhe ga ’Go,
Ga me nnya, gotlhe ga ’Go, Ga me nnya,gotlhe ga ’Go,’’
Lo fentse rato lwa Gago, ’’Ga me nnya, gotlhe ga ’Go.’’

hymns.title: Morena Nthobela Senkgwe Se Se Tshedileng
Gae Ja Mokreste
hymns.lyrics:
Gaeng Ja Mokreste Bontleng, Ke ’Fatshe Ja Boikhutso
Mmolok’wa me O ile Go dira topo ya me.

O Mpaakanyetsa Bodulo Bo Nna Ka Bosakhutlheng,
Gonne k’o bo sa fetogeng Fatshing ja boitshepo.

Teng Ga Go Tsene Setlhabi, Ga Go Bofutsana Teng.
’Garing jole jwa legodimo, Ke tla rwala serwalo.

Loso Lo Tla Nyelediwa Lobelela Lo Ntshiwa;
Opelang barekolodwi Ipeleleng mos’o sang.

Opelang Barua Boswa, Opelang Phenyo Tseleng;
Lo tla bulelwa Sione, Lo tla bona go tsena.
hymns.chorus:
Go boikhutso balaping, Go boikhutso balaping,
Go boikhutso balaping. Boikhutso jwa ’go;
Moseja ga Jordane, Monateng Edene.
Kwa setlharing sa botshelo Boikhutsong jwa ’go.

hymns.title: Tholi Lidza Phalaphala
hymns.chorus:
tholi lidza phalaphala, lidza i tou pfala;
Mudzimu U a u ruma, uri vha tshile vhothe.

hymns.title: Murena U A da
hymns.chorus:
U tsini, na munango, Murena U tsini na munango;
U a da, U a da o swika munangoni.

hymns.title: U vhonana Zwifhatuwo
hymns.chorus:
Mato a do di Mu vhona, Yesu a tshi do vhuya
Mato a do di Mu vhona, ndi Ene Yesu ngoho.

hymns.title: U a da
hymns.chorus:
U a da, U a da nga u tavhanya, U a da fhano shangoni;
Vhatshimbili vha do dzhena hayani, musi Yesu a tshi vhuya.

hymns.title: Hayani Hu Tshe Kule?
hymns.lyrics:
Hu tshee kule naa hayani? Ndi vhudzisa Mune wanga,
A ri ’vhusiku ho fhela, hu da madautsha
Zwino u songo tsha lila, kondelela ,da ri tuwe,
Ro swika zwino tshedzani, tshe tshi sa fheliho.

Nda vhudzisa nduna ya andwa, khei phindulo ya hone,
"Ndi do lwa nda kondelela, nga pfumo la tshedza;
Zwino u songo tsha lila, I ya hone nga vhulenda,
Mukovhe u do u wana, musi wo no kunda.’

Ndo sedzisa kha zwifhinga, zwi sumba uri ri tsini
"Na u vhuya ha Murena, hu do fhela shango;
Zwino u songo tsha lila, dzitsumbedzo dzi ya anda,
Dzi ri vhudza uri Yesu, u tsini-tsini ha."

Hayani a hu tshe kule, ndi muhumbulo wavhudi
"Mutshimbili kondelela, fhumula zwililo;
Zwino u songo tsha lila, ngauri ri do tangana,
Dzitshengelo dzo no fhela, hayani tadulu.’

hymns.title: Sedzesani Vhakhethwa.
hymns.chorus:
U a da! Yesu U a da! U a da! U da nga thendo!
U a da u vhusa vhothe, U a da, Ee, U a da

hymns.title: Musi A Tshi Vhuya
hymns.lyrics:
Musi a tshi vhuya U do dzhia vhathu vhawe
Vhathu vhawe vha do penya vhunga sa Ene

A vha dzhia, A vha dzhia, vha thubwa nga Ene;
Vho lugaho vha do penya, nga misi yothe.

3.Na vhana vha re vhatuku, vha funa Murena
Ndi vhakhethwa vha Yehova, Muvhumbi washu.
hymns.chorus:
Khare dzi do penya sa naledzi tadulu;
Vhothe vha do penya sa vhakhethwa vhawe

hymns.title: Phalaphala I tshi Lila
hymns.lyrics:
Phala-phala I tshi lila tshifhinga tsho no fhela,
Hu do swika duvha lo ambiwa
Avho vho tshidzwaho vha kuvhanganyelwa tadulu,
Vha vhidzwa tadulu ndi do vha hone.

Ilo duvha ndi lavhudi, vha tshi do vuswa vhothe
Vha do vha vhe vhaswa vhukuma vhothe;
Avho vho nangwaho vha kuvhanganyelwa hayani
Vha vhidzwa tadulu ndi do vha hone.

Kha ri shumele Murena u swika A tshi vhuya,
Kha ri divhadzane lufuno lwawe;
Ro no fa a ri tsha do kona u shuma na tshithu
Vha vhidzwa tadulu ndi do vha hone.
hymns.chorus:
Vha tshi do vhidzwa tadulu, Vha tshi do vhidzwa tadulu
Vha tshi do vhidzwa tatulu vha vhidzwa tadulu ndi do vha hone.

hymns.title: Yesu U A da Hafhu
hymns.chorus: U a da hafhu! U a da hafhu! Yesu u a da hafhu.

hymns.title: Ri tangana Mulamboni
hymns.chorus:
Ri tangana mulamboni, kha wavhudi kha wavhudi tshothe
Ro tangana na vhakhethwa, khulunoni ya Mudzimu

hymns.title: Ndi do U Tevhela
hymns.chorus:
Ndi do u tevhela Yesu, Wo fhaladza malofha;
Na musi u tshi nyadziwa, Ndi do di U tevhela

hymns.title: Hu Na Tshisima
hymns.lyrics:
Hu na tshisima tshi bvaho, Ha Yesu Murena;
Vhatshinyi vhe vha tamba vho, Hone malofhani,
Vhothe vha do bviswa vhutshinyini havho,
Vhatshinyi vho tanzwiwaho, Hona malofhani.

Mutshinyi we a vhambwa, A takala u vhona;
Mune wa tshone tshisima, A mu tanzwa zwivhi,
Nangwe ndi na zwivhi, Ndi do di tanzwiwa,
Mune wa tshone tshisima, A mu tanzwa zwivhi.

Rine rothe ri livhuwa, Ngwana yo ri fela;
Shango lothe li nga tshidzwa, nga yone zwivhini,
Malofha a maanda, A u tanzwa vhutshinyi,
Shango lothe li nga tshidzwa, nga yone zwivhini.

Tshe nda vhona Iwe Yesu, wo felaho rine;
Lufuno lwau lu kha nne, U swika lufuni,
U swika U tshi da, U swika U tshi da,
Lufuno lwau lu kha nne, U swika lufuni.

Yesu U nndugisele-vho, vhudzulo tadulu;
Nangwe zwi songo mpfanela, Iwe wo no mpfela,
Wo mpfulufhedzisa, Na vhutshilo vhuswa,
Nangwe zwi songo mpfanela, Iwe wo no mpfela.

Ndi na luimbo lwavhudi, Ndi renda u tshidzwa;
Nga maanda awe Murena, Ndo tanzwiwa zwivhi,
Ndi nga we a lovha, A vuwa vhafuni,
Nga maanda awe Murena, Ndo tanzwiwa zwivhi.

hymns.title: Ndi Tshene Sa Mahada
hymns.chorus:
Sa Mahada, sa Mahada-vho!
ntanzwe-vho ndi tshene sa Mahada.

hymns.title: Thetshelesa Mali I tshi Wa
hymns.chorus:
Ngwinzhi, ngwinzhi, ngwinzhi, ngwinzhi, ipfa i ya wa!
Ndi ya Yesu yothe, i ya kha Ene.

hymns.title: Yesu U A Mpfuna
hymns.chorus:
Yesu ya pfuna, U a pfuna nne;
Yesu ya pfuna, I ralo Bivhili.

hymns.title: Ndo tanzwa Zwanda
hymns.lyrics:
Zwanda khezwi khezwi,
Ndo zwi tanzwa zwa tshena;
Ndi nekedza Yesu.

Na ndevhe nga dzi pfe,
Na nga maduvha othe;
Mishumo yavhudi,
Ine nda nga ita-vho.

Mato nga a sedze,
Hothe hune nda ya-vho;
Uri ndi si tshine,
Nda do khakhela Yesu.
hymns.chorus:
Na milenzhe yanga, nga i thanyele,
Hune ya ya hone, i ye ha Yesu.

hymns.title: Ndi Lufuno Lu Ri Takadzaho
hymns.lyrics:
Nga lufuno lwa Yesu ri pfa ro takala,
Ri kona u kondelela na kha vhanwe vhathu.

Vhufheloni ha zwothe, hu do swika Yesu;
Ri do imba luimbo, lwa vhothe vho kundaho.

hymns.title: Phanda Vhakreste
hymns.lyrics:
Tshivhidzo tsha Yesu mafumo ngeya,
Ri ye-vho nndwani, ri lwe na swina,
Nduna ya mmbi, ndi Ene Yesu vho;
Ndi Muvhusa vhothe, U da na gundo.

Vhonani vhahashu, Mbilu ya muvhi,
I a tetemela, i ofha Yesu,
Ipfi lo ambiwa, ndi la u kunda;
Kha ri khwathe rothe, imbani nothe.

Ri tshimbile sa ’mbi, inwi vha Yesu,
Kha ri vha edzise vho no kundaho,
Ri si balangane, khosi ndi ’thihi.
Lutendo luthihi lu re kha Yesu.

Mahosi a shango, a lovha othe,
Tshivhidzo tsha Yesu tshone a tshi wi,
Tshi do di mu kunda, Ene sathane;
Kristo E na rine, ri do ofhani?

I da ri tangane, ri vhe vhathihi,
Sa tshivhidzo tshawe, ri imbe rothe,
Ri khode Murena maduvha othe,
Na vharunwa vhothe ri imbe rothe.
hymns.chorus:
I yani-ha phanda,
Inwi maswole,
Murena Asuyu,
A ri lwelaho.

hymns.title: Dzula Wo dilinda
hymns.lyrics:
Iwe muya wanga,
Dzula wo dilinda;
Mudzimu ndi thavha yanga
Musi ndo no neta.

Dzula nga thabelo,
U vhe mulaifa;
Yesu U ’tsumbedze ngoho,
Na vhutshilo vhuswa.

Ilwa na mulingi,
U ’tsumbedze Yesu;
Fhuluta mitodzi yanga,
Ndi sendze litadulu.

hymns.title: Vuwa Muya Wanga
Ndi da Tshifhambanoni
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi da tshifhambanoni,
ndi da nga u pofula
Zwothe ndi a zwi sanda,
Kha Iwe ndi vhutshilo.

Ndi di nekedza  tshothe,
lupfumoni na khonani;
Mbilu yanga na muya,
zwothe nga hu sa fheli.

Yesu U amba hafhu,
U do ’nyita mukhethwa;
Ndi do vha o tshilaho,
thendo ndi ya Murena.
hymns.chorus:
Ndo fulufhela Yesu,
Ngwana ya Khalivari;
Yesu U amba na nne,
’ndi do u tanzwa tshothe.’

hymns.title: Murena Ndi Pfa Phathutshedzo
hymns.lyrics:
Murena ndi pfa phathutshedzo, U tshi dzi shulula;
Phathutshedzo kha dzi dale if, uri ndi vhe mukhethwa,
Kha dzi de, kha dzi de, phathutshedzo kha dzi de.

’Si mphire khotsi-anga, u songo tsha mphira na nne;
Ndi na zwivhi zwi mbiluni, zwino ndi da kha Iwe,
Kha Iwe, kha Iwe, zwino ndi da kha Iwe.

’Si mphire khotsi-anga, U songo nndata Murena.
Ndo lindela U tshi ’mbidza, uri ndi de kha Iwe,
Ndi do da, ndi do da,
U tshi mmbidza ndi doda.

Ndi tama muya waU Khotsi, U ’ndalele na nne.
A thi vhoni, ndo pofula, amba ipfi ndi vhone,
Amba-vho, amba-vho, amba ipfi ndi vhone.

Ndo vhona lufuno lwau, nga malofha a Yesu.
Phathutshedzo kha dzi ande, uri ndi vhe mukhethwa,
Mukhethwa, mukhethwa, uri ndi vhe mukhethwa.

hymns.title: Nndadze Zwino Muya Mukhethwa.
hymns.lyrics:
Ndadze zwino Mutshidzi, nga Muya Wau Mukhethwa,
Khonani yashu Mufeli, Ida dzhena U dzule.

Ndi’we U zwi divhaho, U konaho U ndolisa,
A u shayaho ndi nne, Ida U dzule kha rine

A shayaho nungo ndi nne, ndi khotha phanda Hau,
Ndi Iwe a re na Maanda, ndadze nga Muya Wau.

Fhembeledza mbilu yanga, Yo neta nga mihwalo,
Mufhembeledzi Mutshidzi, Ida-ha U ndolise.
hymns.chorus:
O Muya, Mukhethwa, ro u lindela rine
’da kha rine U ri dadze, ’da U dzule kha rine.

hymns.title: Ndi U toda Tshothe
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi U toda tshothe, Yesu wanga,
A nthusaho haho, nga mulalo.

Ndi U toda tshothe, dzula na nne,
Milingo a i di ndi na Iwe.

Ndi U toda tshothe, matunguni,
Ida-ha U nthuse, ndi sa do fa.

Ndi U toda tshothe, mpfunze ndila,
Phetha-ha zwe Wa mpfulufhedzisa.

Ndi U toda tshothe, Mukhethwa-Mukhethwa,
Nyite Wau tshothe, U Mutshidzi.
hymns.chorus:
nne nga zwifhinga zwothe, ndi toda Murena,
Ndi de ndi fhatutshedzwe, Ndi da kha’we

hymns.title: Ndi nekedza Zwothe Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi nekedza zwothe Yesu, ndi zwi nekedza Iwe,
Ndi tshi fulufhela Iwe, ndi do shuma na Iwe.

Ndi nekedza zwothe Yesu, phanda hau ndo khotha,
Zwa shangoni ndo zwi lata, ntanganedze Murena.

Ndi isa zwothe ha Yesu, nnyite-vho Mukhethwa nne,,
Mphe-vho Muya Mukhethwa, u vhe wanga vhukuma.

Ndi nekedza zwothe Yesu, ndi pfa mulalo Wau,
Ndi takalela u tshidzwa, ndi do renda Murena.
hymns.chorus:
Ndi a nekedza, ndi a nekedza,
Zwothe ndi do zwi sia ha Iwe Murena.

hymns.title: Ndi da Ndo di rali Khotsi
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, ipfi ndi nalo lithihi,
la u ri Iwe wo mpfela, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, a thi koni u di tanzwa,
Ndi tamba nga malofha au, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, u ntsikele luvalo.
Uri lu vhe lu ndindaho, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, ndo disa tshikha ya zwivhi,
Ndi muhedana muyani, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, ndi ri ntanzwe mbilu yanga,
Ndi tenda fulufhedziso, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

Ndi da ndo di rali khotsi, Mbofhe nga lufuno lwau,
Ndi itwe Wau Murena, ndi a da kha Iwe Nngwana.

hymns.title: Ri Renda Khotsi
hymns.lyrics:
Ri renda Khotsi nga Murwa wawe-vho,
Nga Yesu we a fela-vho na rine.

Ri renda Khotsi, nga Muya waWe,
We a ri vhonisa Mutshidzi washu.

Dzithendo dzothe, kha yone Ngwana-vho,
Ye ya hwala zwivhi zwothe zwa shango.

Ri fhembeledzwa nga lufuno lwawe,
Vhutshilo hashu vhu vusuluswe-vho.

Khuliso yothe na dzithendo dzothe,
Kha Uyo we a ri rengulula-vho.
hymns.chorus:
Haleluya, Haleluya, Haleluya, Amen.
Haleluya, Haleluya, Ri vusuluswe

hymns.title: di nee Tshifhinga Tsha U Vha Mukhethwa.
hymns.lyrics:
Di-nee tshifhinga tsha u do amba,
Dzula na Murena u ambe nae,
Ita vhukonani, thusa vhahota,
Phathutshedzo dzawe u si dzi hangwe.

Di-ite Mukhethwa na mushumoni,
di-nee tshifhinga tsha u rabela,
Nga u sedza Yesu U mu edzise,
Hu vhonale Ene fhedzi kha Iwe.

Di-ite Mukhethwa u Mu tevhele,
Hothe hu ne wa ya O ranga phanda,
Musi wa dakalo kana zwililo,
Khwathisa kha Yesu pfa ipfi lawe.

Di-ite Mukhethwa mbilu i rule,
U do u dededza nga zwa tadulu,
Na muya Mukhethwa wo ranga phanda,
U u lugisela kha zwa tadulu.

hymns.title: Dzula Na Nne
hymns.lyrics:
Dzula na nne hu da madekwana,
Li a swifhala ’da dzula na nne,
Musi vhanwe vha tshi furalela,
Iwe Mutshidzi ’da dzula na nne.

Vhu tavhanya u fhira vhutshilo,
U naka ha zwa shango hu ngafhi,
Zwithu zwothe zwi a thuthekana,
A sa shandukiho dzula na nne.

Ndi a u humbela u dzule na nne,
U siho milingo i do nkunda,
U songo da sa mufhiri kha nne,
Hone Murena u dzule na nne.

Hu todea U tshi dzula nne,
Mulingi u a kundwa nga Iwe,
Ndi nnyi ane a nga Iwe Yesu,
maduvha othe ’da dzula na nne.

A thi ofhi musi ndi na Iwe,

Mitodzi a i tshe na vhutungu,
Lufu na tshidza zwi nga nnyitani?
Ndi na gundo musi ndi na Iwe.

hymns.title: duvha li Kovhela Vhukovhela
hymns.lyrics:
duvha li a kovhela, zwino hu da swiswi,
Lindani nga thabelo, musi swiswi lo no tibedza shango.

Ndi Mune wa vhutshilo, a dzulaho tadulu,
’da U ri kuvhatedze, ri ye muvhusoni Wau u daho.

Swiswi zwino lo no da, ri humbela tshilidzi,
naledzi dzi fukedza tshifhatuwo Tshau, ro u tulutshelwa.

Musi ri sa tsha vhona, ho sala lone swiswi,
Murena wa vharunwa, tshedza Tshau tshi pandela swiswi lothe.
hymns.chorus:
U Mukhethwa-khethwa, O! Jehova!
Vha tadulu na fhasi, nga vha Mu rende Ene RaMaanda.

hymns.title: U duvha la Muya Wanga
hymns.lyrics:
U duvha la muya wanga, Ú tsini swiswi a liho.
Hu sa de swiswi la dzumba tshifhatuwo Tshau Yesu.

Musi ndi tshi vho edela, Mato anga a tshi bonya,
Ndi awela ndo takala, ndi na ’We Murena wanga.

Matsheloni, madekwana, dzula na nne U ndededze,
Musi vhusiku ho swika, Ú sin a nne thi nga tshili.

Ndi tshi vuwa mphathutshedze, ndi sathu thoma-vho lwendo,
Uri nga lufuno lwau, ndi ye henengei tadulu.

hymns.title: Vhushavhelo Nga Tshifhinga Tsha Madumbu.
hymns.lyrics:
Murena ndi tombo lashu, na vhushavhelo hashu-vho,
Bako na murunzi washu, ndi ’we vhushavhelo hashu.

Yesu ndi murunzi washu, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho,
A ri ofhi U na rine, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho.

Naho hu nga da mudalo, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho,
Ri di dzumba kha Mudzimu, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho.

Thikho I re tombo lashu, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho,
Dzula tshothe Iwe Yesu, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho.
hymns.chorus:
Murango u re na Maanda, Murunzi wa lino shango,
Murangaphanda wa ngoho, U vhushavhelo hashu-vho

hymns.title: O Nthanga Phanda
hymns.lyrics:
nthanga phanda Murena, U mphumudza matunguni,
Kha zwothe zwine nda ita, tshanda tshawe tshi kha nne.

Na musi hu tshi da swiswi, naho hu dzikhakhathini,
A thi ofhi a thi tshuwi, nga u’ Murena u na nne.

A thi nadzo mbilaelo, tshanga ndi u kondelela,
Kha zwothe ndi dakaloni, nga u’ Murena U na nne.

Musi ndo fhedza mushumo, ndi do vha o takalaho,
A thi tsha ofha na lufu, ndi do wela Yorodane.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu u do di nkokodza, nga Tshawe tshanda tshihulu,
Musi a tshi khou nkokodza na nne ndi do di tevhela.

hymns.title: Mulalo U Tshi Nga Mulambo.
hymns.lyrics:
Mulalo u nga mulambo muhulu, naho matungu e manzhi,
Iwe wo mpfunza wa ri: ’Zwo naka, Zwo naka na kha muya wanga’.

Musi Sathane a tshi da u nndinga, ha nga zwi koni u nngwana,
Ngauri Yesu O nthusa A fhaladza, na malofha Awe nga nne.

Arali ndi tshi humbula zwauri, zwothe zwivhi zwe nda ita;
O zwi ombela-vho tshifhambanoni, muya u livhuwa Murena.

duvha la vhufhelo nga li tavhanye, Makole a do petiwa;
A tshi da hu do lila phalaphala, zwo naka na kha muya wanga.
hymns.chorus: Zwo naka...Kha muya...wanga, zwo naka muya wanga

hymns.title: Vhukonani Vhu Ngafha
hymns.lyrics:
Hu na vhukonani kha Murena, ri imiswa zwandani zwawe,
Dziphathutshedzo dzone ndi khulu, ndo di-tika zwandani zwawe

Zwo naka ngoho u vha mudali, ndo di-tika zwandani zwawe,
Hu na tshedza tshi vhonetshelaho, mudali a vhone Murena.

Ndi nga ofhani? Ndi nga ofhani? Zwino ndi khou tsireledzwa,
Naho ndi nga fashwa nga milingo, ndi do dzula zwandani zwawe
hymns.chorus:
Fara...Khwatha, shavhela khae u tshile,
Fara...Khwatha, Ima khae Yesu u kunde

hymns.title: Lutendo Lwanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi sedza kha Iwe, Ngwana ya Khalivari, U mukhethwa,
’Pfa thabelo yanga, thutha zwivhi zwanga,
U bva namusi kha ndi vhe Wau

Kha ndi newe Maanda, na u kondelela, Nga RaMaanda,
Kha ndi u tende-ha, nga ho fhelelaho,
Ngauri Iwe wo no di mpfela.

Kha vhutungu hothe, ndo no swifhalelwa, U nkokodze,
Pandelai swiswi, mphulute mitodzi,
Uri ndi si pambuwe ndilani.

hymns.title: Tsini Na Mudzimu
hymns.lyrics:
Tsini na Mudzimu, tsini-tsini, na musi ndo hwala tshifhambano,
Luimbo lwanga lu do vha holuno-vho, Tsini na Mudzimu, tsini-tsini.

Na musi ndi tshi nga sa mueni, naho ndo siamela kha tombo,
Fhedzi ndoro dzanga ndi dzine dza do ri, ndi tsini Mudzimu, tsini-tsini.

Kha i penye ndila lwendoni lwanga, zwothe zwe nda fhiwa ndi tshilidzi,
Vharunwa tadulu vha do di mbona-vho, ndi tsini Mudzimu, tsini-tsini.

Zwi dinaho zwothe zwi tshi ndela, matunguni othe ndi na Iwe,
Huno kha mathupho ndi vho do ri nne, Ndi tsini Mudzimu, tsini-tsini.

Ndi tshi vho do fhufha nga dziphapha, nda fhira nwedzini na duvhani,
Luimbo lwanga-vho lu do vha ulu-vho, ndi tsini Mudzimu, tsini-tsini.

hymns.title: Khwathisani Kha Mudzimu
hymns.lyrics:
1.Khwathisani kha ipfi la Yesu, na vhukati ha mifhirifhiri,
Ndi lone fhedzi lire na Maanda, a u fhenya milingo.

Khwathisa u luga, nga zwivhuya, nga mbilu i sa ofhi na tshithu,
Ndi lone fhedzi li re na gundo, kha zwivhi zwothe fhano.

Khwathisani khayo ngoho yothe, ndi pfanelo yashu rothe fhano,
Ipfi fhedzi li re na mulalo, u swikela vhufhelo.
hymns.chorus:
Kha ri nambatele, ntha ha Murena, ntha ha Kristo fhedzi,
Kha ri kondelele, musi ro kunda, ri do dzula na Murena

hymns.title: Fulufhelo langa lo Fhatwa Khae
hymns.lyrics:
1.Fulufhelo langa li kha malofha awe avhudi,
Ndi nga si di-fulufhele, ndi tikwa nga dzina lawe.

Maswiswi e phanda hanga, ndi di-tika nga tshilidzi,
Na madumbu e ndilani, ndi nga si late lutendo.

Ndi mulanga wo khwathaho, kha vho mu fulufhelaho,
Naho ndi tshi shaya nungo, Yesu ndo mu fulufhela.

Hu tshi lila phalaphala, ndi do gonya nda ya khae,
Ndo ambadzwa ya vhukhethwa, nda sendela khulunoni.
hymns.chorus:
Yesu Kristo, thavha yanga, zwinwe zwothe zwi do fhela
Zwothe zwinwe zwi do fhela.

hymns.title: Fulufhela U di tukufhadze
hymns.lyrics:
Ri tshi pfa Murena, na ipfi lawe-vho,
U vhonetshela ndila yashu,
Ri tshimbila nae, U dzula na rine,
Na vha pfaho, Vha mu hulisa.

A ri nyadzi tshithu, Lufunoni lwawe,
Ro di-nekedza tshothe Yesu, Ro funwa nga Iwe,
A ri ofhi tshithu, Tshi bvelelaho ri na Iwe.

A huna vhuleme. Naho hu u ofha,
Ri wana malamba mahulu. A hu na tshinyalo,
Naho e mathupho, nga u pfa ri wana mashudu.

A ri soli tshithu, lufunoni lwawe,
Ri tshi vhea zwothe kha Ene, U sumba lufuno,
Na lone dakalo, Kha ri mu pfe ri mu hulise.

Musi ri tshi pfana, Ri do tuwa rothe,
Yesu u do ri dzhia rothe, Ri do dzula nae,
Ra tshimbila nae, Ra tshidzwa nga hu sa fheliho.
hymns.chorus:
Thetshelesa, U di-tukufhadze,
U fulufhele Yesu, U di-tukufhadze.

hymns.title: Mudzimu A Vhe Na Inwi
hymns.lyrics:
1.Mudzimu a vhe na’nwi nothe, a ni tshimbidze nga ndila,
A ni vhiele luhura, ri dovhe ri vhonane hafhu.

Mudzimu a vhe na’nwi nothe, ni vhe tshilidzini tshawe,
A ni fhe zwiliwa zwawe, ri dovhe ri vhonane hafhu.

Mudzimu a vhe na’nwi nothe, matunguni a milingo,
A tou ni kuvhatedza, ri dovhe ri tangane hafhu.

Mudzimu a vhe na’nwi ’nothe, A ni dadze nga lufuno,
Ni tsireledzwe kha lufu, Mudzimu a vhe na’’nwi nothe.
hymns.chorus:
Ri de ri tangane, phanda ha Yesu hafhu,
Ri de ri tangane, Mudzimu a vhe na ’nwi nothe.

hymns.title: Ri Tshi tangana Na Vhahashu
hymns.lyrics:
1.Ri tshi tangana na vhahashu, hu vha na dakalo,
Zwi ro pfisa vhutungu, musi ri tshi vho fhambana.

tadulu a hu fhambanwi, a vha onesani,
Ndi kha shango la dakalo, a hu nga fhambanwi.

Ri do takala ri tshi vhona, vhahashu henefho,
Fhedzi ri vho lilela, ilo shango la dakalo

Maipfi a no ’Salani.’ Ha tsha do ambiwa,
Hu do imbiwa nyimbo, dza vhakhethwa nga dakalo.

hymns.title: O Lala E Kha Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
O lala e kha Murena,
Afho hune ha sa lilwe;
Vhuawelo ha vhudisa,
A huna tshi thithisaho.

Ene o lala zwavhudi,
O awela o lindela;
O tenda a kha di tshila,
O fulufhela Mukhethwa.

lala kha Yesu tshete,
Zwino u vhuaweloni;
Mutshidzi a re na Maanda,
U do mu vusa nga vhuya.

U tshandani tsha Mudzimu,
U do vuswa nga Mutshidzi;
U do li sia livhIda,
Yesu a tshi do mu vusa.

hymns.title: Musi Mushumo Wanga Wo No Fhela.
hymns.lyrics:
Musi mushumo wanga wo fhela fhano fhasi,
Muvhili wo ambadzwa u sa sina,
Zwenezwo Mutshidzi wanga ndi do mu divhesa,
Ene a takala a tshi mmbona.

Ndi do takala ndi tshi vho vhona tshifhatuwo,
Na ito lawe li na vhuthu kha nne,
Na mbilu yanga i do livhuha nga lufuno,
Lwe lwa nndugiselela-vho vhudzulo.

rine ri vho do vhona vho faho kale-kale,
A ri tsha do dovha ra fhambana-vho,
A ri tsha do dovha ra fhambana ngei tadulu,
Ndi tama u vhona Murena wanga.

Na nne ndi do dzhena mudini nga nguvho tshena,
Ndi do vha afho hu sina zwililo,
Ndi do imba luimbo lwa vhothe vho tshidzwaho,
Musi ndi thsi vhona Mutshidzi wanga.
hymns.chorus:
Nda mu divha, nda mu divha, ndi do ima tsini-tsini hawe,
Nda mu divha, nda mu divha, nga dzintho zwandani zwawe.

hymns.title: Mphe Bivhili
hymns.lyrics:
Mphe Bivhili ya tshedza tsha-vhudi, uri ndi takadze na vhaeni,
A hu na gole li tsireledzaho, Kha Yesu a daho u ri tshidza.

Mphe Bivhili matunguni anga, na musi muya wanga wo neta.
Mphe maipfi a ambaho Yesu, Uri ndi vhone Mutshidzi wanga.

Mphe Bivhili i vhonetshelaho, uri ndi vhone khombo dzothe ndilani
Ndi denzhe li vhonetshela zwavhudi, uri ndi vhone ndi mu tevhele.

Mphe Bivhili ya tshedza tsha vhudi, tshi do vhonetshela livhIdani,
Tshedza tshayo tshi bvaho ngei tadulu, henengei seli ha Yorodane.
hymns.chorus:
Mphe Bivhili, Murunwa Mukhethwa,
Uri na nne i mbonetshele-vho.
Fulufhedziso na lufuno lwawe,
Zwi dzula zwothe nga hu sa fheli.

hymns.title: U Dovhe U Nyimbele ’vho
hymns.lyrics:
U dovhe u nyimbele-vho, maipfi a vhutshilo,
Vhudi hao ndi vhu vhone, maipfi a vhutshilo,
Ndi maipfi avhudi, a ’funza na nne.

Yesu vhanwe o vha nea, maipfi a vhutshilo.
Mutshinyi u a vhidzwa-vho, nga ipfi la vhutshilo,
U fhiwa nga fhedzi, li isa litadulu.

Vhudzani-ha vhathu vhothe, maipfi a vhutshilo,
One a disa mulalo, Yesu ndi Mutshidzi,
U kona U tanzwa na mbilu dzashu.
hymns.chorus:
Maipfi avhudi-vhudi, a a ri mangadza,
Maipfi avhudi-vhudi, a a ri mangadza.

hymns.title: Seli Na Yorodane
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi do ima Yorodane, Nda vhona zwa seli,
Ndi sedze shango la-vhudi, lone li re Kanana.

Ngei midavhini yavhudi, duvha lo tavha,
Yesu ndi tshedza tsha hone, swiswi li do tuswa-vho.

Ndi do swika lini hone, ndi fhatutshedzwe-vho,
Ndi do vhona lini khotsi, nda dzula vhurenani.

Mbilu yanga yo takala, a i tshe ho fhano,
Nangwe maswina e manzhi, ndi do kondelela-vho.
hymns.chorus:
Ra awela shangoni la-vhudi,
seli shangoni la-vhudi-sa,
Ri do imba nyimbo dza Mushe na
Ngwana, ra dzula na Yesu tshothe.

hymns.title: Vhufheloni Ri do Takala
hymns.lyrics:
Vhufheloni ri do takala, ro kuvhangana hayani,
Ri do ya na mitshelo yashu, mudini wa vhudi

Dzinyimbo dza hone dzo naka, Ri do imba nga dakalo,
Ra renda Murena washu mudini ula muswa.

Ho lindelwa u do pembela, vhudzulo hone ndi vhunzhi,
Ho itwaho nga Murena, mudini ula muswa.
hymns.chorus:
U takala, U takala, hu sa fheli, u takala,
Pembelani duvha li a da, la (u) khurela vhothe.

hymns.title: Muhumbulo Wavhudi.
hymns.lyrics:
Muhumbulo muswa ngavhe u tshi nndela,
Zwino ndo no vha tsini na u swika hayani.

Tsini khotsi-anga na haya ha vhudi,
Ndi tsini na khulunoni, henengei tadulu.

Tsini na u swika nda rulwa mihwalo,
Ndi tshi sia dzikhakhathi, ndi yo wana khare.

Vhukati ha swiswi, madumbu vhusiku,
Hu mbo taha mulambo u isaho tshedzani.

Khotsi, tika lutendo lwanga lu khwathe,
’Si nditshe ndi ndothe khunzikhunzini ya lufu.
hymns.chorus:
Ndo no vha tsini na haya,
Ndo no vha tsini-tsini zwino u fhira zwa kale.

hymns.title: Hu Na Shango La-vhudi
hymns.lyrics:
Hu na shango la-vhudi-vhudi,
Ri vho vhona na tshedza tshalo,
Khotsi-ashu u henengei,
O ri lugisela vhudzulo.

Ri do imbelela dzithendo,
Nyimbo dza Murena washu-vho
A hu nga do vha na matungu,
Khalo shango la u awela.

Nga mulandu wa hei mpho,
Na dziphathutshedzo dza hone,
Ri do imbelela dzithendo,
Ha khotsi-ashu wa tadulu.
hymns.chorus:
Henengei tadulu ....
Ri do kuvhangana henengei,
Henengei tadulu ....
Ri do kuvhangana henengei.

hymns.title: Ri Lovhedze Nga Huswa
hymns.lyrics:
Ri lovhedze-ha nga Maanda au,
Ri vuse nga lufuno, ri sendedze.

A ro ngo fanela, ri na tshika,
Khotsi, ri tanzwe-ha kha vhuvhi hothe.

Muya wau Yesu nga u de ngeno,
Ri a U humbela, ima tsini-ha.

Nthetshelese, ngeo tadulu,
nne ndi a U funa, ndo takala.

Ri renda khotsi, ri a U renda,
Ngwana yo thavhiwaho, Amen, Amen.
hymns.chorus:
Ri rabele khotsi ri a humbela,
Ri lovhedze nga muya, na lufuno.

hymns.title: Ida Iwe Tshisima
hymns.lyrics:
’da tshisima tsha vhutshilo, ndi a U renda Iwe,
Ndi lutsinga lwa tshilidzi, lwo fanelaho thendo,
Mmpfunze u U hulisa-vho, hu vhoneswe Mudzimu,
Mbilu yanga kha i dale, lufuno na dakalo.

nne ndi fulufhela Iwe, U tombo li tshidzaho,
Ndi fulufhela u tshidzwa, u swikela U tshi da,
Ndi Yesu we a ndzhenisa, ngomu sambini lawe,
Dzikhomboni nda di tshidzwa, nga malofha a Yesu

Ndi na mulandu muhulu, wa tshilidzi tsha Yesu,
Mphe-vho u luga hau, ndi vhuyele ha Iwe,
Ndi na zwivhi zwinzhi Yesu, ndi di lata kha Iwe,
U i dzhie mbilu yanga, i lavhelese Iwe.

hymns.title: Muya Mukhethwa Murangaphanda
hymns.lyrics:
Muya u re mukhethwa, ndi kale wo lindela,
Nga tshanda tshi todaho, rine vhadali fhano,
O netaho a rende, nga ipfi li re lawe,
line la ri, ’Mudali ndi do u isa haya’.

Iwe thama ya ngoho, haya ho no vha tsini,
U si ri sie fhano, vhukuma ri a ofha,
Hu tshi bvuma tadulu, nga Iwe ri do khuda,
Hevhedza kha nne u ri, ’Ndi do u isa haya’.

Khotsi yashu khulwane, ri sumbedze tadulu,
U rabela hashu-vho, hone madzina ashu,
A hone na tadulu, ipfi li a fhindula,
’Mudali Ida-ha, ndi do u isa hayani’.

hymns.title: Ndi Tama U Itelwa Tshithihi Nga Murena
hymns.chorus:
ntanzwe nga ngomu hanga, ntanzwe na nga mulilo;
Na nga ndila-de, A thi nga hani uri tshivhi tshi fe.

hymns.title: Wo Ya Naa Ha Yesu?
hymns.lyrics:
Wo ya naa ha Yesu wo tanzwiwa naa? Wo tamba nga malofha awe?
U a fulufhela tshilidzi tshawe, wo tamba nga malofha awe?

U a tshimbila na Mutshidzi Yesu, Wo tamba nga malofha awe?
U awela misi yothe ha Yesu, wo tamba nga malofha awe?

U a funa u tshenela Yesu naa? Wo tamba nga malofha awe?
Nndu dza hone wo dzi lindela naa, Wo tamba nga malofha awe?

Latai-ha nguvho dzi re na tshikha, u a tamba nga malofha awe?
Tshi hone tshisima tsho u lindela, Ida malofhani a Ngwana.
hymns.chorus:
Wo tamba... wo tamba... wo tamba... nga malofha awe?
Mbilu yau yo tshenela Yesu naa, wo tamba nga malofha awe?

hymns.title: Ndi A da Hayani
hymns.lyrics:
Ndo vha ndo xela ndi kule, zwino ndo vhuya,
Ndo neta nga zwivhi zwanga, Yesu ndi a da.

Ndo tshinya nga Maanda Yesu, ndi a di-nyadza.
Ndi a lila lwa vhutungu, Yesu ndi a da.

Ndo neta nga u pambuwa, ndo vhuya hafhu,
Ndo fulufhela lufuno, mphe tshilidzi.

Mbilu yanga yo lemelwa, ndo neta tshothe.
Ndi di-nekedza kha Yesu, ndo vhuya tshothe.

ntanzwe namusi Murena, Ndi da ha Yesu,
Ndi tshene vhunga Mahada, Yesu ndo vhuya.
hymns.chorus:
Ndi a da hayani; ndo no tou neta,
Ntanganedze nga lufuno, Yesu ndi a da.

hymns.title: Uyo A Pfaho
hymns.lyrics:
Uyo a pfaho kha vhidzelele, Ivangeli kha i ye lifhasini,
Hu re na vhathu nga hu vhidzelelwe, ’Uyo a pfa kha de.’

Uyo a pfaho kha di-sendedze, Munango wo vulwa u do di dzhena,
Ndi nne ndila, u ralo Murena, ’Uyo a pfa kha de.’

Ane a pfa kheli fulufhelo, la u tshidzwa hawe kha ili shango.
Vhutshilo khovhu u fhiwa nga khotsi, ’Uyo a pfa kha de.’
hymns.chorus:
Uyo a pfaho kha tavhanyedze,
A vhudze vhothe vha re fhano fhasi,
Mudzimu U a ni vhidza Idani,
’Uyo a pfaho kha de’.

hymns.title: Hu Rendwe Dzina la Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Hu rendwe dzina la Yesu, Vharunwa vha rende,
disani khare tshihosini, Ni mu vhumbe khosi!
disani khare tshihosini, Ni mu vhumbe khosi!

Inwi mbeu ya Israel, no rengululwaho,
Rendani a ni tshidzaho, ni mu vhumbe khosi!
Rendani a ni tshidzaho, ni mu vhumbe khosi!

Dzitshakha na ndimi dzothe, fhano lifhasini,
Nothe hulisani Ene, Ni mu vhumbe khotsi!
Nothe hulisani Ene, Ni mu vhumbe khotsi!

rine na vhakhethwa vhala, ri we phanda hawe,
Ri imbe Iwa misi yothe, Ri mu vhumbe khotsi!
Ri imbe Iwa misi yothe, Ri mu vhumbe khotsi!.

hymns.title: Yesu Mufuni Wanga
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu mufuni wanga, ndi da kha Iwe zwino,
Musi ndi kha vhuleme, milingo i tshi anda,
U nthule khotsi anga, nthule Mutshidzi wanga,
Musi ndi tshi balelwa, U ntanganedze Yesu.

A thi na vhushavhelo zwino, ndo lavhelesa khaIwe,
U si ntsie ndi ndothe, Ida zwino U ntshidze,
Iwe Mutshidzi wanga, u fulufhelo langa,
Fukedza thoho yanga, nga phapha dzau Yesu.

Ndi funa Iwe fhedzi, U fhira zwithu zwothe,
U vuse na vho waho, U fhodze vha lwalaho,
Iwe u re Mukhethwa, nne ndi muitazwivhi,
Ndi nengisa nga zwivhi, Iwe u wa zwivhuya.

U ndadze nga vhukhethwa, ndi tanzwiwe ndi nake,
Hu swike u tshidzwa, ndi tambe zwothe zwivhi,
Tshisima tsha vhutshilo, avha na nne misi yothe,
Tika mbilu yanga, mbilu yanga tshothe.

hymns.title: Yesu Iwe Dakalo
hymns.lyrics:
Yesu dakalo la mbilu,
Iwe tshisima na tshedza,
Ro furalela madzanga,
Ra vho shavhela kha Iwe.

Ngoho yau i sa shanduki,
U tshidza vha u vhidzaho,
Wo luga kha vharabeli,
U zwothe kha vha re vhau.

Yesu zwiliwa zwashu,
Ri do dzula ri tshi zwi la,
Ri nwa kha Iwe tshisima,
Ra fhedza dora nga Iwe.

Mbilu dzo u tulutshelwa,
Hothe hu ne ra tshimbila,
Ri di takadzwa nga Iwe,
Lutendo lwashu lwa khwatha.

Murena dzula na rine,
U ri fhe mulalo tshothe,
Pandela swiswi la tshivhi,
tavhisa tshedza shangoni.

hymns.title: Ndi divhe Zwinzhi Nga Yesu
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi divhe zwinzhi nga Yesu, ndi funze vhanwe nga Ene.
Ndi vhone u tshidza hawe, lufuno nge a mpfela.

Amba hafhu nga Murena, bula vhuhulwane hawe,
A mphe na muya wawe, u divhise Yesu wanga.

di-funze hafhu nga Yesu, sendela nga u rabela,
Thetshelesa ipfi lawe, u kone u vhudza vhanwe.

Amba nga Yesu Murena, nga tshidzulo tsha vhuhosi,
Vhulunga idzo ndaela, dza u vhuya ha vhakhethwa.
hymns.chorus:
Ndi divhe nga Yesu, ndi divhe nga Yesu,
Ndi vhone u tshidza hawe, lufuno nge a mpfela.

hymns.title: Ndi A U Funa Iwe Yesu Wanga
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi a U funa Iwe Yesu wanga,
Nga Iwe namusi ndi litsha zwivhi,
U Mutshidzi wanga mufeli wanga,
Zwino Yesu wanga ndi a U funa.

Ndi a U funa ngauri wo mpfuna,
Wa di-nekedza ngei tshifhammbanoni,
Ndi a U funa ngauri wo mpfela,
Zwino Yesu wanga ndi a U funa.

Kha hone vhutshilo na lwone lufu,
Ndi do u rendisa Mutshidzi wanga,
Naho ndo thovhoni yanga ya lufu,
Zwino Yesu wanga ndi a U funa.

Nduni dza vhuhosi ndi do takala,
Ngei tadulu ndi do di U renda,
Ndi do imba ndo hwala khare yanga,
Zwino Yesu wanga ndi a U funa..

hymns.title: Ndi do tanzwiwa Hani?
hymns.lyrics:
Ndi do tanzwiwa hani? Nga malofha awe fhedzi,
Ndi nga tshenisa hani? Ndi nga malofha a Yesu.

Ndi wane u tanzwiwa, malofhani a Murena,
Ndi kone u hangwelwa, nga malofha a Murena.

Ndi nga tshidzwa nga mini? Malofha a Yesu fhedzi,
Ndi ndothe a thi koni, Mukoni ndi Ene fhedzi.

Ndi fulufhela mini? Malofha a Yesu fhedzi,
Ndi do wana zwivhuya malofhani a Murena.
hymns.chorus:
Maanda ndi malofha, Ane a ntanzwa,
A huna tshinwe-vho, malofha a Yesu fhedzi.

hymns.title: Naa Wo Neta?
hymns.lyrics:
Naa wo neta mbilu i vhutungu Vhudzai Yesu, vhudzai Yesu,
Arali U tshi pfa u na thoni, vhudzai Ene Yesu.

Ndi ngani u tshi tolou lila, Vhudzai Yesu, vhudzai Yesu,
U na zwivhi zwi sa divhiwiho? Vhudzai Ene Yesu

Mbilu yau i na vhutungu naa? Vhudzai Yesu, vhudzai Yesu,
Mbilu yau i lilela mini? Vhudzai Ene Yesu.

U kho’ humbula nga ha lufu naa? Vhudzai Yesu, vhudzai Yesu,
U lilela muvhuso wawe naa? Vhudzai Ene Yesu.
hymns.chorus:
Vhudzai Yesu, vhudzai Yesu, Yesu khonani yau,
A hu tshe na na inwe khonani, vhudzai Ene Yesu.

hymns.title: Zwo Naka U Fulufhela
hymns.lyrics:
Zwo naka u fulufhela, u tenda ipfi lawe,
U divha fulufheldziso, Na zwe Yesu a amba.

Zwo naka u fulufhela, kha one malofha-vho,
divha ilo fulufhelo, zwi isa kha Mutshidzi.

Zwo naka u fulufhela, u tshi litsha-vho zwivhi,
Yesu we a nembelela, U ri nea malamba.

Ndi gude u fulufhela, Yesu Iwe Mutshidzi,
Ndi divha uri U na nne, u ya nga hu sa fheli
hymns.chorus:
Yesu, Yesu ndo mu funa, ndo mu sedzisa nne,
Yesu fulufhelo langa, mphe tshilidzi na nne.

hymns.title: duvha la Dakalo
hymns.lyrics:
Duvha lone, la u khetha,
Iwe Mudzimu Mukhethwa,
Ndi zwavhudi, mbilu yanga,
I tshi funa na mafhungo

Zwo no fhela, zwo no fhela,
Ndi wa Yesu, Ene wanga,
O mphulusa, nda tevhela,
Nga uho u tshidzwa hanga.

Mbilu yanga, I awele,
I humbule izwi zwithu,
I songo vhuya ya tuwa,
Murenani misi yothe
hymns.chorus:
Lo naka, duvha le, Yesu a ntanzwa zwivhini,
O mpfunza u rabela, na u tshila ndo takala,
Lo naka duvha le Yesu a ntanzwa zwivhini.

hymns.title: Kha Vha de Vha Murena
hymns.lyrics:
Kha vha de vha Yesu, ri hashe lufuno,
Ri imba nyimbo dzavhudi, Ri imba nyimbo dzavhudi,
Ri hulisa Yesu, ri hulisa Yesu

Vha sa mu divhiho, vha litshe u imba,
Fhedzi vhana vha Mudzimu, Fhedzi vhana vha Mudzimu,
Vha do imbelela, vha do imbelela.

Thavhani Tsioni, ri do takalesa,
Ndila ya u tadulu, Ndila ya u tadulu,
Ndi mususku, fhedzi, ndi musuku fhedzi.

Renda-ha nga nyimbo, Fhuluta mitodzi,
Thendo kha Immanuele, Thendo kha Immanuele,
U murangaphanda, Khosi ya tadulu.
hymns.chorus:
Kha ri ye Tsioni,
A si u naka Tsioni, Ri khou ya tadulu,
Mudi wavhudi wa Mudzimu.

hymns.title: Ndo Vhofhololwa Nga Malofha
hymns.lyrics:
Ndo vhofhololwa nga malofha, ndo vhofhololwa nga Yesu,
Ndo vhofhololwa nga tshilidzi, ndi khae nga hu sa fheli.

nne nga malofha ndo tanzwiwa, Hu na dakalo kha nne-vho,
Tshila tshedza tshawe tshi kha nne, Ngauri ndo wanwa ngae

Nda humbula Mutshidzi wanga, Nda mu elelwa nga misi,
Nda imbelela thi fhumuli, Nda renda lufuno lwawe.

Ndi do mu vhona kha vhuhosi, Khosi I ri takadzaho,
Lufuno lwawe lu a ndinda, Lu’nea tshedza swiswini

Khare yanga yo no ndindela, ngei haya ha tadulu,
Tsini na vhakhethwa vhawe-vho, Ndi do vha nae tadulu.
hymns.chorus:
Tshidzwa, Tshidzwa, tshidzwa nga Yesu Murena,
Tshidzwa... tshidzwa, Ndi wawe nga hu sa fheli.

hymns.title: Ri do Awela Madini A Vhutshilo
hymns.lyrics:
Ri do awela madini, a bvaho tshisimani,
Afho Yesu o lindela, ri do mu vhona hone.

Ro no neta nga u tshimbila, ri do di awela,
Hu na muungo wa madi, ri do tamba henefho.

Idani kha Ene Yesu, a no do ni fha Maanda,
Ndi Ene madi a vhutshilo, inwa u pfeledze.
hymns.chorus:
Ri do awela mulamboni, ri do mu vhona henefho,
Ri awela mulamboni, madini a vhutshilo.

hymns.title: U do Kuvhanganya Dzitshakha
hymns.lyrics:
U do kuvhanganya dzitshakha, Dzi do vhonala phanda hawe,
Ri do vha ri kha tshiimo-de, vhanwe vha tshi mu tanganedza.

Hu do vha hu tshi vhusa Mutshidzi, Ene Ngwana yo lugaho,
A ri nga do tetemela naa, Ra mu shavha ra ya thavhani?

Vhanwe u do vha kuvhatedza, Vha re na luswayo lwawe-vho,
U do vha ambadza u luga, Vha dzula marumbini awe.

Arali ri vha lindelaho, Ri na mbone dzi tshi di duga,
Musi muhwe a tshi do swika, Ri do kona u fhufha rothe.

Mbilu yanga lilala tadulu, ndi kone u kondelela,
Ri khalwo lwendo lwa u tuwa, Lwa u ya muvhusoni wawe.
hymns.chorus:
Rine henefho ri do ima ’fhi, nga duvha lihulu,
Musi vhathu vha tshi vho khethwa, Nga ilo duvha lihulu.

hymns.title: lo nwalwa Naa Dzina langa
hymns.lyrics:
Murena zwa shangoni, a si tshithu kha nne,
Ndi lilela u dzhena henengei tadulu,
Ndi vhe hone-vho buguni yau tadulu,
Mmbudze Yesu, dzina langa lo nwalwa naa?

Murena ndi na zwivhi zwinzhisa vhukuma,
Fhedzi malofha a Ngwana o fanela nne,
Na ilo fulufhedziso lo nwaliwaho,
’Ndi do ni tanzwa zwivhi zwa nga sa Mahada’.

Mudi ri yaho khawo nndu ndi dza vhudi,
Hu dzula vhakhethwa vha re na nguvho tshena,
A hu nga dzheni zwothe zwithu zwire na tshikha,
Vharunwa vha a linda, langa lo nwalwa naa?
hymns.chorus:
Lone lo nwalwa naa? lone dzina langa
Li nga vha lo nwalwa naa, lone lo dzina langa?

hymns.title: Khathulo Yo Thoma
hymns.lyrics:
Khathulo yo thoma ngei tadulu, Hu sedzisiswa nga Maanda,
Hu sengiswa zwivhi na zwivhuya, Murena U a vhona.

Khathulo i thoma kha vho faho, Ha tevhela vha no tshila,
Zwi tshi bva buguni ya khathulo, Ine a i shumisa.

Ri do ri mini, hu tshi sedzuluswa zwivhi zwashu zwi khagala,
Milandu yothe i hatulwa hu si na u do fhindula.
hymns.chorus:
Ri do ima ra ri mini, ri do ima ra ri mini?
Ri do mu todesa vhukuma, muimeleli washu-vho.

hymns.title: Ro Vhidzwa Nga Murena
hymns.lyrics:
Ro vhidzwa nga Murena washu, O ri vhidzela zwiliwani,
li do vha lihulu dakalo, U dzhena hawe.

Khare ya mipfa a i tsheho, Hu na ya vhuhosi thohoni,
Zwihulu ri do zwi vhona-ha, U dzhena hawe.

Zwothe khathihi a tshi penya, Zwi do dzumbululwa sa duvha,
Zwi do dihwa na nga vhahura, U dzhena hawe.

Mato awe a do vha vhona, Vho ambaraho dza mutshato,
Zwo naka ri tshi nga dzhena-vho, U dzhena hawe.

U fhandekana a hu tsheeho, Vho latwaho vha do tambula,
li do vha hani ilo duvha? U dzhena hawe.

Ri fhe dziphatutshedzo dzau, Ri thuse nga tshilidzi tshau,
Uri ri si vhe na dzinyofho, U dzhena hawe.
hymns.chorus:
Murena a tshi dzhena, musi a tshi da,
Ri do vha ngafhi-ha rothe, A tshi do vhuya.

hymns.title: Ri A Zwala Mbeu
hymns.lyrics:
Ri a zwala mbeu, mbeu yo lugaho,
Matsheloni, masiari na madekwana,
Ro rindela-vho tshifhinga tsha u kana,
Ri do takala ro hwala mikano.

Ri a zwala mbeu maduvhani othe,
A ri nga ofhi khuli ya vhusiku,
Ro swika mafheleloni a mushumo,
Ri do takala ro hwala mikano.

Ri zwalela Murena nga mitodzi,
Huno rine a ri ofhi vhuleme,
